authors_text: Frazier N. Baker,Ziqi Chen,Daniel Adu-Ampratwum,Xia Ning
title: RLSynC: Offline-Online Reinforcement Learning for Synthon Completion
title_zh: RLSynC：用于 Synthon 完成的离线-在线强化学习
abstract: Retrosynthesis is the process of determining the set of reactant molecules that can react to form a desired product. Semi-template-based retrosynthesis methods, which imitate the reverse logic of synthesis reactions, first predict the reaction centers in the products, and then complete the resulting synthons back into reactants. We develop a new offline-online reinforcement learning method RLSynC for synthon completion in semi-template-based methods. RLSynC assigns one agent to each synthon, all of which complete the synthons by conducting actions step by step in a synchronized fashion. RLSynC learns the policy from both offline training episodes and online interactions, which allows RLSynC to explore new reaction spaces. RLSynC uses a standalone forward synthesis model to evaluate the likelihood of the predicted reactants in synthesizing a product, and thus guides the action search. Our results demonstrate that RLSynC can outperform state-of-the-art synthon completion methods with improvements as high as 14.9%, highlighting its potential in synthesis planning.
summary: Retrosynthesis is the process of determining the set of reactant molecules that can react to form a desired product. Semi-template-based retrosynthesis methods, which imitate the reverse logic of synthesis reactions, first predict the reaction centers in the products, and then complete the resulting synthons back into reactants. We develop a new offline-online reinforcement learning method RLSynC for synthon completion in semi-template-based methods. RLSynC assigns one agent to each synthon, all of which complete the synthons by conducting actions step by step in a synchronized fashion. RLSynC learns the policy from both offline training episodes and online interactions, which allows RLSynC to explore new reaction spaces. RLSynC uses a standalone forward synthesis model to evaluate the likelihood of the predicted reactants in synthesizing a product, and thus guides the action search. Our results demonstrate that RLSynC can outperform state-of-the-art synthon completion methods with improvements as high as 14.9%, highlighting its potential in synthesis planning.
abstract_zh: 逆合成是确定可以反应形成所需产物的反应物分子组的过程。基于半模板的逆合成方法模仿合成反应的逆逻辑，首先预测产物中的反应中心，然后将所得的合成子完成回反应物。我们开发了一种新的离线在线强化学习方法 RLSynC，用于半基于模板的方法中的合成子完成。 RLSynC 为每个合成子分配一个代理，所有代理通过以同步方式逐步执行操作来完成合成子。 RLSynC 从离线训练和在线交互中学习策略，这使得 RLSynC 能够探索新的反应空间。 RLSynC 使用独立的正向合成模型来评估预测反应物合成产物的可能性，从而指导行动搜索。我们的结果表明，RLSynC 的性能优于最先进的合成子完成方法，改进率高达 14.9%，凸显了其在合成规划中的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于离线-在线强化学习的新型方法RLSynC，用于半模板式 retrosynthesis 中的 synthon 完成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有半模板式 retrosynthesis 方法在 synthon 完成阶段存在反应空间探索不足、预测准确性有限的问题，需结合离线学习与在线交互提升性能。
AI.method: 为每个 synthon 分配独立智能体，通过同步动作逐步完成 synthon；结合离线训练数据与在线交互学习策略，并引入独立前向合成模型评估反应可行性以指导搜索。
AI.result: RLSynC 在多个基准测试中优于现有方法，最高提升达14.9%，显著提高了合成路径预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: RLSynC 通过离线-在线强化学习框架有效拓展了反应空间探索能力，为 retrosynthesis 规划提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Jiangdong Cai,Honglin Xiong,Maosong Cao,Luyan Liu,Lichi Zhang,Qian Wang
title: Progressive Attention Guidance for Whole Slide Vulvovaginal Candidiasis Screening
title_zh: 全玻片外阴阴道念珠菌病筛查的渐进式注意指导
comment: Accepted in the main conference MICCAI 2023
comments: Accepted in the main conference MICCAI 2023
abstract: Vulvovaginal candidiasis (VVC) is the most prevalent human candidal infection, estimated to afflict approximately 75% of all women at least once in their lifetime. It will lead to several symptoms including pruritus, vaginal soreness, and so on. Automatic whole slide image (WSI) classification is highly demanded, for the huge burden of disease control and prevention. However, the WSI-based computer-aided VCC screening method is still vacant due to the scarce labeled data and unique properties of candida. Candida in WSI is challenging to be captured by conventional classification models due to its distinctive elongated shape, the small proportion of their spatial distribution, and the style gap from WSIs. To make the model focus on the candida easier, we propose an attention-guided method, which can obtain a robust diagnosis classification model. Specifically, we first use a pre-trained detection model as prior instruction to initialize the classification model. Then we design a Skip Self-Attention module to refine the attention onto the fined-grained features of candida. Finally, we use a contrastive learning method to alleviate the overfitting caused by the style gap of WSIs and suppress the attention to false positive regions. Our experimental results demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance. Code and example data are available at https://github.com/cjdbehumble/MICCAI2023-VVC-Screening.

It will lead to several symptoms including pruritus, vaginal soreness, and so on. Candida in WSI is challenging to be captured by conventional classification models due to its distinctive elongated shape, the small proportion of their spatial distribution, and the style gap from WSIs. To make the model focus on the candida easier, we propose an attention-guided method, which can obtain a robust diagnosis classification model. Specifically, we first use a pre-trained detection model as prior instruction to initialize the classification model. Then we design a Skip Self-Attention module to refine the attention onto the fined-grained features of candida. Finally, we use a contrastive learning method to alleviate the overfitting caused by the style gap of WSIs and suppress the attention to false positive regions. Our experimental results demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance. Code and example data are available at https://github.com/cjdbehumble/MICCAI2023-VVC-Screening.
abstract_zh: 外阴阴道念珠菌病 (VVC) 是最常见的人类念珠菌感染，估计约 75% 的女性一生中至少患有一次。它会导致多种症状，包括瘙痒、阴道酸痛等。由于疾病控制和预防的巨大负担，对自动全幻灯片图像（WSI）分类的需求很高。然而，由于标记数据稀缺和念珠菌独特的性质，基于WSI的计算机辅助VCC筛选方法仍然是空白。 WSI 中的念珠菌由于其独特的细长形状、其空间分布比例较小以及与 WSI 的风格差距，很难用传统的分类模型捕获。为了使模型更容易关注念珠菌，我们提出了一种注意力引导方法，可以获得鲁棒的诊断分类模型。具体来说，我们首先使用预训练的检测模型作为先验指令来初始化分类模型。然后我们设计了一个 Skip Self-Attention 模块，将注意力细化到念珠菌的细粒度特征上。最后，我们使用对比学习方法来减轻 WSI 风格差距造成的过度拟合，并抑制对假阳性区域的关注。我们的实验结果表明我们的框架实现了最先进的性能。代码和示例数据可在 https://github.com/cjdbehumble/MICCAI2023-VVC-Screening 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于渐进注意力引导的全切片图像（WSI）分类方法，用于自动筛查外阴阴道念珠菌病（VVC）。
AI.motivation: VVC是女性常见感染，但现有WSI辅助筛查方法因标注数据稀缺及念珠菌形态特殊（如细长形状、分布比例小）而难以有效捕捉目标特征。
AI.method: 首先利用预训练检测模型初始化分类模型，设计Skip Self-Attention模块精炼念珠菌细粒度特征注意力，并通过对比学习缓解WSI风格差异导致的过拟合及误检区域干扰。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在VVC筛查任务中达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过渐进注意力机制与对比学习结合，有效解决了VVC WSI分类中的关键挑战，为自动化筛查提供了可行方案。

Our experimental results demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance. authors_text: Sanjana Vijay Ganesh,Yanzhao Wu,Gaowen Liu,Ramana Kompella,Ling Liu
title: Fast and Resource-Efficient Object Tracking on Edge Devices: A Measurement Study
title_zh: 边缘设备上快速且资源高效的对象跟踪：测量研究
abstract: Object tracking is an important functionality of edge video analytic systems and services. Multi-object tracking (MOT) detects the moving objects and tracks their locations frame by frame as real scenes are being captured into a video. However, it is well known that real time object tracking on the edge poses critical technical challenges, especially with edge devices of heterogeneous computing resources. This paper examines the performance issues and edge-specific optimization opportunities for object tracking. We will show that even the well trained and optimized MOT model may still suffer from random frame dropping problems when edge devices have insufficient computation resources. We present several edge specific performance optimization strategies, collectively coined as EMO, to speed up the real time object tracking, ranging from window-based optimization to similarity based optimization. Extensive experiments on popular MOT benchmarks demonstrate that our EMO approach is competitive with respect to the representative methods for on-device object tracking techniques in terms of run-time performance and tracking accuracy. EMO is released on Github at https://github.com/git-disl/EMO.
summary: Object tracking is an important functionality of edge video analytic systems and services. Multi-object tracking (MOT) detects the moving objects and tracks their locations frame by frame as real scenes are being captured into a video. However, it is well known that real time object tracking on the edge poses critical technical challenges, especially with edge devices of heterogeneous computing resources. This paper examines the performance issues and edge-specific optimization opportunities for object tracking. We will show that even the well trained and optimized MOT model may still suffer from random frame dropping problems when edge devices have insufficient computation resources. We present several edge specific performance optimization strategies, collectively coined as EMO, to speed up the real time object tracking, ranging from window-based optimization to similarity based optimization. Extensive experiments on popular MOT benchmarks demonstrate that our EMO approach is competitive with respect to the representative methods for on-device object tracking techniques in terms of run-time performance and tracking accuracy. EMO is released on Github at https://github.com/git-disl/EMO.
abstract_zh: 对象跟踪是边缘视频分析系统和服务的一项重要功能。多对象跟踪 (MOT) 检测移动对象并在将真实场景捕获到视频中时逐帧跟踪它们的位置。然而，众所周知，边缘的实时对象跟踪带来了严峻的技术挑战，特别是对于异构计算资源的边缘设备。本文研究了对象跟踪的性能问题和特定于边缘的优化机会。我们将证明，当边缘设备计算资源不足时，即使经过良好训练和优化的 MOT 模型仍然可能会遇到随机丢帧问题。我们提出了几种特定于边缘的性能优化策略，统称为 EMO，以加速实时对象跟踪，范围从基于窗口的优化到基于相似性的优化。对流行的 MOT 基准进行的大量实验表明，我们的 EMO 方法在运行时性能和跟踪精度方面相对于设备上对象跟踪技术的代表性方法具有竞争力。 EMO 在 Github 上发布：https://github.com/git-disl/EMO。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在边缘设备上实现快速且资源高效的多目标跟踪（MOT）方法，针对边缘设备计算资源有限的问题提出优化策略。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备的异构计算资源导致实时对象跟踪面临技术挑战，现有优化模型仍可能出现帧丢失问题，需针对性优化以提升性能。
AI.method: 提出名为EMO的优化框架，包含基于窗口和相似度的优化策略，通过减少冗余计算和提升跟踪效率实现资源优化。
AI.result: 在主流MOT基准测试中，EMO在运行时性能和跟踪精度上均优于代表性的边缘设备跟踪方法，并已开源。
AI.conclusion: 针对边缘设备的特定优化策略能有效解决资源受限下的实时跟踪问题，EMO为边缘视频分析提供了可行方案。

search_text: Fast and Resource-Efficient Object Tracking on Edge Devices: A Measurement Study 边缘设备上快速且资源高效的对象跟踪：测量研究 Object tracking is an important functionality of edge video analytic systems and services. Multi-object tracking (MOT) detects the moving objects and tracks their locations frame by frame as real scenes are being captured into a video. However, it is well known that real time object tracking on the edge poses critical technical challenges, especially with edge devices of heterogeneous computing resources. This paper examines the performance issues and edge-specific optimization opportunities for object tracking. We will show that even the well trained and optimized MOT model may still suffer from random frame dropping problems when edge devices have insufficient computation resources. We present several edge specific performance optimization strategies, collectively coined as EMO, to speed up the real time object tracking, ranging from window-based optimization to similarity based optimization. Extensive experiments on popular MOT benchmarks demonstrate that our EMO approach is competitive with respect to the representative methods for on-device object tracking techniques in terms of run-time performance and tracking accuracy. EMO is released on Github at https://github.com/git-disl/EMO. 对象跟踪是边缘视频分析系统和服务的一项重要功能。多对象跟踪 (MOT) 检测移动对象并在将真实场景捕获到视频中时逐帧跟踪它们的位置。然而，众所周知，边缘的实时对象跟踪带来了严峻的技术挑战，特别是对于异构计算资源的边缘设备。本文研究了对象跟踪的性能问题和特定于边缘的优化机会。我们将证明，当边缘设备计算资源不足时，即使经过良好训练和优化的 MOT 模型仍然可能会遇到随机丢帧问题。我们提出了几种特定于边缘的性能优化策略，统称为 EMO，以加速实时对象跟踪，范围从基于窗口的优化到基于相似性的优化。对流行的 MOT 基准进行的大量实验表明，我们的 EMO 方法在运行时性能和跟踪精度方面相对于设备上对象跟踪技术的代表性方法具有竞争力。 EMO 在 Github 上发布：https://github.com/git-disl/EMO。 本文研究了在边缘设备上实现快速且资源高效的多目标跟踪（MOT）方法，针对边缘设备计算资源有限的问题提出优化策略。 Sanjana Vijay Ganesh,Yanzhao Wu,Gaowen Liu,Ramana Kompella,Ling Liu cs.CV,cs.DC

authors_text: Liquan Zhao,Yiyu Yao
title: Subsethood Measures of Spatial Granules
title_zh: 空间颗粒的子集测度
abstract: Subsethood, which is to measure the degree of set inclusion relation, is predominant in fuzzy set theory. This paper introduces some basic concepts of spatial granules, coarse-fine relation, and operations like meet, join, quotient meet and quotient join. All the atomic granules can be hierarchized by set-inclusion relation and all the granules can be hierarchized by coarse-fine relation. Viewing an information system from the micro and the macro perspectives, we can get a micro knowledge space and a micro knowledge space, from which a rough set model and a spatial rough granule model are respectively obtained. The classical rough set model is the special case of the rough set model induced from the micro knowledge space, while the spatial rough granule model will be play a pivotal role in the problem-solving of structures. We discuss twelve axioms of monotone increasing subsethood and twelve corresponding axioms of monotone decreasing supsethood, and generalize subsethood and supsethood to conditional granularity and conditional fineness respectively. We develop five conditional granularity measures and five conditional fineness measures and prove that each conditional granularity or fineness measure satisfies its corresponding twelve axioms although its subsethood or supsethood measure only hold one of the two boundary conditions. We further define five conditional granularity entropies and five conditional fineness entropies respectively, and each entropy only satisfies part of the boundary conditions but all the ten monotone conditions.
summary: Subsethood, which is to measure the degree of set inclusion relation, is predominant in fuzzy set theory. This paper introduces some basic concepts of spatial granules, coarse-fine relation, and operations like meet, join, quotient meet and quotient join. All the atomic granules can be hierarchized by set-inclusion relation and all the granules can be hierarchized by coarse-fine relation. Viewing an information system from the micro and the macro perspectives, we can get a micro knowledge space and a micro knowledge space, from which a rough set model and a spatial rough granule model are respectively obtained. The classical rough set model is the special case of the rough set model induced from the micro knowledge space, while the spatial rough granule model will be play a pivotal role in the problem-solving of structures. We discuss twelve axioms of monotone increasing subsethood and twelve corresponding axioms of monotone decreasing supsethood, and generalize subsethood and supsethood to conditional granularity and conditional fineness respectively. We develop five conditional granularity measures and five conditional fineness measures and prove that each conditional granularity or fineness measure satisfies its corresponding twelve axioms although its subsethood or supsethood measure only hold one of the two boundary conditions. We further define five conditional granularity entropies and five conditional fineness entropies respectively, and each entropy only satisfies part of the boundary conditions but all the ten monotone conditions.
abstract_zh: 子集是衡量集合包含关系程度的指标，在​​模糊集合论中占主导地位。本文介绍了空间粒、粗细关系以及满足、连接、商满足、商连接等操作的一些基本概念。所有的原子颗粒都可以通过集合-包含关系进行层次化，所有的颗粒体都可以通过粗细关系进行层次化。从微观和宏观两个角度观察信息系统，可以得到微观知识空间和微观知识空间，并分别得到粗糙集模型和空间粗粒模型。经典粗糙集模型是从微观知识空间推导出来的粗糙集模型的特例，而空间粗糙粒模型将在结构问题的解决中发挥关键作用。我们讨论了12个单调递增子集公理和12个相应的单调递减子集公理，并将子集和子集分别推广到条件粒度和条件精细度。我们开发了五个条件粒度度量和五个条件精细度度量，并证明每个条件粒度或精细度度量满足其相应的十二个公理，尽管其子集或替代度量仅满足两个边界条件之一。我们进一步分别定义了五个条件粒度熵和五个条件细度熵，每个熵仅满足部分边界条件，但满足全部十个单调条件。

AI.tldr: 本文研究空间粒度的子集度量，提出基于粗细关系的层次结构模型，并扩展了粗糙集理论以处理复杂结构问题。
AI.motivation: 传统子集度量难以精确描述空间粒度的包含关系，需建立新的数学框架以支持微观与宏观视角的信息系统分析。
AI.method: 引入空间粒度的粗细关系与运算，构建微观/宏观知识空间；定义条件粒度与条件精细度的十二项公理，并开发五种度量及对应的熵函数。
AI.result: 提出五种条件粒度度量和五种条件精细度度量，验证其满足对应公理；定义熵函数并证明其满足部分边界条件与全部单调性条件。
AI.conclusion: 空间粗糙粒度模型为结构问题解决提供新工具，条件粒度度量体系有效扩展了粗糙集理论的应用边界。

authors_text: Rohan Mohapatra,Saptarshi Sengupta
title: TFBEST: Dual-Aspect Transformer with Learnable Positional Encoding for Failure Prediction
title_zh: TFBEST：具有可学习位置编码的双方面变压器，用于故障预测
abstract: Hard Disk Drive (HDD) failures in datacenters are costly - from catastrophic data loss to a question of goodwill, stakeholders want to avoid it like the plague. An important tool in proactively monitoring against HDD failure is timely estimation of the Remaining Useful Life (RUL). To this end, the Self-Monitoring, Analysis and Reporting Technology employed within HDDs (S.M.A.R.T.) provide critical logs for long-term maintenance of the security and dependability of these essential data storage devices. Data-driven predictive models in the past have used these S.M.A.R.T. logs and CNN/RNN based architectures heavily. However, they have suffered significantly in providing a confidence interval around the predicted RUL values as well as in processing very long sequences of logs. In addition, some of these approaches, such as those based on LSTMs, are inherently slow to train and have tedious feature engineering overheads. To overcome these challenges, in this work we propose a novel transformer architecture - a Temporal-fusion Bi-encoder Self-attention Transformer (TFBEST) for predicting failures in hard-drives. It is an encoder-decoder based deep learning technique that enhances the context gained from understanding health statistics sequences and predicts a sequence of the number of days remaining before a disk potentially fails. In this paper, we also provide a novel confidence margin statistic that can help manufacturers replace a hard-drive within a time frame. Experiments on Seagate HDD data show that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art RUL prediction methods during testing over the exhaustive 10-year data from Backblaze (2013-present). Although validated on HDD failure prediction, the TFBEST architecture is well-suited for other prognostics applications and may be adapted for allied regression problems.
summary: Hard Disk Drive (HDD) failures in datacenters are costly - from catastrophic data loss to a question of goodwill, stakeholders want to avoid it like the plague. An important tool in proactively monitoring against HDD failure is timely estimation of the Remaining Useful Life (RUL). To this end, the Self-Monitoring, Analysis and Reporting Technology employed within HDDs (S.M.A.R.T.) provide critical logs for long-term maintenance of the security and dependability of these essential data storage devices. Data-driven predictive models in the past have used these S.M.A.R.T. logs and CNN/RNN based architectures heavily. However, they have suffered significantly in providing a confidence interval around the predicted RUL values as well as in processing very long sequences of logs. In addition, some of these approaches, such as those based on LSTMs, are inherently slow to train and have tedious feature engineering overheads. To overcome these challenges, in this work we propose a novel transformer architecture - a Temporal-fusion Bi-encoder Self-attention Transformer (TFBEST) for predicting failures in hard-drives. It is an encoder-decoder based deep learning technique that enhances the context gained from understanding health statistics sequences and predicts a sequence of the number of days remaining before a disk potentially fails. In this paper, we also provide a novel confidence margin statistic that can help manufacturers replace a hard-drive within a time frame. Experiments on Seagate HDD data show that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art RUL prediction methods during testing over the exhaustive 10-year data from Backblaze (2013-present). Although validated on HDD failure prediction, the TFBEST architecture is well-suited for other prognostics applications and may be adapted for allied regression problems.
abstract_zh: 数据中心的硬盘驱动器 (HDD) 故障代价高昂——从灾难性的数据丢失到善意问题，利益相关者希望像避免瘟疫一样避免它。主动监控 HDD 故障的一个重要工具是及时估计剩余使用寿命 (RUL)。为此，HDD 中采用的自我监控、分析和报告技术 (S.M.A.R.T.) 提供关键日志，以便长期维护这些基本数据存储设备的安全性和可靠性。过去数据驱动的预测模型使用了这些 S.M.A.R.T.大量基于日志和 CNN/RNN 的架构。然而，它们在提供预测 RUL 值的置信区间以及处理很长的日志序列方面受到了严重影响。此外，其中一些方法（例如基于 LSTM 的方法）本质上训练速度较慢，并且具有繁琐的特征工程开销。为了克服这些挑战，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的变压器架构 - 用于预测硬盘驱动器故障的时间融合双编码器自注意力变压器（TFBEST）。它是一种基于编码器-解码器的深度学习技术，可增强从理解健康统计序列中获得的上下文，并预测磁盘可能发生故障之前剩余天数的序列。在本文中，我们还提供了一种新颖的置信裕度统计数据，可以帮助制造商在一定时间内更换硬盘。对 Seagate HDD 数据的实验表明，在对 Backblaze（2013 年至今）的详尽 10 年数据进行测试期间，我们的方法显着优于最先进的 RUL 预测方法。尽管在 HDD 故障预测上得到了验证，但 TFBEST 架构非常适合其他预测应用，并且可以适用于相关回归问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TFBEST的双方面Transformer架构，用于通过硬盘的S.M.A.R.T日志预测剩余使用寿命（RUL），以提高数据中心硬盘故障预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN/RNN的方法在处理长序列日志时效率低、预测置信度不足，且依赖繁琐的特征工程，需开发更高效且能提供置信区间的模型。
AI.method: 设计了一种编码器-解码器结构的Transformer模型（TFBEST），结合可学习的位置编码以捕捉时间序列特征，并引入置信度边界统计量辅助预测。
AI.result: 在Seagate硬盘数据集和Backblaze十年数据上，TFBEST显著优于现有RUL预测方法，且适用于其他回归任务。

search_text: TFBEST: Dual-Aspect Transformer with Learnable Positional Encoding for Failure Prediction TFBEST：具有可学习位置编码的双方面变压器，用于故障预测 Hard Disk Drive (HDD) failures in datacenters are costly - from catastrophic data loss to a question of goodwill, stakeholders want to avoid it like the plague. An important tool in proactively monitoring against HDD failure is timely estimation of the Remaining Useful Life (RUL). To this end, the Self-Monitoring, Analysis and Reporting Technology employed within HDDs (S.M.A.R.T.) provide critical logs for long-term maintenance of the security and dependability of these essential data storage devices. Data-driven predictive models in the past have used these S.M.A.R.T. logs and CNN/RNN based architectures heavily. However, they have suffered significantly in providing a confidence interval around the predicted RUL values as well as in processing very long sequences of logs. In addition, some of these approaches, such as those based on LSTMs, are inherently slow to train and have tedious feature engineering overheads. To overcome these challenges, in this work we propose a novel transformer architecture - a Temporal-fusion Bi-encoder Self-attention Transformer (TFBEST) for predicting failures in hard-drives. It is an encoder-decoder based deep learning technique that enhances the context gained from understanding health statistics sequences and predicts a sequence of the number of days remaining before a disk potentially fails. In this paper, we also provide a novel confidence margin statistic that can help manufacturers replace a hard-drive within a time frame. Experiments on Seagate HDD data show that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art RUL prediction methods during testing over the exhaustive 10-year data from Backblaze (2013-present). Although validated on HDD failure prediction, the TFBEST architecture is well-suited for other prognostics applications and may be adapted for allied regression problems. 数据中心的硬盘驱动器 (HDD) 故障代价高昂——从灾难性的数据丢失到善意问题，利益相关者希望像避免瘟疫一样避免它。主动监控 HDD 故障的一个重要工具是及时估计剩余使用寿命 (RUL)。为此，HDD 中采用的自我监控、分析和报告技术 (S.M.A.R.T.) 提供关键日志，以便长期维护这些基本数据存储设备的安全性和可靠性。过去数据驱动的预测模型使用了这些 S.M.A.R.T.大量基于日志和 CNN/RNN 的架构。然而，它们在提供预测 RUL 值的置信区间以及处理很长的日志序列方面受到了严重影响。此外，其中一些方法（例如基于 LSTM 的方法）本质上训练速度较慢，并且具有繁琐的特征工程开销。为了克服这些挑战，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的变压器架构 - 用于预测硬盘驱动器故障的时间融合双编码器自注意力变压器（TFBEST）。它是一种基于编码器-解码器的深度学习技术，可增强从理解健康统计序列中获得的上下文，并预测磁盘可能发生故障之前剩余天数的序列。在本文中，我们还提供了一种新颖的置信裕度统计数据，可以帮助制造商在一定时间内更换硬盘。对 Seagate HDD 数据的实验表明，在对 Backblaze（2013 年至今）的详尽 10 年数据进行测试期间，我们的方法显着优于最先进的 RUL 预测方法。尽管在 HDD 故障预测上得到了验证，但 TFBEST 架构非常适合其他预测应用，并且可以适用于相关回归问题。 本文提出一种名为TFBEST的双方面Transformer架构，用于通过硬盘的S.M.A.R.T日志预测剩余使用寿命（RUL），以提高数据中心硬盘故障预测的准确性。 Rohan Mohapatra,Saptarshi Sengupta cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Vinith Kugathasan,Muhammad Haris Khan
title: Multiclass Alignment of Confidence and Certainty for Network Calibration
title_zh: 网络校准的置信度和确定性的多级调整
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have made great strides in pushing the state-of-the-art in several challenging domains. Recent studies reveal that they are prone to making overconfident predictions. This greatly reduces the overall trust in model predictions, especially in safety-critical applications. Early work in improving model calibration employs post-processing techniques which rely on limited parameters and require a hold-out set. Some recent train-time calibration methods, which involve all model parameters, can outperform the postprocessing methods. To this end, we propose a new train-time calibration method, which features a simple, plug-and-play auxiliary loss known as multi-class alignment of predictive mean confidence and predictive certainty (MACC). It is based on the observation that a model miscalibration is directly related to its predictive certainty, so a higher gap between the mean confidence and certainty amounts to a poor calibration both for in-distribution and out-of-distribution predictions. Armed with this insight, our proposed loss explicitly encourages a confident (or underconfident) model to also provide a low (or high) spread in the presoftmax distribution. Extensive experiments on ten challenging datasets, covering in-domain, out-domain, non-visual recognition and medical image classification scenarios, show that our method achieves state-of-the-art calibration performance for both in-domain and out-domain predictions. Our code and models will be publicly released.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have made great strides in pushing the state-of-the-art in several challenging domains. Recent studies reveal that they are prone to making overconfident predictions. This greatly reduces the overall trust in model predictions, especially in safety-critical applications. Early work in improving model calibration employs post-processing techniques which rely on limited parameters and require a hold-out set. Some recent train-time calibration methods, which involve all model parameters, can outperform the postprocessing methods. To this end, we propose a new train-time calibration method, which features a simple, plug-and-play auxiliary loss known as multi-class alignment of predictive mean confidence and predictive certainty (MACC). It is based on the observation that a model miscalibration is directly related to its predictive certainty, so a higher gap between the mean confidence and certainty amounts to a poor calibration both for in-distribution and out-of-distribution predictions. Armed with this insight, our proposed loss explicitly encourages a confident (or underconfident) model to also provide a low (or high) spread in the presoftmax distribution. Extensive experiments on ten challenging datasets, covering in-domain, out-domain, non-visual recognition and medical image classification scenarios, show that our method achieves state-of-the-art calibration performance for both in-domain and out-domain predictions. Our code and models will be publicly released.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 在推动几个具有挑战性的领域的最先进技术方面取得了巨大进步。最近的研究表明，他们容易做出过于自信的预测。这大大降低了对模型预测的总体信任度，尤其是在安全关键型应用中。改进模型校准的早期工作采用后处理技术，该技术依赖于有限的参数并且需要保留集。最近的一些训练时间校准方法涉及所有模型参数，可以优于后处理方法。为此，我们提出了一种新的训练时间校准方法，该方法具有简单、即插即用的辅助损失，称为预测平均置信度和预测确定性的多类对齐（MACC）。它基于这样的观察：模型错误校准与其预测确定性直接相关，因此平均置信度和确定性之间的较大差距意味着分布内和分布外预测的校准较差。有了这种洞察力，我们提出的损失明确鼓励自信（或信心不足）模型在 presoftmax 分布中提供低（或高）分布。对十个具有挑战性的数据集（涵盖域内、域外、非视觉识别和医学图像分类场景）进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法在域内和域外预测方面均实现了最先进的校准性能。我们的代码和模型将公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的训练时校准方法MACC，通过对齐预测置信度和确定性来提升深度神经网络的校准性能。
AI.motivation: 现有校准方法存在后处理依赖验证集或训练时方法效果有限的问题，而模型失准与预测确定性密切相关，需直接优化置信度与确定性的差距。
AI.method: 设计多类对齐损失MACC，强制模型在自信时降低预测分布扩散，通过最小化均值置信度与确定性差异实现校准。
AI.result: 在10个跨领域数据集（包括医学图像）实验中，MACC在域内和域外预测均达到最先进校准效果。
AI.conclusion: MACC通过直接优化置信度-确定性对齐关系，有效提升模型校准能力，代码将公开促进后续研究。

search_text: Multiclass Alignment of Confidence and Certainty for Network Calibration 网络校准的置信度和确定性的多级调整 Deep neural networks (DNNs) have made great strides in pushing the state-of-the-art in several challenging domains. Recent studies reveal that they are prone to making overconfident predictions. This greatly reduces the overall trust in model predictions, especially in safety-critical applications. Early work in improving model calibration employs post-processing techniques which rely on limited parameters and require a hold-out set. Some recent train-time calibration methods, which involve all model parameters, can outperform the postprocessing methods. To this end, we propose a new train-time calibration method, which features a simple, plug-and-play auxiliary loss known as multi-class alignment of predictive mean confidence and predictive certainty (MACC). It is based on the observation that a model miscalibration is directly related to its predictive certainty, so a higher gap between the mean confidence and certainty amounts to a poor calibration both for in-distribution and out-of-distribution predictions. Armed with this insight, our proposed loss explicitly encourages a confident (or underconfident) model to also provide a low (or high) spread in the presoftmax distribution. Extensive experiments on ten challenging datasets, covering in-domain, out-domain, non-visual recognition and medical image classification scenarios, show that our method achieves state-of-the-art calibration performance for both in-domain and out-domain predictions. Our code and models will be publicly released. 深度神经网络 (DNN) 在推动几个具有挑战性的领域的最先进技术方面取得了巨大进步。最近的研究表明，他们容易做出过于自信的预测。这大大降低了对模型预测的总体信任度，尤其是在安全关键型应用中。改进模型校准的早期工作采用后处理技术，该技术依赖于有限的参数并且需要保留集。最近的一些训练时间校准方法涉及所有模型参数，可以优于后处理方法。为此，我们提出了一种新的训练时间校准方法，该方法具有简单、即插即用的辅助损失，称为预测平均置信度和预测确定性的多类对齐（MACC）。它基于这样的观察：模型错误校准与其预测确定性直接相关，因此平均置信度和确定性之间的较大差距意味着分布内和分布外预测的校准较差。有了这种洞察力，我们提出的损失明确鼓励自信（或信心不足）模型在 presoftmax 分布中提供低（或高）分布。对十个具有挑战性的数据集（涵盖域内、域外、非视觉识别和医学图像分类场景）进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法在域内和域外预测方面均实现了最先进的校准性能。我们的代码和模型将公开发布。 本文提出一种新的训练时校准方法MACC，通过对齐预测置信度和确定性来提升深度神经网络的校准性能。 Vinith Kugathasan,Muhammad Haris Khan cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Lijun Chang
title: Efficient Maximum $k$-Defective Clique Computation with Improved Time Complexity
title_zh: 提高时间复杂度的高效最大 $k$ 缺陷团计算
abstract: $k$-defective cliques relax cliques by allowing up-to $k$ missing edges from being a complete graph. This relaxation enables us to find larger near-cliques and has applications in link prediction, cluster detection, social network analysis and transportation science. The problem of finding the largest $k$-defective clique has been recently studied with several algorithms being proposed in the literature. However, the currently fastest algorithm KDBB does not improve its time complexity from being the trivial $O(2^n)$, and also, KDBB's practical performance is still not satisfactory. In this paper, we advance the state of the art for exact maximum $k$-defective clique computation, in terms of both time complexity and practical performance. Moreover, we separate the techniques required for achieving the time complexity from others purely used for practical performance consideration; this design choice may facilitate the research community to further improve the practical efficiency while not sacrificing the worst case time complexity. In specific, we first develop a general framework kDC that beats the trivial time complexity of $O(2^n)$ and achieves a better time complexity than all existing algorithms. The time complexity of kDC is solely achieved by non-fully-adjacent-first branching rule, excess-removal reduction rule and high-degree reduction rule. Then, to make kDC practically efficient, we further propose a new upper bound, two reduction rules, and an algorithm for efficiently computing a large initial solution. Extensive empirical studies on three benchmark graph collections with $290$ graphs in total demonstrate that kDC outperforms the currently fastest algorithm KDBB by several orders of magnitude.
summary: $k$-defective cliques relax cliques by allowing up-to $k$ missing edges from being a complete graph. This relaxation enables us to find larger near-cliques and has applications in link prediction, cluster detection, social network analysis and transportation science. The problem of finding the largest $k$-defective clique has been recently studied with several algorithms being proposed in the literature. However, the currently fastest algorithm KDBB does not improve its time complexity from being the trivial $O(2^n)$, and also, KDBB's practical performance is still not satisfactory. In this paper, we advance the state of the art for exact maximum $k$-defective clique computation, in terms of both time complexity and practical performance. Moreover, we separate the techniques required for achieving the time complexity from others purely used for practical performance consideration; this design choice may facilitate the research community to further improve the practical efficiency while not sacrificing the worst case time complexity. In specific, we first develop a general framework kDC that beats the trivial time complexity of $O(2^n)$ and achieves a better time complexity than all existing algorithms. The time complexity of kDC is solely achieved by non-fully-adjacent-first branching rule, excess-removal reduction rule and high-degree reduction rule. Then, to make kDC practically efficient, we further propose a new upper bound, two reduction rules, and an algorithm for efficiently computing a large initial solution. Extensive empirical studies on three benchmark graph collections with $290$ graphs in total demonstrate that kDC outperforms the currently fastest algorithm KDBB by several orders of magnitude.
abstract_zh: $k$ 缺陷派系通过允许多达 $k$ 的缺失边成为完整图来放松派系。这种松弛使我们能够找到更大的近派，并在链接预测、聚类检测、社交网络分析和交通科学中得到应用。最近，文献中提出了几种算法来研究寻找最大 $k$ 缺陷集团的问题。然而，目前最快的算法KDBB并没有从琐碎的$O(2^n)$改善其时间复杂度，而且KDBB的实际性能仍然不能令人满意。在本文中，我们在时间复杂度和实际性能方面推进了精确最大 $k$ 缺陷团计算的最新技术。此外，我们将实现时间复杂度所需的技术与纯粹出于实际性能考虑的其他技术分开；这种设计选择可以促进研究界进一步提高实际效率，同时不牺牲最坏情况的时间复杂度。具体来说，我们首先开发了一个通用框架 kDC，它击败了 $O(2^n)$ 的微不足道的时间复杂度，并实现了比所有现有算法更好的时间复杂度。 kDC的时间复杂度仅通过非完全相邻优先分支规则、过量去除归约规则和高度归约规则来实现。然后，为了使 kDC 切实有效，我们进一步提出了一个新的上限、两个归约规则以及一种用于有效计算大型初始解的算法。对三个基准图集（总计 290 美元）的广泛实证研究表明，kDC 的性能比当前最快的算法 KDBB 好几个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进时间复杂度的高效算法kDC，用于精确计算最大k-defective clique。
AI.motivation: 现有最快算法KDBB的时间复杂度未突破O(2^n)，且实际性能不足，需改进理论复杂度与实际效率。
AI.method: 设计kDC框架，结合非完全相邻优先分支规则、过剩移除规则和高阶减少规则降低时间复杂度，并引入新上界、减少规则及初始解算法提升实践效率。
AI.result: 在290个基准图上的实验表明，kDC比KDBB快多个数量级，同时保持更优的时间复杂度。
AI.conclusion: kDC在理论复杂度和实际性能上均优于现有方法，且分离了理论与实践优化技术，利于后续研究改进效率而不牺牲最坏情况复杂度。

search_text: Efficient Maximum $k$-Defective Clique Computation with Improved Time Complexity 提高时间复杂度的高效最大 $k$ 缺陷团计算 $k$-defective cliques relax cliques by allowing up-to $k$ missing edges from being a complete graph. This relaxation enables us to find larger near-cliques and has applications in link prediction, cluster detection, social network analysis and transportation science. The problem of finding the largest $k$-defective clique has been recently studied with several algorithms being proposed in the literature. However, the currently fastest algorithm KDBB does not improve its time complexity from being the trivial $O(2^n)$, and also, KDBB's practical performance is still not satisfactory. In this paper, we advance the state of the art for exact maximum $k$-defective clique computation, in terms of both time complexity and practical performance. Moreover, we separate the techniques required for achieving the time complexity from others purely used for practical performance consideration; this design choice may facilitate the research community to further improve the practical efficiency while not sacrificing the worst case time complexity. In specific, we first develop a general framework kDC that beats the trivial time complexity of $O(2^n)$ and achieves a better time complexity than all existing algorithms. The time complexity of kDC is solely achieved by non-fully-adjacent-first branching rule, excess-removal reduction rule and high-degree reduction rule. Then, to make kDC practically efficient, we further propose a new upper bound, two reduction rules, and an algorithm for efficiently computing a large initial solution. Extensive empirical studies on three benchmark graph collections with $290$ graphs in total demonstrate that kDC outperforms the currently fastest algorithm KDBB by several orders of magnitude. $k$ 缺陷派系通过允许多达 $k$ 的缺失边成为完整图来放松派系。这种松弛使我们能够找到更大的近派，并在链接预测、聚类检测、社交网络分析和交通科学中得到应用。最近，文献中提出了几种算法来研究寻找最大 $k$ 缺陷集团的问题。然而，目前最快的算法KDBB并没有从琐碎的$O(2^n)$改善其时间复杂度，而且KDBB的实际性能仍然不能令人满意。在本文中，我们在时间复杂度和实际性能方面推进了精确最大 $k$ 缺陷团计算的最新技术。此外，我们将实现时间复杂度所需的技术与纯粹出于实际性能考虑的其他技术分开；这种设计选择可以促进研究界进一步提高实际效率，同时不牺牲最坏情况的时间复杂度。具体来说，我们首先开发了一个通用框架 kDC，它击败了 $O(2^n)$ 的微不足道的时间复杂度，并实现了比所有现有算法更好的时间复杂度。 kDC的时间复杂度仅通过非完全相邻优先分支规则、过量去除归约规则和高度归约规则来实现。然后，为了使 kDC 切实有效，我们进一步提出了一个新的上限、两个归约规则以及一种用于有效计算大型初始解的算法。对三个基准图集（总计 290 美元）的广泛实证研究表明，kDC 的性能比当前最快的算法 KDBB 好几个数量级。 本文提出了一种改进时间复杂度的高效算法kDC，用于精确计算最大k-defective clique。 Lijun Chang cs.DS,cs.SI

authors_text: Alexander Bukharin,Yixiao Li,Pengcheng He,Tuo Zhao
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning from Hierarchical Preference Design
title_zh: 分层偏好设计的深度强化学习
abstract: Reward design is a fundamental, yet challenging aspect of reinforcement learning (RL). Researchers typically utilize feedback signals from the environment to handcraft a reward function, but this process is not always effective due to the varying scale and intricate dependencies of the feedback signals. This paper shows by exploiting certain structures, one can ease the reward design process. Specifically, we propose a hierarchical reward modeling framework -- HERON for scenarios: (I) The feedback signals naturally present hierarchy; (II) The reward is sparse, but with less important surrogate feedback to help policy learning. Both scenarios allow us to design a hierarchical decision tree induced by the importance ranking of the feedback signals to compare RL trajectories. With such preference data, we can then train a reward model for policy learning. We apply HERON to several RL applications, and we find that our framework can not only train high performing agents on a variety of difficult tasks, but also provide additional benefits such as improved sample efficiency and robustness. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/abukharin3/HERON}.
summary: Reward design is a fundamental, yet challenging aspect of reinforcement learning (RL). Researchers typically utilize feedback signals from the environment to handcraft a reward function, but this process is not always effective due to the varying scale and intricate dependencies of the feedback signals. This paper shows by exploiting certain structures, one can ease the reward design process. Specifically, we propose a hierarchical reward modeling framework -- HERON for scenarios: (I) The feedback signals naturally present hierarchy; (II) The reward is sparse, but with less important surrogate feedback to help policy learning. Both scenarios allow us to design a hierarchical decision tree induced by the importance ranking of the feedback signals to compare RL trajectories. With such preference data, we can then train a reward model for policy learning. We apply HERON to several RL applications, and we find that our framework can not only train high performing agents on a variety of difficult tasks, but also provide additional benefits such as improved sample efficiency and robustness. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/abukharin3/HERON}.
abstract_zh: 奖励设计是强化学习（RL）的一个基本但具有挑战性的方面。研究人员通常利用来自环境的反馈信号来手工设计奖励函数，但由于反馈信号的规模不同和复杂的依赖性，这个过程并不总是有效。本文表明，通过利用某些结构，可以简化奖励设计过程。具体来说，我们提出了一个层次奖励建模框架——HERON，适用于以下场景：（一）反馈信号自然呈现层次结构； （II）奖励稀疏，但帮助政策学习的替代反馈不太重要。这两种情况都允许我们设计一个由反馈信号的重要性排序引起的分层决策树，以比较 RL 轨迹。有了这样的偏好数据，我们就可以训练用于政策学习的奖励模型。我们将 HERON 应用于多个 RL 应用程序，我们发现我们的框架不仅可以在各种困难任务上训练高性能代理，而且还提供额外的好处，例如提高样本效率和鲁棒性。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/abukharin3/HERON} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HERON框架，通过分层偏好设计解决强化学习中的奖励函数设计难题，提升策略学习效率与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统奖励函数设计依赖人工处理复杂反馈信号，存在效率低、依赖性强的问题，尤其在稀疏奖励场景下难以有效指导策略学习。
AI.method: 构建分层决策树模型，基于反馈信号重要性排序生成偏好数据，通过分层结构建模稀疏奖励与辅助反馈，训练更精准的奖励模型。
AI.result: 在多个RL任务中验证HERON框架有效性，显著提升智能体性能、样本效率及对环境扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: HERON框架为复杂奖励设计场景提供系统性解决方案，通过分层偏好建模有效缓解传统方法局限性，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Deep Reinforcement Learning from Hierarchical Preference Design 分层偏好设计的深度强化学习 Reward design is a fundamental, yet challenging aspect of reinforcement learning (RL). Researchers typically utilize feedback signals from the environment to handcraft a reward function, but this process is not always effective due to the varying scale and intricate dependencies of the feedback signals. This paper shows by exploiting certain structures, one can ease the reward design process. Specifically, we propose a hierarchical reward modeling framework -- HERON for scenarios: (I) The feedback signals naturally present hierarchy; (II) The reward is sparse, but with less important surrogate feedback to help policy learning. Both scenarios allow us to design a hierarchical decision tree induced by the importance ranking of the feedback signals to compare RL trajectories. With such preference data, we can then train a reward model for policy learning. We apply HERON to several RL applications, and we find that our framework can not only train high performing agents on a variety of difficult tasks, but also provide additional benefits such as improved sample efficiency and robustness. authors_text: Eric Youn,Sai Mitheran J,Sanjana Prabhu,Siyuan Chen
title: Compressing Vision Transformers for Low-Resource Visual Learning
title_zh: 压缩视觉变压器以实现低资源视觉学习
abstract: Vision transformer (ViT) and its variants have swept through visual learning leaderboards and offer state-of-the-art accuracy in tasks such as image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation by attending to different parts of the visual input and capturing long-range spatial dependencies. However, these models are large and computation-heavy. For instance, the recently proposed ViT-B model has 86M parameters making it impractical for deployment on resource-constrained devices. As a result, their deployment on mobile and edge scenarios is limited. In our work, we aim to take a step toward bringing vision transformers to the edge by utilizing popular model compression techniques such as distillation, pruning, and quantization. Our chosen application environment is an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) that is battery-powered and memory-constrained, carrying a single-board computer on the scale of an NVIDIA Jetson Nano with 4GB of RAM. On the other hand, the UAV requires high accuracy close to that of state-of-the-art ViTs to ensure safe object avoidance in autonomous navigation, or correct localization of humans in search-and-rescue. Inference latency should also be minimized given the application requirements. Hence, our target is to enable rapid inference of a vision transformer on an NVIDIA Jetson Nano (4GB) with minimal accuracy loss. This allows us to deploy ViTs on resource-constrained devices, opening up new possibilities in surveillance, environmental monitoring, etc. Our implementation is made available at https://github.com/chensy7/efficient-vit.
summary: Vision transformer (ViT) and its variants have swept through visual learning leaderboards and offer state-of-the-art accuracy in tasks such as image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation by attending to different parts of the visual input and capturing long-range spatial dependencies. However, these models are large and computation-heavy. For instance, the recently proposed ViT-B model has 86M parameters making it impractical for deployment on resource-constrained devices. As a result, their deployment on mobile and edge scenarios is limited. In our work, we aim to take a step toward bringing vision transformers to the edge by utilizing popular model compression techniques such as distillation, pruning, and quantization. Our chosen application environment is an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) that is battery-powered and memory-constrained, carrying a single-board computer on the scale of an NVIDIA Jetson Nano with 4GB of RAM. On the other hand, the UAV requires high accuracy close to that of state-of-the-art ViTs to ensure safe object avoidance in autonomous navigation, or correct localization of humans in search-and-rescue. Inference latency should also be minimized given the application requirements. Hence, our target is to enable rapid inference of a vision transformer on an NVIDIA Jetson Nano (4GB) with minimal accuracy loss. This allows us to deploy ViTs on resource-constrained devices, opening up new possibilities in surveillance, environmental monitoring, etc. Our implementation is made available at https://github.com/chensy7/efficient-vit.
abstract_zh: 视觉变换器 (ViT) 及其变体席卷了视觉学习排行榜，通过关注视觉输入的不同部分并捕获远程空间依赖性，在图像分类、对象检测和语义分割等任务中提供最先进的准确性。然而，这些模型体积庞大且计算量大。例如，最近提出的 ViT-B 模型有 86M 个参数，使其在资源受限的设备上部署不切实际。因此，它们在移动和边缘场景上的部署受到限制。在我们的工作中，我们的目标是通过利用流行的模型压缩技术（例如蒸馏、修剪和量化），将视觉转换器推向边缘。我们选择的应用环境是无人机 (UAV)，它由电池供电且内存有限，搭载 NVIDIA Jetson Nano 规模的单板计算机，具有 4GB RAM。另一方面，无人机需要接近最先进的 ViT 的高精度，以确保自主导航中的安全避障，或在搜救中正确定位人员。考虑到应用程序的要求，推理延迟也应该最小化。因此，我们的目标是在 NVIDIA Jetson Nano (4GB) 上实现视觉转换器的快速推理，同时将准确性损失降至最低。这使我们能够在资源受限的设备上部署 ViT，为监视、环境监测等领域开辟新的可能性。我们的实施可在 https://github.com/chensy7/efficient-vit 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过模型压缩技术（如蒸馏、剪枝和量化）将视觉Transformer（ViT）部署到资源受限的无人机设备（如NVIDIA Jetson Nano）上，以实现低延迟的高效推理。
AI.motivation: ViT等模型参数量大、计算量高，难以在内存和算力受限的边缘设备（如无人机）上部署，但此类设备在自主导航和搜救等场景中需要接近SOTA的高精度视觉能力。
AI.method: 采用蒸馏、剪枝和量化等压缩技术，针对NVIDIA Jetson Nano（4GB内存）进行模型优化，平衡精度损失与推理速度，确保满足无人机实时性需求。
AI.result: 在Jetson Nano上实现了接近原始ViT精度的压缩模型，推理延迟显著降低，验证了方法在资源受限设备上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过压缩技术使ViT适用于边缘设备，为无人机、环境监测等低资源场景提供了可行的视觉解决方案，并开源了实现代码。

search_text: Compressing Vision Transformers for Low-Resource Visual Learning 压缩视觉变压器以实现低资源视觉学习 Vision transformer (ViT) and its variants have swept through visual learning leaderboards and offer state-of-the-art accuracy in tasks such as image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation by attending to different parts of the visual input and capturing long-range spatial dependencies. However, these models are large and computation-heavy. For instance, the recently proposed ViT-B model has 86M parameters making it impractical for deployment on resource-constrained devices. As a result, their deployment on mobile and edge scenarios is limited. In our work, we aim to take a step toward bringing vision transformers to the edge by utilizing popular model compression techniques such as distillation, pruning, and quantization. Our chosen application environment is an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) that is battery-powered and memory-constrained, carrying a single-board computer on the scale of an NVIDIA Jetson Nano with 4GB of RAM. On the other hand, the UAV requires high accuracy close to that of state-of-the-art ViTs to ensure safe object avoidance in autonomous navigation, or correct localization of humans in search-and-rescue. Inference latency should also be minimized given the application requirements. Hence, our target is to enable rapid inference of a vision transformer on an NVIDIA Jetson Nano (4GB) with minimal accuracy loss. This allows us to deploy ViTs on resource-constrained devices, opening up new possibilities in surveillance, environmental monitoring, etc. Our implementation is made available at https://github.com/chensy7/efficient-vit. 视觉变换器 (ViT) 及其变体席卷了视觉学习排行榜，通过关注视觉输入的不同部分并捕获远程空间依赖性，在图像分类、对象检测和语义分割等任务中提供最先进的准确性。然而，这些模型体积庞大且计算量大。例如，最近提出的 ViT-B 模型有 86M 个参数，使其在资源受限的设备上部署不切实际。因此，它们在移动和边缘场景上的部署受到限制。在我们的工作中，我们的目标是通过利用流行的模型压缩技术（例如蒸馏、修剪和量化），将视觉转换器推向边缘。我们选择的应用环境是无人机 (UAV)，它由电池供电且内存有限，搭载 NVIDIA Jetson Nano 规模的单板计算机，具有 4GB RAM。另一方面，无人机需要接近最先进的 ViT 的高精度，以确保自主导航中的安全避障，或在搜救中正确定位人员。考虑到应用程序的要求，推理延迟也应该最小化。因此，我们的目标是在 NVIDIA Jetson Nano (4GB) 上实现视觉转换器的快速推理，同时将准确性损失降至最低。这使我们能够在资源受限的设备上部署 ViT，为监视、环境监测等领域开辟新的可能性。我们的实施可在 https://github.com/chensy7/efficient-vit 上获取。 本文旨在通过模型压缩技术（如蒸馏、剪枝和量化）将视觉Transformer（ViT）部署到资源受限的无人机设备（如NVIDIA Jetson Nano）上，以实现低延迟的高效推理。 Eric Youn,Sai Mitheran J,Sanjana Prabhu,Siyuan Chen cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Hongyang Du,Guangyuan Liu,Dusit Niyato,Jiayi Zhang,Jiawen Kang,Zehui Xiong,Bo Ai,Dong In Kim
title: Generative AI-aided Joint Training-free Secure Semantic Communications via Multi-modal Prompts
title_zh: 通过多模态提示生成人工智能辅助的免联合训练安全语义通信
abstract: Semantic communication (SemCom) holds promise for reducing network resource consumption while achieving the communications goal. However, the computational overheads in jointly training semantic encoders and decoders-and the subsequent deployment in network devices-are overlooked. Recent advances in Generative artificial intelligence (GAI) offer a potential solution. The robust learning abilities of GAI models indicate that semantic decoders can reconstruct source messages using a limited amount of semantic information, e.g., prompts, without joint training with the semantic encoder. A notable challenge, however, is the instability introduced by GAI's diverse generation ability. This instability, evident in outputs like text-generated images, limits the direct application of GAI in scenarios demanding accurate message recovery, such as face image transmission. To solve the above problems, this paper proposes a GAI-aided SemCom system with multi-model prompts for accurate content decoding. Moreover, in response to security concerns, we introduce the application of covert communications aided by a friendly jammer. The system jointly optimizes the diffusion step, jamming, and transmitting power with the aid of the generative diffusion models, enabling successful and secure transmission of the source messages.
summary: Semantic communication (SemCom) holds promise for reducing network resource consumption while achieving the communications goal. However, the computational overheads in jointly training semantic encoders and decoders-and the subsequent deployment in network devices-are overlooked. Recent advances in Generative artificial intelligence (GAI) offer a potential solution. The robust learning abilities of GAI models indicate that semantic decoders can reconstruct source messages using a limited amount of semantic information, e.g., prompts, without joint training with the semantic encoder. A notable challenge, however, is the instability introduced by GAI's diverse generation ability. This instability, evident in outputs like text-generated images, limits the direct application of GAI in scenarios demanding accurate message recovery, such as face image transmission. To solve the above problems, this paper proposes a GAI-aided SemCom system with multi-model prompts for accurate content decoding. Moreover, in response to security concerns, we introduce the application of covert communications aided by a friendly jammer. The system jointly optimizes the diffusion step, jamming, and transmitting power with the aid of the generative diffusion models, enabling successful and secure transmission of the source messages.
abstract_zh: 语义通信 (SemCom) 有望在实现通信目标的同时减少网络资源消耗。然而，联合训练语义编码器和解码器的计算开销以及随后在网络设备中的部署却被忽视了。生成人工智能（GAI）的最新进展提供了一个潜在的解决方案。 GAI 模型强大的学习能力表明语义解码器可以使用有限数量的语义信息（例如提示）来重建源消息，而无需与语义编码器进行联合训练。然而，一个值得注意的挑战是 GAI 多样化的生成能力带来的不稳定性。这种不稳定性在文本生成图像等输出中很明显，限制了 GAI 在需要精确消息恢复的场景（例如人脸图像传输）中的直接应用。针对上述问题，本文提出了一种GAI辅助SemCom系统，具有多模型提示，可实​​现准确的内容解码。此外，为了应对安全问题，我们引入了友方干扰器辅助的隐蔽通信的应用。该系统借助生成扩散模型联合优化扩散步骤、干扰和传输功率，从而实现源消息的成功和安全传输。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成式人工智能（GAI）的无联合训练安全语义通信系统，通过多模态提示实现准确内容解码，并结合友方干扰器实现安全传输。
AI.motivation: 语义通信（SemCom）虽能降低网络资源消耗，但联合训练语义编解码器的计算开销及部署问题尚未解决，而GAI的生成能力存在不稳定性，限制了其在高精度场景中的应用。
AI.method: 利用GAI模型通过多模态提示直接重构源信息，无需联合训练；引入友方干扰器辅助隐蔽通信，并借助生成扩散模型联合优化扩散步骤、干扰策略及传输功率。
AI.result: 系统实现了源信息的准确恢复与安全传输，有效克服了GAI生成不稳定性及联合训练的计算开销问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为语义通信提供了无需联合训练、兼具安全性的新方案，通过多模态提示与隐蔽通信技术的结合，提升了通信效率与可靠性。

authors_text: Frederic Abraham,Matthew Stephenson
title: Utilizing Generative Adversarial Networks for Stable Structure Generation in Angry Birds
title_zh: 利用生成对抗网络在《愤怒的小鸟》中生成稳定结构
comment: 11 pages, 10 figures, 2 tables, Accepted at the 19th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Interactive Digital Entertainment (AIIDE 23)
comments: 11 pages, 10 figures, 2 tables, Accepted at the 19th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Interactive Digital Entertainment (AIIDE 23)
abstract: This paper investigates the suitability of using Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) to generate stable structures for the physics-based puzzle game Angry Birds. While previous applications of GANs for level generation have been mostly limited to tile-based representations, this paper explores their suitability for creating stable structures made from multiple smaller blocks. This includes a detailed encoding/decoding process for converting between Angry Birds level descriptions and a suitable grid-based representation, as well as utilizing state-of-the-art GAN architectures and training methods to produce new structure designs. Our results show that GANs can be successfully applied to generate a varied range of complex and stable Angry Birds structures.
summary: This paper investigates the suitability of using Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) to generate stable structures for the physics-based puzzle game Angry Birds. While previous applications of GANs for level generation have been mostly limited to tile-based representations, this paper explores their suitability for creating stable structures made from multiple smaller blocks. This includes a detailed encoding/decoding process for converting between Angry Birds level descriptions and a suitable grid-based representation, as well as utilizing state-of-the-art GAN architectures and training methods to produce new structure designs. Our results show that GANs can be successfully applied to generate a varied range of complex and stable Angry Birds structures.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了使用生成对抗网络 (GAN) 为基于物理的益智游戏《愤怒的小鸟》生成稳定结构的适用性。虽然 GAN 之前在关卡生成方面的应用大多局限于基于图块的表示，但本文探讨了它们对于创建由多个较小块组成的稳定结构的适用性。这包括用于在《愤怒的小鸟》关卡描述和合适的基于网格的表示之间进行转换的详细编码/解码过程，以及利用最先进的 GAN 架构和训练方法来生成新的结构设计。我们的结果表明，GAN 可以成功地应用于生成各种复杂且稳定的《愤怒的小鸟》结构。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用生成对抗网络（GANs）为物理引擎游戏《愤怒的小鸟》生成稳定结构。
AI.motivation: 传统基于瓦块的关卡生成方法难以满足复杂结构需求，需探索更灵活的结构生成技术以提升游戏设计多样性。
AI.method: 设计编码解码流程将游戏关卡描述转换为网格表示，并采用先进GAN架构与训练策略生成多块结构。
AI.result: 实验表明GANs能有效生成多样化且物理稳定的《愤怒的小鸟》结构设计。
AI.conclusion: GANs在复杂物理结构生成任务中展现出良好潜力，为游戏关卡设计提供新方法。

Our results show that GANs can be successfully applied to generate a varied range of complex and stable Angry Birds structures. 本文研究了使用生成对抗网络 (GAN) 为基于物理的益智游戏《愤怒的小鸟》生成稳定结构的适用性。虽然 GAN 之前在关卡生成方面的应用大多局限于基于图块的表示，但本文探讨了它们对于创建由多个较小块组成的稳定结构的适用性。这包括用于在《愤怒的小鸟》关卡描述和合适的基于网格的表示之间进行转换的详细编码/解码过程，以及利用最先进的 GAN 架构和训练方法来生成新的结构设计。我们的结果表明，GAN 可以成功地应用于生成各种复杂且稳定的《愤怒的小鸟》结构。 本文研究使用生成对抗网络（GANs）为物理引擎游戏《愤怒的小鸟》生成稳定结构。 Frederic Abraham,Matthew Stephenson cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Wei-Tsung Lu,Ju-Chiang Wang,Qiuqiang Kong,Yun-Ning Hung
title: Music Source Separation with Band-Split RoPE Transformer
title_zh: 使用频带分割 RoPE 变压器分离音乐源
comment: This paper explains the SAMI-ByteDance MSS system submitted to Sound Demixing Challenge (SDX23) Music Separation Track. Version 2 of paper fixed some typos
comments: This paper explains the SAMI-ByteDance MSS system submitted to Sound Demixing Challenge (SDX23) Music Separation Track. Version 2 of paper fixed some typos
abstract: Music source separation (MSS) aims to separate a music recording into multiple musically distinct stems, such as vocals, bass, drums, and more. Recently, deep learning approaches such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and recurrent neural networks (RNNs) have been used, but the improvement is still limited. In this paper, we propose a novel frequency-domain approach based on a Band-Split RoPE Transformer (called BS-RoFormer). BS-RoFormer relies on a band-split module to project the input complex spectrogram into subband-level representations, and then arranges a stack of hierarchical Transformers to model the inner-band as well as inter-band sequences for multi-band mask estimation. To facilitate training the model for MSS, we propose to use the Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE). The BS-RoFormer system trained on MUSDB18HQ and 500 extra songs ranked the first place in the MSS track of Sound Demixing Challenge (SDX23). Benchmarking a smaller version of BS-RoFormer on MUSDB18HQ, we achieve state-of-the-art result without extra training data, with 9.80 dB of average SDR.

Recently, deep learning approaches such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and recurrent neural networks (RNNs) have been used, but the improvement is still limited. In this paper, we propose a novel frequency-domain approach based on a Band-Split RoPE Transformer (called BS-RoFormer). BS-RoFormer relies on a band-split module to project the input complex spectrogram into subband-level representations, and then arranges a stack of hierarchical Transformers to model the inner-band as well as inter-band sequences for multi-band mask estimation. To facilitate training the model for MSS, we propose to use the Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE). The BS-RoFormer system trained on MUSDB18HQ and 500 extra songs ranked the first place in the MSS track of Sound Demixing Challenge (SDX23). Benchmarking a smaller version of BS-RoFormer on MUSDB18HQ, we achieve state-of-the-art result without extra training data, with 9.80 dB of average SDR.
abstract_zh: 音乐源分离 (MSS) 旨在将音乐录音分离为多个音乐上不同的主干，例如人声、贝斯、鼓等。最近，已经使用了卷积神经网络（CNN）和循环神经网络（RNN）等深度学习方法，但改进仍然有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于频带分割 RoPE 变压器（称为 BS-RoFormer）的新颖频域方法。 BS-RoFormer 依靠频带分割模块将输入的复杂频谱图投影为子带级表示，然后安排一堆分层 Transformer 来对带内和带间序列进行建模，以进行多带掩模估计。为了便于训练 MSS 模型，我们建议使用旋转位置嵌入 (RoPE)。在MUSDB18HQ和500首额外歌曲上训练的BS-RoFormer系统在Sound Demixing Challenge (SDX23)的MSS轨道上排名第一。在 MUSDB18HQ 上对较小版本的 BS-RoFormer 进行基准测试，我们无需额外的训练数据即可获得最先进的结果，平均 SDR 为 9.80 dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于频域的音乐源分离方法BS-RoFormer，通过带分割模块和分层Transformer结构实现多频带掩码估计。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN和RNN在音乐源分离任务中存在改进瓶颈，需探索更有效的频域建模方法以提升分离效果。
AI.method: 设计带分割模块将复数频谱分解为子带表示，结合分层Transformer建模子带内及跨子带序列，并引入RoPE位置编码优化训练过程。
AI.result: 在SDX23挑战赛中排名第一，MUSDB18HQ数据集上以9.80dB平均SDR指标达到当时最优性能且无需额外训练数据。
AI.conclusion: BS-RoFormer通过频域子带分解与RoPE编码的结合，在音乐源分离任务中实现了显著性能提升，验证了该方法的有效性。

authors_text: Weijieying Ren,Tianxiang Zhao,Wei Qin,Kunpeng Liu
title: T-SaS: Toward Shift-aware Dynamic Adaptation for Streaming Data
title_zh: T-SaS：面向流数据的移位感知动态适应
abstract: In many real-world scenarios, distribution shifts exist in the streaming data across time steps. Many complex sequential data can be effectively divided into distinct regimes that exhibit persistent dynamics. Discovering the shifted behaviors and the evolving patterns underlying the streaming data are important to understand the dynamic system. Existing methods typically train one robust model to work for the evolving data of distinct distributions or sequentially adapt the model utilizing explicitly given regime boundaries. However, there are two challenges: (1) shifts in data streams could happen drastically and abruptly without precursors. Boundaries of distribution shifts are usually unavailable, and (2) training a shared model for all domains could fail to capture varying patterns. This paper aims to solve the problem of sequential data modeling in the presence of sudden distribution shifts that occur without any precursors. Specifically, we design a Bayesian framework, dubbed as T-SaS, with a discrete distribution-modeling variable to capture abrupt shifts of data. Then, we design a model that enable adaptation with dynamic network selection conditioned on that discrete variable. The proposed method learns specific model parameters for each distribution by learning which neurons should be activated in the full network. A dynamic masking strategy is adopted here to support inter-distribution transfer through the overlapping of a set of sparse networks. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method is superior in both accurately detecting shift boundaries to get segments of varying distributions and effectively adapting to downstream forecast or classification tasks.
summary: In many real-world scenarios, distribution shifts exist in the streaming data across time steps. Many complex sequential data can be effectively divided into distinct regimes that exhibit persistent dynamics. Discovering the shifted behaviors and the evolving patterns underlying the streaming data are important to understand the dynamic system. Existing methods typically train one robust model to work for the evolving data of distinct distributions or sequentially adapt the model utilizing explicitly given regime boundaries. However, there are two challenges: (1) shifts in data streams could happen drastically and abruptly without precursors. Boundaries of distribution shifts are usually unavailable, and (2) training a shared model for all domains could fail to capture varying patterns. This paper aims to solve the problem of sequential data modeling in the presence of sudden distribution shifts that occur without any precursors. Specifically, we design a Bayesian framework, dubbed as T-SaS, with a discrete distribution-modeling variable to capture abrupt shifts of data. Then, we design a model that enable adaptation with dynamic network selection conditioned on that discrete variable. The proposed method learns specific model parameters for each distribution by learning which neurons should be activated in the full network. A dynamic masking strategy is adopted here to support inter-distribution transfer through the overlapping of a set of sparse networks. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method is superior in both accurately detecting shift boundaries to get segments of varying distributions and effectively adapting to downstream forecast or classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 在许多现实场景中，流数据中存在跨时间步长的分布变化。许多复杂的序列数据可以有效地分为表现出持续动态的不同状态。发现流数据背后的变化行为和演变模式对于理解动态系统非常重要。现有方法通常训练一个鲁棒模型来处理不同分布的不断变化的数据，或者利用明确给定的范围边界顺序调整模型。然而，存在两个挑战：（1）数据流的变化可能会在没有先兆的情况下突然发生剧烈变化。分布变化的边界通常是不可用的，并且（2）为所有领域训练共享模型可能无法捕获不同的模式。本文旨在解决在没有任何先兆的情况下突然发生分布变化的情况下的顺序数据建模问题。具体来说，我们设计了一个被称为 T-SaS 的贝叶斯框架，它具有离散分布建模变量来捕获数据的突然变化。然后，我们设计了一个模型，可以根据该离散变量进行动态网络选择的适应。所提出的方法通过学习在整个网络中应该激活哪些神经元来学习每个分布的特定模型参数。这里采用动态掩蔽策略，通过一组稀疏网络的重叠来支持分布间传输。大量的实验表明，我们提出的方法在准确检测移位边界以获得不同分布的片段以及有效适应下游预测或分类任务方面均具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出T-SaS方法，解决流数据中突发分布偏移的动态建模问题，通过贝叶斯框架实现动态网络选择和参数学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理无预警的突发分布偏移，且共享模型无法适应不同分布模式，需设计新框架应对动态变化。
AI.method: 设计贝叶斯框架T-SaS，引入离散分布变量捕捉突变，结合动态网络选择与掩码策略实现跨分布参数学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，T-SaS在分布偏移检测和下游任务适应性上优于现有方法，准确率和鲁棒性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: T-SaS通过动态网络选择和掩码机制有效应对突发分布偏移，在流数据建模中展现优越性能。

authors_text: Sunan Sun,Haihui Gao,Tianyu Li,Nadia Figueroa
title: Directionality-Aware Mixture Model Parallel Sampling for Efficient Linear Parameter Varying Dynamical System Learning
title_zh: 用于高效线性参数变化动态系统学习的方向性混合模型并行采样
abstract: The Linear Parameter Varying Dynamical System (LPV-DS) is an effective approach that learns stable, time-invariant motion policies using statistical modeling and semi-definite optimization to encode complex motions for reactive robot control. Despite its strengths, the LPV-DS learning approach faces challenges in achieving a high model accuracy without compromising the computational efficiency. To address this, we introduce the Directionality-Aware Mixture Model (DAMM), a novel statistical model that applies the Riemannian metric on the n-sphere $\mathbb{S}^n$ to efficiently blend non-Euclidean directional data with $\mathbb{R}^m$ Euclidean states. Additionally, we develop a hybrid Markov chain Monte Carlo technique that combines Gibbs Sampling with Split/Merge Proposal, allowing for parallel computation to drastically speed up inference. Our extensive empirical tests demonstrate that LPV-DS integrated with DAMM achieves higher reproduction accuracy, better model efficiency, and near real-time/online learning compared to standard estimation methods on various datasets. Lastly, we demonstrate its suitability for incrementally learning multi-behavior policies in real-world robot experiments.
summary: The Linear Parameter Varying Dynamical System (LPV-DS) is an effective approach that learns stable, time-invariant motion policies using statistical modeling and semi-definite optimization to encode complex motions for reactive robot control. Despite its strengths, the LPV-DS learning approach faces challenges in achieving a high model accuracy without compromising the computational efficiency. To address this, we introduce the Directionality-Aware Mixture Model (DAMM), a novel statistical model that applies the Riemannian metric on the n-sphere $\mathbb{S}^n$ to efficiently blend non-Euclidean directional data with $\mathbb{R}^m$ Euclidean states. Additionally, we develop a hybrid Markov chain Monte Carlo technique that combines Gibbs Sampling with Split/Merge Proposal, allowing for parallel computation to drastically speed up inference. Our extensive empirical tests demonstrate that LPV-DS integrated with DAMM achieves higher reproduction accuracy, better model efficiency, and near real-time/online learning compared to standard estimation methods on various datasets. Lastly, we demonstrate its suitability for incrementally learning multi-behavior policies in real-world robot experiments.
abstract_zh: 线性参数变化动态系统 (LPV-DS) 是一种有效的方法，它使用统计建模和半定优化来学习稳定、时不变的运动策略，以编码用于反应式机器人控制的复杂运动。尽管有其优点，LPV-DS 学习方法在不影响计算效率的情况下实现高模型精度方面面临着挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了方向性感知混合模型（DAMM），这是一种新颖的统计模型，它将黎曼度量应用于 n 球 $\mathbb{S}^n$ 上，以有效地将非欧几里德方向数据与 $\mathbb{R}^m$ 欧几里德状态混合。此外，我们开发了一种混合马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗技术，将吉布斯采样与拆分/合并提案相结合，允许并行计算，从而大大加快推理速度。我们广泛的实证测试表明，与各种数据集上的标准估计方法相比，与 DAMM 集成的 LPV-DS 可以实现更高的再现精度、更好的模型效率以及近实时/在线学习。最后，我们证明了它在现实世界的机器人实验中增量学习多行为策略的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出方向感知混合模型（DAMM）及混合马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛方法，以提升线性参数变化动态系统（LPV-DS）学习的效率与精度。
AI.motivation: 现有LPV-DS方法在模型精度与计算效率间难以平衡，需改进非欧几里得方向数据与欧几里得状态的融合方式，并加速推断过程。
AI.method: 引入基于n维球面黎曼度量的DAMM模型，结合吉布斯采样与分裂/合并提议的混合MCMC技术，实现并行计算以提升推断速度。
AI.result: 实验表明，集成DAMM的LPV-DS在多数据集上达到更高复现精度与模型效率，支持近实时在线学习，并适用于真实机器人多行为策略增量学习。
AI.conclusion: DAMM有效解决了LPV-DS的效率与精度矛盾，为复杂动态系统的实时控制提供了可行方案。

search_text: Directionality-Aware Mixture Model Parallel Sampling for Efficient Linear Parameter Varying Dynamical System Learning 用于高效线性参数变化动态系统学习的方向性混合模型并行采样 The Linear Parameter Varying Dynamical System (LPV-DS) is an effective approach that learns stable, time-invariant motion policies using statistical modeling and semi-definite optimization to encode complex motions for reactive robot control. Despite its strengths, the LPV-DS learning approach faces challenges in achieving a high model accuracy without compromising the computational efficiency. To address this, we introduce the Directionality-Aware Mixture Model (DAMM), a novel statistical model that applies the Riemannian metric on the n-sphere $\mathbb{S}^n$ to efficiently blend non-Euclidean directional data with $\mathbb{R}^m$ Euclidean states. Additionally, we develop a hybrid Markov chain Monte Carlo technique that combines Gibbs Sampling with Split/Merge Proposal, allowing for parallel computation to drastically speed up inference. Our extensive empirical tests demonstrate that LPV-DS integrated with DAMM achieves higher reproduction accuracy, better model efficiency, and near real-time/online learning compared to standard estimation methods on various datasets. Lastly, we demonstrate its suitability for incrementally learning multi-behavior policies in real-world robot experiments. 线性参数变化动态系统 (LPV-DS) 是一种有效的方法，它使用统计建模和半定优化来学习稳定、时不变的运动策略，以编码用于反应式机器人控制的复杂运动。尽管有其优点，LPV-DS 学习方法在不影响计算效率的情况下实现高模型精度方面面临着挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了方向性感知混合模型（DAMM），这是一种新颖的统计模型，它将黎曼度量应用于 n 球 $\mathbb{S}^n$ 上，以有效地将非欧几里德方向数据与 $\mathbb{R}^m$ 欧几里德状态混合。此外，我们开发了一种混合马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗技术，将吉布斯采样与拆分/合并提案相结合，允许并行计算，从而大大加快推理速度。我们广泛的实证测试表明，与各种数据集上的标准估计方法相比，与 DAMM 集成的 LPV-DS 可以实现更高的再现精度、更好的模型效率以及近实时/在线学习。最后，我们证明了它在现实世界的机器人实验中增量学习多行为策略的适用性。 本文提出方向感知混合模型（DAMM）及混合马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛方法，以提升线性参数变化动态系统（LPV-DS）学习的效率与精度。 Sunan Sun,Haihui Gao,Tianyu Li,Nadia Figueroa cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Parth Paritosh,Nikolay Atanasov,Sonia Martinez
title: Distributed Variational Inference for Online Supervised Learning
title_zh: 在线监督学习的分布式变分推理
abstract: Developing efficient solutions for inference problems in intelligent sensor networks is crucial for the next generation of location, tracking, and mapping services. This paper develops a scalable distributed probabilistic inference algorithm that applies to continuous variables, intractable posteriors and large-scale real-time data in sensor networks. In a centralized setting, variational inference is a fundamental technique for performing approximate Bayesian estimation, in which an intractable posterior density is approximated with a parametric density. Our key contribution lies in the derivation of a separable lower bound on the centralized estimation objective, which enables distributed variational inference with one-hop communication in a sensor network. Our distributed evidence lower bound (DELBO) consists of a weighted sum of observation likelihood and divergence to prior densities, and its gap to the measurement evidence is due to consensus and modeling errors. To solve binary classification and regression problems while handling streaming data, we design an online distributed algorithm that maximizes DELBO, and specialize it to Gaussian variational densities with non-linear likelihoods. The resulting distributed Gaussian variational inference (DGVI) efficiently inverts a $1$-rank correction to the covariance matrix. Finally, we derive a diagonalized version for online distributed inference in high-dimensional models, and apply it to multi-robot probabilistic mapping using indoor LiDAR data.
summary: Developing efficient solutions for inference problems in intelligent sensor networks is crucial for the next generation of location, tracking, and mapping services. This paper develops a scalable distributed probabilistic inference algorithm that applies to continuous variables, intractable posteriors and large-scale real-time data in sensor networks. In a centralized setting, variational inference is a fundamental technique for performing approximate Bayesian estimation, in which an intractable posterior density is approximated with a parametric density. Our key contribution lies in the derivation of a separable lower bound on the centralized estimation objective, which enables distributed variational inference with one-hop communication in a sensor network. Our distributed evidence lower bound (DELBO) consists of a weighted sum of observation likelihood and divergence to prior densities, and its gap to the measurement evidence is due to consensus and modeling errors. To solve binary classification and regression problems while handling streaming data, we design an online distributed algorithm that maximizes DELBO, and specialize it to Gaussian variational densities with non-linear likelihoods. The resulting distributed Gaussian variational inference (DGVI) efficiently inverts a $1$-rank correction to the covariance matrix. Finally, we derive a diagonalized version for online distributed inference in high-dimensional models, and apply it to multi-robot probabilistic mapping using indoor LiDAR data.
abstract_zh: 为智能传感器网络中的推理问题开发有效的解决方案对于下一代定位、跟踪和地图服务至关重要。本文开发了一种可扩展的分布式概率推理算法，适用于传感器网络中的连续变量、棘手的后验和大规模实时数据。在集中式设置中，变分推理是执行近似贝叶斯估计的基本技术，其中用参数密度来近似难以处理的后验密度。我们的主要贡献在于推导了集中估计目标的可分离下界，这使得能够在传感器网络中通过一跳通信进行分布式变分推理。我们的分布式证据下界（DELBO）由观察可能性和与先验密度的分歧的加权和组成，其与测量证据的差距是由于共识和建模误差造成的。为了在处理流数据时解决二元分类和回归问题，我们设计了一种最大化 DELBO 的在线分布式算法，并将其专门用于具有非线性似然的高斯变分密度。由此产生的分布式高斯变分推理 (DGVI) 有效地反转了协方差矩阵的 1$ 阶校正。最后，我们推导了高维模型中在线分布式推理的对角化版本，并将其应用于使用室内 LiDAR 数据的多机器人概率映射。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于传感器网络的分布式变分推断算法，用于解决在线监督学习中的大规模实时数据问题。
AI.motivation: 智能传感器网络需要高效处理连续变量、难以计算的后验分布及大规模实时数据，传统集中式方法存在可扩展性与实时性不足的问题。
AI.method: 通过推导集中式估计目标的可分离下界（DELBO），设计单跳通信的分布式变分推断框架，并开发在线分布式算法DGVI，结合高斯变分密度与非线性似然处理流数据，最终提出高维模型的对角化版本。
AI.result: DGVI算法能高效计算协方差矩阵的秩1修正逆，并成功应用于多机器人室内LiDAR概率地图构建任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为传感器网络中的实时分布式贝叶斯推断提供了可扩展解决方案，验证了其在高维在线学习场景中的有效性。

authors_text: Arnaud Gazda,Oceane Koska
title: A pragma based C++ framework for hybrid quantum/classical computation
title_zh: 用于混合量子/经典计算的基于编译指示的 C++ 框架
abstract: Quantum computers promise exponential speed ups over classical computers for various tasks. This emerging technology is expected to have its first huge impact in High Performance Computing (HPC), as it can solve problems beyond the reach of HPC. To that end, HPC will require quantum accelerators, which will enable applications to run on both classical and quantum devices, via hybrid quantum-classical nodes. Hybrid quantum-HPC applications should be scalable, executable on Quantum Error Corrected (QEC) devices, and could use quantum-classical primitives. However, the lack of scalability, poor performances, and inability to insert classical schemes within quantum applications has prevented current quantum frameworks from being adopted by the HPC community. This paper specifies the requirements of a hybrid quantum-classical framework compatible with HPC environments, and introduces a novel hardware-agnostic framework called Q-Pragma. This framework extends the classical programming language C++ heavily used in HPC via the addition of pragma directives to manage quantum computations.
summary: Quantum computers promise exponential speed ups over classical computers for various tasks. This emerging technology is expected to have its first huge impact in High Performance Computing (HPC), as it can solve problems beyond the reach of HPC. To that end, HPC will require quantum accelerators, which will enable applications to run on both classical and quantum devices, via hybrid quantum-classical nodes. Hybrid quantum-HPC applications should be scalable, executable on Quantum Error Corrected (QEC) devices, and could use quantum-classical primitives. However, the lack of scalability, poor performances, and inability to insert classical schemes within quantum applications has prevented current quantum frameworks from being adopted by the HPC community. This paper specifies the requirements of a hybrid quantum-classical framework compatible with HPC environments, and introduces a novel hardware-agnostic framework called Q-Pragma. This framework extends the classical programming language C++ heavily used in HPC via the addition of pragma directives to manage quantum computations.
abstract_zh: 量子计算机有望在执行各种任务时比传统计算机实现指数级的加速。这项新兴技术预计将在高性能计算 (HPC) 领域产生巨大影响，因为它可以解决 HPC 无法解决的问题。为此，高性能计算将需要量子加速器，这将使应用程序能够通过混合量子经典节点在经典设备和量子设备上运行。混合量子 HPC 应用程序应该是可扩展的，可以在量子纠错 (QEC) 设备上执行，并且可以使用量子经典原语。然而，缺乏可扩展性、性能差以及无法在量子应用中插入经典方案等问题阻碍了当前量子框架被 HPC 社区采用。本文详细说明了与 HPC 环境兼容的混合量子经典框架的要求，并介绍了一种称为 Q-Pragma 的新型硬件无关框架。该框架通过添加 pragma 指令来管理量子计算，扩展了 HPC 中大量使用的经典编程语言 C++。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于C++的混合量子-经典计算框架Q-Pragma，通过pragma指令扩展实现量子计算与HPC环境的兼容。
AI.motivation: 现有量子框架存在可扩展性差、性能不足及难以集成经典算法等问题，阻碍了其在HPC领域的应用。
AI.method: 设计硬件无关的Q-Pragma框架，通过向C++添加pragma指令扩展，实现量子计算任务的管理与经典-量子混合执行。
AI.result: 框架满足HPC场景下混合计算的可扩展性需求，并支持量子纠错设备，为量子-经典协同计算提供基础支持。
AI.conclusion: Q-Pragma为HPC与量子计算的融合提供了可行方案，推动了量子加速器在高性能计算中的实际应用。

ai_content.motivation: 现有量子框架存在可扩展性差、性能不足及难以集成经典算法等问题，阻碍了其在HPC领域的应用。
ai_content.method: 设计硬件无关的Q-Pragma框架，通过向C++添加pragma指令扩展，实现量子计算任务的管理与经典-量子混合执行。
ai_content.result: 框架满足HPC场景下混合计算的可扩展性需求，并支持量子纠错设备，为量子-经典协同计算提供基础支持。
ai_content.conclusion: Q-Pragma为HPC与量子计算的融合提供了可行方案，推动了量子加速器在高性能计算中的实际应用。

search_text: A pragma based C++ framework for hybrid quantum/classical computation 用于混合量子/经典计算的基于编译指示的 C++ 框架 Quantum computers promise exponential speed ups over classical computers for various tasks. This emerging technology is expected to have its first huge impact in High Performance Computing (HPC), as it can solve problems beyond the reach of HPC. To that end, HPC will require quantum accelerators, which will enable applications to run on both classical and quantum devices, via hybrid quantum-classical nodes. Hybrid quantum-HPC applications should be scalable, executable on Quantum Error Corrected (QEC) devices, and could use quantum-classical primitives. However, the lack of scalability, poor performances, and inability to insert classical schemes within quantum applications has prevented current quantum frameworks from being adopted by the HPC community. This paper specifies the requirements of a hybrid quantum-classical framework compatible with HPC environments, and introduces a novel hardware-agnostic framework called Q-Pragma. This framework extends the classical programming language C++ heavily used in HPC via the addition of pragma directives to manage quantum computations. 量子计算机有望在执行各种任务时比传统计算机实现指数级的加速。这项新兴技术预计将在高性能计算 (HPC) 领域产生巨大影响，因为它可以解决 HPC 无法解决的问题。为此，高性能计算将需要量子加速器，这将使应用程序能够通过混合量子经典节点在经典设备和量子设备上运行。混合量子 HPC 应用程序应该是可扩展的，可以在量子纠错 (QEC) 设备上执行，并且可以使用量子经典原语。然而，缺乏可扩展性、性能差以及无法在量子应用中插入经典方案等问题阻碍了当前量子框架被 HPC 社区采用。本文详细说明了与 HPC 环境兼容的混合量子经典框架的要求，并介绍了一种称为 Q-Pragma 的新型硬件无关框架。该框架通过添加 pragma 指令来管理量子计算，扩展了 HPC 中大量使用的经典编程语言 C++。 本文提出一个基于C++的混合量子-经典计算框架Q-Pragma，通过pragma指令扩展实现量子计算与HPC环境的兼容。 Arnaud Gazda,Oceane Koska quant-ph,cs.ET,cs.PL

authors_text: Aranyak Maity,Ayan Banerjee,Sandeep Gupta
title: Detection of Unknown-Unknowns in Human-in-Plant Human-in-Loop Systems Using Physics Guided Process Models
title_zh: 使用物理引导过程模型检测工厂人机循环系统中的未知物
abstract: Unknown-unknowns are operational scenarios in systems that are not accounted for in the design and test phase. In such scenarios, the operational behavior of the Human-in-loop (HIL) Human-in-Plant (HIP) systems is not guaranteed to meet requirements such as safety and efficacy. We propose a novel framework for analyzing the operational output characteristics of safety-critical HIL-HIP systems that can discover unknown-unknown scenarios and evaluate potential safety hazards. We propose dynamics-induced hybrid recurrent neural networks (DiH-RNN) to mine a physics-guided surrogate model (PGSM) that checks for deviation of the cyber-physical system (CPS) from safety-certified operational characteristics. The PGSM enables early detection of unknown-unknowns based on the physical laws governing the system. We demonstrate the detection of operational changes in an Artificial Pancreas(AP) due to unknown insulin cartridge errors.
summary: Unknown-unknowns are operational scenarios in systems that are not accounted for in the design and test phase. In such scenarios, the operational behavior of the Human-in-loop (HIL) Human-in-Plant (HIP) systems is not guaranteed to meet requirements such as safety and efficacy. We propose a novel framework for analyzing the operational output characteristics of safety-critical HIL-HIP systems that can discover unknown-unknown scenarios and evaluate potential safety hazards. We propose dynamics-induced hybrid recurrent neural networks (DiH-RNN) to mine a physics-guided surrogate model (PGSM) that checks for deviation of the cyber-physical system (CPS) from safety-certified operational characteristics. The PGSM enables early detection of unknown-unknowns based on the physical laws governing the system. We demonstrate the detection of operational changes in an Artificial Pancreas(AP) due to unknown insulin cartridge errors.
abstract_zh: 未知的未知是在设计和测试阶段未考虑到的系统中的操作场景。在这种情况下，不能保证人机环路（HIL）人机交互（HIP）系统的运行行为满足安全性和有效性等要求。我们提出了一种新颖的框架，用于分析安全关键型 HIL-HIP 系统的运行输出特性，可以发现未知场景并评估潜在的安全隐患。我们提出动态诱导混合循环神经网络（DiH-RNN）来挖掘物理引导代理模型（PGSM），该模型检查网络物理系统（CPS）与安全认证操作特性的偏差。 PGSM 能够根据控制系统的物理定律及早检测未知的未知情况。我们演示了由于未知的胰岛素筒错误而导致的人工胰腺 (AP) 操作变化的检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于物理引导过程模型的框架，用于检测人机环系统中的未知未知场景。
AI.motivation: 现有系统无法识别设计阶段未考虑的未知场景，可能导致安全性和有效性失效。
AI.method: 开发动力学诱导混合循环神经网络（DiH-RNN），构建物理引导代理模型（PGSM）以检测系统偏离安全特性的异常。
AI.result: 在人工胰腺系统中成功检测出未知胰岛素 cartridge 故障导致的操作变化。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能通过物理定律实现对关键系统未知风险的早期识别与评估。
