authors_text: Anuvab Sen,Arul Rhik Mazumder,Dibyarup Dutta,Udayon Sen,Pathikrit Syam,Sandipan Dhar
title: Comparative Evaluation of Metaheuristic Algorithms for Hyperparameter Selection in Short-Term Weather Forecasting
title_zh: 短期天气预报中超参数选择的元启发式算法的比较评估
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, 2 Tables, Accepted by the 15th International Conference on Evolutionary Computation Theory and Applications (ECTA 2023) to be held as part of IJCCI 2023, November 13-15, 2023, Rome, Italy
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures, 2 Tables, Accepted by the 15th International Conference on Evolutionary Computation Theory and Applications (ECTA 2023) to be held as part of IJCCI 2023, November 13-15, 2023, Rome, Italy
abstract: Weather forecasting plays a vital role in numerous sectors, but accurately capturing the complex dynamics of weather systems remains a challenge for traditional statistical models. Apart from Auto Regressive time forecasting models like ARIMA, deep learning techniques (Vanilla ANNs, LSTM and GRU networks), have shown promise in improving forecasting accuracy by capturing temporal dependencies. This paper explores the application of metaheuristic algorithms, namely Genetic Algorithm (GA), Differential Evolution (DE), and Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO), to automate the search for optimal hyperparameters in these model architectures. Metaheuristic algorithms excel in global optimization, offering robustness, versatility, and scalability in handling non-linear problems. We present a comparative analysis of different model architectures integrated with metaheuristic optimization, evaluating their performance in weather forecasting based on metrics such as Mean Squared Error (MSE) and Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE). The results demonstrate the potential of metaheuristic algorithms in enhancing weather forecasting accuracy \& helps in determining the optimal set of hyper-parameters for each model. The paper underscores the importance of harnessing advanced optimization techniques to select the most suitable metaheuristic algorithm for the given weather forecasting task.
summary: Weather forecasting plays a vital role in numerous sectors, but accurately capturing the complex dynamics of weather systems remains a challenge for traditional statistical models. Apart from Auto Regressive time forecasting models like ARIMA, deep learning techniques (Vanilla ANNs, LSTM and GRU networks), have shown promise in improving forecasting accuracy by capturing temporal dependencies. This paper explores the application of metaheuristic algorithms, namely Genetic Algorithm (GA), Differential Evolution (DE), and Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO), to automate the search for optimal hyperparameters in these model architectures. Metaheuristic algorithms excel in global optimization, offering robustness, versatility, and scalability in handling non-linear problems. We present a comparative analysis of different model architectures integrated with metaheuristic optimization, evaluating their performance in weather forecasting based on metrics such as Mean Squared Error (MSE) and Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE). The results demonstrate the potential of metaheuristic algorithms in enhancing weather forecasting accuracy \& helps in determining the optimal set of hyper-parameters for each model. The paper underscores the importance of harnessing advanced optimization techniques to select the most suitable metaheuristic algorithm for the given weather forecasting task.
abstract_zh: 天气预报在许多领域发挥着至关重要的作用，但准确捕捉天气系统的复杂动态仍然是传统统计模型的挑战。除了 ARIMA 等自回归时间预测模型之外，深度学习技术（Vanilla ANN、LSTM 和 GRU 网络）也显示出通过捕获时间依赖性来提高预测准确性的前景。本文探讨了元启发式算法（即遗传算法（GA）、差分进化（DE）和粒子群优化（PSO））的应用，以自动搜索这些模型架构中的最佳超参数。元启发式算法在全局优化方面表现出色，在处理非线性问题时具有鲁棒性、多功能性和可扩展性。我们对与元启发式优化相结合的不同模型架构进行了比较分析，并根据均方误差（MSE）和平均绝对百分比误差（MAPE）等指标评估了它们在天气预报中的性能。结果证明了元启发式算法在提高天气预报准确性方面的潜力，并有助于确定每个模型的最佳超参数集。本文强调了利用先进的优化技术为给定的天气预报任务选择最合适的元启发式算法的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文比较评估了元启发式算法在短期天气预报模型超参数选择中的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统统计模型难以准确捕捉天气系统复杂性，深度学习模型虽有潜力但需优化超参数，元启发式算法在全局优化中表现优异。
AI.method: 采用遗传算法（GA）、差分进化（DE）和粒子群优化（PSO）优化ARIMA、ANN、LSTM、GRU模型超参数，通过MSE和MAPE指标评估性能。
AI.result: 元启发式算法有效提升天气预报准确性，并确定了各模型的最佳超参数组合。
AI.conclusion: 元启发式算法优化可显著增强天气预报效果，需根据任务选择合适的优化算法。

authors_text: Blake VanBerlo,Brian Li,Jesse Hoey,Alexander Wong
title: Self-Supervised Pretraining Improves Performance and Inference Efficiency in Multiple Lung Ultrasound Interpretation Tasks
title_zh: 自监督预训练提高了多项肺部超声解释任务的性能和推理效率
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, submitted to IEEE Access
comments: 10 pages, 5 figures, submitted to IEEE Access
abstract: In this study, we investigated whether self-supervised pretraining could produce a neural network feature extractor applicable to multiple classification tasks in B-mode lung ultrasound analysis. When fine-tuning on three lung ultrasound tasks, pretrained models resulted in an improvement of the average across-task area under the receiver operating curve (AUC) by 0.032 and 0.061 on local and external test sets respectively. Compact nonlinear classifiers trained on features outputted by a single pretrained model did not improve performance across all tasks; however, they did reduce inference time by 49% compared to serial execution of separate fine-tuned models. When training using 1% of the available labels, pretrained models consistently outperformed fully supervised models, with a maximum observed test AUC increase of 0.396 for the task of view classification. Overall, the results indicate that self-supervised pretraining is useful for producing initial weights for lung ultrasound classifiers.
summary: In this study, we investigated whether self-supervised pretraining could produce a neural network feature extractor applicable to multiple classification tasks in B-mode lung ultrasound analysis. When fine-tuning on three lung ultrasound tasks, pretrained models resulted in an improvement of the average across-task area under the receiver operating curve (AUC) by 0.032 and 0.061 on local and external test sets respectively. Compact nonlinear classifiers trained on features outputted by a single pretrained model did not improve performance across all tasks; however, they did reduce inference time by 49% compared to serial execution of separate fine-tuned models. When training using 1% of the available labels, pretrained models consistently outperformed fully supervised models, with a maximum observed test AUC increase of 0.396 for the task of view classification. Overall, the results indicate that self-supervised pretraining is useful for producing initial weights for lung ultrasound classifiers.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们研究了自监督预训练是否可以产生适用于 B 型肺部超声分析中的多个分类任务的神经网络特征提取器。当对三项肺部超声任务进行微调时，预训练模型使本地和外部测试集的接收者操作曲线 (AUC) 下的平均跨任务面积分别提高了 0.032 和 0.061。根据单个预训练模型输出的特征进行训练的紧凑非线性分类器并没有提高所有任务的性能；然而，与单独微调模型的串行执行相比，它们确实将推理时间减少了 49%。当使用 1% 的可用标签进行训练时，预训练模型的性能始终优于完全监督模型，对于视图分类任务，最大观察到的测试 AUC 增加了 0.396。总体而言，结果表明自监督预训练对于为肺部超声分类器生成初始权重很有用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自监督预训练在多个肺部超声图像分类任务中的应用效果。
AI.motivation: 肺部超声图像分析需要处理多种分类任务，而标注数据有限，因此需要更高效的模型训练方法。
AI.method: 使用自监督预训练方法训练神经网络特征提取器，并在三个肺部超声任务上进行微调。
AI.result: 预训练模型在本地和外部测试集上的平均AUC分别提高了0.032和0.061，同时推理时间减少了49%。
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练有助于生成适用于肺部超声分类任务的初始权重，尤其在标注数据较少时效果显著。

authors_text: Clément Le Moine Veillon,Victor Rosi,Pablo Arias Sarah,Léane Salais,Nicolas Obin
title: BWSNet: Automatic Perceptual Assessment of Audio Signals
title_zh: BWSNet：音频信号的自动感知评估
abstract: This paper introduces BWSNet, a model that can be trained from raw human judgements obtained through a Best-Worst scaling (BWS) experiment. It maps sound samples into an embedded space that represents the perception of a studied attribute. To this end, we propose a set of cost functions and constraints, interpreting trial-wise ordinal relations as distance comparisons in a metric learning task. We tested our proposal on data from two BWS studies investigating the perception of speech social attitudes and timbral qualities. For both datasets, our results show that the structure of the latent space is faithful to human judgements.
summary: This paper introduces BWSNet, a model that can be trained from raw human judgements obtained through a Best-Worst scaling (BWS) experiment. It maps sound samples into an embedded space that represents the perception of a studied attribute. To this end, we propose a set of cost functions and constraints, interpreting trial-wise ordinal relations as distance comparisons in a metric learning task. We tested our proposal on data from two BWS studies investigating the perception of speech social attitudes and timbral qualities. For both datasets, our results show that the structure of the latent space is faithful to human judgements.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 BWSNet，这是一种可以根据通过最佳-最差缩放 (BWS) 实验获得的原始人类判断进行训练的模型。它将声音样本映射到表示所研究属性的感知的嵌入空间中。为此，我们提出了一组成本函数和约束，将试验顺序关系解释为度量学习任务中的距离比较。我们根据两项 BWS 研究的数据测试了我们的提议，这两项研究调查了言语社会态度和音色质量的感知。对于这两个数据集，我们的结果表明潜在空间的结构忠实于人类的判断。

AI.tldr: 提出BWSNet模型，通过人类判断训练，自动评估音频信号的感知属性
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖主观评分效率低，BWS实验能提供更高效的数据，需将其转化为模型
AI.method: 设计成本函数和约束，将BWS的序数关系转化为度量学习中的距离比较，映射到嵌入空间
AI.result: 在两个BWS数据集上验证，潜在空间结构忠实反映人类判断
AI.conclusion: BWSNet有效捕捉人类感知，为音频信号自动评估提供新方法

ai_content.conclusion: BWSNet有效捕捉人类感知，为音频信号自动评估提供新方法

authors_text: Lili Yu,Bowen Shi,Ramakanth Pasunuru,Benjamin Muller,Olga Golovneva,Tianlu Wang,Arun Babu,Binh Tang,Brian Karrer,Shelly Sheynin,Candace Ross,Adam Polyak,Russell Howes,Vasu Sharma,Puxin Xu,Hovhannes Tamoyan,Oron Ashual,Uriel Singer,Shang-Wen Li,Susan Zhang,Richard James,Gargi Ghosh,Yaniv Taigman,Maryam Fazel-Zarandi,Asli Celikyilmaz, et al. (2 additional authors not shown)
title: Scaling Autoregressive Multi-Modal Models: Pretraining and Instruction Tuning
title_zh: 缩放自回归多模态模型：预训练和指令调整
abstract: We present CM3Leon (pronounced "Chameleon"), a retrieval-augmented, token-based, decoder-only multi-modal language model capable of generating and infilling both text and images. CM3Leon uses the CM3 multi-modal architecture but additionally shows the extreme benefits of scaling up and tuning on more diverse instruction-style data. It is the first multi-modal model trained with a recipe adapted from text-only language models, including a large-scale retrieval-augmented pre-training stage and a second multi-task supervised fine-tuning (SFT) stage. It is also a general-purpose model that can do both text-to-image and image-to-text generation, allowing us to introduce self-contained contrastive decoding methods that produce high-quality outputs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this recipe is highly effective for multi-modal models. CM3Leon achieves state-of-the-art performance in text-to-image generation with 5x less training compute than comparable methods (zero-shot MS-COCO FID of 4.88). After SFT, CM3Leon can also demonstrate unprecedented levels of controllability in tasks ranging from language-guided image editing to image-controlled generation and segmentation.
summary: We present CM3Leon (pronounced "Chameleon"), a retrieval-augmented, token-based, decoder-only multi-modal language model capable of generating and infilling both text and images. CM3Leon uses the CM3 multi-modal architecture but additionally shows the extreme benefits of scaling up and tuning on more diverse instruction-style data. It is the first multi-modal model trained with a recipe adapted from text-only language models, including a large-scale retrieval-augmented pre-training stage and a second multi-task supervised fine-tuning (SFT) stage. It is also a general-purpose model that can do both text-to-image and image-to-text generation, allowing us to introduce self-contained contrastive decoding methods that produce high-quality outputs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this recipe is highly effective for multi-modal models. CM3Leon achieves state-of-the-art performance in text-to-image generation with 5x less training compute than comparable methods (zero-shot MS-COCO FID of 4.88). After SFT, CM3Leon can also demonstrate unprecedented levels of controllability in tasks ranging from language-guided image editing to image-controlled generation and segmentation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 CM3Leon（发音为“Chameleon”），这是一种检索增强、基于标记、仅解码器的多模态语言模型，能够生成和填充文本和图像。 CM3Leon 使用 CM3 多模式架构，但还显示了扩展和调整更多样化的指令类型数据的极端优势。它是第一个使用改编自纯文本语言模型的配方进行训练的多模态模型，包括大规模检索增强预训练阶段和第二个多任务监督微调（SFT）阶段。它也是一个通用模型，可以进行文本到图像和图像到文本的生成，使我们能够引入产生高质量输出的独立对比解码方法。大量实验表明，该方法对于多模态模型非常有效。 CM3Leon 在文本到图像生成方面实现了最先进的性能，训练计算量比同类方法少 5 倍（零样本 MS-COCO FID 为 4.88）。 SFT 之后，CM3Leon 还可以在从语言引导的图像编辑到图像控制的生成和分割等任务中展现出前所未有的可控性水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CM3Leon，一种基于检索增强和指令调优的多模态语言模型，能够生成和填充文本与图像，并在少样本情况下达到最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态模型在训练效率和可控性上存在不足，需通过大规模预训练和指令微调提升性能。
AI.method: 采用CM3多模态架构，结合检索增强的预训练阶段和多任务监督微调阶段，支持文本到图像及图像到文本生成，并引入对比解码方法。
AI.result: 在零样本MS-COCO数据集上，CM3Leon的FID值为4.88，较同类方法减少5倍计算量；微调后在图像编辑和生成任务中展现卓越可控性。
AI.conclusion: 检索增强预训练与指令调优的结合显著提升了多模态模型的性能与效率，为未来研究提供了有效范式。

CM3Leon uses the CM3 multi-modal architecture but additionally shows the extreme benefits of scaling up and tuning on more diverse instruction-style data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this recipe is highly effective for multi-modal models. CM3Leon achieves state-of-the-art performance in text-to-image generation with 5x less training compute than comparable methods (zero-shot MS-COCO FID of 4.88). After SFT, CM3Leon can also demonstrate unprecedented levels of controllability in tasks ranging from language-guided image editing to image-controlled generation and segmentation. 我们提出了 CM3Leon（发音为“Chameleon”），这是一种检索增强、基于标记、仅解码器的多模态语言模型，能够生成和填充文本和图像。 CM3Leon 使用 CM3 多模式架构，但还显示了扩展和调整更多样化的指令类型数据的极端优势。它是第一个使用改编自纯文本语言模型的配方进行训练的多模态模型，包括大规模检索增强预训练阶段和第二个多任务监督微调（SFT）阶段。它也是一个通用模型，可以进行文本到图像和图像到文本的生成，使我们能够引入产生高质量输出的独立对比解码方法。大量实验表明，该方法对于多模态模型非常有效。 CM3Leon 在文本到图像生成方面实现了最先进的性能，训练计算量比同类方法少 5 倍（零样本 MS-COCO FID 为 4.88）。 SFT 之后，CM3Leon 还可以在从语言引导的图像编辑到图像控制的生成和分割等任务中展现出前所未有的可控性水平。 本文提出CM3Leon，一种基于检索增强和指令调优的多模态语言模型，能够生成和填充文本与图像，并在少样本情况下达到最先进的性能。 Lili Yu,Bowen Shi,Ramakanth Pasunuru,Benjamin Muller,Olga Golovneva,Tianlu Wang,Arun Babu,Binh Tang,Brian Karrer,Shelly Sheynin,Candace Ross,Adam Polyak,Russell Howes,Vasu Sharma,Puxin Xu,Hovhannes Tamoyan,Oron Ashual,Uriel Singer,Shang-Wen Li,Susan Zhang,Richard James,Gargi Ghosh,Yaniv Taigman,Maryam Fazel-Zarandi,Asli Celikyilmaz, et al. (2 additional authors not shown) cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Steven Zhou,Xiaojing Ye
title: Approximating High-Dimensional Minimal Surfaces with Physics-Informed Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用物理信息神经网络逼近高维最小曲面
abstract: In this paper, we compute numerical approximations of the minimal surfaces, an essential type of Partial Differential Equation (PDE), in higher dimensions. Classical methods cannot handle it in this case because of the Curse of Dimensionality, where the computational cost of these methods increases exponentially fast in response to higher problem dimensions, far beyond the computing capacity of any modern supercomputers. Only in the past few years have machine learning researchers been able to mitigate this problem. The solution method chosen here is a model known as a Physics-Informed Neural Network (PINN) which trains a deep neural network (DNN) to solve the minimal surface PDE. It can be scaled up into higher dimensions and trained relatively quickly even on a laptop with no GPU. Due to the inability to view the high-dimension output, our data is presented as snippets of a higher-dimension shape with enough fixed axes so that it is viewable with 3-D graphs. Not only will the functionality of this method be tested, but we will also explore potential limitations in the method's performance.
summary: In this paper, we compute numerical approximations of the minimal surfaces, an essential type of Partial Differential Equation (PDE), in higher dimensions. Classical methods cannot handle it in this case because of the Curse of Dimensionality, where the computational cost of these methods increases exponentially fast in response to higher problem dimensions, far beyond the computing capacity of any modern supercomputers. Only in the past few years have machine learning researchers been able to mitigate this problem. The solution method chosen here is a model known as a Physics-Informed Neural Network (PINN) which trains a deep neural network (DNN) to solve the minimal surface PDE. It can be scaled up into higher dimensions and trained relatively quickly even on a laptop with no GPU. Due to the inability to view the high-dimension output, our data is presented as snippets of a higher-dimension shape with enough fixed axes so that it is viewable with 3-D graphs. Not only will the functionality of this method be tested, but we will also explore potential limitations in the method's performance.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们计算更高维度的最小曲面的数值近似，这是偏微分方程 (PDE) 的基本类型。由于维度诅咒，经典方法在这种情况下无法处理它，这些方法的计算成本随着更高维度的问题而呈指数级快速增长，远远超出了任何现代超级计算机的计算能力。直到过去几年，机器学习研究人员才能够缓解这个问题。这里选择的求解方法是一种称为物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 的模型，它训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 来求解最小表面偏微分方程。即使在没有 GPU 的笔记本电脑上，它也可以扩展到更高的维度并相对快速地进行训练。由于无法查看高维输出，我们的数据以具有足够固定轴的高维形状片段的形式呈现，以便可以通过 3D 图形查看。我们不仅将测试该方法的功能，还将探索该方法性能的潜在限制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用物理信息神经网络（PINN）解决高维极小曲面问题，克服传统方法因维度灾难导致的计算瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 传统数值方法在高维空间中面临计算成本指数级增长的维度灾难问题，难以有效求解高维极小曲面偏微分方程。
AI.method: 采用物理信息神经网络（PINN）训练深度神经网络直接求解极小曲面PDE，通过固定部分维度实现高维结果的可视化，并在普通设备上完成训练。
AI.result: 验证了PINN方法在高维极小曲面问题中的可行性，同时揭示了其在精度和收敛性方面的潜在局限性。
AI.conclusion: PINN为高维PDE求解提供了新思路，但需进一步优化以提升复杂场景下的计算稳定性与准确性。

authors_text: Md Ferdous Alam,Yi Wang,Chin-Yi Cheng,Jieliang Luo
title: Representation Learning for Sequential Volumetric Design Tasks
title_zh: 顺序体积设计任务的表示学习
abstract: Volumetric design, also called massing design, is the first and critical step in professional building design which is sequential in nature. As the volumetric design process requires careful design decisions and iterative adjustments, the underlying sequential design process encodes valuable information for designers. Many efforts have been made to automatically generate reasonable volumetric designs, but the quality of the generated design solutions varies, and evaluating a design solution requires either a prohibitively comprehensive set of metrics or expensive human expertise. While previous approaches focused on learning only the final design instead of sequential design tasks, we propose to encode the design knowledge from a collection of expert or high-performing design sequences and extract useful representations using transformer-based models. Later we propose to utilize the learned representations for crucial downstream applications such as design preference evaluation and procedural design generation. We develop the preference model by estimating the density of the learned representations whereas we train an autoregressive transformer model for sequential design generation. We demonstrate our ideas by leveraging a novel dataset of thousands of sequential volumetric designs. Our preference model can compare two arbitrarily given design sequences and is almost $90\%$ accurate in evaluation against random design sequences. Our autoregressive model is also capable of autocompleting a volumetric design sequence from a partial design sequence.
summary: Volumetric design, also called massing design, is the first and critical step in professional building design which is sequential in nature. As the volumetric design process requires careful design decisions and iterative adjustments, the underlying sequential design process encodes valuable information for designers. Many efforts have been made to automatically generate reasonable volumetric designs, but the quality of the generated design solutions varies, and evaluating a design solution requires either a prohibitively comprehensive set of metrics or expensive human expertise. While previous approaches focused on learning only the final design instead of sequential design tasks, we propose to encode the design knowledge from a collection of expert or high-performing design sequences and extract useful representations using transformer-based models. Later we propose to utilize the learned representations for crucial downstream applications such as design preference evaluation and procedural design generation. We develop the preference model by estimating the density of the learned representations whereas we train an autoregressive transformer model for sequential design generation. We demonstrate our ideas by leveraging a novel dataset of thousands of sequential volumetric designs. Our preference model can compare two arbitrarily given design sequences and is almost $90\%$ accurate in evaluation against random design sequences. Our autoregressive model is also capable of autocompleting a volumetric design sequence from a partial design sequence.
abstract_zh: 体积设计，也称为体量设计，是专业建筑设计的第一步也是关键的一步，本质上是连续的。由于体积设计过程需要仔细的设计决策和迭代调整，因此底层的顺序设计过程为设计人员编码了有价值的信息。人们已经做出了许多努力来自动生成合理的体积设计，但是生成的设计解决方案的质量各不相同，并且评估设计解决方案需要一组极其全面的指标或昂贵的人类专业知识。虽然以前的方法只专注于学习最终设计而不是顺序设计任务，但我们建议从专家或高性能设计序列的集合中对设计知识进行编码，并使用基于变压器的模型提取有用的表示。后来，我们建议将学习到的表示用于关键的下游应用，例如设计偏好评估和程序设计生成。我们通过估计学习表示的密度来开发偏好模型，同时训练用于顺序设计生成的自回归变压器模型。我们通过利用包含数千个连续体积设计的新颖数据集来展示我们的想法。我们的偏好模型可以比较两个任意给定的设计序列，并且针对随机设计序列的评估准确率几乎为 90\%$。我们的自回归模型还能够从部分设计序列自动完成体积设计序列。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用基于Transformer的模型学习体积设计任务中的序列表示，以改进设计偏好评估和程序化生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注最终设计而非序列设计过程，导致生成方案质量参差不齐且评估依赖复杂指标或人工专家。
AI.method: 从专家设计序列中编码设计知识，使用Transformer模型提取表示，并开发偏好模型与自回归模型用于下游任务。
AI.result: 偏好模型对随机序列评估准确率达90%，自回归模型可从部分序列自动生成完整设计。
AI.conclusion: 通过学习序列表示，有效捕捉设计知识并提升设计评估与生成性能。

authors_text: Bliss Singhal,Fnu Pooja
title: Unveiling Intractable Epileptogenic Brain Networks with Deep Learning Algorithms: A Novel and Comprehensive Framework for Scalable Seizure Prediction with Unimodal Neuroimaging Data in Pediatric Patients
title_zh: 利用深度学习算法揭示棘手的致癫痫脑网络：利用儿科患者单峰神经影像数据进行可扩展癫痫发作预测的新颖综合框架
abstract: Epilepsy is a prevalent neurological disorder affecting 50 million individuals worldwide and 1.2 million Americans. There exist millions of pediatric patients with intractable epilepsy, a condition in which seizures fail to come under control. The occurrence of seizures can result in physical injury, disorientation, unconsciousness, and additional symptoms that could impede children's ability to participate in everyday tasks. Predicting seizures can help parents and healthcare providers take precautions, prevent risky situations, and mentally prepare children to minimize anxiety and nervousness associated with the uncertainty of a seizure. This research proposes a novel and comprehensive framework to predict seizures in pediatric patients by evaluating machine learning algorithms on unimodal neuroimaging data consisting of electroencephalogram signals. The bandpass filtering and independent component analysis proved to be effective in reducing the noise and artifacts from the dataset. Various machine learning algorithms' performance is evaluated on important metrics such as accuracy, precision, specificity, sensitivity, F1 score and MCC. The results show that the deep learning algorithms are more successful in predicting seizures than logistic Regression, and k nearest neighbors. The recurrent neural network (RNN) gave the highest precision and F1 Score, long short-term memory (LSTM) outperformed RNN in accuracy and convolutional neural network (CNN) resulted in the highest Specificity. This research has significant implications for healthcare providers in proactively managing seizure occurrence in pediatric patients, potentially transforming clinical practices, and improving pediatric care.

The recurrent neural network (RNN) gave the highest precision and F1 Score, long short-term memory (LSTM) outperformed RNN in accuracy and convolutional neural network (CNN) resulted in the highest Specificity. This research has significant implications for healthcare providers in proactively managing seizure occurrence in pediatric patients, potentially transforming clinical practices, and improving pediatric care.
abstract_zh: 癫痫是一种常见的神经系统疾病，影响着全球 5000 万人和 120 万美国人。数以百万计的儿科患者患有顽固性癫痫，这种疾病的癫痫发作无法得到控制。癫痫发作可能会导致身体受伤、迷失方向、失去知觉以及其他症状，这些症状可能会妨碍儿童参与日常活动的能力。预测癫痫发作可以帮助父母和医疗保健提供者采取预防措施，预防危险情况，并让儿童做好心理准备，以尽量减少与癫痫发作的不确定性相关的焦虑和紧张。这项研究提出了一种新颖且全面的框架，通过评估由脑电图信号组成的单峰神经影像数据的机器学习算法来预测儿科患者的癫痫发作。带通滤波和独立分量分析被证明可以有效减少数据集中的噪声和伪影。各种机器学习算法的性能根据准确度、精确度、特异性、灵敏度、F1 分数和 MCC 等重要指标进行评估。结果表明，深度学习算法在预测癫痫发作方面比逻辑回归和 k 最近邻算法更成功。循环神经网络 (RNN) 的精度和 F1 分数最高，长短期记忆 (LSTM) 的精度优于 RNN，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的特异性最高。这项研究对于医疗保健提供者主动管理儿科患者癫痫发作、潜在改变临床实践和改善儿科护理具有重要意义。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于深度学习算法的新框架，利用单模态脑成像数据（EEG信号）预测儿童癫痫患者的发作。
AI.motivation: 难治性癫痫影响全球数百万儿童，发作预测可帮助家长和医疗人员采取预防措施，减少风险并改善患儿生活质量。
AI.method: 通过带通滤波和独立成分分析预处理EEG数据，评估逻辑回归、K近邻、RNN、LSTM和CNN等多种机器学习算法的性能。
AI.result: 深度学习算法优于传统方法，其中RNN在精确率和F1分数上表现最佳，LSTM准确率最高，CNN特异性最佳。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习框架在儿童癫痫发作预测中具有显著潜力，可能推动临床实践变革并提升儿科护理水平。

search_text: Unveiling Intractable Epileptogenic Brain Networks with Deep Learning Algorithms: A Novel and Comprehensive Framework for Scalable Seizure Prediction with Unimodal Neuroimaging Data in Pediatric Patients 利用深度学习算法揭示棘手的致癫痫脑网络：利用儿科患者单峰神经影像数据进行可扩展癫痫发作预测的新颖综合框架 Epilepsy is a prevalent neurological disorder affecting 50 million individuals worldwide and 1.2 million Americans. There exist millions of pediatric patients with intractable epilepsy, a condition in which seizures fail to come under control. The occurrence of seizures can result in physical injury, disorientation, unconsciousness, and additional symptoms that could impede children's ability to participate in everyday tasks. Predicting seizures can help parents and healthcare providers take precautions, prevent risky situations, and mentally prepare children to minimize anxiety and nervousness associated with the uncertainty of a seizure. This research proposes a novel and comprehensive framework to predict seizures in pediatric patients by evaluating machine learning algorithms on unimodal neuroimaging data consisting of electroencephalogram signals. The bandpass filtering and independent component analysis proved to be effective in reducing the noise and artifacts from the dataset. Various machine learning algorithms' performance is evaluated on important metrics such as accuracy, precision, specificity, sensitivity, F1 score and MCC. The results show that the deep learning algorithms are more successful in predicting seizures than logistic Regression, and k nearest neighbors. The recurrent neural network (RNN) gave the highest precision and F1 Score, long short-term memory (LSTM) outperformed RNN in accuracy and convolutional neural network (CNN) resulted in the highest Specificity. This research has significant implications for healthcare providers in proactively managing seizure occurrence in pediatric patients, potentially transforming clinical practices, and improving pediatric care. 癫痫是一种常见的神经系统疾病，影响着全球 5000 万人和 120 万美国人。数以百万计的儿科患者患有顽固性癫痫，这种疾病的癫痫发作无法得到控制。癫痫发作可能会导致身体受伤、迷失方向、失去知觉以及其他症状，这些症状可能会妨碍儿童参与日常活动的能力。预测癫痫发作可以帮助父母和医疗保健提供者采取预防措施，预防危险情况，并让儿童做好心理准备，以尽量减少与癫痫发作的不确定性相关的焦虑和紧张。这项研究提出了一种新颖且全面的框架，通过评估由脑电图信号组成的单峰神经影像数据的机器学习算法来预测儿科患者的癫痫发作。带通滤波和独立分量分析被证明可以有效减少数据集中的噪声和伪影。各种机器学习算法的性能根据准确度、精确度、特异性、灵敏度、F1 分数和 MCC 等重要指标进行评估。结果表明，深度学习算法在预测癫痫发作方面比逻辑回归和 k 最近邻算法更成功。循环神经网络 (RNN) 的精度和 F1 分数最高，长短期记忆 (LSTM) 的精度优于 RNN，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的特异性最高。这项研究对于医疗保健提供者主动管理儿科患者癫痫发作、潜在改变临床实践和改善儿科护理具有重要意义。 该论文提出了一种基于深度学习算法的新框架，利用单模态脑成像数据（EEG信号）预测儿童癫痫患者的发作。 Bliss Singhal,Fnu Pooja cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.IV

authors_text: Philip Müller,Felix Meissen,Johannes Brandt,Georgios Kaissis,Daniel Rueckert
title: Anatomy-Driven Pathology Detection on Chest X-rays
title_zh: 胸部 X 射线解剖驱动的病理学检测
abstract: Pathology detection and delineation enables the automatic interpretation of medical scans such as chest X-rays while providing a high level of explainability to support radiologists in making informed decisions. However, annotating pathology bounding boxes is a time-consuming task such that large public datasets for this purpose are scarce. Current approaches thus use weakly supervised object detection to learn the (rough) localization of pathologies from image-level annotations, which is however limited in performance due to the lack of bounding box supervision. We therefore propose anatomy-driven pathology detection (ADPD), which uses easy-to-annotate bounding boxes of anatomical regions as proxies for pathologies. We study two training approaches: supervised training using anatomy-level pathology labels and multiple instance learning (MIL) with image-level pathology labels. Our results show that our anatomy-level training approach outperforms weakly supervised methods and fully supervised detection with limited training samples, and our MIL approach is competitive with both baseline approaches, therefore demonstrating the potential of our approach.
summary: Pathology detection and delineation enables the automatic interpretation of medical scans such as chest X-rays while providing a high level of explainability to support radiologists in making informed decisions. However, annotating pathology bounding boxes is a time-consuming task such that large public datasets for this purpose are scarce. Current approaches thus use weakly supervised object detection to learn the (rough) localization of pathologies from image-level annotations, which is however limited in performance due to the lack of bounding box supervision. We therefore propose anatomy-driven pathology detection (ADPD), which uses easy-to-annotate bounding boxes of anatomical regions as proxies for pathologies. We study two training approaches: supervised training using anatomy-level pathology labels and multiple instance learning (MIL) with image-level pathology labels. Our results show that our anatomy-level training approach outperforms weakly supervised methods and fully supervised detection with limited training samples, and our MIL approach is competitive with both baseline approaches, therefore demonstrating the potential of our approach.
abstract_zh: 病理学检测和描绘可以自动解释胸部 X 光检查等医学扫描结果，同时提供高水平的可解释性，以支持放射科医生做出明智的决策。然而，注释病理边界框是一项耗时的任务，因此用于此目的的大型公共数据集很少。因此，当前的方法使用弱监督的对象检测来从图像级注释中学习病理的（粗略）定位，但由于缺乏边界框监督，其性能受到限制。因此，我们提出了解剖驱动的病理检测（ADPD），它使用易于注释的解剖区域边界框作为病理的代理。我们研究了两种训练方法：使用解剖级病理学标签的监督训练和使用图像级病理学标签的多实例学习（MIL）。我们的结果表明，我们的解剖级训练方法优于弱监督方法和有限训练样本的完全监督检测，并且我们的 MIL 方法与两种基线方法都具有竞争力，因此证明了我们方法的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于解剖结构的胸部X光病理检测方法（ADPD），通过利用解剖区域标注代替病理边界框标注，解决弱监督检测中定位精度不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督病理检测方法因缺乏边界框监督导致性能受限，而病理标注耗时且公开数据稀缺，需探索更高效的可解释检测方案。
AI.method: 提出ADPD方法，使用易标注的解剖区域边界框作为病理代理，分别采用解剖级别监督训练和图像级别多实例学习（MIL）两种训练策略。
AI.result: 解剖级别训练方法在有限样本下优于弱监督和全监督检测，MIL方法表现与基线方法相当，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: ADPD通过解剖先验提升病理检测性能，为医学影像分析提供可解释性方案，未来可拓展至更多病理类型和影像模态。

authors_text: Weiyi Xie,Colin Jacobs,Jean-Paul Charbonnier,Dirk Jan Slebos,Bram van Ginneken
title: Emphysema Subtyping on Thoracic Computed Tomography Scans using Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用深度神经网络进行胸部计算机断层扫描的肺气肿亚型
abstract: Accurate identification of emphysema subtypes and severity is crucial for effective management of COPD and the study of disease heterogeneity. Manual analysis of emphysema subtypes and severity is laborious and subjective. To address this challenge, we present a deep learning-based approach for automating the Fleischner Society's visual score system for emphysema subtyping and severity analysis. We trained and evaluated our algorithm using 9650 subjects from the COPDGene study. Our algorithm achieved the predictive accuracy at 52\%, outperforming a previously published method's accuracy of 45\%. In addition, the agreement between the predicted scores of our method and the visual scores was good, where the previous method obtained only moderate agreement. Our approach employs a regression training strategy to generate categorical labels while simultaneously producing high-resolution localized activation maps for visualizing the network predictions. By leveraging these dense activation maps, our method possesses the capability to compute the percentage of emphysema involvement per lung in addition to categorical severity scores. Furthermore, the proposed method extends its predictive capabilities beyond centrilobular emphysema to include paraseptal emphysema subtypes.
summary: Accurate identification of emphysema subtypes and severity is crucial for effective management of COPD and the study of disease heterogeneity. Manual analysis of emphysema subtypes and severity is laborious and subjective. To address this challenge, we present a deep learning-based approach for automating the Fleischner Society's visual score system for emphysema subtyping and severity analysis. We trained and evaluated our algorithm using 9650 subjects from the COPDGene study. Our algorithm achieved the predictive accuracy at 52\%, outperforming a previously published method's accuracy of 45\%. In addition, the agreement between the predicted scores of our method and the visual scores was good, where the previous method obtained only moderate agreement. Our approach employs a regression training strategy to generate categorical labels while simultaneously producing high-resolution localized activation maps for visualizing the network predictions. By leveraging these dense activation maps, our method possesses the capability to compute the percentage of emphysema involvement per lung in addition to categorical severity scores. Furthermore, the proposed method extends its predictive capabilities beyond centrilobular emphysema to include paraseptal emphysema subtypes.
abstract_zh: 准确识别肺气肿亚型和严重程度对于有效治疗 COPD 和研究疾病异质性至关重要。手动分析肺气肿亚型和严重程度既费力又主观。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，用于自动化 Fleischner Society 的视觉评分系统，以进行肺气肿亚型和严重程度分析。我们使用 COPDGene 研究中的 9650 名受试者来训练和评估我们的算法。我们的算法实现了 52% 的预测准确度，优于之前发布的方法 45% 的准确度。此外，我们的方法的预测分数与视觉分数之间的一致性很好，而之前的方法仅获得中等一致性。我们的方法采用回归训练策略来生成分类标签，同时生成高分辨率的局部激活图以可视化网络预测。通过利用这些密集的激活图，我们的方法除了分类严重程度评分之外，还能够计算每个肺的肺气肿参与百分比。此外，所提出的方法将其预测能力扩展到小叶中心肺气肿之外，包括间隔旁肺气肿亚型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的自动化方法，用于对胸部CT扫描中的肺气肿亚型进行分类和严重程度分析。
AI.motivation: 手动分析肺气肿亚型和严重程度耗时且主观，开发自动化方法可提高慢性阻塞性肺病（COPD）管理效率并研究疾病异质性。
AI.method: 采用回归训练策略训练深度学习模型，结合高分辨率局部激活图生成，同时输出分类严重程度评分和肺部肺气肿涉及百分比，并扩展至包括边缘性肺气肿亚型。
AI.result: 在9650名受试者数据集上，模型预测准确率达52%，优于先前方法的45%；与人工评分的协议程度达良好水平（先前方法仅中等协议）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自动化评分和可视化分析显著提升了肺气肿亚型分类的准确性与一致性，为COPD研究提供了更全面的工具。

search_text: Emphysema Subtyping on Thoracic Computed Tomography Scans using Deep Neural Networks 使用深度神经网络进行胸部计算机断层扫描的肺气肿亚型 Accurate identification of emphysema subtypes and severity is crucial for effective management of COPD and the study of disease heterogeneity. Manual analysis of emphysema subtypes and severity is laborious and subjective. To address this challenge, we present a deep learning-based approach for automating the Fleischner Society's visual score system for emphysema subtyping and severity analysis. We trained and evaluated our algorithm using 9650 subjects from the COPDGene study. Our algorithm achieved the predictive accuracy at 52\%, outperforming a previously published method's accuracy of 45\%. In addition, the agreement between the predicted scores of our method and the visual scores was good, where the previous method obtained only moderate agreement. Our approach employs a regression training strategy to generate categorical labels while simultaneously producing high-resolution localized activation maps for visualizing the network predictions. By leveraging these dense activation maps, our method possesses the capability to compute the percentage of emphysema involvement per lung in addition to categorical severity scores. Furthermore, the proposed method extends its predictive capabilities beyond centrilobular emphysema to include paraseptal emphysema subtypes. 准确识别肺气肿亚型和严重程度对于有效治疗 COPD 和研究疾病异质性至关重要。手动分析肺气肿亚型和严重程度既费力又主观。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，用于自动化 Fleischner Society 的视觉评分系统，以进行肺气肿亚型和严重程度分析。我们使用 COPDGene 研究中的 9650 名受试者来训练和评估我们的算法。我们的算法实现了 52% 的预测准确度，优于之前发布的方法 45% 的准确度。此外，我们的方法的预测分数与视觉分数之间的一致性很好，而之前的方法仅获得中等一致性。我们的方法采用回归训练策略来生成分类标签，同时生成高分辨率的局部激活图以可视化网络预测。通过利用这些密集的激活图，我们的方法除了分类严重程度评分之外，还能够计算每个肺的肺气肿参与百分比。此外，所提出的方法将其预测能力扩展到小叶中心肺气肿之外，包括间隔旁肺气肿亚型。 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的自动化方法，用于对胸部CT扫描中的肺气肿亚型进行分类和严重程度分析。 Weiyi Xie,Colin Jacobs,Jean-Paul Charbonnier,Dirk Jan Slebos,Bram van Ginneken eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: W. Jacob Wagner,Ahmet Soylemezoglu,Dustin Nottage,Katherine Driggs-Campbell
title: In Situ Soil Property Estimation for Autonomous Earthmoving Using Physics-Infused Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用注入物理的神经网络进行自主土方移动的原位土壤特性估计
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, to be published in proceedings of 16th European-African Regional Conference of the International Society for Terrain-Vehicle Systems (ISTVS)
comments: 10 pages, 6 figures, to be published in proceedings of 16th European-African Regional Conference of the International Society for Terrain-Vehicle Systems (ISTVS)
abstract: A novel, learning-based method for in situ estimation of soil properties using a physics-infused neural network (PINN) is presented. The network is trained to produce estimates of soil cohesion, angle of internal friction, soil-tool friction, soil failure angle, and residual depth of cut which are then passed through an earthmoving model based on the fundamental equation of earthmoving (FEE) to produce an estimated force. The network ingests a short history of kinematic observations along with past control commands and predicts interaction forces accurately with average error of less than 2kN, 13% of the measured force. To validate the approach, an earthmoving simulation of a bladed vehicle is developed using Vortex Studio, enabling comparison of the estimated parameters to pseudo-ground-truth values which is challenging in real-world experiments. The proposed approach is shown to enable accurate estimation of interaction forces and produces meaningful parameter estimates even when the model and the environmental physics deviate substantially.
summary: A novel, learning-based method for in situ estimation of soil properties using a physics-infused neural network (PINN) is presented. The network is trained to produce estimates of soil cohesion, angle of internal friction, soil-tool friction, soil failure angle, and residual depth of cut which are then passed through an earthmoving model based on the fundamental equation of earthmoving (FEE) to produce an estimated force. The network ingests a short history of kinematic observations along with past control commands and predicts interaction forces accurately with average error of less than 2kN, 13% of the measured force. To validate the approach, an earthmoving simulation of a bladed vehicle is developed using Vortex Studio, enabling comparison of the estimated parameters to pseudo-ground-truth values which is challenging in real-world experiments. The proposed approach is shown to enable accurate estimation of interaction forces and produces meaningful parameter estimates even when the model and the environmental physics deviate substantially.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种基于学习的新颖方法，使用注入物理的神经网络（PINN）对土壤特性进行原位估计。该网络经过训练，可生成土壤粘聚力、内摩擦角、土壤工具摩擦力、土壤破坏角和残余切削深度的估计值，然后将其传递到基于土方基本方程 (FEE) 的土方模型，以产生估计的力。该网络吸收运动学观察的简短历史记录以及过去的控制命令，并准确预测相互作用力，平均误差小于 2kN，即测量力的 13%。为了验证该方法，使用 Vortex Studio 开发了叶片车辆的土方模拟，从而能够将估计参数与伪地面实况值进行比较，这在现实世界的实验中具有挑战性。即使模型和环境物理存在很大偏差，所提出的方法也能够准确估计相互作用力并产生有意义的参数估计。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于物理信息神经网络（PINN）的实时土壤属性估计方法，用于自主工程作业中的交互力预测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在实时性和准确性上存在不足，自主工程车辆需要准确的土壤参数来调整操作，现有方法在模型与环境物理偏差大时表现不佳。
AI.method: 采用物理信息神经网络（PINN），结合地球移动基本方程（FEE），利用历史运动学数据和控制命令预测土壤参数，并通过Vortex Studio模拟验证。
AI.result: 估计力的平均误差低于2kN（13%的测量力），模拟验证显示参数估计有效，且在模型与环境物理偏差大时仍能提供有意义的结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够准确估计交互力和土壤参数，适用于自主工程车辆，尤其在模型与实际环境存在偏差的情况下表现出鲁棒性。

authors_text: W. Jacob Wagner,Isaac Blankenau,Maribel DeLaTorre,Amartya Purushottam,Ahmet Soylemezoglu
title: A Robust Localization Solution for an Uncrewed Ground Vehicle in Unstructured Outdoor GNSS-Denied Environments
title_zh: 适用于非结构化室外 GNSS 拒绝环境中无人地面车辆的稳健定位解决方案
comment: 15 pages, 9 figures, 2 tables, to be published in The Proceedings of the Institute of Navigation GNSS+ 2023 conference (ION GNSS+ 23)
comments: 15 pages, 9 figures, 2 tables, to be published in The Proceedings of the Institute of Navigation GNSS+ 2023 conference (ION GNSS+ 23)
abstract: This work addresses the challenge of developing a localization system for an uncrewed ground vehicle (UGV) operating autonomously in unstructured outdoor Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS)-denied environments. The goal is to enable accurate mapping and long-range navigation with practical applications in domains such as autonomous construction, military engineering missions, and exploration of non-Earth planets. The proposed system - Terrain-Referenced Assured Engineer Localization System (TRAELS) - integrates pose estimates produced by two complementary terrain referenced navigation (TRN) methods with wheel odometry and inertial measurement unit (IMU) measurements using an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF). Unlike simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) systems that require loop closures, the described approach maintains accuracy over long distances and one-way missions without the need to revisit previous positions. Evaluation of TRAELS is performed across a range of environments. In regions where a combination of distinctive geometric and ground surface features are present, the developed TRN methods are leveraged by TRAELS to consistently achieve an absolute trajectory error of less than 3.0 m. The approach is also shown to be capable of recovering from large accumulated drift when traversing feature-sparse areas, which is essential in ensuring robust performance of the system across a wide variety of challenging GNSS-denied environments. Overall, the effectiveness of the system in providing precise localization and mapping capabilities in challenging GNSS-denied environments is demonstrated and an analysis is performed leading to insights for improving TRN approaches for UGVs.
summary: This work addresses the challenge of developing a localization system for an uncrewed ground vehicle (UGV) operating autonomously in unstructured outdoor Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS)-denied environments. The goal is to enable accurate mapping and long-range navigation with practical applications in domains such as autonomous construction, military engineering missions, and exploration of non-Earth planets. The proposed system - Terrain-Referenced Assured Engineer Localization System (TRAELS) - integrates pose estimates produced by two complementary terrain referenced navigation (TRN) methods with wheel odometry and inertial measurement unit (IMU) measurements using an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF). Unlike simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) systems that require loop closures, the described approach maintains accuracy over long distances and one-way missions without the need to revisit previous positions. Evaluation of TRAELS is performed across a range of environments. In regions where a combination of distinctive geometric and ground surface features are present, the developed TRN methods are leveraged by TRAELS to consistently achieve an absolute trajectory error of less than 3.0 m. The approach is also shown to be capable of recovering from large accumulated drift when traversing feature-sparse areas, which is essential in ensuring robust performance of the system across a wide variety of challenging GNSS-denied environments. Overall, the effectiveness of the system in providing precise localization and mapping capabilities in challenging GNSS-denied environments is demonstrated and an analysis is performed leading to insights for improving TRN approaches for UGVs.
abstract_zh: 这项工作解决了为无人地面车辆（UGV）开发定位系统的挑战，该系统可在非结构化室外全球导航卫星系统（GNSS）拒绝的环境中自主运行。其目标是实现精确测绘和远程导航，并在自主建设、军事工程任务和非地球行星探索等领域得到实际应用。所提出的系统 - 地形参考保证工程师定位系统 (TRAELS) - 将两种互补的地形参考导航 (TRN) 方法产生的姿态估计与使用扩展卡尔曼滤波器 (EKF) 的车轮里程计和惯性测量单元 (IMU) 测量相集成。与需要闭环的同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 系统不同，所描述的方法可以在长距离和单向任务中保持准确性，而无需重新访问先前的位置。 TRAELS 的评估是在一系列环境中进行的。在存在独特几何和地面特征组合的区域，TRAELS 利用开发的 TRN 方法始终实现小于 3.0 m 的绝对轨迹误差。该方法还被证明能够在穿越特征稀疏区域时从大量累积漂移中恢复，这对于确保系统在各种具有挑战性的 GNSS 拒绝环境中的稳健性能至关重要。总体而言，该系统在具有挑战性的 GNSS 拒绝环境中提供精确定位和绘图功能的有效性得到了证明，并进行了分析，从而获得了改进 UGV TRN 方法的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TRAELS的鲁棒定位系统，用于在无GNSS信号的非结构化户外环境中实现无人地面车辆（UGV）的高精度定位与长距离导航。
AI.motivation: GNSS信号在复杂户外环境中易受干扰，而自主无人系统在军事、建筑及行星探索等场景中需依赖可靠定位技术，传统SLAM方法存在回环闭合依赖及长距离漂移问题。
AI.method: 融合两种地形参考导航（TRN）方法与轮式里程计、IMU数据，通过扩展卡尔曼滤波（EKF）进行状态估计，无需回环闭合即可实现长距离连续导航。
AI.result: 在特征丰富区域定位误差低于3.0米，可有效抑制特征稀疏区域的累积漂移，验证了系统在多种GNSS拒止环境下的鲁棒性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: TRAELS系统为无GNSS环境下的UGV定位提供了有效解决方案，并为改进地形参考导航方法提供了关键见解。

ai_content.conclusion: TRAELS系统为无GNSS环境下的UGV定位提供了有效解决方案，并为改进地形参考导航方法提供了关键见解。

search_text: A Robust Localization Solution for an Uncrewed Ground Vehicle in Unstructured Outdoor GNSS-Denied Environments 适用于非结构化室外 GNSS 拒绝环境中无人地面车辆的稳健定位解决方案 This work addresses the challenge of developing a localization system for an uncrewed ground vehicle (UGV) operating autonomously in unstructured outdoor Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS)-denied environments. The goal is to enable accurate mapping and long-range navigation with practical applications in domains such as autonomous construction, military engineering missions, and exploration of non-Earth planets. The proposed system - Terrain-Referenced Assured Engineer Localization System (TRAELS) - integrates pose estimates produced by two complementary terrain referenced navigation (TRN) methods with wheel odometry and inertial measurement unit (IMU) measurements using an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF). Unlike simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) systems that require loop closures, the described approach maintains accuracy over long distances and one-way missions without the need to revisit previous positions. Evaluation of TRAELS is performed across a range of environments. In regions where a combination of distinctive geometric and ground surface features are present, the developed TRN methods are leveraged by TRAELS to consistently achieve an absolute trajectory error of less than 3.0 m. The approach is also shown to be capable of recovering from large accumulated drift when traversing feature-sparse areas, which is essential in ensuring robust performance of the system across a wide variety of challenging GNSS-denied environments. Overall, the effectiveness of the system in providing precise localization and mapping capabilities in challenging GNSS-denied environments is demonstrated and an analysis is performed leading to insights for improving TRN approaches for UGVs. 这项工作解决了为无人地面车辆（UGV）开发定位系统的挑战，该系统可在非结构化室外全球导航卫星系统（GNSS）拒绝的环境中自主运行。其目标是实现精确测绘和远程导航，并在自主建设、军事工程任务和非地球行星探索等领域得到实际应用。所提出的系统 - 地形参考保证工程师定位系统 (TRAELS) - 将两种互补的地形参考导航 (TRN) 方法产生的姿态估计与使用扩展卡尔曼滤波器 (EKF) 的车轮里程计和惯性测量单元 (IMU) 测量相集成。与需要闭环的同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 系统不同，所描述的方法可以在长距离和单向任务中保持准确性，而无需重新访问先前的位置。 TRAELS 的评估是在一系列环境中进行的。在存在独特几何和地面特征组合的区域，TRAELS 利用开发的 TRN 方法始终实现小于 3.0 m 的绝对轨迹误差。该方法还被证明能够在穿越特征稀疏区域时从大量累积漂移中恢复，这对于确保系统在各种具有挑战性的 GNSS 拒绝环境中的稳健性能至关重要。总体而言，该系统在具有挑战性的 GNSS 拒绝环境中提供精确定位和绘图功能的有效性得到了证明，并进行了分析，从而获得了改进 UGV TRN 方法的见解。 本文提出了一种名为TRAELS的鲁棒定位系统，用于在无GNSS信号的非结构化户外环境中实现无人地面车辆（UGV）的高精度定位与长距离导航。 W. Jacob Wagner,Isaac Blankenau,Maribel DeLaTorre,Amartya Purushottam,Ahmet Soylemezoglu cs.RO

authors_text: Huan Zhang,Emmanouil Karystinaios,Simon Dixon,Gerhard Widmer,Carlos Eduardo Cancino-Chacón
title: Symbolic Music Representations for Classification Tasks: A Systematic Evaluation
title_zh: 分类任务的符号音乐表示：系统评估
comment: To be published in the Proceedings of the 24th International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR 2023), Milan, Italy
comments: To be published in the Proceedings of the 24th International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR 2023), Milan, Italy
abstract: Music Information Retrieval (MIR) has seen a recent surge in deep learning-based approaches, which often involve encoding symbolic music (i.e., music represented in terms of discrete note events) in an image-like or language like fashion. However, symbolic music is neither an image nor a sentence, and research in the symbolic domain lacks a comprehensive overview of the different available representations. In this paper, we investigate matrix (piano roll), sequence, and graph representations and their corresponding neural architectures, in combination with symbolic scores and performances on three piece-level classification tasks. We also introduce a novel graph representation for symbolic performances and explore the capability of graph representations in global classification tasks. Our systematic evaluation shows advantages and limitations of each input representation. Our results suggest that the graph representation, as the newest and least explored among the three approaches, exhibits promising performance, while being more light-weight in training.
summary: Music Information Retrieval (MIR) has seen a recent surge in deep learning-based approaches, which often involve encoding symbolic music (i.e., music represented in terms of discrete note events) in an image-like or language like fashion. However, symbolic music is neither an image nor a sentence, and research in the symbolic domain lacks a comprehensive overview of the different available representations. In this paper, we investigate matrix (piano roll), sequence, and graph representations and their corresponding neural architectures, in combination with symbolic scores and performances on three piece-level classification tasks. We also introduce a novel graph representation for symbolic performances and explore the capability of graph representations in global classification tasks. Our systematic evaluation shows advantages and limitations of each input representation. Our results suggest that the graph representation, as the newest and least explored among the three approaches, exhibits promising performance, while being more light-weight in training.
abstract_zh: 音乐信息检索（MIR）最近出现了基于深度学习的方法的激增，这些方法通常涉及以类似图像或类似语言的方式对符号音乐（即以离散音符事件表示的音乐）进行编码。然而，象征音乐既不是图像也不是句子，象征领域的研究缺乏对不同可用表征的全面概述。在本文中，我们结合三个片段级分类任务的符号分数和性能，研究矩阵（钢琴卷帘）、序列和图形表示及其相应的神经架构。我们还引入了一种用于符号性能的新颖的图形表示，并探索了图形表示在全局分类任务中的能力。我们的系统评估显示了每种输入表示的优点和局限性。我们的结果表明，图表示作为三种方法中最新且探索最少的方法，表现出有希望的性能，同时在训练中更加轻量级。

AI.tldr: 系统评估不同符号音乐表示方法在分类任务中的效果
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对符号音乐表示方法的全面评估，需比较不同表示方法的优劣
AI.method: 采用矩阵、序列及图表示，结合神经网络架构，在三个分类任务中进行系统评估，并提出新的图表示方法
AI.result: 图表示在分类任务中表现优异且训练更高效，显示其潜力
AI.conclusion: 图表示在分类任务中表现优于其他方法，但需进一步探索其应用

authors_text: Fangkai Yang,Wenjie Yin,Lu Wang,Tianci Li,Pu Zhao,Bo Liu,Paul Wang,Bo Qiao,Yudong Liu,Mårten Björkman,Saravan Rajmohan,Qingwei Lin,Dongmei Zhang
title: Diffusion-based Time Series Data Imputation for Microsoft 365
title_zh: Microsoft 365 基于扩散的时间序列数据插补
abstract: Reliability is extremely important for large-scale cloud systems like Microsoft 365. Cloud failures such as disk failure, node failure, etc. threaten service reliability, resulting in online service interruptions and economic loss. Existing works focus on predicting cloud failures and proactively taking action before failures happen. However, they suffer from poor data quality like data missing in model training and prediction, which limits the performance. In this paper, we focus on enhancing data quality through data imputation by the proposed Diffusion+, a sample-efficient diffusion model, to impute the missing data efficiently based on the observed data. Our experiments and application practice show that our model contributes to improving the performance of the downstream failure prediction task.
summary: Reliability is extremely important for large-scale cloud systems like Microsoft 365. Cloud failures such as disk failure, node failure, etc. threaten service reliability, resulting in online service interruptions and economic loss. Existing works focus on predicting cloud failures and proactively taking action before failures happen. However, they suffer from poor data quality like data missing in model training and prediction, which limits the performance. In this paper, we focus on enhancing data quality through data imputation by the proposed Diffusion+, a sample-efficient diffusion model, to impute the missing data efficiently based on the observed data. Our experiments and application practice show that our model contributes to improving the performance of the downstream failure prediction task.
abstract_zh: 可靠性对于Microsoft 365这样的大规模云系统来说极其重要。磁盘故障、节点故障等云故障会威胁服务可靠性，导致在线服务中断和经济损失。现有的工作重点是预测云故障并在故障发生之前主动采取行动。然而，它们的数据质量较差，例如模型训练和预测中的数据丢失，这限制了性能。在本文中，我们重点关注通过所提出的 Diffusion+（一种样本有效的扩散模型）进行数据插补来提高数据质量，以根据观测数据有效地插补缺失数据。我们的实验和应用实践表明，我们的模型有助于提高下游故障预测任务的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于扩散模型的时序数据填补方法Diffusion+，以提升Microsoft 365云系统的故障预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有云故障预测方法因训练数据缺失导致数据质量差，限制了预测性能，需通过数据填补改善数据质量。
AI.method: 设计样本高效的扩散模型Diffusion+，利用观测数据高效填补缺失的时序数据。
AI.result: 实验和应用验证表明，该方法有效提升了下游故障预测任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: Diffusion+通过高质量数据填补显著增强了云故障预测的可靠性，为云系统维护提供支持。

authors_text: Muhao Liu,Chenyang Qi,Shunxing Bao,Quan Liu,Ruining Deng,Yu Wang,Shilin Zhao,Haichun Yang,Yuankai Huo
title: Evaluation Kidney Layer Segmentation on Whole Slide Imaging using Convolutional Neural Networks and Transformers
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络和变压器评估整个幻灯片成像的肾层分割
abstract: The segmentation of kidney layer structures, including cortex, outer stripe, inner stripe, and inner medulla within human kidney whole slide images (WSI) plays an essential role in automated image analysis in renal pathology. However, the current manual segmentation process proves labor-intensive and infeasible for handling the extensive digital pathology images encountered at a large scale. In response, the realm of digital renal pathology has seen the emergence of deep learning-based methodologies. However, very few, if any, deep learning based approaches have been applied to kidney layer structure segmentation. Addressing this gap, this paper assesses the feasibility of performing deep learning based approaches on kidney layer structure segmetnation. This study employs the representative convolutional neural network (CNN) and Transformer segmentation approaches, including Swin-Unet, Medical-Transformer, TransUNet, U-Net, PSPNet, and DeepLabv3+. We quantitatively evaluated six prevalent deep learning models on renal cortex layer segmentation using mice kidney WSIs. The empirical results stemming from our approach exhibit compelling advancements, as evidenced by a decent Mean Intersection over Union (mIoU) index. The results demonstrate that Transformer models generally outperform CNN-based models. By enabling a quantitative evaluation of renal cortical structures, deep learning approaches are promising to empower these medical professionals to make more informed kidney layer segmentation.
summary: The segmentation of kidney layer structures, including cortex, outer stripe, inner stripe, and inner medulla within human kidney whole slide images (WSI) plays an essential role in automated image analysis in renal pathology. However, the current manual segmentation process proves labor-intensive and infeasible for handling the extensive digital pathology images encountered at a large scale. In response, the realm of digital renal pathology has seen the emergence of deep learning-based methodologies. However, very few, if any, deep learning based approaches have been applied to kidney layer structure segmentation. Addressing this gap, this paper assesses the feasibility of performing deep learning based approaches on kidney layer structure segmetnation. This study employs the representative convolutional neural network (CNN) and Transformer segmentation approaches, including Swin-Unet, Medical-Transformer, TransUNet, U-Net, PSPNet, and DeepLabv3+. We quantitatively evaluated six prevalent deep learning models on renal cortex layer segmentation using mice kidney WSIs. The empirical results stemming from our approach exhibit compelling advancements, as evidenced by a decent Mean Intersection over Union (mIoU) index. The results demonstrate that Transformer models generally outperform CNN-based models. By enabling a quantitative evaluation of renal cortical structures, deep learning approaches are promising to empower these medical professionals to make more informed kidney layer segmentation.
abstract_zh: 肾脏层结构的分割，包括人肾全切片图像 (WSI) 中的皮质、外条纹、内条纹和内髓质，在肾脏病理学的自动图像分析中发挥着重要作用。然而，当前的手动分割过程被证明是劳动密集型的，并且对于处理大规模遇到的大量数字病理图像来说是不可行的。作为回应，数字肾脏病理学领域出现了基于深度学习的方法。然而，很少有基于深度学习的方法被应用于肾层结构分割。为了解决这一差距，本文评估了在肾层结构分割上执行基于深度学习的方法的可行性。本研究采用代表性的卷积神经网络（CNN）和 Transformer 分割方法，包括 Swin-Unet、Medical-Transformer、TransUNet、U-Net、PSPNet 和 DeepLabv3+。我们使用小鼠肾脏 WSI 定量评估了六种流行的肾皮质层分割深度学习模型。我们的方法得出的实证结果显示出令人瞩目的进步，正如不错的平均交集（mIoU）指数所证明的那样。结果表明 Transformer 模型通常优于基于 CNN 的模型。通过对肾皮质结构进行定量评估，深度学习方法有望使这些医疗专业人员能够进行更明智的肾层分割。

AI.tldr: 评估卷积神经网络和Transformer在肾脏层分割中的应用效果
AI.motivation: 手动分割肾脏组织耗时且难以处理大规模数字病理图像，现有深度学习方法在该领域应用较少
AI.method: 采用Swin-Unet、Medical-Transformer等6种主流分割模型，基于小鼠肾脏全切片图像进行定量评估
AI.result: Transformer模型整体优于CNN模型，mIoU指标显示良好分割性能
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法可有效实现肾脏层结构分割，为病理分析提供自动化解决方案

search_text: Evaluation Kidney Layer Segmentation on Whole Slide Imaging using Convolutional Neural Networks and Transformers 使用卷积神经网络和变压器评估整个幻灯片成像的肾层分割 The segmentation of kidney layer structures, including cortex, outer stripe, inner stripe, and inner medulla within human kidney whole slide images (WSI) plays an essential role in automated image analysis in renal pathology. However, the current manual segmentation process proves labor-intensive and infeasible for handling the extensive digital pathology images encountered at a large scale. In response, the realm of digital renal pathology has seen the emergence of deep learning-based methodologies. However, very few, if any, deep learning based approaches have been applied to kidney layer structure segmentation. Addressing this gap, this paper assesses the feasibility of performing deep learning based approaches on kidney layer structure segmetnation. This study employs the representative convolutional neural network (CNN) and Transformer segmentation approaches, including Swin-Unet, Medical-Transformer, TransUNet, U-Net, PSPNet, and DeepLabv3+. We quantitatively evaluated six prevalent deep learning models on renal cortex layer segmentation using mice kidney WSIs. The empirical results stemming from our approach exhibit compelling advancements, as evidenced by a decent Mean Intersection over Union (mIoU) index. The results demonstrate that Transformer models generally outperform CNN-based models. By enabling a quantitative evaluation of renal cortical structures, deep learning approaches are promising to empower these medical professionals to make more informed kidney layer segmentation. 肾脏层结构的分割，包括人肾全切片图像 (WSI) 中的皮质、外条纹、内条纹和内髓质，在肾脏病理学的自动图像分析中发挥着重要作用。然而，当前的手动分割过程被证明是劳动密集型的，并且对于处理大规模遇到的大量数字病理图像来说是不可行的。作为回应，数字肾脏病理学领域出现了基于深度学习的方法。然而，很少有基于深度学习的方法被应用于肾层结构分割。为了解决这一差距，本文评估了在肾层结构分割上执行基于深度学习的方法的可行性。本研究采用代表性的卷积神经网络（CNN）和 Transformer 分割方法，包括 Swin-Unet、Medical-Transformer、TransUNet、U-Net、PSPNet 和 DeepLabv3+。我们使用小鼠肾脏 WSI 定量评估了六种流行的肾皮质层分割深度学习模型。我们的方法得出的实证结果显示出令人瞩目的进步，正如不错的平均交集（mIoU）指数所证明的那样。结果表明 Transformer 模型通常优于基于 CNN 的模型。通过对肾皮质结构进行定量评估，深度学习方法有望使这些医疗专业人员能够进行更明智的肾层分割。 评估卷积神经网络和Transformer在肾脏层分割中的应用效果 Muhao Liu,Chenyang Qi,Shunxing Bao,Quan Liu,Ruining Deng,Yu Wang,Shilin Zhao,Haichun Yang,Yuankai Huo eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Shanshan Tang,Kai Wang,David Hein,Gloria Lin,Nina N. Sanford,Jing Wang
title: Recurrence-Free Survival Prediction for Anal Squamous Cell Carcinoma Chemoradiotherapy using Planning CT-based Radiomics Model
title_zh: 使用基于规划 CT 的放射组学模型预测肛门鳞状细胞癌放化疗的无复发生存率
abstract: Objectives: Approximately 30% of non-metastatic anal squamous cell carcinoma (ASCC) patients will experience recurrence after chemoradiotherapy (CRT), and currently available clinical variables are poor predictors of treatment response. We aimed to develop a model leveraging information extracted from radiation pretreatment planning CT to predict recurrence-free survival (RFS) in ASCC patients after CRT. Methods: Radiomics features were extracted from planning CT images of 96 ASCC patients. Following pre-feature selection, the optimal feature set was selected via step-forward feature selection with a multivariate Cox proportional hazard model. The RFS prediction was generated from a radiomics-clinical combined model based on an optimal feature set with five repeats of five-fold cross validation. The risk stratification ability of the proposed model was evaluated with Kaplan-Meier analysis. Results: Shape- and texture-based radiomics features significantly predicted RFS. Compared to a clinical-only model, radiomics-clinical combined model achieves better performance in the testing cohort with higher C-index (0.80 vs 0.73) and AUC (0.84 vs 0.79 for 1-year RFS, 0.84 vs 0.78 for 2-year RFS, and 0.86 vs 0.83 for 3-year RFS), leading to distinctive high- and low-risk of recurrence groups (p<0.001). Conclusions: A treatment planning CT based radiomics and clinical combined model had improved prognostic performance in predicting RFS for ASCC patients treated with CRT as compared to a model using clinical features only.
summary: Objectives: Approximately 30% of non-metastatic anal squamous cell carcinoma (ASCC) patients will experience recurrence after chemoradiotherapy (CRT), and currently available clinical variables are poor predictors of treatment response. We aimed to develop a model leveraging information extracted from radiation pretreatment planning CT to predict recurrence-free survival (RFS) in ASCC patients after CRT. Methods: Radiomics features were extracted from planning CT images of 96 ASCC patients. Following pre-feature selection, the optimal feature set was selected via step-forward feature selection with a multivariate Cox proportional hazard model. The RFS prediction was generated from a radiomics-clinical combined model based on an optimal feature set with five repeats of five-fold cross validation. The risk stratification ability of the proposed model was evaluated with Kaplan-Meier analysis. Results: Shape- and texture-based radiomics features significantly predicted RFS. Compared to a clinical-only model, radiomics-clinical combined model achieves better performance in the testing cohort with higher C-index (0.80 vs 0.73) and AUC (0.84 vs 0.79 for 1-year RFS, 0.84 vs 0.78 for 2-year RFS, and 0.86 vs 0.83 for 3-year RFS), leading to distinctive high- and low-risk of recurrence groups (p<0.001). Conclusions: A treatment planning CT based radiomics and clinical combined model had improved prognostic performance in predicting RFS for ASCC patients treated with CRT as compared to a model using clinical features only.
abstract_zh: 目的：大约 30% 的非转移性肛门鳞状细胞癌 (ASCC) 患者在放化疗 (CRT) 后会出现复发，而目前可用的临床变量不能很好地预测治疗反应。我们的目的是开发一个模型，利用从放射预处理计划 CT 中提取的信息来预测 CRT 后 ASCC 患者的无复发生存期 (RFS)。方法：从 96 例 ASCC 患者的计划 CT 图像中提取放射组学特征。在预特征选择之后，通过使用多元 Cox 比例风险模型的逐步特征选择来选择最佳特征集。 RFS 预测是根据放射组学-临床组合模型生成的，该模型基于最佳特征集并进行五次重复的五倍交叉验证。通过 Kaplan-Meier 分析评估了所提出模型的风险分层能力。结果：基于形状和纹理的放射组学特征可显着预测 RFS。与纯临床模型相比，放射组学-临床组合模型在测试队列中取得了更好的表现，具有较高的 C 指数（0.80 vs 0.73）和 AUC（1 年 RFS 为 0.84 vs 0.79，2 年 RFS 为 0.84 vs 0.78，3 年 RFS 为 0.86 vs 0.83），从而产生独特的高风险和低风险复发组（p<0.001）。结论：与仅使用临床特征的模型相比，基于放射组学和临床组合模型的 CT 治疗计划在预测接受 CRT 治疗的 ASCC 患者 RFS 方面具有改善的预后性能。

AI.tldr: 开发基于计划CT的放射组学模型预测肛门鳞状细胞癌放化疗后的无复发生存期。
AI.motivation: 现有临床变量对肛门鳞状细胞癌患者放化疗后复发预测效果不佳，需更精准的预后模型。
AI.method: 从96例患者计划CT中提取放射组学特征，通过逐步前向选择优化特征集，结合临床数据构建模型，并采用五折交叉验证评估。
AI.result: 形状与纹理特征显著预测RFS，联合模型在测试队列中C指数（0.80 vs 0.73）和AUC（1年：0.84 vs 0.79；2年：0.84 vs 0.78；3年：0.86 vs 0.83）均优于临床模型（p<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: 结合放射组学与临床特征的模型较单纯临床模型能更准确预测肛门鳞状细胞癌患者的无复发生存率。

authors_text: Jensen Gao,Bidipta Sarkar,Fei Xia,Ted Xiao,Jiajun Wu,Brian Ichter,Anirudha Majumdar,Dorsa Sadigh
title: Physically Grounded Vision-Language Models for Robotic Manipulation
title_zh: 用于机器人操作的物理基础视觉语言模型
abstract: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) have led to improved performance on tasks such as visual question answering and image captioning. Consequently, these models are now well-positioned to reason about the physical world, particularly within domains such as robotic manipulation. However, current VLMs are limited in their understanding of the physical concepts (e.g., material, fragility) of common objects, which restricts their usefulness for robotic manipulation tasks that involve interaction and physical reasoning about such objects. To address this limitation, we propose PhysObjects, an object-centric dataset of 39.6K crowd-sourced and 417K automated physical concept annotations of common household objects. We demonstrate that fine-tuning a VLM on PhysObjects improves its understanding of physical object concepts, including generalization to held-out concepts, by capturing human priors of these concepts from visual appearance. We incorporate this physically grounded VLM in an interactive framework with a large language model-based robotic planner, and show improved planning performance on tasks that require reasoning about physical object concepts, compared to baselines that do not leverage physically grounded VLMs. We additionally illustrate the benefits of our physically grounded VLM on a real robot, where it improves task success rates. We release our dataset and provide further details and visualizations of our results at https://iliad.stanford.edu/pg-vlm/.
summary: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) have led to improved performance on tasks such as visual question answering and image captioning. Consequently, these models are now well-positioned to reason about the physical world, particularly within domains such as robotic manipulation. However, current VLMs are limited in their understanding of the physical concepts (e.g., material, fragility) of common objects, which restricts their usefulness for robotic manipulation tasks that involve interaction and physical reasoning about such objects. To address this limitation, we propose PhysObjects, an object-centric dataset of 39.6K crowd-sourced and 417K automated physical concept annotations of common household objects. We demonstrate that fine-tuning a VLM on PhysObjects improves its understanding of physical object concepts, including generalization to held-out concepts, by capturing human priors of these concepts from visual appearance. We incorporate this physically grounded VLM in an interactive framework with a large language model-based robotic planner, and show improved planning performance on tasks that require reasoning about physical object concepts, compared to baselines that do not leverage physically grounded VLMs. We additionally illustrate the benefits of our physically grounded VLM on a real robot, where it improves task success rates. We release our dataset and provide further details and visualizations of our results at https://iliad.stanford.edu/pg-vlm/.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言模型 (VLM) 的最新进展提高了视觉问答和图像字幕等任务的性能。因此，这些模型现在可以很好地推理物理世界，特别是在机器人操纵等领域。然而，当前的 VLM 对常见物体的物理概念（例如材料、脆弱性）的理解有限，这限制了它们在涉及此类物体的交互和物理推理的机器人操作任务中的有用性。为了解决这一限制，我们提出了 PhysObjects，这是一个以对象为中心的数据集，包含常见家庭物品的 39.6K 众包和 417K 自动化物理概念注释。我们证明，在 PhysObjects 上微调 VLM 可以通过从视觉外观中捕获这些概念的人类先验，提高其对物理对象概念的理解，包括对保留概念的泛化。我们将这种基于物理的 VLM 与基于大型语言模型的机器人规划器结合到一个交互式框架中，并且与不利用基于物理的 VLM 的基线相比，在需要推理物理对象概念的任务上展示了改进的规划性能。我们还说明了物理接地 VLM 在真实机器人上的优势，它提高了任务成功率。我们在 https://iliad.stanford.edu/pg-vlm/ 上发布了我们的数据集并提供了我们结果的更多详细信息和可视化结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于物理概念的视觉-语言模型（PhysObjects），以增强机器人操作任务中对物体物理特性的理解。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型缺乏对物体物理属性（如材质、易碎性）的准确理解，限制了其在需要物理推理的机器人操作中的应用。
AI.method: 构建包含39.6K人工标注和417K自动化标注的物理概念数据集PhysObjects，微调视觉-语言模型并结合大型语言模型的机器人规划框架。
AI.result: 微调后的模型在物理概念理解及任务规划上优于基线方法，实际机器人测试中任务成功率显著提升。

search_text: Physically Grounded Vision-Language Models for Robotic Manipulation 用于机器人操作的物理基础视觉语言模型 Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) have led to improved performance on tasks such as visual question answering and image captioning. Consequently, these models are now well-positioned to reason about the physical world, particularly within domains such as robotic manipulation. However, current VLMs are limited in their understanding of the physical concepts (e.g., material, fragility) of common objects, which restricts their usefulness for robotic manipulation tasks that involve interaction and physical reasoning about such objects. To address this limitation, we propose PhysObjects, an object-centric dataset of 39.6K crowd-sourced and 417K automated physical concept annotations of common household objects. We demonstrate that fine-tuning a VLM on PhysObjects improves its understanding of physical object concepts, including generalization to held-out concepts, by capturing human priors of these concepts from visual appearance. We incorporate this physically grounded VLM in an interactive framework with a large language model-based robotic planner, and show improved planning performance on tasks that require reasoning about physical object concepts, compared to baselines that do not leverage physically grounded VLMs. We additionally illustrate the benefits of our physically grounded VLM on a real robot, where it improves task success rates. We release our dataset and provide further details and visualizations of our results at https://iliad.stanford.edu/pg-vlm/. 视觉语言模型 (VLM) 的最新进展提高了视觉问答和图像字幕等任务的性能。因此，这些模型现在可以很好地推理物理世界，特别是在机器人操纵等领域。然而，当前的 VLM 对常见物体的物理概念（例如材料、脆弱性）的理解有限，这限制了它们在涉及此类物体的交互和物理推理的机器人操作任务中的有用性。为了解决这一限制，我们提出了 PhysObjects，这是一个以对象为中心的数据集，包含常见家庭物品的 39.6K 众包和 417K 自动化物理概念注释。我们证明，在 PhysObjects 上微调 VLM 可以通过从视觉外观中捕获这些概念的人类先验，提高其对物理对象概念的理解，包括对保留概念的泛化。我们将这种基于物理的 VLM 与基于大型语言模型的机器人规划器结合到一个交互式框架中，并且与不利用基于物理的 VLM 的基线相比，在需要推理物理对象概念的任务上展示了改进的规划性能。我们还说明了物理接地 VLM 在真实机器人上的优势，它提高了任务成功率。我们在 https://iliad.stanford.edu/pg-vlm/ 上发布了我们的数据集并提供了我们结果的更多详细信息和可视化结果。 本文提出一种基于物理概念的视觉-语言模型（PhysObjects），以增强机器人操作任务中对物体物理特性的理解。 Jensen Gao,Bidipta Sarkar,Fei Xia,Ted Xiao,Jiajun Wu,Brian Ichter,Anirudha Majumdar,Dorsa Sadigh cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Teru Nagamori,Sayaka Shiota,Hitoshi Kiya
title: Domain Adaptation for Efficiently Fine-tuning Vision Transformer with Encrypted Images
title_zh: 使用加密图像有效微调视觉变压器的域适应
abstract: In recent years, deep neural networks (DNNs) trained with transformed data have been applied to various applications such as privacy-preserving learning, access control, and adversarial defenses. However, the use of transformed data decreases the performance of models. Accordingly, in this paper, we propose a novel method for fine-tuning models with transformed images under the use of the vision transformer (ViT). The proposed domain adaptation method does not cause the accuracy degradation of models, and it is carried out on the basis of the embedding structure of ViT. In experiments, we confirmed that the proposed method prevents accuracy degradation even when using encrypted images with the CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 datasets.
summary: In recent years, deep neural networks (DNNs) trained with transformed data have been applied to various applications such as privacy-preserving learning, access control, and adversarial defenses. However, the use of transformed data decreases the performance of models. Accordingly, in this paper, we propose a novel method for fine-tuning models with transformed images under the use of the vision transformer (ViT). The proposed domain adaptation method does not cause the accuracy degradation of models, and it is carried out on the basis of the embedding structure of ViT. In experiments, we confirmed that the proposed method prevents accuracy degradation even when using encrypted images with the CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 datasets.
abstract_zh: 近年来，用转换后的数据训练的深度神经网络（DNN）已应用于隐私保护学习、访问控制和对抗性防御等各种应用中。然而，使用转换后的数据会降低模型的性能。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种使用视觉变换器（ViT）对变换图像进行微调模型的新方法。所提出的域自适应方法不会导致模型精度下降，并且是在ViT嵌入结构的基础上进行的。在实验中，我们证实即使在 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 数据集上使用加密图像时，所提出的方法也可以防止精度下降。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于视觉Transformer的领域适应方法，在加密图像上微调模型以防止精度下降
AI.motivation: 变换数据（如加密图像）会降低模型性能，需解决加密场景下的模型准确性问题
AI.method: 基于ViT的嵌入结构设计领域适应方法，无需修改原有结构，在加密图像上微调模型
AI.result: 实验表明方法在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上有效防止精度下降
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了加密图像微调中的准确性问题，适用于隐私保护等场景

authors_text: Blake VanBerlo,Jesse Hoey,Alexander Wong
title: A Survey of the Impact of Self-Supervised Pretraining for Diagnostic Tasks with Radiological Images
title_zh: 自监督预训练对放射图像诊断任务影响的调查
comment: 32 pages, 6 figures, a literature survey submitted to BMC Medical Imaging
comments: 32 pages, 6 figures, a literature survey submitted to BMC Medical Imaging
abstract: Self-supervised pretraining has been observed to be effective at improving feature representations for transfer learning, leveraging large amounts of unlabelled data. This review summarizes recent research into its usage in X-ray, computed tomography, magnetic resonance, and ultrasound imaging, concentrating on studies that compare self-supervised pretraining to fully supervised learning for diagnostic tasks such as classification and segmentation. The most pertinent finding is that self-supervised pretraining generally improves downstream task performance compared to full supervision, most prominently when unlabelled examples greatly outnumber labelled examples. Based on the aggregate evidence, recommendations are provided for practitioners considering using self-supervised learning. Motivated by limitations identified in current research, directions and practices for future study are suggested, such as integrating clinical knowledge with theoretically justified self-supervised learning methods, evaluating on public datasets, growing the modest body of evidence for ultrasound, and characterizing the impact of self-supervised pretraining on generalization.
summary: Self-supervised pretraining has been observed to be effective at improving feature representations for transfer learning, leveraging large amounts of unlabelled data. This review summarizes recent research into its usage in X-ray, computed tomography, magnetic resonance, and ultrasound imaging, concentrating on studies that compare self-supervised pretraining to fully supervised learning for diagnostic tasks such as classification and segmentation. The most pertinent finding is that self-supervised pretraining generally improves downstream task performance compared to full supervision, most prominently when unlabelled examples greatly outnumber labelled examples. Based on the aggregate evidence, recommendations are provided for practitioners considering using self-supervised learning. Motivated by limitations identified in current research, directions and practices for future study are suggested, such as integrating clinical knowledge with theoretically justified self-supervised learning methods, evaluating on public datasets, growing the modest body of evidence for ultrasound, and characterizing the impact of self-supervised pretraining on generalization.
abstract_zh: 据观察，自监督预训练可以利用大量未标记数据，有效地改善迁移学习的特征表示。这篇综述总结了其在 X 射线、计算机断层扫描、磁共振和超声成像中的应用的最新研究，重点关注对分类和分割等诊断任务的自监督预训练与完全监督学习进行比较的研究。最相关的发现是，与完全监督相比，自监督预训练通常可以提高下游任务性能，尤其是当未标记示例数量大大超过标记示例时。根据汇总证据，为考虑使用自我监督学习的从业者提供建议。由于当前研究中发现的局限性，建议了未来研究的方向和实践，例如将临床知识与理论上合理的自我监督学习方法相结合，评估公共数据集，增加超声的适度证据，以及描述自我监督预训练对泛化的影响。

AI.tldr: 综述自监督预训练在放射学图像诊断任务中的影响
AI.motivation: 探讨自监督预训练在放射学图像诊断中的有效性，特别是在未标记数据丰富的场景下，并提出未来研究方向
AI.method: 通过文献综述总结自监督预训练在X光、CT、MRI和超声图像中的应用，并比较其与全监督学习的性能差异
AI.result: 自监督预训练在未标记数据远多于标记数据时显著提升下游任务性能
AI.conclusion: 建议整合临床知识与理论自监督方法，未来需在公共数据集上验证，并加强超声领域的研究

authors_text: Javier Ferrando,Matthias Sperber,Hendra Setiawan,Dominic Telaar,Saša Hasan
title: Automating Behavioral Testing in Machine Translation
title_zh: 机器翻译中的自动化行为测试
abstract: Behavioral testing in NLP allows fine-grained evaluation of systems by examining their linguistic capabilities through the analysis of input-output behavior. Unfortunately, existing work on behavioral testing in Machine Translation (MT) is currently restricted to largely handcrafted tests covering a limited range of capabilities and languages. To address this limitation, we propose to use Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate a diverse set of source sentences tailored to test the behavior of MT models in a range of situations. We can then verify whether the MT model exhibits the expected behavior through matching candidate sets that are also generated using LLMs. Our approach aims to make behavioral testing of MT systems practical while requiring only minimal human effort. In our experiments, we apply our proposed evaluation framework to assess multiple available MT systems, revealing that while in general pass-rates follow the trends observable from traditional accuracy-based metrics, our method was able to uncover several important differences and potential bugs that go unnoticed when relying only on accuracy.
summary: Behavioral testing in NLP allows fine-grained evaluation of systems by examining their linguistic capabilities through the analysis of input-output behavior. Unfortunately, existing work on behavioral testing in Machine Translation (MT) is currently restricted to largely handcrafted tests covering a limited range of capabilities and languages. To address this limitation, we propose to use Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate a diverse set of source sentences tailored to test the behavior of MT models in a range of situations. We can then verify whether the MT model exhibits the expected behavior through matching candidate sets that are also generated using LLMs. Our approach aims to make behavioral testing of MT systems practical while requiring only minimal human effort. In our experiments, we apply our proposed evaluation framework to assess multiple available MT systems, revealing that while in general pass-rates follow the trends observable from traditional accuracy-based metrics, our method was able to uncover several important differences and potential bugs that go unnoticed when relying only on accuracy.
abstract_zh: NLP 中的行为测试可以通过分析输入输出行为来检查系统的语言能力，从而对系统进行细粒度的评估。不幸的是，机器翻译 (MT) 行为测试的现有工作目前仅限于手工测试，涵盖有限的功能和语言范围。为了解决这一限制，我们建议使用大型语言模型 (LLM) 生成一组不同的源句子，专门用于测试 MT 模型在各种情况下的行为。然后，我们可以通过匹配同样使用 LLM 生成的候选集来验证 MT 模型是否表现出预期的行为。我们的方法旨在使 MT 系统的行为测试变得实用，同时只需要最少的人力。在我们的实验中，我们应用我们提出的评估框架来评估多个可用的机器翻译系统，结果表明，虽然一般来说通过率遵循传统的基于准确性的指标可观察到的趋势，但我们的方法能够发现仅依赖准确性时被忽视的几个重要差异和潜在错误。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用大语言模型（LLMs）自动生成多样化测试用例，实现机器翻译系统的行为测试自动化，减少人工干预。
AI.motivation: 现有机器翻译行为测试依赖手工编写测试用例，覆盖范围有限且效率低下，难以全面评估系统行为。
AI.method: 通过LLMs生成针对性源语句和候选参考译文，构建自动化测试框架，验证MT模型在不同场景下的行为表现。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法与传统准确率指标趋势一致，但能发现传统方法遗漏的系统性差异和潜在错误。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提升了行为测试的实用性和有效性，为机器翻译系统的精细化评估提供了新途径。

search_text: Automating Behavioral Testing in Machine Translation 机器翻译中的自动化行为测试 Behavioral testing in NLP allows fine-grained evaluation of systems by examining their linguistic capabilities through the analysis of input-output behavior. Unfortunately, existing work on behavioral testing in Machine Translation (MT) is currently restricted to largely handcrafted tests covering a limited range of capabilities and languages. To address this limitation, we propose to use Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate a diverse set of source sentences tailored to test the behavior of MT models in a range of situations. We can then verify whether the MT model exhibits the expected behavior through matching candidate sets that are also generated using LLMs. Our approach aims to make behavioral testing of MT systems practical while requiring only minimal human effort. In our experiments, we apply our proposed evaluation framework to assess multiple available MT systems, revealing that while in general pass-rates follow the trends observable from traditional accuracy-based metrics, our method was able to uncover several important differences and potential bugs that go unnoticed when relying only on accuracy.
