authors_text: Abe Ejilemele,Jorge Mendez-Mendez
title: Continual Improvement of Threshold-Based Novelty Detection
title_zh: 基于阈值的新颖性检测的持续改进
comment: Presented in the workshop track at CoLLAs 2023
comments: Presented in the workshop track at CoLLAs 2023
abstract: When evaluated in dynamic, open-world situations, neural networks struggle to detect unseen classes. This issue complicates the deployment of continual learners in realistic environments where agents are not explicitly informed when novel categories are encountered. A common family of techniques for detecting novelty relies on thresholds of similarity between observed data points and the data used for training. However, these methods often require manually specifying (ahead of time) the value of these thresholds, and are therefore incapable of adapting to the nature of the data. We propose a new method for automatically selecting these thresholds utilizing a linear search and leave-one-out cross-validation on the ID classes. We demonstrate that this novel method for selecting thresholds results in improved total accuracy on MNIST, Fashion MNIST, and CIFAR-10.
summary: When evaluated in dynamic, open-world situations, neural networks struggle to detect unseen classes. This issue complicates the deployment of continual learners in realistic environments where agents are not explicitly informed when novel categories are encountered. A common family of techniques for detecting novelty relies on thresholds of similarity between observed data points and the data used for training. However, these methods often require manually specifying (ahead of time) the value of these thresholds, and are therefore incapable of adapting to the nature of the data. We propose a new method for automatically selecting these thresholds utilizing a linear search and leave-one-out cross-validation on the ID classes. We demonstrate that this novel method for selecting thresholds results in improved total accuracy on MNIST, Fashion MNIST, and CIFAR-10.
abstract_zh: 当在动态、开放世界的情况下进行评估时，神经网络很难检测到看不见的类别。这个问题使持续学习者在现实环境中的部署变得复杂，在现实环境中，当遇到新类别时，智能体不会被明确通知。用于检测新颖性的常见技术系列依赖于观察到的数据点与用于训练的数据之间的相似性阈值。然而，这些方法通常需要手动指定（提前）这些阈值，因此无法适应数据的性质。我们提出了一种新方法，利用 ID 类的线性搜索和留一交叉验证来自动选择这些阈值。我们证明，这种选择阈值的新方法可以提高 MNIST、Fashion MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 的总体准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进基于阈值的新颖性检测方法，以解决动态开放世界中神经网络难以检测未见类别的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于相似度阈值的新颖性检测方法需手动设定阈值，无法适应数据特性，导致在真实动态环境中检测性能不足。
AI.method: 通过线性搜索结合留一法交叉验证，自动选择针对已知类别的最优相似度阈值。
AI.result: 该方法在MNIST、Fashion MNIST和CIFAR-10数据集上均实现了更高的总准确率。
AI.conclusion: 自动阈值选择方法能有效提升动态环境下新颖性检测的鲁棒性，为持续学习提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Manav Kulshrestha,Ahmed H. Qureshi
title: Structural Concept Learning via Graph Attention for Multi-Level Rearrangement Planning
title_zh: 通过图注意力学习结构概念进行多级重排规划
comment: Accepted to Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2023
comments: Accepted to Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2023
abstract: Robotic manipulation tasks, such as object rearrangement, play a crucial role in enabling robots to interact with complex and arbitrary environments. Existing work focuses primarily on single-level rearrangement planning and, even if multiple levels exist, dependency relations among substructures are geometrically simpler, like tower stacking. We propose Structural Concept Learning (SCL), a deep learning approach that leverages graph attention networks to perform multi-level object rearrangement planning for scenes with structural dependency hierarchies. It is trained on a self-generated simulation data set with intuitive structures, works for unseen scenes with an arbitrary number of objects and higher complexity of structures, infers independent substructures to allow for task parallelization over multiple manipulators, and generalizes to the real world. We compare our method with a range of classical and model-based baselines to show that our method leverages its scene understanding to achieve better performance, flexibility, and efficiency. The dataset, supplementary details, videos, and code implementation are available at: https://manavkulshrestha.github.io/scl
summary: Robotic manipulation tasks, such as object rearrangement, play a crucial role in enabling robots to interact with complex and arbitrary environments. Existing work focuses primarily on single-level rearrangement planning and, even if multiple levels exist, dependency relations among substructures are geometrically simpler, like tower stacking. We propose Structural Concept Learning (SCL), a deep learning approach that leverages graph attention networks to perform multi-level object rearrangement planning for scenes with structural dependency hierarchies. It is trained on a self-generated simulation data set with intuitive structures, works for unseen scenes with an arbitrary number of objects and higher complexity of structures, infers independent substructures to allow for task parallelization over multiple manipulators, and generalizes to the real world. We compare our method with a range of classical and model-based baselines to show that our method leverages its scene understanding to achieve better performance, flexibility, and efficiency. The dataset, supplementary details, videos, and code implementation are available at: https://manavkulshrestha.github.io/scl
abstract_zh: 机器人操纵任务（例如对象重新排列）在使机器人能够与复杂且任意的环境交互方面发挥着至关重要的作用。现有的工作主要集中在单层重排规划上，即使存在多个层，子结构之间的依赖关系在几何上也更简单，就像塔堆叠一样。我们提出结构概念学习（SCL），这是一种深度学习方法，利用图注意力网络对具有结构依赖层次结构的场景执行多级对象重排规划。它在具有直观结构的自生成模拟数据集上进行训练，适用于具有任意数量的对象和较高结构复杂性的未见过的场景，推断独立的子结构以允许多个操纵器上的任务并行化，并推广到现实世界。我们将我们的方法与一系列经典和基于模型的基线进行比较，以表明我们的方法利用其场景理解来实现更好的性能、灵活性和效率。数据集、补充详细信息、视频和代码实现可在以下位置获取：https://manavkulshrestha.github.io/scl

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图注意力网络的深度学习方法SCL，用于解决具有结构依赖层次的多级物体重排规划问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要针对单级重排规划，且在处理复杂结构依赖关系时表现不足，难以应对现实场景中任意数量物体和复杂结构的挑战。
AI.method: 通过自生成的模拟数据集训练图注意力网络，学习物体间的结构依赖关系，实现对未知场景的泛化能力，并支持多机械臂并行操作。
AI.result: 实验表明SCL在性能、灵活性和效率上优于经典和模型基线方法，且能有效推广到真实世界场景。
AI.conclusion: SCL通过结构概念学习有效解决了多级物体重排问题，为复杂环境下的机器人操作提供了新思路。

It is trained on a self-generated simulation data set with intuitive structures, works for unseen scenes with an arbitrary number of objects and higher complexity of structures, infers independent substructures to allow for task parallelization over multiple manipulators, and generalizes to the real world. We compare our method with a range of classical and model-based baselines to show that our method leverages its scene understanding to achieve better performance, flexibility, and efficiency. The dataset, supplementary details, videos, and code implementation are available at: https://manavkulshrestha.github.io/scl 机器人操纵任务（例如对象重新排列）在使机器人能够与复杂且任意的环境交互方面发挥着至关重要的作用。现有的工作主要集中在单层重排规划上，即使存在多个层，子结构之间的依赖关系在几何上也更简单，就像塔堆叠一样。我们提出结构概念学习（SCL），这是一种深度学习方法，利用图注意力网络对具有结构依赖层次结构的场景执行多级对象重排规划。它在具有直观结构的自生成模拟数据集上进行训练，适用于具有任意数量的对象和较高结构复杂性的未见过的场景，推断独立的子结构以允许多个操纵器上的任务并行化，并推广到现实世界。我们将我们的方法与一系列经典和基于模型的基线进行比较，以表明我们的方法利用其场景理解来实现更好的性能、灵活性和效率。数据集、补充详细信息、视频和代码实现可在以下位置获取：https://manavkulshrestha.github.io/scl 本文提出了一种基于图注意力网络的深度学习方法SCL，用于解决具有结构依赖层次的多级物体重排规划问题。 Manav Kulshrestha,Ahmed H. Qureshi cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Felipe Gohring de Magalhães,Mahdi Nikdast,Gabriela Nicolescu
title: Integrated Photonic AI Accelerators under Hardware Security Attacks: Impacts and Countermeasures
title_zh: 硬件安全攻击下的集成光子AI加速器：影响与对策
abstract: Integrated photonics based on silicon photonics platform is driving several application domains, from enabling ultra-fast chip-scale communication in high-performance computing systems to energy-efficient optical computation in artificial intelligence (AI) hardware accelerators. Integrating silicon photonics into a system necessitates the adoption of interfaces between the photonic and the electronic subsystems, which are required for buffering data and optical-to-electrical and electrical-to-optical conversions. Consequently, this can lead to new and inevitable security breaches that cannot be fully addressed using hardware security solutions proposed for purely electronic systems. This paper explores different types of attacks profiting from such breaches in integrated photonic neural network accelerators. We show the impact of these attacks on the system performance (i.e., power and phase distributions, which impact accuracy) and possible solutions to counter such attacks.
summary: Integrated photonics based on silicon photonics platform is driving several application domains, from enabling ultra-fast chip-scale communication in high-performance computing systems to energy-efficient optical computation in artificial intelligence (AI) hardware accelerators. Integrating silicon photonics into a system necessitates the adoption of interfaces between the photonic and the electronic subsystems, which are required for buffering data and optical-to-electrical and electrical-to-optical conversions. Consequently, this can lead to new and inevitable security breaches that cannot be fully addressed using hardware security solutions proposed for purely electronic systems. This paper explores different types of attacks profiting from such breaches in integrated photonic neural network accelerators. We show the impact of these attacks on the system performance (i.e., power and phase distributions, which impact accuracy) and possible solutions to counter such attacks.
abstract_zh: 基于硅光子平台的集成光子学正在推动多个应用领域的发展，从实现高性能计算系统中的超快芯片级通信到人工智能（AI）硬件加速器中的节能光学计算。将硅光子集成到系统中需要在光子和电子子系统之间采用接口，这是缓冲数据以及光电和电光转换所​​必需的。因此，这可能会导致新的、不可避免的安全漏洞，而使用针对纯电子系统提出的硬件安全解决方案无法完全解决这些漏洞。本文探讨了从集成光子神经网络加速器中的此类漏洞中获利的不同类型的攻击。我们展示了这些攻击对系统性能（即影响精度的功率和相位分布）的影响以及应对此类攻击的可能解决方案。

AI.tldr: 研究集成光子AI加速器在硬件安全攻击下的影响及应对策略
AI.motivation: 集成光子系统因光电接口引入新安全漏洞，现有电子安全方案不足，需研究攻击影响及对策
AI.method: 分析多种硬件攻击类型，评估其对功率和相位分布的影响，并提出应对措施
AI.result: 揭示攻击对系统准确性的负面影响，并提出有效缓解方案
AI.conclusion: 集成光子AI加速器需强化硬件安全防护，未来需更多研究以应对新型攻击

authors_text: Karn N. Watcharasupat,Chih-Wei Wu,Yiwei Ding,Iroro Orife,Aaron J. Hipple,Phillip A. Williams,Scott Kramer,Alexander Lerch,William Wolcott
title: A Generalized Bandsplit Neural Network for Cinematic Audio Source Separation
title_zh: 用于电影音频源分离的广义带分裂神经网络
comment: Accepted to the IEEE Open Journal of Signal Processing (ICASSP 2024 Track)
comments: Accepted to the IEEE Open Journal of Signal Processing (ICASSP 2024 Track)
abstract: Cinematic audio source separation is a relatively new subtask of audio source separation, with the aim of extracting the dialogue, music, and effects stems from their mixture. In this work, we developed a model generalizing the Bandsplit RNN for any complete or overcomplete partitions of the frequency axis. Psychoacoustically motivated frequency scales were used to inform the band definitions which are now defined with redundancy for more reliable feature extraction. A loss function motivated by the signal-to-noise ratio and the sparsity-promoting property of the 1-norm was proposed. We additionally exploit the information-sharing property of a common-encoder setup to reduce computational complexity during both training and inference, improve separation performance for hard-to-generalize classes of sounds, and allow flexibility during inference time with detachable decoders. Our best model sets the state of the art on the Divide and Remaster dataset with performance above the ideal ratio mask for the dialogue stem.
summary: Cinematic audio source separation is a relatively new subtask of audio source separation, with the aim of extracting the dialogue, music, and effects stems from their mixture. In this work, we developed a model generalizing the Bandsplit RNN for any complete or overcomplete partitions of the frequency axis. Psychoacoustically motivated frequency scales were used to inform the band definitions which are now defined with redundancy for more reliable feature extraction. A loss function motivated by the signal-to-noise ratio and the sparsity-promoting property of the 1-norm was proposed. We additionally exploit the information-sharing property of a common-encoder setup to reduce computational complexity during both training and inference, improve separation performance for hard-to-generalize classes of sounds, and allow flexibility during inference time with detachable decoders. Our best model sets the state of the art on the Divide and Remaster dataset with performance above the ideal ratio mask for the dialogue stem.
abstract_zh: 电影音频源分离是音频源分离的一个相对较新的子任务，其目的是从它们的混合中提取对话、音乐和效果。在这项工作中，我们开发了一个模型，将 Bandsplit RNN 推广到频率轴的任何完整或过完整分区。心理声学驱动的频率尺度被用来告知频带定义，这些定义现在被定义为具有冗余，以便更可靠的特征提取。提出了一种由信噪比和 1-范数的稀疏性促进特性驱动的损失函数。我们还利用通用编码器设置的信息共享属性来降低训练和推理过程中的计算复杂性，提高难以概括的声音类别的分离性能，并在使用可拆卸解码器的推理时间内提供灵活性。我们的最佳模型在 Divide and Remaster 数据集上设置了最先进的技术，其性能高于对话主干的理想比率掩模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用的频带分割神经网络，用于从电影音频混合信号中分离对话、音乐和音效等声源。
AI.motivation: 传统音频源分离方法在处理电影音频时存在频率划分不灵活、特征提取可靠性不足及计算复杂度高等问题，需改进分离效果与效率。
AI.method: 基于频带分割RNN框架，采用心理声学频率尺度定义冗余频带；设计结合信噪比与L1范数的损失函数；通过共享编码器结构降低计算复杂度并支持推理时动态解码器分离。
AI.result: 在Divide and Remaster数据集上，模型在对话声源分离任务中超越理想比率掩码，达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过灵活频带划分与结构优化，在提升电影音频分离质量的同时降低了计算成本，为复杂声学场景分离提供了新思路。

authors_text: Nicos Isaak,Loizos Michael
title: Experience and Prediction: A Metric of Hardness for a Novel Litmus Test
title_zh: 经验与预测：新型石蕊测试的硬度度量
abstract: In the last decade, the Winograd Schema Challenge (WSC) has become a central aspect of the research community as a novel litmus test. Consequently, the WSC has spurred research interest because it can be seen as the means to understand human behavior. In this regard, the development of new techniques has made possible the usage of Winograd schemas in various fields, such as the design of novel forms of CAPTCHAs. Work from the literature that established a baseline for human adult performance on the WSC has shown that not all schemas are the same, meaning that they could potentially be categorized according to their perceived hardness for humans. In this regard, this \textit{hardness-metric} could be used in future challenges or in the WSC CAPTCHA service to differentiate between Winograd schemas. Recent work of ours has shown that this could be achieved via the design of an automated system that is able to output the hardness-indexes of Winograd schemas, albeit with limitations regarding the number of schemas it could be applied on. This paper adds to previous research by presenting a new system that is based on Machine Learning (ML), able to output the hardness of any Winograd schema faster and more accurately than any other previously used method. Our developed system, which works within two different approaches, namely the random forest and deep learning (LSTM-based), is ready to be used as an extension of any other system that aims to differentiate between Winograd schemas, according to their perceived hardness for humans. At the same time, along with our developed system we extend previous work by presenting the results of a large-scale experiment that shows how human performance varies across Winograd schemas.
summary: In the last decade, the Winograd Schema Challenge (WSC) has become a central aspect of the research community as a novel litmus test. Consequently, the WSC has spurred research interest because it can be seen as the means to understand human behavior. In this regard, the development of new techniques has made possible the usage of Winograd schemas in various fields, such as the design of novel forms of CAPTCHAs. Work from the literature that established a baseline for human adult performance on the WSC has shown that not all schemas are the same, meaning that they could potentially be categorized according to their perceived hardness for humans. In this regard, this \textit{hardness-metric} could be used in future challenges or in the WSC CAPTCHA service to differentiate between Winograd schemas. Recent work of ours has shown that this could be achieved via the design of an automated system that is able to output the hardness-indexes of Winograd schemas, albeit with limitations regarding the number of schemas it could be applied on. This paper adds to previous research by presenting a new system that is based on Machine Learning (ML), able to output the hardness of any Winograd schema faster and more accurately than any other previously used method. Our developed system, which works within two different approaches, namely the random forest and deep learning (LSTM-based), is ready to be used as an extension of any other system that aims to differentiate between Winograd schemas, according to their perceived hardness for humans. At the same time, along with our developed system we extend previous work by presenting the results of a large-scale experiment that shows how human performance varies across Winograd schemas.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，Winograd Schema Challenge (WSC) 作为一种新颖的试金石已经成为研究界的一个核心方面。因此，WSC 激发了研究兴趣，因为它可以被视为理解人类行为的手段。在这方面，新技术的发展使得 Winograd 模式在各个领域的使用成为可能，例如新形式的验证码的设计。为人类成年人在 WSC 上的表现建立基线的文献表明，并非所有模式都是相同的，这意味着它们可能会根据人类感知的硬度进行分类。在这方面，这个 \textit{hardness-metric} 可以在未来的挑战中或在 WSC CAPTCHA 服务中使用，以区分 Winograd 模式。我们最近的工作表明，这可以通过设计一个自动化系统来实现，该系统能够输出 Winograd 模式的硬度指数，尽管它可以应用的模式数量存在限制。本文对之前的研究进行了补充，提出了一种基于机器学习 (ML) 的新系统，能够比之前使用的任何其他方法更快、更准确地输出任何 Winograd 模式的硬度。我们开发的系统采用两种不同的方法，即随机森林和深度学习（基于 LSTM），可以用作任何其他系统的扩展，旨在根据人类感知的硬度来区分 Winograd 模式。与此同时，除了我们开发的系统之外，我们还通过展示大规模实验的结果来扩展之前的工作，该实验显示了人类表现在 Winograd 模式中的差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的方法，用于更快速和准确地评估Winograd Schema（WSC）的难度指标，并通过大规模实验验证了人类在不同WSC上的表现差异。
AI.motivation: 现有研究显示并非所有WSC具有相同难度，但传统方法在处理规模和准确性上存在局限，需开发更高效的自动化系统以区分WSC难度。
AI.method: 设计了两种机器学习方法（随机森林和基于LSTM的深度学习模型），通过训练模型输出WSC的难度指数，并进行大规模实验分析人类表现差异。
AI.result: 新系统相比现有方法在速度和准确性上均有提升，实验结果揭示了人类在不同WSC上的性能变化规律。
AI.conclusion: 提出的机器学习系统可有效评估WSC难度，为未来挑战和CAPTCHA服务提供工具，同时实验数据为理解人类认知差异提供了新视角。

search_text: Experience and Prediction: A Metric of Hardness for a Novel Litmus Test 经验与预测：新型石蕊测试的硬度度量 In the last decade, the Winograd Schema Challenge (WSC) has become a central aspect of the research community as a novel litmus test. Consequently, the WSC has spurred research interest because it can be seen as the means to understand human behavior. In this regard, the development of new techniques has made possible the usage of Winograd schemas in various fields, such as the design of novel forms of CAPTCHAs. Work from the literature that established a baseline for human adult performance on the WSC has shown that not all schemas are the same, meaning that they could potentially be categorized according to their perceived hardness for humans. In this regard, this \textit{hardness-metric} could be used in future challenges or in the WSC CAPTCHA service to differentiate between Winograd schemas. Recent work of ours has shown that this could be achieved via the design of an automated system that is able to output the hardness-indexes of Winograd schemas, albeit with limitations regarding the number of schemas it could be applied on. This paper adds to previous research by presenting a new system that is based on Machine Learning (ML), able to output the hardness of any Winograd schema faster and more accurately than any other previously used method. Our developed system, which works within two different approaches, namely the random forest and deep learning (LSTM-based), is ready to be used as an extension of any other system that aims to differentiate between Winograd schemas, according to their perceived hardness for humans. At the same time, along with our developed system we extend previous work by presenting the results of a large-scale experiment that shows how human performance varies across Winograd schemas. 在过去的十年中，Winograd Schema Challenge (WSC) 作为一种新颖的试金石已经成为研究界的一个核心方面。因此，WSC 激发了研究兴趣，因为它可以被视为理解人类行为的手段。在这方面，新技术的发展使得 Winograd 模式在各个领域的使用成为可能，例如新形式的验证码的设计。为人类成年人在 WSC 上的表现建立基线的文献表明，并非所有模式都是相同的，这意味着它们可能会根据人类感知的硬度进行分类。在这方面，这个 \textit{hardness-metric} 可以在未来的挑战中或在 WSC CAPTCHA 服务中使用，以区分 Winograd 模式。我们最近的工作表明，这可以通过设计一个自动化系统来实现，该系统能够输出 Winograd 模式的硬度指数，尽管它可以应用的模式数量存在限制。本文对之前的研究进行了补充，提出了一种基于机器学习 (ML) 的新系统，能够比之前使用的任何其他方法更快、更准确地输出任何 Winograd 模式的硬度。我们开发的系统采用两种不同的方法，即随机森林和深度学习（基于 LSTM），可以用作任何其他系统的扩展，旨在根据人类感知的硬度来区分 Winograd 模式。与此同时，除了我们开发的系统之外，我们还通过展示大规模实验的结果来扩展之前的工作，该实验显示了人类表现在 Winograd 模式中的差异。 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的方法，用于更快速和准确地评估Winograd Schema（WSC）的难度指标，并通过大规模实验验证了人类在不同WSC上的表现差异。 Nicos Isaak,Loizos Michael cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Martin J. Menten,Johannes C. Paetzold,Veronika A. Zimmer,Suprosanna Shit,Ivan Ezhov,Robbie Holland,Monika Probst,Julia A. Schnabel,Daniel Rueckert
title: A skeletonization algorithm for gradient-based optimization
title_zh: 基于梯度优化的骨架化算法
abstract: The skeleton of a digital image is a compact representation of its topology, geometry, and scale. It has utility in many computer vision applications, such as image description, segmentation, and registration. However, skeletonization has only seen limited use in contemporary deep learning solutions. Most existing skeletonization algorithms are not differentiable, making it impossible to integrate them with gradient-based optimization. Compatible algorithms based on morphological operations and neural networks have been proposed, but their results often deviate from the geometry and topology of the true medial axis. This work introduces the first three-dimensional skeletonization algorithm that is both compatible with gradient-based optimization and preserves an object's topology. Our method is exclusively based on matrix additions and multiplications, convolutional operations, basic non-linear functions, and sampling from a uniform probability distribution, allowing it to be easily implemented in any major deep learning library. In benchmarking experiments, we prove the advantages of our skeletonization algorithm compared to non-differentiable, morphological, and neural-network-based baselines. Finally, we demonstrate the utility of our algorithm by integrating it with two medical image processing applications that use gradient-based optimization: deep-learning-based blood vessel segmentation, and multimodal registration of the mandible in computed tomography and magnetic resonance images.
summary: The skeleton of a digital image is a compact representation of its topology, geometry, and scale. It has utility in many computer vision applications, such as image description, segmentation, and registration. However, skeletonization has only seen limited use in contemporary deep learning solutions. Most existing skeletonization algorithms are not differentiable, making it impossible to integrate them with gradient-based optimization. Compatible algorithms based on morphological operations and neural networks have been proposed, but their results often deviate from the geometry and topology of the true medial axis. This work introduces the first three-dimensional skeletonization algorithm that is both compatible with gradient-based optimization and preserves an object's topology. Our method is exclusively based on matrix additions and multiplications, convolutional operations, basic non-linear functions, and sampling from a uniform probability distribution, allowing it to be easily implemented in any major deep learning library. In benchmarking experiments, we prove the advantages of our skeletonization algorithm compared to non-differentiable, morphological, and neural-network-based baselines. Finally, we demonstrate the utility of our algorithm by integrating it with two medical image processing applications that use gradient-based optimization: deep-learning-based blood vessel segmentation, and multimodal registration of the mandible in computed tomography and magnetic resonance images.
abstract_zh: 数字图像的骨架是其拓扑、几何形状和比例的紧凑表示。它在许多计算机视觉应用中都很有用，例如图像描述、分割和配准。然而，骨架化在当代深度学习解决方案中的应用非常有限。大多数现有的骨架化算法都是不可微分的，因此无法将它们与基于梯度的优化集成。基于形态学运算和神经网络的兼容算法已经被提出，但它们的结果往往偏离真实中轴的几何和拓扑。这项工作引入了第一个三维骨架化算法，该算法既与基于梯度的优化兼容，又保留了对象的拓扑。我们的方法完全基于矩阵加法和乘法、卷积运算、基本非线性函数以及从均匀概率分布中采样，使其可以在任何主要深度学习库中轻松实现。在基准测试实验中，我们证明了我们的骨架化算法与不可微分、形态学和基于神经网络的基线相比的优势。最后，我们通过将算法与使用基于梯度的优化的两个医学图像处理应用程序集成来展示该算法的实用性：基于深度学习的血管分割以及计算机断层扫描和磁共振图像中下颌骨的多模态配准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于梯度优化的三维骨架化算法，能够保留物体拓扑结构并易于在深度学习框架中实现。
AI.motivation: 传统骨架化算法难以与深度学习结合，现有可微方法在几何和拓扑保真度上存在不足，需开发兼容梯度优化且保持拓扑结构的算法。
AI.method: 基于矩阵运算、卷积操作、基础非线性函数及均匀分布采样，构建全可微三维骨架化算法，支持主流深度学习库实现。
AI.result: 基准测试优于非微分形态学方法和神经网络基线，在医学图像处理（血管分割、颌骨多模态配准）中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法实现了骨架化与梯度优化的兼容性，为医学图像处理等任务提供了拓扑保真解决方案，填补了可微骨架化领域的空白。

However, skeletonization has only seen limited use in contemporary deep learning solutions. Compatible algorithms based on morphological operations and neural networks have been proposed, but their results often deviate from the geometry and topology of the true medial axis. Our method is exclusively based on matrix additions and multiplications, convolutional operations, basic non-linear functions, and sampling from a uniform probability distribution, allowing it to be easily implemented in any major deep learning library. authors_text: Mohamad Qadri,Michael Kaess
title: Learning Observation Models with Incremental Non-Differentiable Graph Optimizers in the Loop for Robotics State Estimation
title_zh: 在循环中使用增量不可微图优化器学习观察模型以进行机器人状态估计
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures. Published at the Differentiable Almost Everything Workshop of the 40th International Conference on Machine Learning
comments: 6 pages, 4 figures. Published at the Differentiable Almost Everything Workshop of the 40th International Conference on Machine Learning
abstract: We consider the problem of learning observation models for robot state estimation with incremental non-differentiable optimizers in the loop. Convergence to the correct belief over the robot state is heavily dependent on a proper tuning of observation models which serve as input to the optimizer. We propose a gradient-based learning method which converges much quicker to model estimates that lead to solutions of much better quality compared to an existing state-of-the-art method as measured by the tracking accuracy over unseen robot test trajectories.
summary: We consider the problem of learning observation models for robot state estimation with incremental non-differentiable optimizers in the loop. Convergence to the correct belief over the robot state is heavily dependent on a proper tuning of observation models which serve as input to the optimizer. We propose a gradient-based learning method which converges much quicker to model estimates that lead to solutions of much better quality compared to an existing state-of-the-art method as measured by the tracking accuracy over unseen robot test trajectories.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在循环中使用增量不可微优化器来学习用于机器人状态估计的观察模型的问题。收敛到对机器人状态的正确信念在很大程度上取决于对作为优化器输入的观察模型的适当调整。我们提出了一种基于梯度的学习方法，该方法可以更快地收敛到模型估计，与通过看不见的机器人测试轨迹的跟踪精度来衡量的现有最先进方法相比，该方法可以产生质量更好的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究在机器人状态估计中，如何利用增量非微分图优化器在环内学习观测模型，以提高状态估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在调整观测模型时收敛速度慢，导致状态估计质量不高，因此需要一种更高效的学习方法来优化观测模型。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于梯度的学习方法，结合增量非微分图优化器，在环内迭代优化观测模型参数，以加速收敛并提高估计精度。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在未见测试轨迹上的跟踪精度显著优于现有最先进的方法，收敛速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的梯度学习方法有效提升了机器人状态估计的准确性和收敛速度，为观测模型优化提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文主要研究在机器人状态估计中，如何利用增量非微分图优化器在环内学习观测模型，以提高状态估计的准确性。
motivation: 现有方法在调整观测模型时收敛速度慢，导致状态估计质量不高，因此需要一种更高效的学习方法来优化观测模型。
method: 提出了一种基于梯度的学习方法，结合增量非微分图优化器，在环内迭代优化观测模型参数，以加速收敛并提高估计精度。
result: 实验结果表明，该方法在未见测试轨迹上的跟踪精度显著优于现有最先进的方法，收敛速度更快。
conclusion: 本文提出的梯度学习方法有效提升了机器人状态估计的准确性和收敛速度，为观测模型优化提供了新思路。
search_text: Learning Observation Models with Incremental Non-Differentiable Graph Optimizers in the Loop for Robotics State Estimation 在循环中使用增量不可微图优化器学习观察模型以进行机器人状态估计 We consider the problem of learning observation models for robot state estimation with incremental non-differentiable optimizers in the loop. Convergence to the correct belief over the robot state is heavily dependent on a proper tuning of observation models which serve as input to the optimizer. We propose a gradient-based learning method which converges much quicker to model estimates that lead to solutions of much better quality compared to an existing state-of-the-art method as measured by the tracking accuracy over unseen robot test trajectories. 我们考虑在循环中使用增量不可微优化器来学习用于机器人状态估计的观察模型的问题。收敛到对机器人状态的正确信念在很大程度上取决于对作为优化器输入的观察模型的适当调整。我们提出了一种基于梯度的学习方法，该方法可以更快地收敛到模型估计，与通过看不见的机器人测试轨迹的跟踪精度来衡量的现有最先进方法相比，该方法可以产生质量更好的解决方案。 本文主要研究在机器人状态估计中，如何利用增量非微分图优化器在环内学习观测模型，以提高状态估计的准确性。 Mohamad Qadri,Michael Kaess cs.RO

authors_text: Martin Huschens,Martin Briesch,Dominik Sobania,Franz Rothlauf
title: Do You Trust ChatGPT? -- Perceived Credibility of Human and AI-Generated Content
title_zh: 您信任 ChatGPT 吗？ ——人类和人工智能生成内容的可信度
abstract: This paper examines how individuals perceive the credibility of content originating from human authors versus content generated by large language models, like the GPT language model family that powers ChatGPT, in different user interface versions. Surprisingly, our results demonstrate that regardless of the user interface presentation, participants tend to attribute similar levels of credibility. While participants also do not report any different perceptions of competence and trustworthiness between human and AI-generated content, they rate AI-generated content as being clearer and more engaging. The findings from this study serve as a call for a more discerning approach to evaluating information sources, encouraging users to exercise caution and critical thinking when engaging with content generated by AI systems.
summary: This paper examines how individuals perceive the credibility of content originating from human authors versus content generated by large language models, like the GPT language model family that powers ChatGPT, in different user interface versions. Surprisingly, our results demonstrate that regardless of the user interface presentation, participants tend to attribute similar levels of credibility. While participants also do not report any different perceptions of competence and trustworthiness between human and AI-generated content, they rate AI-generated content as being clearer and more engaging. The findings from this study serve as a call for a more discerning approach to evaluating information sources, encouraging users to exercise caution and critical thinking when engaging with content generated by AI systems.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了个人如何看待来自人类作者的内容与大型语言模型（例如为 ChatGPT 提供支持的 GPT 语言模型系列）在不同用户界面版本中生成的内容的可信度。令人惊讶的是，我们的结果表明，无论用户界面呈现如何，参与者都倾向于赋予相似的可信度水平。虽然参与者也没有报告对人类和人工智能生成的内容之间的能力和可信度有任何不同的看法，但他们认为人工智能生成的内容更清晰、更有吸引力。这项研究的结果呼吁采取更具洞察力的方法来评估信息源，鼓励用户在处理人工智能系统生成的内容时保持谨慎和批判性思维。

AI.tldr: 研究人类作者与AI生成内容的可信度差异
AI.motivation: 探讨用户对AI生成内容的信任度，以促进信息评估的批判性思维
AI.method: 通过不同用户界面版本的实验，比较参与者对人类与AI生成内容的可信度、能力及信任度的感知
AI.result: 参与者对人类和AI内容的可信度、能力及信任度无显著差异，但认为AI内容更清晰、更吸引人
AI.conclusion: 呼吁用户以更审慎的态度评估信息来源，培养对AI生成内容的批判性思维

authors_text: Eleonora Grassucci,Yuki Mitsufuji,Ping Zhang,Danilo Comminiello
title: Enhancing Semantic Communication with Deep Generative Models -- An ICASSP Special Session Overview
title_zh: 通过深度生成模型增强语义通信——ICASSP 特别会议概述
abstract: Semantic communication is poised to play a pivotal role in shaping the landscape of future AI-driven communication systems. Its challenge of extracting semantic information from the original complex content and regenerating semantically consistent data at the receiver, possibly being robust to channel corruptions, can be addressed with deep generative models. This ICASSP special session overview paper discloses the semantic communication challenges from the machine learning perspective and unveils how deep generative models will significantly enhance semantic communication frameworks in dealing with real-world complex data, extracting and exploiting semantic information, and being robust to channel corruptions. Alongside establishing this emerging field, this paper charts novel research pathways for the next generative semantic communication frameworks.
summary: Semantic communication is poised to play a pivotal role in shaping the landscape of future AI-driven communication systems. Its challenge of extracting semantic information from the original complex content and regenerating semantically consistent data at the receiver, possibly being robust to channel corruptions, can be addressed with deep generative models. This ICASSP special session overview paper discloses the semantic communication challenges from the machine learning perspective and unveils how deep generative models will significantly enhance semantic communication frameworks in dealing with real-world complex data, extracting and exploiting semantic information, and being robust to channel corruptions. Alongside establishing this emerging field, this paper charts novel research pathways for the next generative semantic communication frameworks.
abstract_zh: 语义通信将在塑造未来人工智能驱动的通信系统的格局中发挥关键作用。从原始复杂内容中提取语义信息并在接收器处重新生成语义一致的数据（可能对通道损坏具有鲁棒性）的挑战可以通过深度生成模型来解决。这篇 ICASSP 特别会议概述论文从机器学习的角度揭示了语义通信的挑战，并揭示了深度生成模型将如何显着增强语义通信框架，以处理现实世界的复杂数据、提取和利用语义信息以及对通道损坏具有鲁棒性。除了建立这个新兴领域之外，本文还为下一代生成语义通信框架绘制了新颖的研究路径。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了语义通信的挑战，并探讨了深度生成模型如何提升其在处理复杂数据和信道干扰中的性能。
AI.motivation: 随着AI驱动的通信系统发展，语义通信需解决从复杂数据中提取语义信息及在信道干扰下保持数据一致性的挑战，需更有效的方法。
AI.method: 通过分析深度生成模型（如GAN、VAE）在语义信息提取与再生中的应用，探讨其在提升通信鲁棒性中的机制。
AI.result: 结果表明，深度生成模型能有效提升语义通信的鲁棒性与数据一致性，并为下一代框架提供了新的研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 结论认为，深度生成模型是增强语义通信的关键，未来需进一步探索其在复杂环境下的应用与优化。

authors_text: Maryam Zare,Parham M. Kebria,Abbas Khosravi,Saeid Nahavandi
title: A Survey of Imitation Learning: Algorithms, Recent Developments, and Challenges
title_zh: 模仿学习调查：算法、最新进展和挑战
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: In recent years, the development of robotics and artificial intelligence (AI) systems has been nothing short of remarkable. As these systems continue to evolve, they are being utilized in increasingly complex and unstructured environments, such as autonomous driving, aerial robotics, and natural language processing. As a consequence, programming their behaviors manually or defining their behavior through reward functions (as done in reinforcement learning (RL)) has become exceedingly difficult. This is because such environments require a high degree of flexibility and adaptability, making it challenging to specify an optimal set of rules or reward signals that can account for all possible situations. In such environments, learning from an expert's behavior through imitation is often more appealing. This is where imitation learning (IL) comes into play - a process where desired behavior is learned by imitating an expert's behavior, which is provided through demonstrations. This paper aims to provide an introduction to IL and an overview of its underlying assumptions and approaches. It also offers a detailed description of recent advances and emerging areas of research in the field. Additionally, the paper discusses how researchers have addressed common challenges associated with IL and provides potential directions for future research. Overall, the goal of the paper is to provide a comprehensive guide to the growing field of IL in robotics and AI.
summary: In recent years, the development of robotics and artificial intelligence (AI) systems has been nothing short of remarkable. As these systems continue to evolve, they are being utilized in increasingly complex and unstructured environments, such as autonomous driving, aerial robotics, and natural language processing. As a consequence, programming their behaviors manually or defining their behavior through reward functions (as done in reinforcement learning (RL)) has become exceedingly difficult. This is because such environments require a high degree of flexibility and adaptability, making it challenging to specify an optimal set of rules or reward signals that can account for all possible situations. In such environments, learning from an expert's behavior through imitation is often more appealing. This is where imitation learning (IL) comes into play - a process where desired behavior is learned by imitating an expert's behavior, which is provided through demonstrations. This paper aims to provide an introduction to IL and an overview of its underlying assumptions and approaches. It also offers a detailed description of recent advances and emerging areas of research in the field. Additionally, the paper discusses how researchers have addressed common challenges associated with IL and provides potential directions for future research. Overall, the goal of the paper is to provide a comprehensive guide to the growing field of IL in robotics and AI.
abstract_zh: 近年来，机器人和人工智能（AI）系统的发展令人瞩目。随着这些系统的不断发展，它们被用于日益复杂和非结构化的环境中，例如自动驾驶、空中机器人和自然语言处理。因此，手动编程他们的行为或通过奖励函数定义他们的行为（如强化学习 (RL) 中所做的那样）变得极其困难。这是因为此类环境需要高度的灵活性和适应性，因此很难指定一组可以考虑所有可能情况的最佳规则或奖励信号。在这样的环境中，通过模仿来学习专家的行为通常更有吸引力。这就是模仿学习 (IL) 发挥作用的地方 - 通过模仿专家的行为（通过演示提供）来学习所需行为的过程。本文旨在介绍 IL 并概述其基本假设和方法。它还详细描述了该领域的最新进展和新兴研究领域。此外，本文还讨论了研究人员如何解决与 IL 相关的常见挑战，并为未来的研究提供了潜在的方向。总的来说，本文的目标是为机器人和人工智能领域不断发展的 IL 领域提供全面的指南。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了模仿学习（IL）的基本概念、算法、最新进展及挑战，旨在为机器人和人工智能领域提供全面的指南。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人和AI系统在复杂环境中的应用增多，传统手动编程或强化学习方法难以满足需求，模仿学习通过专家示范学习行为成为更优选择。
AI.method: 通过梳理IL的理论基础、算法框架、研究进展及典型挑战，结合现有文献进行系统性总结与分析。
AI.result: 全面概述了IL的核心假设、主流算法、前沿方向（如多智能体模仿学习），并总结了数据效率、泛化能力等关键问题的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 模仿学习为复杂环境下的AI行为学习提供了有效途径，但需进一步解决数据依赖性、安全性等挑战以推动实际应用。

tldr: 本文综述了模仿学习（IL）的基本概念、算法、最新进展及挑战，旨在为机器人和人工智能领域提供全面的指南。
motivation: 随着机器人和AI系统在复杂环境中的应用增多，传统手动编程或强化学习方法难以满足需求，模仿学习通过专家示范学习行为成为更优选择。
method: 通过梳理IL的理论基础、算法框架、研究进展及典型挑战，结合现有文献进行系统性总结与分析。
result: 全面概述了IL的核心假设、主流算法、前沿方向（如多智能体模仿学习），并总结了数据效率、泛化能力等关键问题的解决方案。
conclusion: 模仿学习为复杂环境下的AI行为学习提供了有效途径，但需进一步解决数据依赖性、安全性等挑战以推动实际应用。
search_text: A Survey of Imitation Learning: Algorithms, Recent Developments, and Challenges 模仿学习调查：算法、最新进展和挑战 In recent years, the development of robotics and artificial intelligence (AI) systems has been nothing short of remarkable. As these systems continue to evolve, they are being utilized in increasingly complex and unstructured environments, such as autonomous driving, aerial robotics, and natural language processing. As a consequence, programming their behaviors manually or defining their behavior through reward functions (as done in reinforcement learning (RL)) has become exceedingly difficult. This is because such environments require a high degree of flexibility and adaptability, making it challenging to specify an optimal set of rules or reward signals that can account for all possible situations. In such environments, learning from an expert's behavior through imitation is often more appealing. This is where imitation learning (IL) comes into play - a process where desired behavior is learned by imitating an expert's behavior, which is provided through demonstrations. This paper aims to provide an introduction to IL and an overview of its underlying assumptions and approaches. It also offers a detailed description of recent advances and emerging areas of research in the field. Additionally, the paper discusses how researchers have addressed common challenges associated with IL and provides potential directions for future research. Overall, the goal of the paper is to provide a comprehensive guide to the growing field of IL in robotics and AI. 近年来，机器人和人工智能（AI）系统的发展令人瞩目。随着这些系统的不断发展，它们被用于日益复杂和非结构化的环境中，例如自动驾驶、空中机器人和自然语言处理。因此，手动编程他们的行为或通过奖励函数定义他们的行为（如强化学习 (RL) 中所做的那样）变得极其困难。这是因为此类环境需要高度的灵活性和适应性，因此很难指定一组可以考虑所有可能情况的最佳规则或奖励信号。在这样的环境中，通过模仿来学习专家的行为通常更有吸引力。这就是模仿学习 (IL) 发挥作用的地方 - 通过模仿专家的行为（通过演示提供）来学习所需行为的过程。本文旨在介绍 IL 并概述其基本假设和方法。它还详细描述了该领域的最新进展和新兴研究领域。此外，本文还讨论了研究人员如何解决与 IL 相关的常见挑战，并为未来的研究提供了潜在的方向。总的来说，本文的目标是为机器人和人工智能领域不断发展的 IL 领域提供全面的指南。 本文综述了模仿学习（IL）的基本概念、算法、最新进展及挑战，旨在为机器人和人工智能领域提供全面的指南。 Maryam Zare,Parham M. Kebria,Abbas Khosravi,Saeid Nahavandi cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO,stat.ML

authors_text: Paul Myles Eugenio
title: Minimal Effective Theory for Phonotactic Memory: Capturing Local Correlations due to Errors in Speech
title_zh: 语音记忆的最小有效理论：捕获由于语音错误而导致的局部相关性
abstract: Spoken language evolves constrained by the economy of speech, which depends on factors such as the structure of the human mouth. This gives rise to local phonetic correlations in spoken words. Here we demonstrate that these local correlations facilitate the learning of spoken words by reducing their information content. We do this by constructing a locally-connected tensor-network model, inspired by similar variational models used for many-body physics, which exploits these local phonetic correlations to facilitate the learning of spoken words. The model is therefore a minimal model of phonetic memory, where "learning to pronounce" and "learning a word" are one and the same. A consequence of which is the learned ability to produce new words which are phonetically reasonable for the target language; as well as providing a hierarchy of the most likely errors that could be produced during the action of speech. We test our model against Latin and Turkish words. (The code is available on GitHub.)
summary: Spoken language evolves constrained by the economy of speech, which depends on factors such as the structure of the human mouth. This gives rise to local phonetic correlations in spoken words. Here we demonstrate that these local correlations facilitate the learning of spoken words by reducing their information content. We do this by constructing a locally-connected tensor-network model, inspired by similar variational models used for many-body physics, which exploits these local phonetic correlations to facilitate the learning of spoken words. The model is therefore a minimal model of phonetic memory, where "learning to pronounce" and "learning a word" are one and the same. A consequence of which is the learned ability to produce new words which are phonetically reasonable for the target language; as well as providing a hierarchy of the most likely errors that could be produced during the action of speech. We test our model against Latin and Turkish words. (The code is available on GitHub.)
abstract_zh: 口语的发展受到言语经济性的限制，而言语经济性又取决于人类口腔结构等因素。这产生了口语单词中的本地语音相关性。在这里，我们证明这些局部相关性通过减少口语单词的信息内容来促进口语单词的学习。我们通过构建一个局部连接的张量网络模型来实现这一点，该模型受到多体物理学中使用的类似变分模型的启发，该模型利用这些局部语音相关性来促进口语单词的学习。因此，该模型是语音记忆的最小模型，其中“学习发音”和“学习单词”是一回事。其结果是学习产生与目标语言语音合理的新单词的能力；以及提供在言语行为期间最可能产生的错误的层次结构。我们用拉丁语和土耳其语单词测试我们的模型。 （该代码可在 GitHub 上找到。）

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部音位相关性的张量网络模型，用于捕捉语音学习中的局部相关性，从而降低语音信息内容并促进新词生成。
AI.motivation: 口语演化受人类发音结构限制，产生局部音位相关性，这些相关性可降低语音学习的信息复杂度，但传统模型未有效捕捉此类局部特征。
AI.method: 构建局部连接的张量网络模型，借鉴多体物理变分模型方法，利用音位间的局部相关性模拟语音学习过程，将发音学习与词汇学习统一为同一过程。
AI.result: 模型在拉丁语和土耳其语词汇测试中成功生成符合目标语言音系规则的新词，并能预测语音生成中的常见错误类型。
AI.conclusion: 该模型作为语音记忆的最小有效理论，揭示了局部音位相关性对语音学习的核心作用，同时为语音错误预测提供了层次化分析框架。

authors_text: Anushrut Jignasu,Kelly Marshall,Baskar Ganapathysubramanian,Aditya Balu,Chinmay Hegde,Adarsh Krishnamurthy
title: Towards Foundational AI Models for Additive Manufacturing: Language Models for G-Code Debugging, Manipulation, and Comprehension
title_zh: 迈向增材制造的基础 AI 模型：用于 G 代码调试、操作和理解的语言模型
abstract: 3D printing or additive manufacturing is a revolutionary technology that enables the creation of physical objects from digital models. However, the quality and accuracy of 3D printing depend on the correctness and efficiency of the G-code, a low-level numerical control programming language that instructs 3D printers how to move and extrude material. Debugging G-code is a challenging task that requires a syntactic and semantic understanding of the G-code format and the geometry of the part to be printed. In this paper, we present the first extensive evaluation of six state-of-the-art foundational large language models (LLMs) for comprehending and debugging G-code files for 3D printing. We design effective prompts to enable pre-trained LLMs to understand and manipulate G-code and test their performance on various aspects of G-code debugging and manipulation, including detection and correction of common errors and the ability to perform geometric transformations. We analyze their strengths and weaknesses for understanding complete G-code files. We also discuss the implications and limitations of using LLMs for G-code comprehension.
summary: 3D printing or additive manufacturing is a revolutionary technology that enables the creation of physical objects from digital models. However, the quality and accuracy of 3D printing depend on the correctness and efficiency of the G-code, a low-level numerical control programming language that instructs 3D printers how to move and extrude material. Debugging G-code is a challenging task that requires a syntactic and semantic understanding of the G-code format and the geometry of the part to be printed. In this paper, we present the first extensive evaluation of six state-of-the-art foundational large language models (LLMs) for comprehending and debugging G-code files for 3D printing. We design effective prompts to enable pre-trained LLMs to understand and manipulate G-code and test their performance on various aspects of G-code debugging and manipulation, including detection and correction of common errors and the ability to perform geometric transformations. We analyze their strengths and weaknesses for understanding complete G-code files. We also discuss the implications and limitations of using LLMs for G-code comprehension.
abstract_zh: 3D 打印或增材制造是一项革命性技术，可以从数字模型创建物理对象。然而，3D 打印的质量和准确性取决于 G 代码的正确性和效率，G 代码是一种低级数控编程语言，指导 3D 打印机如何移动和挤出材料。调试 G 代码是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要对 G 代码格式和要打印零件的几何形状有句法和语义理解。在本文中，我们首次对六种最先进的基础大语言模型 (LLM) 进行了广泛评估，用于理解和调试 3D 打印的 G 代码文件。我们设计有效的提示，使预先训练的法学硕士能够理解和操作 G 代码，并测试他们在 G 代码调试和操作的各个方面的性能，包括常见错误的检测和纠正以及执行几何变换的能力。我们分析它们的优点和缺点，以了解完整的 G 代码文件。我们还讨论了使用 LLM 进行 G 代码理解的含义和局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了六种先进大型语言模型在3D打印G代码调试、操作和理解任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: G代码的正确性直接影响3D打印质量，但其调试需要复杂的语法和语义理解，传统方法效率低下，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 设计特定提示词使预训练语言模型理解G代码，通过检测修正常见错误、几何变换等任务评估模型性能，并分析其优劣势。
AI.result: 模型在语法纠错等任务表现较好，但对复杂几何语义理解存在局限，且不同模型性能差异显著。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型为G代码自动化处理提供新思路，但需进一步优化其对制造领域语义的理解能力。

authors_text: Zhihao Ding,Jieming Shi,Qing Li,Jiannong Cao
title: Effective Illicit Account Detection on Large Cryptocurrency MultiGraphs
title_zh: 对大型加密货币多重图进行有效的非法账户检测
abstract: Cryptocurrencies are rapidly expanding and becoming vital in digital financial markets. However, the rise in cryptocurrency-related illicit activities has led to significant losses for users. To protect the security of these platforms, it is critical to identify illicit accounts effectively. Current detection methods mainly depend on feature engineering or are inadequate to leverage the complex information within cryptocurrency transaction networks, resulting in suboptimal performance. In this paper, we present DIAM, an effective method for detecting illicit accounts in cryptocurrency transaction networks modeled by directed multi-graphs with attributed edges. DIAM first features an Edge2Seq module that captures intrinsic transaction patterns from parallel edges by considering edge attributes and their directed sequences, to generate effective node representations. Then in DIAM, we design a multigraph Discrepancy (MGD) module with a tailored message passing mechanism to capture the discrepant features between normal and illicit nodes over the multigraph topology, assisted by an attention mechanism. DIAM integrates these techniques for end-to-end training to detect illicit accounts from legitimate ones. Extensive experiments, comparing against 15 existing solutions on 4 large cryptocurrency datasets of Bitcoin and Ethereum, demonstrate that DIAM consistently outperforms others in accurately identifying illicit accounts. For example, on a Bitcoin dataset with 20 million nodes and 203 million edges, DIAM attains an F1 score of 96.55%, markedly surpassing the runner-up's score of 83.92%. The code is available at https://github.com/TommyDzh/DIAM.

abstract_zh: 加密货币正在迅速扩张，并在数字金融市场中变得至关重要。然而，与加密货币相关的非法活动的增加给用户带来了重大损失。为了保护这些平台的安全，有效识别非法账户至关重要。目前的检测方法主要依赖于特征工程，或者不足以利用加密货币交易网络中的复杂信息，导致性能不佳。在本文中，我们提出了 DIAM，这是一种在加密货币交易网络中检测非法帐户的有效方法，该网络由具有属性边的有向多图建模。 DIAM 首先具有 Edge2Seq 模块，该模块通过考虑边缘属性及其有向序列​​，从并行边缘捕获内在事务模式，以生成有效的节点表示。然后在 DIAM 中，我们设计了一个多图差异（MGD）模块，该模块具有定制的消息传递机制，以在注意机制的帮助下捕获多图拓扑上正常节点和非法节点之间的差异特征。 DIAM 集成了这些技术进行端到端训练，以从合法帐户中检测出非法帐户。通过在比特币和以太坊的 4 个大型加密货币数据集上与 15 个现有解决方案进行比较，进行了大量实验，结果表明 DIAM 在准确识别非法账户方面始终优于其他解决方案。例如，在拥有 2000 万个节点和 2.03 亿条边的比特币数据集上，DIAM 的 F1 得分为 96.55%，明显超过亚军 83.92% 的得分。代码可在 https://github.com/TommyDzh/DIAM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DIAM的方法，用于在大型加密货币多图中有效检测非法账户。
AI.motivation: 当前加密货币非法账户检测方法依赖特征工程或无法充分利用交易网络的复杂信息，导致性能不足。
AI.method: DIAM包含Edge2Seq模块（通过边属性及有向序列生成节点表示）和多图差异模块（MGD，结合消息传递机制与注意力机制捕捉正常与非法节点的拓扑差异），实现端到端训练。
AI.result: 在4个大型加密货币数据集（含2000万节点和2.03亿边的比特币数据集）上，DIAM的F1分数达96.55%，显著优于其他15种方法（如第二名83.92%）。
AI.conclusion: DIAM通过建模多图结构与边属性，有效提升了非法账户检测性能，代码已开源。

authors_text: Jiaxu Zhu,Weinan Tong,Yaoxun Xu,Changhe Song,Zhiyong Wu,Zhao You,Dan Su,Dong Yu,Helen Meng
title: Text-Only Domain Adaptation for End-to-End Speech Recognition through Down-Sampling Acoustic Representation
title_zh: 通过下采样声学表示进行端到端语音识别的纯文本域适应
comment: Proceedings of Interspeech. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2309.01437
comments: Proceedings of Interspeech. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2309.01437
abstract: Mapping two modalities, speech and text, into a shared representation space, is a research topic of using text-only data to improve end-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) performance in new domains. However, the length of speech representation and text representation is inconsistent. Although the previous method up-samples the text representation to align with acoustic modality, it may not match the expected actual duration. In this paper, we proposed novel representations match strategy through down-sampling acoustic representation to align with text modality. By introducing a continuous integrate-and-fire (CIF) module generating acoustic representations consistent with token length, our ASR model can learn unified representations from both modalities better, allowing for domain adaptation using text-only data of the target domain. Experiment results of new domain data demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Mapping two modalities, speech and text, into a shared representation space, is a research topic of using text-only data to improve end-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) performance in new domains. However, the length of speech representation and text representation is inconsistent. Although the previous method up-samples the text representation to align with acoustic modality, it may not match the expected actual duration. In this paper, we proposed novel representations match strategy through down-sampling acoustic representation to align with text modality. By introducing a continuous integrate-and-fire (CIF) module generating acoustic representations consistent with token length, our ASR model can learn unified representations from both modalities better, allowing for domain adaptation using text-only data of the target domain. Experiment results of new domain data demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 将语音和文本两种模式映射到共享表示空间中是使用纯文本数据来提高新领域中端到端自动语音识别 (ASR) 性能的研究主题。然而，语音表示和文本表示的长度不一致。尽管之前的方法对文本表示进行上采样以与声学模态保持一致，但它可能与预期的实际持续时间不匹配。在本文中，我们提出了通过下采样声学表示来与文本模态对齐的新颖表示匹配策略。通过引入连续集成和触发 (CIF) 模块生成与标记长度一致的声学表示，我们的 ASR 模型可以更好地从两种模态学习统一表示，从而允许使用目标域的纯文本数据进行域适应。新领域数据的实验结果证明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过下采样声学表示实现文本-only数据领域适应的端到端语音识别方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过上采样文本表示对齐声学模态，但可能与实际语音持续时间不匹配，导致跨领域语音识别性能下降。
AI.method: 引入连续积分-发放（CIF）模块，通过下采样声学表示使其与文本token长度对齐，构建跨模态共享表示空间。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在新领域数据上显著提升了语音识别性能，验证了文本-only领域适应的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 下采样声学表示结合CIF模块能有效解决跨模态对齐问题，为文本-only领域适应提供了新思路。

authors_text: Geoffroy Oudoumanessah,Carole Lartizien,Michel Dojat,Florence Forbes
title: Towards frugal unsupervised detection of subtle abnormalities in medical imaging
title_zh: 实现医学成像中细微异常的节俭无监督检测
comment: ef:26th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention, MICCAI 2023, Oct 2023, Vancouver (BC), Canada
comments: ef:26th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention, MICCAI 2023, Oct 2023, Vancouver (BC), Canada
abstract: Anomaly detection in medical imaging is a challenging task in contexts where abnormalities are not annotated. This problem can be addressed through unsupervised anomaly detection (UAD) methods, which identify features that do not match with a reference model of normal profiles. Artificial neural networks have been extensively used for UAD but they do not generally achieve an optimal trade-o$\hookleftarrow$ between accuracy and computational demand. As an alternative, we investigate mixtures of probability distributions whose versatility has been widely recognized for a variety of data and tasks, while not requiring excessive design e$\hookleftarrow$ort or tuning. Their expressivity makes them good candidates to account for complex multivariate reference models. Their much smaller number of parameters makes them more amenable to interpretation and e cient learning. However, standard estimation procedures, such as the Expectation-Maximization algorithm, do not scale well to large data volumes as they require high memory usage. To address this issue, we propose to incrementally compute inferential quantities. This online approach is illustrated on the challenging detection of subtle abnormalities in MR brain scans for the follow-up of newly diagnosed Parkinsonian patients. The identified structural abnormalities are consistent with the disease progression, as accounted by the Hoehn and Yahr scale.
summary: Anomaly detection in medical imaging is a challenging task in contexts where abnormalities are not annotated. This problem can be addressed through unsupervised anomaly detection (UAD) methods, which identify features that do not match with a reference model of normal profiles. Artificial neural networks have been extensively used for UAD but they do not generally achieve an optimal trade-o$\hookleftarrow$ between accuracy and computational demand. As an alternative, we investigate mixtures of probability distributions whose versatility has been widely recognized for a variety of data and tasks, while not requiring excessive design e$\hookleftarrow$ort or tuning. Their expressivity makes them good candidates to account for complex multivariate reference models. Their much smaller number of parameters makes them more amenable to interpretation and e cient learning. However, standard estimation procedures, such as the Expectation-Maximization algorithm, do not scale well to large data volumes as they require high memory usage. To address this issue, we propose to incrementally compute inferential quantities. This online approach is illustrated on the challenging detection of subtle abnormalities in MR brain scans for the follow-up of newly diagnosed Parkinsonian patients. The identified structural abnormalities are consistent with the disease progression, as accounted by the Hoehn and Yahr scale.
abstract_zh: 在未注释异常的情况下，医学成像中的异常检测是一项具有挑战性的任务。这个问题可以通过无监督异常检测（UAD）方法来解决，该方法可以识别与正常轮廓的参考模型不匹配的特征。人工神经网络已广泛用于 UAD，但它们通常无法在准确性和计算需求之间实现最佳权衡。作为替代方案，我们研究概率分布的混合，其多功能性已被广泛认可用于各种数据和任务，同时不需要过多的设计 e$\hookleftarrow$ort 或调整。它们的表现力使它们成为解释复杂多元参考模型的良好候选者。它们的参数数量少得多，使得它们更容易解释和有效学习。然而，标准估计过程（例如期望最大化算法）不能很好地扩展到大数据量，因为它们需要高内存使用量。为了解决这个问题，我们建议增量计算推理量。这种在线方法通过在新诊断的帕金森病患者的随访中对 MR 脑部扫描中细微异常的挑战性检测进行了说明。已确定的结构异常与疾病进展一致，如 Hoehn 和 Yahr 量表所解释的那样。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的无监督方法，用于检测医学影像中的细微异常，特别是在帕金森病患者的脑部MRI扫描中。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督异常检测方法（如神经网络）在准确性与计算需求间难以平衡，而混合概率分布模型参数少且可解释性强，但传统估计方法难以处理大数据。
AI.method: 采用混合概率分布模型结合增量计算方法，优化传统EM算法的内存瓶颈，实现对医学影像中细微异常的在线检测。
AI.result: 成功检测出与霍恩-亚尔分期一致的帕金森病结构性异常，验证了方法在临床医学影像分析中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 混合分布模型结合增量计算为医学影像的无监督异常检测提供了高效且可解释的解决方案，适用于大规模数据场景。

search_text: Towards frugal unsupervised detection of subtle abnormalities in medical imaging 实现医学成像中细微异常的节俭无监督检测 Anomaly detection in medical imaging is a challenging task in contexts where abnormalities are not annotated. This problem can be addressed through unsupervised anomaly detection (UAD) methods, which identify features that do not match with a reference model of normal profiles. Artificial neural networks have been extensively used for UAD but they do not generally achieve an optimal trade-o$\hookleftarrow$ between accuracy and computational demand. As an alternative, we investigate mixtures of probability distributions whose versatility has been widely recognized for a variety of data and tasks, while not requiring excessive design e$\hookleftarrow$ort or tuning. Their expressivity makes them good candidates to account for complex multivariate reference models. Their much smaller number of parameters makes them more amenable to interpretation and e cient learning. However, standard estimation procedures, such as the Expectation-Maximization algorithm, do not scale well to large data volumes as they require high memory usage. To address this issue, we propose to incrementally compute inferential quantities. This online approach is illustrated on the challenging detection of subtle abnormalities in MR brain scans for the follow-up of newly diagnosed Parkinsonian patients. The identified structural abnormalities are consistent with the disease progression, as accounted by the Hoehn and Yahr scale. 在未注释异常的情况下，医学成像中的异常检测是一项具有挑战性的任务。这个问题可以通过无监督异常检测（UAD）方法来解决，该方法可以识别与正常轮廓的参考模型不匹配的特征。人工神经网络已广泛用于 UAD，但它们通常无法在准确性和计算需求之间实现最佳权衡。作为替代方案，我们研究概率分布的混合，其多功能性已被广泛认可用于各种数据和任务，同时不需要过多的设计 e$\hookleftarrow$ort 或调整。它们的表现力使它们成为解释复杂多元参考模型的良好候选者。它们的参数数量少得多，使得它们更容易解释和有效学习。然而，标准估计过程（例如期望最大化算法）不能很好地扩展到大数据量，因为它们需要高内存使用量。为了解决这个问题，我们建议增量计算推理量。这种在线方法通过在新诊断的帕金森病患者的随访中对 MR 脑部扫描中细微异常的挑战性检测进行了说明。已确定的结构异常与疾病进展一致，如 Hoehn 和 Yahr 量表所解释的那样。 本文提出一种高效的无监督方法，用于检测医学影像中的细微异常，特别是在帕金森病患者的脑部MRI扫描中。 Geoffroy Oudoumanessah,Carole Lartizien,Michel Dojat,Florence Forbes eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ahmad Sebaq,Mohamed ElHelw
title: RSDiff: Remote Sensing Image Generation from Text Using Diffusion Model
title_zh: RSDiff：使用扩散模型从文本生成遥感图像
abstract: The generation and enhancement of satellite imagery are critical in remote sensing, requiring high-quality, detailed images for accurate analysis. This research introduces a two-stage diffusion model methodology for synthesizing high-resolution satellite images from textual prompts. The pipeline comprises a Low-Resolution Diffusion Model (LRDM) that generates initial images based on text inputs and a Super-Resolution Diffusion Model (SRDM) that refines these images into high-resolution outputs. The LRDM merges text and image embeddings within a shared latent space, capturing essential scene content and structure. The SRDM then enhances these images, focusing on spatial features and visual clarity. Experiments conducted using the Remote Sensing Image Captioning Dataset (RSICD) demonstrate that our method outperforms existing models, producing satellite images with accurate geographical details and improved spatial resolution.
summary: The generation and enhancement of satellite imagery are critical in remote sensing, requiring high-quality, detailed images for accurate analysis. This research introduces a two-stage diffusion model methodology for synthesizing high-resolution satellite images from textual prompts. The pipeline comprises a Low-Resolution Diffusion Model (LRDM) that generates initial images based on text inputs and a Super-Resolution Diffusion Model (SRDM) that refines these images into high-resolution outputs. The LRDM merges text and image embeddings within a shared latent space, capturing essential scene content and structure. The SRDM then enhances these images, focusing on spatial features and visual clarity. Experiments conducted using the Remote Sensing Image Captioning Dataset (RSICD) demonstrate that our method outperforms existing models, producing satellite images with accurate geographical details and improved spatial resolution.
abstract_zh: 卫星图像的生成和增强对于遥感至关重要，需要高质量、详细的图像才能进行准确分析。本研究介绍了一种两阶段扩散模型方法，用于根据文本提示合成高分辨率卫星图像。该管道包括一个基于文本输入生成初始图像的低分辨率扩散模型（LRDM）和一个将这些图像细化为高分辨率输出的超分辨率扩散模型（SRDM）。 LRDM 将文本和图像嵌入合并在共享的潜在空间中，捕获基本的场景内容和结构。然后，SRDM 会增强这些图像，重点关注空间特征和视觉清晰度。使用遥感图像字幕数据集（RSICD）进行的实验表明，我们的方法优于现有模型，生成具有准确地理细节和改进空间分辨率的卫星图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RSDiff方法，通过两阶段扩散模型从文本生成高分辨率遥感图像。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像生成需要高保真细节和精确地理信息，现有模型在分辨率和内容准确性上存在不足。
AI.method: 采用两阶段扩散模型：低分辨率扩散模型（LRDM）生成初始图像，超分辨率扩散模型（SRDM）通过共享潜在空间融合文本与图像嵌入，优化空间特征和清晰度。
AI.result: 在RSICD数据集实验中，RSDiff在地理细节准确性和空间分辨率指标上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: RSDiff通过分阶段优化有效提升了文本到遥感图像生成的质量，为遥感分析提供更可靠的视觉数据支持。

authors_text: Marcelo Sandoval-Castaneda,Yanhong Li,Diane Brentari,Karen Livescu,Gregory Shakhnarovich
title: Self-Supervised Video Transformers for Isolated Sign Language Recognition
title_zh: 用于隔离手语识别的自监督视频转换器
abstract: This paper presents an in-depth analysis of various self-supervision methods for isolated sign language recognition (ISLR). We consider four recently introduced transformer-based approaches to self-supervised learning from videos, and four pre-training data regimes, and study all the combinations on the WLASL2000 dataset. Our findings reveal that MaskFeat achieves performance superior to pose-based and supervised video models, with a top-1 accuracy of 79.02% on gloss-based WLASL2000. Furthermore, we analyze these models' ability to produce representations of ASL signs using linear probing on diverse phonological features. This study underscores the value of architecture and pre-training task choices in ISLR. Specifically, our results on WLASL2000 highlight the power of masked reconstruction pre-training, and our linear probing results demonstrate the importance of hierarchical vision transformers for sign language representation.
summary: This paper presents an in-depth analysis of various self-supervision methods for isolated sign language recognition (ISLR). We consider four recently introduced transformer-based approaches to self-supervised learning from videos, and four pre-training data regimes, and study all the combinations on the WLASL2000 dataset. Our findings reveal that MaskFeat achieves performance superior to pose-based and supervised video models, with a top-1 accuracy of 79.02% on gloss-based WLASL2000. Furthermore, we analyze these models' ability to produce representations of ASL signs using linear probing on diverse phonological features. This study underscores the value of architecture and pre-training task choices in ISLR. Specifically, our results on WLASL2000 highlight the power of masked reconstruction pre-training, and our linear probing results demonstrate the importance of hierarchical vision transformers for sign language representation.
abstract_zh: 本文深入分析了孤立手语识别（ISLR）的各种自监督方法。我们考虑了四种最近引入的基于 Transformer 的视频自监督学习方法和四种预训练数据机制，并研究了 WLASL2000 数据集上的所有组合。我们的研究结果表明，MaskFeat 的性能优于基于姿势和监督的视频模型，在基于光泽度的 WLASL2000 上具有 79.02% 的 top-1 准确率。此外，我们还分析了这些模型使用不同语音特征的线性探测来生成 ASL 符号表示的能力。这项研究强调了 ISLR 中架构和预训练任务选择的价值。具体来说，我们在 WLASL2000 上的结果突出了掩模重建预训练的力量，我们的线性探测结果证明了分层视觉变换器对于手语表示的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自监督视频Transformer在孤立手语识别（ISLR）中的应用，通过对比不同预训练方法和架构，探索其性能表现。
AI.motivation: 手语识别面临数据稀缺和复杂动作建模的挑战，传统监督方法依赖标注数据，而自监督学习能有效利用未标注视频数据，提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用四种基于Transformer的自监督学习方法，结合四种预训练数据策略，在WLASL2000数据集上进行组合实验，并通过线性探针分析模型对音位特征的表征能力。
AI.result: MaskFeat方法在WLASL2000数据集上达到79.02%的top-1准确率，优于基于姿态和监督模型；实验表明掩码重建预训练和分层视觉Transformer对提升手语表征至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习中预训练任务和架构选择对ISLR性能影响显著，掩码重建任务与分层Transformer结构能有效捕捉手语的时空特征，为未来研究提供方向。

Furthermore, we analyze these models' ability to produce representations of ASL signs using linear probing on diverse phonological features. This study underscores the value of architecture and pre-training task choices in ISLR. Specifically, our results on WLASL2000 highlight the power of masked reconstruction pre-training, and our linear probing results demonstrate the importance of hierarchical vision transformers for sign language representation. 本文深入分析了孤立手语识别（ISLR）的各种自监督方法。我们考虑了四种最近引入的基于 Transformer 的视频自监督学习方法和四种预训练数据机制，并研究了 WLASL2000 数据集上的所有组合。我们的研究结果表明，MaskFeat 的性能优于基于姿势和监督的视频模型，在基于光泽度的 WLASL2000 上具有 79.02% 的 top-1 准确率。此外，我们还分析了这些模型使用不同语音特征的线性探测来生成 ASL 符号表示的能力。这项研究强调了 ISLR 中架构和预训练任务选择的价值。具体来说，我们在 WLASL2000 上的结果突出了掩模重建预训练的力量，我们的线性探测结果证明了分层视觉变换器对于手语表示的重要性。 本文研究了自监督视频Transformer在孤立手语识别（ISLR）中的应用，通过对比不同预训练方法和架构，探索其性能表现。 Marcelo Sandoval-Castaneda,Yanhong Li,Diane Brentari,Karen Livescu,Gregory Shakhnarovich cs.CV

authors_text: Khaled Abdelaal,Richard Veras
title: Observe Locally, Classify Globally: Using GNNs to Identify Sparse Matrix Structure
title_zh: 局部观察，全局分类：使用 GNN 识别稀疏矩阵结构
abstract: The performance of sparse matrix computation highly depends on the matching of the matrix format with the underlying structure of the data being computed on. Different sparse matrix formats are suitable for different structures of data. Therefore, the first challenge is identifying the matrix structure before the computation to match it with an appropriate data format. The second challenge is to avoid reading the entire dataset before classifying it. This can be done by identifying the matrix structure through samples and their features. Yet, it is possible that global features cannot be determined from a sampling set and must instead be inferred from local features. To address these challenges, we develop a framework that generates sparse matrix structure classifiers using graph convolutional networks. The framework can also be extended to other matrix structures using user-provided generators. The approach achieves 97% classification accuracy on a set of representative sparse matrix shapes.
summary: The performance of sparse matrix computation highly depends on the matching of the matrix format with the underlying structure of the data being computed on. Different sparse matrix formats are suitable for different structures of data. Therefore, the first challenge is identifying the matrix structure before the computation to match it with an appropriate data format. The second challenge is to avoid reading the entire dataset before classifying it. This can be done by identifying the matrix structure through samples and their features. Yet, it is possible that global features cannot be determined from a sampling set and must instead be inferred from local features. To address these challenges, we develop a framework that generates sparse matrix structure classifiers using graph convolutional networks. The framework can also be extended to other matrix structures using user-provided generators. The approach achieves 97% classification accuracy on a set of representative sparse matrix shapes.
abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵计算的性能很大程度上取决于矩阵格式与计算数据的底层结构的匹配。不同的稀疏矩阵格式适合不同的数据结构。因此，第一个挑战是在计算之前识别矩阵结构，以将其与适当的数据格式相匹配。第二个挑战是避免在分类之前读取整个数据集。这可以通过样本及其特征识别矩阵结构来完成。然而，全局特征可能无法从采样集中确定，而必须从局部特征推断。为了解决这些挑战，我们开发了一个使用图卷积网络生成稀疏矩阵结构分类器的框架。该框架还可以使用用户提供的生成器扩展到其他矩阵结构。该方法在一组代表性稀疏矩阵形状上实现了 97% 的分类准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用图卷积网络（GNN）来识别稀疏矩阵结构，以提升稀疏矩阵计算的性能。
AI.motivation: 稀疏矩阵计算性能高度依赖于矩阵格式与数据结构的匹配，但传统方法需读取完整数据集且难以从局部特征推断全局结构，存在效率与准确性问题。
AI.method: 开发基于图卷积网络的框架，通过局部样本特征生成分类器，并支持通过用户提供的生成器扩展至其他矩阵结构。
AI.result: 在代表性稀疏矩阵形状数据集上达到97%的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了稀疏矩阵结构识别中的局部到全局特征推断问题，为优化稀疏矩阵计算提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Youmin Zhang,Fabio Tosi,Stefano Mattoccia,Matteo Poggi
title: GO-SLAM: Global Optimization for Consistent 3D Instant Reconstruction
title_zh: GO-SLAM：全局优化，实现一致的 3D 即时重建
abstract: Neural implicit representations have recently demonstrated compelling results on dense Simultaneous Localization And Mapping (SLAM) but suffer from the accumulation of errors in camera tracking and distortion in the reconstruction. Purposely, we present GO-SLAM, a deep-learning-based dense visual SLAM framework globally optimizing poses and 3D reconstruction in real-time. Robust pose estimation is at its core, supported by efficient loop closing and online full bundle adjustment, which optimize per frame by utilizing the learned global geometry of the complete history of input frames. Simultaneously, we update the implicit and continuous surface representation on-the-fly to ensure global consistency of 3D reconstruction. Results on various synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that GO-SLAM outperforms state-of-the-art approaches at tracking robustness and reconstruction accuracy. Furthermore, GO-SLAM is versatile and can run with monocular, stereo, and RGB-D input.
summary: Neural implicit representations have recently demonstrated compelling results on dense Simultaneous Localization And Mapping (SLAM) but suffer from the accumulation of errors in camera tracking and distortion in the reconstruction. Purposely, we present GO-SLAM, a deep-learning-based dense visual SLAM framework globally optimizing poses and 3D reconstruction in real-time. Robust pose estimation is at its core, supported by efficient loop closing and online full bundle adjustment, which optimize per frame by utilizing the learned global geometry of the complete history of input frames. Simultaneously, we update the implicit and continuous surface representation on-the-fly to ensure global consistency of 3D reconstruction. Results on various synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that GO-SLAM outperforms state-of-the-art approaches at tracking robustness and reconstruction accuracy. Furthermore, GO-SLAM is versatile and can run with monocular, stereo, and RGB-D input.
abstract_zh: 神经隐式表示最近在密集同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 方面展示了令人信服的结果，但受到相机跟踪误差累积和重建失真的影响。我们有目的地提出 GO-SLAM，这是一种基于深度学习的密集视觉 SLAM 框架，可实时全局优化姿势和 3D 重建。鲁棒的姿态估计是其核心，由高效的循环闭合和在线全束调整支持，通过利用学习的输入帧完整历史记录的全局几何来优化每帧。同时，我们动态更新隐式和连续的表面表示，以确保 3D 重建的全局一致性。各种合成和真实数据集的结果表明，GO-SLAM 在跟踪鲁棒性和重建准确性方面优于最先进的方法。此外，GO-SLAM 用途广泛，可以在单目、立体和 RGB-D 输入下运行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GO-SLAM框架，通过全局优化解决神经隐式表示在密集SLAM中的误差累积和重建失真问题，实现实时三维重建。
AI.motivation: 现有神经隐式SLAM方法存在相机跟踪误差累积和重建失真问题，需提升鲁棒性和重建精度。
AI.method: 结合鲁棒位姿估计、高效回环闭合、在线全集束调整及实时隐式表面更新，利用全局几何信息优化帧间一致性。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上优于现有方法，跟踪鲁棒性和重建精度显著提升，支持单目/立体/RGB-D多模态输入。
AI.conclusion: GO-SLAM通过全局优化有效缓解误差累积，实现高一致性三维重建，具有广泛适用性和实时性优势。

authors_text: Kevin Gmelin,Shikhar Bahl,Russell Mendonca,Deepak Pathak
title: Efficient RL via Disentangled Environment and Agent Representations
title_zh: 通过解开的环境和代理表示实现高效的强化学习
abstract: Agents that are aware of the separation between themselves and their environments can leverage this understanding to form effective representations of visual input. We propose an approach for learning such structured representations for RL algorithms, using visual knowledge of the agent, such as its shape or mask, which is often inexpensive to obtain. This is incorporated into the RL objective using a simple auxiliary loss. We show that our method, Structured Environment-Agent Representations, outperforms state-of-the-art model-free approaches over 18 different challenging visual simulation environments spanning 5 different robots. Website at https://sear-rl.github.io/
summary: Agents that are aware of the separation between themselves and their environments can leverage this understanding to form effective representations of visual input. We propose an approach for learning such structured representations for RL algorithms, using visual knowledge of the agent, such as its shape or mask, which is often inexpensive to obtain. This is incorporated into the RL objective using a simple auxiliary loss. We show that our method, Structured Environment-Agent Representations, outperforms state-of-the-art model-free approaches over 18 different challenging visual simulation environments spanning 5 different robots. Website at https://sear-rl.github.io/
abstract_zh: 意识到自身与其环境之间的分离的智能体可以利用这种理解来形成视觉输入的有效表示。我们提出了一种学习 RL 算法的结构化表示的方法，使用代理的视觉知识，例如其形状或掩模，这些知识通常获取成本低廉。使用简单的辅助损失将其合并到 RL 目标中。我们证明，我们的方法“结构化环境代理表示”在涵盖 5 个不同机器人的 18 个不同的具有挑战性的视觉模拟环境中优于最先进的无模型方法。网站 https://sear-rl.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过解耦环境与智能体表征来提升视觉强化学习效率的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉强化学习方法未能有效利用智能体自身视觉信息（如形状/掩码），而这些信息易于获取且能帮助区分环境与智能体。
AI.method: 设计辅助损失函数将智能体视觉信息整合到RL目标中，学习结构化环境-智能体表征。
AI.result: 在18个视觉模拟环境（5种机器人）中，该方法优于当前最先进的模型自由方法。
AI.conclusion: 结构化表征方法通过显式建模环境与智能体分离，有效提升了视觉强化学习的效率与泛化能力。

conclusion: 结构化表征方法通过显式建模环境与智能体分离，有效提升了视觉强化学习的效率与泛化能力。
search_text: Efficient RL via Disentangled Environment and Agent Representations 通过解开的环境和代理表示实现高效的强化学习 Agents that are aware of the separation between themselves and their environments can leverage this understanding to form effective representations of visual input. We propose an approach for learning such structured representations for RL algorithms, using visual knowledge of the agent, such as its shape or mask, which is often inexpensive to obtain. This is incorporated into the RL objective using a simple auxiliary loss. We show that our method, Structured Environment-Agent Representations, outperforms state-of-the-art model-free approaches over 18 different challenging visual simulation environments spanning 5 different robots. Website at https://sear-rl.github.io/ 意识到自身与其环境之间的分离的智能体可以利用这种理解来形成视觉输入的有效表示。我们提出了一种学习 RL 算法的结构化表示的方法，使用代理的视觉知识，例如其形状或掩模，这些知识通常获取成本低廉。使用简单的辅助损失将其合并到 RL 目标中。我们证明，我们的方法“结构化环境代理表示”在涵盖 5 个不同机器人的 18 个不同的具有挑战性的视觉模拟环境中优于最先进的无模型方法。网站 https://sear-rl.github.io/ 本文提出一种通过解耦环境与智能体表征来提升视觉强化学习效率的方法。 Kevin Gmelin,Shikhar Bahl,Russell Mendonca,Deepak Pathak cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.NE,cs.RO

authors_text: Haonan Qiu,Zhaoxi Chen,Yuming Jiang,Hang Zhou,Xiangyu Fan,Lei Yang,Wayne Wu,Ziwei Liu
title: ReliTalk: Relightable Talking Portrait Generation from a Single Video
title_zh: ReliTalk：从单个视频生成可重新点亮的说话肖像
abstract: Recent years have witnessed great progress in creating vivid audio-driven portraits from monocular videos. However, how to seamlessly adapt the created video avatars to other scenarios with different backgrounds and lighting conditions remains unsolved. On the other hand, existing relighting studies mostly rely on dynamically lighted or multi-view data, which are too expensive for creating video portraits. To bridge this gap, we propose ReliTalk, a novel framework for relightable audio-driven talking portrait generation from monocular videos. Our key insight is to decompose the portrait's reflectance from implicitly learned audio-driven facial normals and images. Specifically, we involve 3D facial priors derived from audio features to predict delicate normal maps through implicit functions. These initially predicted normals then take a crucial part in reflectance decomposition by dynamically estimating the lighting condition of the given video. Moreover, the stereoscopic face representation is refined using the identity-consistent loss under simulated multiple lighting conditions, addressing the ill-posed problem caused by limited views available from a single monocular video. Extensive experiments validate the superiority of our proposed framework on both real and synthetic datasets. Our code is released in https://github.com/arthur-qiu/ReliTalk.
summary: Recent years have witnessed great progress in creating vivid audio-driven portraits from monocular videos. However, how to seamlessly adapt the created video avatars to other scenarios with different backgrounds and lighting conditions remains unsolved. On the other hand, existing relighting studies mostly rely on dynamically lighted or multi-view data, which are too expensive for creating video portraits. To bridge this gap, we propose ReliTalk, a novel framework for relightable audio-driven talking portrait generation from monocular videos. Our key insight is to decompose the portrait's reflectance from implicitly learned audio-driven facial normals and images. Specifically, we involve 3D facial priors derived from audio features to predict delicate normal maps through implicit functions. These initially predicted normals then take a crucial part in reflectance decomposition by dynamically estimating the lighting condition of the given video. Moreover, the stereoscopic face representation is refined using the identity-consistent loss under simulated multiple lighting conditions, addressing the ill-posed problem caused by limited views available from a single monocular video. Extensive experiments validate the superiority of our proposed framework on both real and synthetic datasets. Our code is released in https://github.com/arthur-qiu/ReliTalk.
abstract_zh: 近年来，从单眼视频创建生动的音频驱动肖像方面取得了巨大进展。然而，如何将创建的视频头像无缝地适应不同背景和光照条件的其他场景仍然没有解决。另一方面，现有的重新照明研究大多依赖于动态照明或多视图数据，这对于创建视频肖像来说过于昂贵。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了 ReliTalk，这是一种新颖的框架，用于从单目视频生成可重新点亮的音频驱动的谈话肖像。我们的主要见解是从隐式学习的音频驱动的面部法线和图像中分解肖像的反射率。具体来说，我们利用从音频特征导出的 3D 面部先验，通过隐式函数来预测精细的法线贴图。然后，这些最初预测的法线通过动态估计给定视频的照明条件，在反射率分解中发挥关键作用。此外，在模拟的多个照明条件下，使用身份一致的损失来细化立体人脸表示，解决了由于单个单目视频的可用视图有限而引起的不适定问题。大量的实验验证了我们提出的框架在真实数据集和合成数据集上的优越性。我们的代码发布在 https://github.com/arthur-qiu/ReliTalk。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReliTalk框架，通过单目视频生成可重新照明的音频驱动Talking Portrait。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以将生成的视频化身适配到不同背景和光照场景，且可重新照明研究依赖昂贵的动态光照或多视角数据。
AI.method: 通过隐式学习的音频驱动面部法线和图像分解肖像反射率，结合音频特征生成的3D面部先验预测法线图，并利用身份一致性损失优化立体面部表示。
AI.result: 在真实和合成数据集上验证了框架优越性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: ReliTalk有效解决了单目视频生成可重新照明Talking Portrait的难题，为跨场景应用提供可行方案。
