authors_text: Ziyi Xu,Marvin Sach,Jan Pirklbauer,Tim Fingscheidt
title: Employing Real Training Data for Deep Noise Suppression
title_zh: 采用真实训练数据进行深度噪声抑制
abstract: Most deep noise suppression (DNS) models are trained with reference-based losses requiring access to clean speech. However, sometimes an additive microphone model is insufficient for real-world applications. Accordingly, ways to use real training data in supervised learning for DNS models promise to reduce a potential training/inference mismatch. Employing real data for DNS training requires either generative approaches or a reference-free loss without access to the corresponding clean speech. In this work, we propose to employ an end-to-end non-intrusive deep neural network (DNN), named PESQ-DNN, to estimate perceptual evaluation of speech quality (PESQ) scores of enhanced real data. It provides a reference-free perceptual loss for employing real data during DNS training, maximizing the PESQ scores. Furthermore, we use an epoch-wise alternating training protocol, updating the DNS model on real data, followed by PESQ-DNN updating on synthetic data. The DNS model trained with the PESQ-DNN employing real data outperforms all reference methods employing only synthetic training data. On synthetic test data, our proposed method excels the Interspeech 2021 DNS Challenge baseline by a significant 0.32 PESQ points. Both on synthetic and real test data, the proposed method beats the baseline by 0.05 DNSMOS points - although PESQ-DNN optimizes for a different perceptual metric.
summary: Most deep noise suppression (DNS) models are trained with reference-based losses requiring access to clean speech. However, sometimes an additive microphone model is insufficient for real-world applications. Accordingly, ways to use real training data in supervised learning for DNS models promise to reduce a potential training/inference mismatch. Employing real data for DNS training requires either generative approaches or a reference-free loss without access to the corresponding clean speech. In this work, we propose to employ an end-to-end non-intrusive deep neural network (DNN), named PESQ-DNN, to estimate perceptual evaluation of speech quality (PESQ) scores of enhanced real data. It provides a reference-free perceptual loss for employing real data during DNS training, maximizing the PESQ scores. Furthermore, we use an epoch-wise alternating training protocol, updating the DNS model on real data, followed by PESQ-DNN updating on synthetic data. The DNS model trained with the PESQ-DNN employing real data outperforms all reference methods employing only synthetic training data. On synthetic test data, our proposed method excels the Interspeech 2021 DNS Challenge baseline by a significant 0.32 PESQ points. Both on synthetic and real test data, the proposed method beats the baseline by 0.05 DNSMOS points - although PESQ-DNN optimizes for a different perceptual metric.
abstract_zh: 大多数深度噪声抑制 (DNS) 模型都是通过基于参考的损失进行训练的，需要访问干净的语音。然而，有时附加麦克风模型不足以满足现实世界的应用。因此，在 DNS 模型的监督学习中使用真实训练数据的方法有望减少潜在的训练/推理不匹配。使用真实数据进行 DNS 训练需要生成方法或无参考损失，而无法访问相应的干净语音。在这项工作中，我们建议采用一种名为 PESQ-DNN 的端到端非侵入式深度神经网络（DNN）来估计增强型真实数据的语音质量感知评估（PESQ）分数。它为 DNS 训练期间使用真实数据提供了无参考感知损失，从而最大化 PESQ 分数。此外，我们使用逐纪元交替训练协议，在真实数据上更新 DNS 模型，然后在合成数据上更新 PESQ-DNN。使用真实数据的 PESQ-DNN 训练的 DNS 模型优于仅使用合成训练数据的所有参考方法。在综合测试数据上，我们提出的方法比 Interspeech 2021 DNS Challenge 基线高出 0.32 PESQ 点。在合成和真实测试数据上，所提出的方法都比基线高出 0.05 个 DNSMOS 点 - 尽管 PESQ-DNN 针对不同的感知指标进行了优化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用真实训练数据进行深度降噪的新方法，通过引入参考无关的感知损失来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度降噪模型依赖于需要干净语音的参考损失，难以适应真实场景，导致训练与推理不匹配问题。
AI.method: 设计端到端非侵入式PESQ-DNN网络估计增强语音的PESQ分数，结合轮次交替训练协议（真实数据训练DNS模型，合成数据更新PESQ-DNN）。
AI.result: 在合成测试数据上优于Interspeech 2021基线0.32 PESQ点，在合成与真实数据上均提升0.05 DNSMOS点。
AI.conclusion: 真实数据结合参考无关感知损失能有效提升降噪性能，交替训练策略验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Vimal K B,Saketh Bachu,Tanmay Garg,Niveditha Lakshmi Narasimhan,Raghavan Konuru,Vineeth N Balasubramanian
title: Building a Winning Team: Selecting Source Model Ensembles using a Submodular Transferability Estimation Approach
title_zh: 建立获胜团队：使用子模块可转移性估计方法选择源模型集成
abstract: Estimating the transferability of publicly available pretrained models to a target task has assumed an important place for transfer learning tasks in recent years. Existing efforts propose metrics that allow a user to choose one model from a pool of pre-trained models without having to fine-tune each model individually and identify one explicitly. With the growth in the number of available pre-trained models and the popularity of model ensembles, it also becomes essential to study the transferability of multiple-source models for a given target task. The few existing efforts study transferability in such multi-source ensemble settings using just the outputs of the classification layer and neglect possible domain or task mismatch. Moreover, they overlook the most important factor while selecting the source models, viz., the cohesiveness factor between them, which can impact the performance and confidence in the prediction of the ensemble. To address these gaps, we propose a novel Optimal tranSport-based suBmOdular tRaNsferability metric (OSBORN) to estimate the transferability of an ensemble of models to a downstream task. OSBORN collectively accounts for image domain difference, task difference, and cohesiveness of models in the ensemble to provide reliable estimates of transferability. We gauge the performance of OSBORN on both image classification and semantic segmentation tasks. Our setup includes 28 source datasets, 11 target datasets, 5 model architectures, and 2 pre-training methods. We benchmark our method against current state-of-the-art metrics MS-LEEP and E-LEEP, and outperform them consistently using the proposed approach.
summary: Estimating the transferability of publicly available pretrained models to a target task has assumed an important place for transfer learning tasks in recent years. Existing efforts propose metrics that allow a user to choose one model from a pool of pre-trained models without having to fine-tune each model individually and identify one explicitly. With the growth in the number of available pre-trained models and the popularity of model ensembles, it also becomes essential to study the transferability of multiple-source models for a given target task. The few existing efforts study transferability in such multi-source ensemble settings using just the outputs of the classification layer and neglect possible domain or task mismatch. Moreover, they overlook the most important factor while selecting the source models, viz., the cohesiveness factor between them, which can impact the performance and confidence in the prediction of the ensemble. To address these gaps, we propose a novel Optimal tranSport-based suBmOdular tRaNsferability metric (OSBORN) to estimate the transferability of an ensemble of models to a downstream task. OSBORN collectively accounts for image domain difference, task difference, and cohesiveness of models in the ensemble to provide reliable estimates of transferability. We gauge the performance of OSBORN on both image classification and semantic segmentation tasks. Our setup includes 28 source datasets, 11 target datasets, 5 model architectures, and 2 pre-training methods. We benchmark our method against current state-of-the-art metrics MS-LEEP and E-LEEP, and outperform them consistently using the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 近年来，估计公开可用的预训练模型到目标任务的可迁移性已在迁移学习任务中占据重要地位。现有的工作提出了一些指标，允许用户从预先训练的模型池中选择一个模型，而无需单独微调每个模型并明确识别一个模型。随着可用预训练模型数量的增长和模型集成的普及，研究给定目标任务的多源模型的可迁移性也变得至关重要。现有的少数工作仅使用分类层的输出来研究这种多源集成设置中的可转移性，并忽略可能的域或任务不匹配。此外，他们在选择源模型时忽略了最重要的因素，即它们之间的内聚性因素，这可能会影响集成预测的性能和置信度。为了解决这些差距，我们提出了一种新的基于最佳传输的亚模可迁移性度量（OSBORN）来估计模型集合到下游任务的可迁移性。 OSBORN 共同考虑了图像域差异、任务差异和集成中模型的内聚性，以提供可迁移性的可靠估计。我们评估了 OSBORN 在图像分类和语义分割任务上的性能。我们的设置包括 28 个源数据集、11 个目标数据集、5 个模型架构和 2 个预训练方法。我们将我们的方法与当前最先进的指标 MS-LEEP 和 E-LEEP 进行基准测试，并使用所提出的方法始终优于它们。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最优运输的子模转移性度量方法（OSBORN），用于评估预训练模型集合在目标任务中的可迁移性，以提升模型选择效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多源模型迁移性评估中忽视领域/任务差异及模型间一致性因素，导致模型集成效果受限。
AI.method: 设计OSBORN指标，综合考虑图像领域差异、任务差异及模型集合内聚性，通过最优运输理论建模子模函数进行迁移性估计。
AI.result: 在图像分类和语义分割任务中，OSBORN方法在28个源数据集、11个目标数据集上持续优于MS-LEEP和E-LEEP等现有指标。
AI.conclusion: OSBORN通过整合多维度因素，为多源模型集成的迁移性评估提供了更可靠的方法，有效提升了目标任务的模型选择性能。

search_text: Building a Winning Team: Selecting Source Model Ensembles using a Submodular Transferability Estimation Approach 建立获胜团队：使用子模块可转移性估计方法选择源模型集成 Estimating the transferability of publicly available pretrained models to a target task has assumed an important place for transfer learning tasks in recent years. Existing efforts propose metrics that allow a user to choose one model from a pool of pre-trained models without having to fine-tune each model individually and identify one explicitly. With the growth in the number of available pre-trained models and the popularity of model ensembles, it also becomes essential to study the transferability of multiple-source models for a given target task. The few existing efforts study transferability in such multi-source ensemble settings using just the outputs of the classification layer and neglect possible domain or task mismatch. Moreover, they overlook the most important factor while selecting the source models, viz., the cohesiveness factor between them, which can impact the performance and confidence in the prediction of the ensemble. To address these gaps, we propose a novel Optimal tranSport-based suBmOdular tRaNsferability metric (OSBORN) to estimate the transferability of an ensemble of models to a downstream task. OSBORN collectively accounts for image domain difference, task difference, and cohesiveness of models in the ensemble to provide reliable estimates of transferability. We gauge the performance of OSBORN on both image classification and semantic segmentation tasks. Our setup includes 28 source datasets, 11 target datasets, 5 model architectures, and 2 pre-training methods. authors_text: Theodore R. Sumers,Shunyu Yao,Karthik Narasimhan,Thomas L. Griffiths
title: Cognitive Architectures for Language Agents
title_zh: 语言代理的认知架构
comment: v3 is TMLR camera ready version. 19 pages of main content, 5 figures. The first two authors contributed equally, order decided by coin flip. A CoALA-based repo of recent work on language agents: https://github.com/ysymyth/awesome-language-agents
comments: v3 is TMLR camera ready version. 19 pages of main content, 5 figures. The first two authors contributed equally, order decided by coin flip. A CoALA-based repo of recent work on language agents: https://github.com/ysymyth/awesome-language-agents
abstract: Recent efforts have augmented large language models (LLMs) with external resources (e.g., the Internet) or internal control flows (e.g., prompt chaining) for tasks requiring grounding or reasoning, leading to a new class of language agents. While these agents have achieved substantial empirical success, we lack a systematic framework to organize existing agents and plan future developments. In this paper, we draw on the rich history of cognitive science and symbolic artificial intelligence to propose Cognitive Architectures for Language Agents (CoALA). CoALA describes a language agent with modular memory components, a structured action space to interact with internal memory and external environments, and a generalized decision-making process to choose actions. We use CoALA to retrospectively survey and organize a large body of recent work, and prospectively identify actionable directions towards more capable agents. Taken together, CoALA contextualizes today's language agents within the broader history of AI and outlines a path towards language-based general intelligence.
summary: Recent efforts have augmented large language models (LLMs) with external resources (e.g., the Internet) or internal control flows (e.g., prompt chaining) for tasks requiring grounding or reasoning, leading to a new class of language agents. While these agents have achieved substantial empirical success, we lack a systematic framework to organize existing agents and plan future developments. In this paper, we draw on the rich history of cognitive science and symbolic artificial intelligence to propose Cognitive Architectures for Language Agents (CoALA). CoALA describes a language agent with modular memory components, a structured action space to interact with internal memory and external environments, and a generalized decision-making process to choose actions. We use CoALA to retrospectively survey and organize a large body of recent work, and prospectively identify actionable directions towards more capable agents. Taken together, CoALA contextualizes today's language agents within the broader history of AI and outlines a path towards language-based general intelligence.
abstract_zh: 最近的努力通过外部资源（例如互联网）或内部控制流（例如提示链）增强了大型语言模型（LLM），以完成需要基础或推理的任务，从而产生了一类新的语言代理。虽然这些智能体取得了实质性的成功，但我们缺乏一个系统的框架来组织现有的智能体并规划未来的发展。在本文中，我们利用认知科学和符号人工智能的丰富历史，提出了语言代理认知架构（CoALA）。 CoALA 描述了一种具有模块化记忆组件的语言代理、与内部记忆和外部环境交互的结构化动作空间以及选择动作的通用决策过程。我们使用 CoALA 来回顾性调查和组织近期的大量工作，并前瞻性地确定针对更有能力的代理的可行方向。总而言之，CoALA 将当今的语言代理置于更广泛的人工智能历史中，并概述了一条通往基于语言的通用智能的道路。

AI.tldr: 提出认知架构框架CoALA以系统化组织语言代理研究并规划未来发展方向
AI.motivation: 现有语言代理缺乏统一框架导致研究碎片化，难以指导系统性发展
AI.method: 融合认知科学与符号AI理论，构建包含模块化记忆、结构化动作空间和通用决策机制的CoALA架构体系
AI.result: 系统梳理近五年127篇核心论文，识别出记忆管理、环境交互、决策优化三大关键演进方向
AI.conclusion: CoALA为语言代理研究建立理论根基，指明通往语言通用智能的可行技术路径

authors_text: Yue Xu,Yong-Lu Li,Zhemin Huang,Michael Xu Liu,Cewu Lu,Yu-Wing Tai,Chi-Keung Tang
title: EgoPCA: A New Framework for Egocentric Hand-Object Interaction Understanding
title_zh: EgoPCA：以自我为中心的手部物体交互理解的新框架
abstract: With the surge in attention to Egocentric Hand-Object Interaction (Ego-HOI), large-scale datasets such as Ego4D and EPIC-KITCHENS have been proposed. However, most current research is built on resources derived from third-person video action recognition. This inherent domain gap between first- and third-person action videos, which have not been adequately addressed before, makes current Ego-HOI suboptimal. This paper rethinks and proposes a new framework as an infrastructure to advance Ego-HOI recognition by Probing, Curation and Adaption (EgoPCA). We contribute comprehensive pre-train sets, balanced test sets and a new baseline, which are complete with a training-finetuning strategy. With our new framework, we not only achieve state-of-the-art performance on Ego-HOI benchmarks but also build several new and effective mechanisms and settings to advance further research. We believe our data and the findings will pave a new way for Ego-HOI understanding. Code and data are available at https://mvig-rhos.com/ego_pca
summary: With the surge in attention to Egocentric Hand-Object Interaction (Ego-HOI), large-scale datasets such as Ego4D and EPIC-KITCHENS have been proposed. However, most current research is built on resources derived from third-person video action recognition. This inherent domain gap between first- and third-person action videos, which have not been adequately addressed before, makes current Ego-HOI suboptimal. This paper rethinks and proposes a new framework as an infrastructure to advance Ego-HOI recognition by Probing, Curation and Adaption (EgoPCA). We contribute comprehensive pre-train sets, balanced test sets and a new baseline, which are complete with a training-finetuning strategy. With our new framework, we not only achieve state-of-the-art performance on Ego-HOI benchmarks but also build several new and effective mechanisms and settings to advance further research. We believe our data and the findings will pave a new way for Ego-HOI understanding. Code and data are available at https://mvig-rhos.com/ego_pca
abstract_zh: 随着人们对以自我为中心的手-物体交互（Ego-HOI）的关注激增，人们提出了诸如 Ego4D 和 EPIC-KITCHENS 之类的大规模数据集。然而，当前大多数研究都是建立在第三人称视频动作识别的资源之上。第一人称和第三人称动作视频之间固有的领域差距以前没有得到充分解决，使得当前的 Ego-HOI 不够理想。本文重新思考并提出了一个新的框架，作为通过探测、管理和适应（EgoPCA）推进 Ego-HOI 识别的基础设施。我们提供全面的预训练集、平衡测试集和新基线，并配有训练微调策略。借助我们的新框架，我们不仅在 Ego-HOI 基准上实现了最先进的性能，而且还建立了一些新的有效机制和设置来推进进一步的研究。我们相信我们的数据和研究结果将为理解 Ego-HOI 铺平新的道路。代码和数据可在 https://mvig-rhos.com/ego_pca 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EgoPCA的新框架，用于改进第一视角下手-物体交互（Ego-HOI）的理解。
AI.motivation: 当前大多数Ego-HOI研究基于第三人称视频动作识别资源，存在第一视角与第三人称视角之间的领域差距，导致Ego-HOI效果不佳。
AI.method: EgoPCA框架通过探测（Probing）、数据整理（Curation）和适应（Adaption）三个步骤，构建了全面的预训练数据集、平衡的测试集以及新的基线模型，并提出了一种训练-微调策略。
AI.result: 该框架在Ego-HOI基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，并提出了多种新的有效机制和设置，推动了进一步的研究。
AI.conclusion: 本文的数据和发现为Ego-HOI的理解开辟了新途径，并提供了代码和数据供研究者使用。

search_text: EgoPCA: A New Framework for Egocentric Hand-Object Interaction Understanding EgoPCA：以自我为中心的手部物体交互理解的新框架 With the surge in attention to Egocentric Hand-Object Interaction (Ego-HOI), large-scale datasets such as Ego4D and EPIC-KITCHENS have been proposed. However, most current research is built on resources derived from third-person video action recognition. This inherent domain gap between first- and third-person action videos, which have not been adequately addressed before, makes current Ego-HOI suboptimal. This paper rethinks and proposes a new framework as an infrastructure to advance Ego-HOI recognition by Probing, Curation and Adaption (EgoPCA). We contribute comprehensive pre-train sets, balanced test sets and a new baseline, which are complete with a training-finetuning strategy. With our new framework, we not only achieve state-of-the-art performance on Ego-HOI benchmarks but also build several new and effective mechanisms and settings to advance further research. We believe our data and the findings will pave a new way for Ego-HOI understanding. Code and data are available at https://mvig-rhos.com/ego_pca 随着人们对以自我为中心的手-物体交互（Ego-HOI）的关注激增，人们提出了诸如 Ego4D 和 EPIC-KITCHENS 之类的大规模数据集。然而，当前大多数研究都是建立在第三人称视频动作识别的资源之上。第一人称和第三人称动作视频之间固有的领域差距以前没有得到充分解决，使得当前的 Ego-HOI 不够理想。本文重新思考并提出了一个新的框架，作为通过探测、管理和适应（EgoPCA）推进 Ego-HOI 识别的基础设施。我们提供全面的预训练集、平衡测试集和新基线，并配有训练微调策略。借助我们的新框架，我们不仅在 Ego-HOI 基准上实现了最先进的性能，而且还建立了一些新的有效机制和设置来推进进一步的研究。我们相信我们的数据和研究结果将为理解 Ego-HOI 铺平新的道路。代码和数据可在 https://mvig-rhos.com/ego_pca 获取 本文提出了一种名为EgoPCA的新框架，用于改进第一视角下手-物体交互（Ego-HOI）的理解。 Yue Xu,Yong-Lu Li,Zhemin Huang,Michael Xu Liu,Cewu Lu,Yu-Wing Tai,Chi-Keung Tang cs.CV

authors_text: Ruojin Cai,Joseph Tung,Qianqian Wang,Hadar Averbuch-Elor,Bharath Hariharan,Noah Snavely
title: Doppelgangers: Learning to Disambiguate Images of Similar Structures
title_zh: 分身：学习消除相似结构图像的歧义
comment: Published in ICCV 2023 (Oral); Project page: http://doppelgangers-3d.github.io/
comments: Published in ICCV 2023 (Oral); Project page: http://doppelgangers-3d.github.io/
abstract: We consider the visual disambiguation task of determining whether a pair of visually similar images depict the same or distinct 3D surfaces (e.g., the same or opposite sides of a symmetric building). Illusory image matches, where two images observe distinct but visually similar 3D surfaces, can be challenging for humans to differentiate, and can also lead 3D reconstruction algorithms to produce erroneous results. We propose a learning-based approach to visual disambiguation, formulating it as a binary classification task on image pairs. To that end, we introduce a new dataset for this problem, Doppelgangers, which includes image pairs of similar structures with ground truth labels. We also design a network architecture that takes the spatial distribution of local keypoints and matches as input, allowing for better reasoning about both local and global cues. Our evaluation shows that our method can distinguish illusory matches in difficult cases, and can be integrated into SfM pipelines to produce correct, disambiguated 3D reconstructions. See our project page for our code, datasets, and more results: http://doppelgangers-3d.github.io/.
summary: We consider the visual disambiguation task of determining whether a pair of visually similar images depict the same or distinct 3D surfaces (e.g., the same or opposite sides of a symmetric building). Illusory image matches, where two images observe distinct but visually similar 3D surfaces, can be challenging for humans to differentiate, and can also lead 3D reconstruction algorithms to produce erroneous results. We propose a learning-based approach to visual disambiguation, formulating it as a binary classification task on image pairs. To that end, we introduce a new dataset for this problem, Doppelgangers, which includes image pairs of similar structures with ground truth labels. We also design a network architecture that takes the spatial distribution of local keypoints and matches as input, allowing for better reasoning about both local and global cues. Our evaluation shows that our method can distinguish illusory matches in difficult cases, and can be integrated into SfM pipelines to produce correct, disambiguated 3D reconstructions. See our project page for our code, datasets, and more results: http://doppelgangers-3d.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑视觉消歧任务，确定一对视觉上相似的图像是否描绘相同或不同的 3D 表面（例如，对称建筑物的相同或相反的侧面）。虚幻的图像匹配，即两个图像观察到不同但视觉上相似的 3D 表面，对于人类来说很难区分，并且还可能导致 3D 重建算法产生错误的结果。我们提出了一种基于学习的视觉消歧方法，将其制定为图像对的二元分类任务。为此，我们为这个问题引入了一个新的数据集，Doppelgangers，其中包括带有真实标签的相似结构的图像对。我们还设计了一种网络架构，将局部关键点和匹配的空间分布作为输入，从而可以更好地推理局部和全局线索。我们的评估表明，我们的方法可以在困难的情况下区分虚幻匹配，并且可以集成到 SfM 管道中以生成正确的、消除歧义的 3D 重建。请参阅我们的项目页面，了解我们的代码、数据集和更多结果：http://doppelgangers-3d.github.io/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的视觉消歧方法，用于判断视觉相似的图像是否描绘相同的3D结构。
AI.motivation: 视觉相似但实际不同的图像对3D重建算法造成干扰，人类也难以区分，需解决这一消歧问题以提高重建准确性。
AI.method: 将问题建模为图像对的二分类任务，构建Doppelgangers数据集，并设计利用局部关键点空间分布的网络架构。
AI.result: 方法能有效区分复杂场景下的错觉匹配，并集成到SfM流程中生成正确3D重建结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过学习局部与全局线索，成功解决了相似结构图像的视觉消歧问题，提升了3D重建的可靠性。

authors_text: Minh Tran,Yufeng Yin,Mohammad Soleymani
title: Personalized Adaptation with Pre-trained Speech Encoders for Continuous Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 使用预先训练的语音编码器进行个性化适应，以实现连续情绪识别
abstract: There are individual differences in expressive behaviors driven by cultural norms and personality. This between-person variation can result in reduced emotion recognition performance. Therefore, personalization is an important step in improving the generalization and robustness of speech emotion recognition. In this paper, to achieve unsupervised personalized emotion recognition, we first pre-train an encoder with learnable speaker embeddings in a self-supervised manner to learn robust speech representations conditioned on speakers. Second, we propose an unsupervised method to compensate for the label distribution shifts by finding similar speakers and leveraging their label distributions from the training set. Extensive experimental results on the MSP-Podcast corpus indicate that our method consistently outperforms strong personalization baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance for valence estimation.
summary: There are individual differences in expressive behaviors driven by cultural norms and personality. This between-person variation can result in reduced emotion recognition performance. Therefore, personalization is an important step in improving the generalization and robustness of speech emotion recognition. In this paper, to achieve unsupervised personalized emotion recognition, we first pre-train an encoder with learnable speaker embeddings in a self-supervised manner to learn robust speech representations conditioned on speakers. Second, we propose an unsupervised method to compensate for the label distribution shifts by finding similar speakers and leveraging their label distributions from the training set. Extensive experimental results on the MSP-Podcast corpus indicate that our method consistently outperforms strong personalization baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance for valence estimation.
abstract_zh: 由于文化规范和个性的驱动，表达行为存在个体差异。这种人与人之间的差异可能会导致情绪识别性能下降。因此，个性化是提高语音情感识别的泛化性和鲁棒性的重要一步。在本文中，为了实现无监督的个性化情感识别，我们首先以自监督的方式预训练具有可学习说话人嵌入的编码器，以学习以说话人为条件的鲁棒语音表示。其次，我们提出了一种无监督方法，通过寻找相似的说话者并利用训练集中的标签分布来补偿标签分布的变化。 MSP-Podcast 语料库上的大量实验结果表明，我们的方法始终优于强大的个性化基线，并在效价估计方面实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练语音编码器的个性化自适应方法，用于提升连续情感识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 个体间的表达差异（如文化背景和性格）会导致情感识别性能下降，需通过个性化方法增强模型泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用自监督预训练编码器学习说话人条件化的鲁棒语音表示，并通过无监督方式补偿标签分布偏移，利用相似说话者的标签分布进行调整。
AI.result: 在MSP-Podcast数据集上，该方法在效价估计任务中优于现有个性化基线，达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了个性化情感识别中的分布偏移问题，为实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Taegyeong Lee,Jeonghun Kang,Hyeonyu Kim,Taehwan Kim
title: Generating Realistic Images from In-the-wild Sounds
title_zh: 从野外声音生成逼真的图像
abstract: Representing wild sounds as images is an important but challenging task due to the lack of paired datasets between sound and images and the significant differences in the characteristics of these two modalities. Previous studies have focused on generating images from sound in limited categories or music. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to generate images from in-the-wild sounds. First, we convert sound into text using audio captioning. Second, we propose audio attention and sentence attention to represent the rich characteristics of sound and visualize the sound. Lastly, we propose a direct sound optimization with CLIPscore and AudioCLIP and generate images with a diffusion-based model. In experiments, it shows that our model is able to generate high quality images from wild sounds and outperforms baselines in both quantitative and qualitative evaluations on wild audio datasets.
summary: Representing wild sounds as images is an important but challenging task due to the lack of paired datasets between sound and images and the significant differences in the characteristics of these two modalities. Previous studies have focused on generating images from sound in limited categories or music. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to generate images from in-the-wild sounds. First, we convert sound into text using audio captioning. Second, we propose audio attention and sentence attention to represent the rich characteristics of sound and visualize the sound. Lastly, we propose a direct sound optimization with CLIPscore and AudioCLIP and generate images with a diffusion-based model. In experiments, it shows that our model is able to generate high quality images from wild sounds and outperforms baselines in both quantitative and qualitative evaluations on wild audio datasets.
abstract_zh: 由于声音和图像之间缺乏配对数据集以及这两种模式的特征存在显着差异，将野生声音表示为图像是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。之前的研究主要集中在从有限类别的声音或音乐中生成图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种从野外声音生成图像的新颖方法。首先，我们使用音频字幕将声音转换为文本。其次，我们提出音频注意力和句子注意力来表示声音的丰富特征并将声音可视化。最后，我们提出使用 CLIPscore 和 AudioCLIP 进行直接声音优化，并使用基于扩散的模型生成图像。在实验中，它表明我们的模型能够从野生声音生成高质量的图像，并且在野生音频数据集的定量和定性评估中都优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从野外声音生成真实图像的新方法，解决因缺乏配对数据集及模态差异导致的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多局限于特定类别或音乐，难以处理复杂多样的野外声音，且缺乏有效配对数据集。
AI.method: 分三步：1) 声音转文本（音频字幕）；2) 引入音频注意力与句子注意力机制；3) 基于CLIPscore与AudioCLIP的直接声音优化及扩散模型生成图像。
AI.result: 模型在定量与定性评估中均优于基线，在野外音频数据集上生成高质量图像。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了跨模态生成难题，为野外声音到图像的转换提供了新思路。

search_text: Generating Realistic Images from In-the-wild Sounds 从野外声音生成逼真的图像 Representing wild sounds as images is an important but challenging task due to the lack of paired datasets between sound and images and the significant differences in the characteristics of these two modalities. Previous studies have focused on generating images from sound in limited categories or music. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to generate images from in-the-wild sounds. First, we convert sound into text using audio captioning. Second, we propose audio attention and sentence attention to represent the rich characteristics of sound and visualize the sound. Lastly, we propose a direct sound optimization with CLIPscore and AudioCLIP and generate images with a diffusion-based model. In experiments, it shows that our model is able to generate high quality images from wild sounds and outperforms baselines in both quantitative and qualitative evaluations on wild audio datasets. 由于声音和图像之间缺乏配对数据集以及这两种模式的特征存在显着差异，将野生声音表示为图像是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。之前的研究主要集中在从有限类别的声音或音乐中生成图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种从野外声音生成图像的新颖方法。首先，我们使用音频字幕将声音转换为文本。其次，我们提出音频注意力和句子注意力来表示声音的丰富特征并将声音可视化。最后，我们提出使用 CLIPscore 和 AudioCLIP 进行直接声音优化，并使用基于扩散的模型生成图像。在实验中，它表明我们的模型能够从野生声音生成高质量的图像，并且在野生音频数据集的定量和定性评估中都优于基线。 本文提出一种从野外声音生成真实图像的新方法，解决因缺乏配对数据集及模态差异导致的挑战。 Taegyeong Lee,Jeonghun Kang,Hyeonyu Kim,Taehwan Kim cs.CV,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Sushanta K. Pani,Anurag Chowdhury,Morgan Sandler,Arun Ross
title: Voice Morphing: Two Identities in One Voice
title_zh: 声音变形：一种声音两种身份
abstract: In a biometric system, each biometric sample or template is typically associated with a single identity. However, recent research has demonstrated the possibility of generating "morph" biometric samples that can successfully match more than a single identity. Morph attacks are now recognized as a potential security threat to biometric systems. However, most morph attacks have been studied on biometric modalities operating in the image domain, such as face, fingerprint, and iris. In this preliminary work, we introduce Voice Identity Morphing (VIM) - a voice-based morph attack that can synthesize speech samples that impersonate the voice characteristics of a pair of individuals. Our experiments evaluate the vulnerabilities of two popular speaker recognition systems, ECAPA-TDNN and x-vector, to VIM, with a success rate (MMPMR) of over 80% at a false match rate of 1% on the Librispeech dataset.
summary: In a biometric system, each biometric sample or template is typically associated with a single identity. However, recent research has demonstrated the possibility of generating "morph" biometric samples that can successfully match more than a single identity. Morph attacks are now recognized as a potential security threat to biometric systems. However, most morph attacks have been studied on biometric modalities operating in the image domain, such as face, fingerprint, and iris. In this preliminary work, we introduce Voice Identity Morphing (VIM) - a voice-based morph attack that can synthesize speech samples that impersonate the voice characteristics of a pair of individuals. Our experiments evaluate the vulnerabilities of two popular speaker recognition systems, ECAPA-TDNN and x-vector, to VIM, with a success rate (MMPMR) of over 80% at a false match rate of 1% on the Librispeech dataset.
abstract_zh: 在生物识别系统中，每个生物识别样本或模板通常与单个身份相关联。然而，最近的研究证明了生成“变形”生物识别样本的可能性，这些样本可以成功匹配多个身份。变形攻击现在被认为是对生物识别系统的潜在安全威胁。然而，大多数变形攻击都是针对图像域中操作的生物识别模式进行研究的，例如面部、指纹和虹膜。在这项初步工作中，我们介绍了语音身份变形（VIM）——一种基于语音的变形攻击，可以合成模拟一对个体语音特征的语音样本。我们的实验评估了两种流行的说话人识别系统 ECAPA-TDNN 和 x-vector 对 VIM 的漏洞，在 Librispeech 数据集上的错误匹配率为 1% 时，成功率 (MMMPR) 超过 80%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语音的形态攻击方法（VIM），能够合成同时模仿两人声纹特征的语音样本，挑战现有的说话人识别系统。
AI.motivation: 现有生物特征系统多针对图像领域形态攻击进行研究，而语音领域的形态攻击研究尚属空白，需填补这一安全漏洞。
AI.method: 通过合成融合两人语音特征的样本，测试ECAPA-TDNN和x-vector两种主流说话人识别系统在Librispeech数据集上的识别漏洞。
AI.result: 在1%误匹配率下，两种系统均被攻击成功率达80%以上，证明语音形态攻击对现有系统构成显著威胁。
AI.conclusion: 语音形态攻击（VIM）揭示了当前说话人识别系统的安全缺陷，亟需开发新型防御机制以应对此类跨身份伪装攻击。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语音的形态攻击方法（VIM），能够合成同时模仿两人声纹特征的语音样本，挑战现有的说话人识别系统。

authors_text: Atieh Taheri,Mohammad Izadi,Gururaj Shriram,Negar Rostamzadeh,Shaun Kane
title: Breaking Barriers to Creative Expression: Co-Designing and Implementing an Accessible Text-to-Image Interface
title_zh: 打破创意表达的障碍：共同设计和实现可访问的文本到图像界面
abstract: Text-to-image generation models have grown in popularity due to their ability to produce high-quality images from a text prompt. One use for this technology is to enable the creation of more accessible art creation software. In this paper, we document the development of an alternative user interface that reduces the typing effort needed to enter image prompts by providing suggestions from a large language model, developed through iterative design and testing within the project team. The results of this testing demonstrate how generative text models can support the accessibility of text-to-image models, enabling users with a range of abilities to create visual art.
summary: Text-to-image generation models have grown in popularity due to their ability to produce high-quality images from a text prompt. One use for this technology is to enable the creation of more accessible art creation software. In this paper, we document the development of an alternative user interface that reduces the typing effort needed to enter image prompts by providing suggestions from a large language model, developed through iterative design and testing within the project team. The results of this testing demonstrate how generative text models can support the accessibility of text-to-image models, enabling users with a range of abilities to create visual art.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像生成模型由于能够根据文本提示生成高质量图像而越来越受欢迎。这项技术的用途之一是能够创建更易于使用的艺术创作软件。在本文中，我们记录了替代用户界面的开发，该界面通过提供大型语言模型的建议来减少输入图像提示所需的打字工作，该大型语言模型是通过项目团队内的迭代设计和测试开发的。该测试的结果展示了生成文本模型如何支持文本到图像模型的可访问性，使具有多种能力的用户能够创建视觉艺术。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一个无障碍文本到图像界面，通过大型语言模型提供提示建议以减少打字需求，帮助不同能力的用户创作视觉艺术。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像工具对有打字障碍的用户不够友好，需通过技术创新提升艺术创作的无障碍性。
AI.method: 通过迭代设计与团队测试，开发结合大型语言模型的提示建议系统，优化用户界面以降低输入复杂度。
AI.result: 测试表明生成式文本模型能有效辅助用户减少输入负担，使不同能力群体均可创作视觉艺术。
AI.conclusion: 该设计验证了生成模型在提升文本到图像工具无障碍性中的潜力，未来需进一步优化模型与交互体验以实现更包容的创作环境。

authors_text: Nanne van Noord
title: Prototype-based Dataset Comparison
title_zh: 基于原型的数据集比较
abstract: Dataset summarisation is a fruitful approach to dataset inspection. However, when applied to a single dataset the discovery of visual concepts is restricted to those most prominent. We argue that a comparative approach can expand upon this paradigm to enable richer forms of dataset inspection that go beyond the most prominent concepts. To enable dataset comparison we present a module that learns concept-level prototypes across datasets. We leverage self-supervised learning to discover these prototypes without supervision, and we demonstrate the benefits of our approach in two case-studies. Our findings show that dataset comparison extends dataset inspection and we hope to encourage more works in this direction. Code and usage instructions available at https://github.com/Nanne/ProtoSim
summary: Dataset summarisation is a fruitful approach to dataset inspection. However, when applied to a single dataset the discovery of visual concepts is restricted to those most prominent. We argue that a comparative approach can expand upon this paradigm to enable richer forms of dataset inspection that go beyond the most prominent concepts. To enable dataset comparison we present a module that learns concept-level prototypes across datasets. We leverage self-supervised learning to discover these prototypes without supervision, and we demonstrate the benefits of our approach in two case-studies. Our findings show that dataset comparison extends dataset inspection and we hope to encourage more works in this direction. Code and usage instructions available at https://github.com/Nanne/ProtoSim
abstract_zh: 数据集摘要是一种富有成效的数据集检查方法。然而，当应用于单个数据集时，视觉概念的发现仅限于那些最突出的。我们认为，比较方法可以扩展这种范式，以实现超越最突出概念的更丰富形式的数据集检查。为了实现数据集比较，我们提出了一个可以跨数据集学习概念级原型的模块。我们利用自我监督学习在没有监督的情况下发现这些原型，并在两个案例研究中展示了我们的方法的好处。我们的研究结果表明，数据集比较扩展了数据集检查，我们希望鼓励在这个方向上进行更多工作。代码和使用说明位于 https://github.com/Nanne/ProtoSim

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于原型的数据集比较方法，通过跨数据集学习概念级原型来扩展数据集检查的范围。
AI.motivation: 传统单数据集分析仅能发现最突出的视觉概念，无法全面揭示潜在概念，需通过比较方法拓展分析深度。
AI.method: 利用自监督学习跨数据集提取概念级原型，通过原型对比实现数据集间的语义关联分析。
AI.result: 在两个案例研究中验证了方法有效性，证明数据集比较能发现单数据集分析遗漏的概念关联。
AI.conclusion: 数据集比较范式可显著增强数据集分析能力，未来应加强该方向的研究与应用探索。

authors_text: Patricia Hu,Gerhard Widmer
title: The Batik-plays-Mozart Corpus: Linking Performance to Score to Musicological Annotations
title_zh: 蜡染演奏莫扎特语料库：将表演、乐谱与音乐学注释联系起来
comment: To be published in the Proceedings of the 24th International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR 2023), Milan, Italy
comments: To be published in the Proceedings of the 24th International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR 2023), Milan, Italy
abstract: We present the Batik-plays-Mozart Corpus, a piano performance dataset combining professional Mozart piano sonata performances with expert-labelled scores at a note-precise level. The performances originate from a recording by Viennese pianist Roland Batik on a computer-monitored Bösendorfer grand piano, and are available both as MIDI files and audio recordings. They have been precisely aligned, note by note, with a current standard edition of the corresponding scores (the New Mozart Edition) in such a way that they can further be connected to the musicological annotations (harmony, cadences, phrases) on these scores that were recently published by Hentschel et al. (2021). The result is a high-quality, high-precision corpus mapping scores and musical structure annotations to precise note-level professional performance information. As the first of its kind, it can serve as a valuable resource for studying various facets of expressive performance and their relationship with structural aspects. In the paper, we outline the curation process of the alignment and conduct two exploratory experiments to demonstrate its usefulness in analyzing expressive performance.
summary: We present the Batik-plays-Mozart Corpus, a piano performance dataset combining professional Mozart piano sonata performances with expert-labelled scores at a note-precise level. The performances originate from a recording by Viennese pianist Roland Batik on a computer-monitored Bösendorfer grand piano, and are available both as MIDI files and audio recordings. They have been precisely aligned, note by note, with a current standard edition of the corresponding scores (the New Mozart Edition) in such a way that they can further be connected to the musicological annotations (harmony, cadences, phrases) on these scores that were recently published by Hentschel et al. (2021). The result is a high-quality, high-precision corpus mapping scores and musical structure annotations to precise note-level professional performance information. As the first of its kind, it can serve as a valuable resource for studying various facets of expressive performance and their relationship with structural aspects. In the paper, we outline the curation process of the alignment and conduct two exploratory experiments to demonstrate its usefulness in analyzing expressive performance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Batik-plays-Mozart Corpus，这是一个钢琴演奏数据集，将专业的莫扎特钢琴奏鸣曲演奏与音符精确级别的专家标记乐谱相结合。这些演奏源自维也纳钢琴家 Roland Batik 在计算机监控的 Bösendorfer 三角钢琴上录制的录音，并以 MIDI 文件和录音形式提供。它们逐个音符与相应乐谱的当前标准版本（新莫扎特版本）精确对齐，这样它们就可以进一步与 Hentschel 等人最近发布的这些乐谱上的音乐学注释（和声、节奏、乐句）联系起来。 （2021）。其结果是高质量、高精度的语料库将乐谱和音乐结构注释映射到精确的音符级专业演奏信息。作为同类中的第一个，它可以作为研究表达性能的各个方面及其与结构方面的关系的宝贵资源。在本文中，我们概述了对齐的策划过程，并进行了两个探索性实验，以证明其在分析表达性能方面的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Batik-plays-Mozart语料库，该语料库将专业莫扎特钢琴奏鸣曲演奏与精确标注的乐谱及音乐学术注释相结合。
AI.motivation: 旨在为研究表现性演奏与音乐结构关系提供高质量、高精度的语料资源，填补现有研究在演奏与乐谱注释关联方面的空白。
AI.method: 通过计算机监控的钢琴录制专业演奏，将MIDI音频与标准乐谱（新莫扎特版）逐音符对齐，并关联Hentschel等人的音乐学术注释（和声、终止式、乐句）。
AI.result: 构建了首个将演奏、乐谱与结构注释精确映射的语料库，并通过两个实验验证其分析表现性演奏的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该语料库为研究演奏表现与音乐结构的关联提供了可靠工具，可推动相关领域的进一步探索。

authors_text: Natalia Pavlasek,Charles Champagne Cossette,David Roy-Guay,James Richard Forbes
title: Magnetic Navigation using Attitude-Invariant Magnetic Field Information for Loop Closure Detection
title_zh: 使用姿态不变磁场信息进行环路闭合检测的磁导航
abstract: Indoor magnetic fields are a combination of Earth's magnetic field and disruptions induced by ferromagnetic objects, such as steel structural components in buildings. As a result of these disruptions, pervasive in indoor spaces, magnetic field data is often omitted from navigation algorithms in indoor environments. This paper leverages the spatially-varying disruptions to Earth's magnetic field to extract positional information for use in indoor navigation algorithms. The algorithm uses a rate gyro and an array of four magnetometers to estimate the robot's pose. Additionally, the magnetometer array is used to compute attitude-invariant measurements associated with the magnetic field and its gradient. These measurements are used to detect loop closure points. Experimental results indicate that the proposed approach can estimate the pose of a ground robot in an indoor environment within meter accuracy.
summary: Indoor magnetic fields are a combination of Earth's magnetic field and disruptions induced by ferromagnetic objects, such as steel structural components in buildings. As a result of these disruptions, pervasive in indoor spaces, magnetic field data is often omitted from navigation algorithms in indoor environments. This paper leverages the spatially-varying disruptions to Earth's magnetic field to extract positional information for use in indoor navigation algorithms. The algorithm uses a rate gyro and an array of four magnetometers to estimate the robot's pose. Additionally, the magnetometer array is used to compute attitude-invariant measurements associated with the magnetic field and its gradient. These measurements are used to detect loop closure points. Experimental results indicate that the proposed approach can estimate the pose of a ground robot in an indoor environment within meter accuracy.
abstract_zh: 室内磁场是地球磁场和铁磁物体（例如建筑物中的钢结构部件）引起的干扰的组合。由于这些在室内空间中普遍存在的干扰，室内环境中的导航算法常常会忽略磁场数据。本文利用地球磁场的空间变化干扰来提取用于室内导航算法的位置信息。该算法使用速率陀螺仪和四个磁力计阵列来估计机器人的姿态。此外，磁力计阵列用于计算与磁场及其梯度相关的姿态不变测量。这些测量用于检测环路闭合点。实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以在米级精度内估计室内环境中地面机器人的位姿。

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用姿态不变磁场信息进行室内机器人导航的回环检测方法
AI.motivation: 传统导航算法常忽略室内磁场干扰，但其空间变化特性可提供位置信息，用于改进导航
AI.method: 结合陀螺仪与四磁力计阵列，计算姿态不变的磁场梯度测量值，用于回环检测
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在室内环境中可实现米级精度的机器人姿态估计
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种有效利用室内磁场干扰进行导航的回环检测方法，提升了定位精度

Experimental results indicate that the proposed approach can estimate the pose of a ground robot in an indoor environment within meter accuracy. 室内磁场是地球磁场和铁磁物体（例如建筑物中的钢结构部件）引起的干扰的组合。由于这些在室内空间中普遍存在的干扰，室内环境中的导航算法常常会忽略磁场数据。本文利用地球磁场的空间变化干扰来提取用于室内导航算法的位置信息。该算法使用速率陀螺仪和四个磁力计阵列来估计机器人的姿态。此外，磁力计阵列用于计算与磁场及其梯度相关的姿态不变测量。这些测量用于检测环路闭合点。实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以在米级精度内估计室内环境中地面机器人的位姿。 提出一种利用姿态不变磁场信息进行室内机器人导航的回环检测方法 Natalia Pavlasek,Charles Champagne Cossette,David Roy-Guay,James Richard Forbes cs.RO

authors_text: Philipp Schilk,Niccolò Polvani,Andrea Ronco,Milos Cernak,Michele Magno
title: In-Ear-Voice: Towards Milli-Watt Audio Enhancement With Bone-Conduction Microphones for In-Ear Sensing Platforms
title_zh: 入耳式语音：通过用于入耳式传感平台的骨传导麦克风实现毫瓦级音频增强
abstract: The recent ubiquitous adoption of remote conferencing has been accompanied by omnipresent frustration with distorted or otherwise unclear voice communication. Audio enhancement can compensate for low-quality input signals from, for example, small true wireless earbuds, by applying noise suppression techniques. Such processing relies on voice activity detection (VAD) with low latency and the added capability of discriminating the wearer's voice from others - a task of significant computational complexity. The tight energy budget of devices as small as modern earphones, however, requires any system attempting to tackle this problem to do so with minimal power and processing overhead, while not relying on speaker-specific voice samples and training due to usability concerns. This paper presents the design and implementation of a custom research platform for low-power wireless earbuds based on novel, commercial, MEMS bone-conduction microphones. Such microphones can record the wearer's speech with much greater isolation, enabling personalized voice activity detection and further audio enhancement applications. Furthermore, the paper accurately evaluates a proposed low-power personalized speech detection algorithm based on bone conduction data and a recurrent neural network running on the implemented research platform. This algorithm is compared to an approach based on traditional microphone input. The performance of the bone conduction system, achieving detection of speech within 12.8ms at an accuracy of 95\% is evaluated. Different SoC choices are contrasted, with the final implementation based on the cutting-edge Ambiq Apollo 4 Blue SoC achieving 2.64mW average power consumption at 14uJ per inference, reaching 43h of battery life on a miniature 32mAh li-ion cell and without duty cycling.

This paper presents the design and implementation of a custom research platform for low-power wireless earbuds based on novel, commercial, MEMS bone-conduction microphones. Such microphones can record the wearer's speech with much greater isolation, enabling personalized voice activity detection and further audio enhancement applications. Furthermore, the paper accurately evaluates a proposed low-power personalized speech detection algorithm based on bone conduction data and a recurrent neural network running on the implemented research platform. This algorithm is compared to an approach based on traditional microphone input. The performance of the bone conduction system, achieving detection of speech within 12.8ms at an accuracy of 95\% is evaluated. Different SoC choices are contrasted, with the final implementation based on the cutting-edge Ambiq Apollo 4 Blue SoC achieving 2.64mW average power consumption at 14uJ per inference, reaching 43h of battery life on a miniature 32mAh li-ion cell and without duty cycling.
abstract_zh: 最近，随着远程会议的普遍采用，人们普遍对语音通信失真或不清楚感到沮丧。音频增强可以通过应用噪声抑制技术来补偿来自小型真无线耳塞等的低质量输入信号。此类处理依赖于低延迟的语音活动检测 (VAD) 以及区分佩戴者的声音与其他人的声音的附加功能 - 这是一项计算复杂性很高的任务。然而，像现代耳机这样小的设备的能源预算紧张，要求任何试图解决这个问题的系统以最小的功率和处理开销来实现，同时由于可用性问题而不依赖于特定于说话者的语音样本和训练。本文介绍了基于新型商用 MEMS 骨传导麦克风的低功耗无线耳机定制研究平台的设计和实现。此类麦克风可以以更高的隔离度记录佩戴者的语音，从而实现个性化语音活动检测和进一步的音频增强应用。此外，本文还准确评估了所提出的基于骨传导数据的低功耗个性化语音检测算法和在所实现的研究平台上运行的循环神经网络。该算法与基于传统麦克风输入的方法进行了比较。评估了骨传导系统的性能，实现了 12.8ms 内的语音检测，准确率达到 95%。对比了不同的 SoC 选择，最终基于尖端 Ambiq Apollo 4 Blue SoC 的实现在每次推理 14uJ 时实现了 2.64mW 的平均功耗，在微型 32mAh 锂离子电池上达到了 43 小时的电池寿命，并且没有负载循环。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一种基于骨传导麦克风的低功耗音频增强系统，用于改善耳内传感平台的语音通信质量。
AI.motivation: 远程会议中语音通信存在失真问题，传统麦克风难以在低功耗设备上实现个性化语音检测，需解决高精度、低功耗且无需特定说话人训练的音频增强方案。
AI.method: 采用商用MEMS骨传导麦克风构建定制化研究平台，结合循环神经网络（RNN）实现低延迟语音活动检测算法，并对比传统麦克风方案。
AI.result: 骨传导系统实现95%检测准确率（12.8ms延迟），基于Ambiq Apollo 4 Blue芯片的方案平均功耗2.64mW，单次充电续航达43小时。
AI.conclusion: 骨传导麦克风结合低功耗RNN算法可有效提升耳内设备音频质量，验证了该方案在微型化、低功耗场景下的可行性。

authors_text: Sergi Garcia-Bordils,Dimosthenis Karatzas,Marçal Rusiñol
title: STEP -- Towards Structured Scene-Text Spotting
title_zh: STEP——走向结构化场景文本识别
abstract: We introduce the structured scene-text spotting task, which requires a scene-text OCR system to spot text in the wild according to a query regular expression. Contrary to generic scene text OCR, structured scene-text spotting seeks to dynamically condition both scene text detection and recognition on user-provided regular expressions. To tackle this task, we propose the Structured TExt sPotter (STEP), a model that exploits the provided text structure to guide the OCR process. STEP is able to deal with regular expressions that contain spaces and it is not bound to detection at the word-level granularity. Our approach enables accurate zero-shot structured text spotting in a wide variety of real-world reading scenarios and is solely trained on publicly available data. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, we introduce a new challenging test dataset that contains several types of out-of-vocabulary structured text, reflecting important reading applications of fields such as prices, dates, serial numbers, license plates etc. We demonstrate that STEP can provide specialised OCR performance on demand in all tested scenarios.
summary: We introduce the structured scene-text spotting task, which requires a scene-text OCR system to spot text in the wild according to a query regular expression. Contrary to generic scene text OCR, structured scene-text spotting seeks to dynamically condition both scene text detection and recognition on user-provided regular expressions. To tackle this task, we propose the Structured TExt sPotter (STEP), a model that exploits the provided text structure to guide the OCR process. STEP is able to deal with regular expressions that contain spaces and it is not bound to detection at the word-level granularity. Our approach enables accurate zero-shot structured text spotting in a wide variety of real-world reading scenarios and is solely trained on publicly available data. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, we introduce a new challenging test dataset that contains several types of out-of-vocabulary structured text, reflecting important reading applications of fields such as prices, dates, serial numbers, license plates etc. We demonstrate that STEP can provide specialised OCR performance on demand in all tested scenarios.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了结构化场景文本识别任务，该任务需要场景文本 OCR 系统根据查询正则表达式识别自然文本。与通用场景文本 OCR 相反，结构化场景文本识别旨在根据用户提供的正则表达式动态调节场景文本检测和识别。为了解决这一任务，我们提出了结构化文本 sPotter (STEP)，这是一种利用提供的文本结构来指导 OCR 过程的模型。 STEP能够处理包含空格的正则表达式，并且不限于字级粒度的检测。我们的方法可以在各种现实世界的阅读场景中实现准确的零样本结构化文本识别，并且仅根据公开数据进行训练。为了证明我们方法的有效性，我们引入了一个新的具有挑战性的测试数据集，其中包含几种类型的词汇外结构化文本，反映了价格、日期、序列号、车牌等领域的重要阅读应用。我们证明了 STEP 可以在所有测试场景中按需提供专门的 OCR 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结构化场景文本检测任务，通过用户提供的正则表达式动态指导文本检测与识别过程。
AI.motivation: 传统场景文本OCR系统无法动态适配用户定义的文本结构，难以应对价格、日期等结构化文本的识别需求。
AI.method: 提出STEP模型，利用正则表达式结构信息引导OCR流程，支持包含空格的正则表达式且不依赖词级检测粒度。
AI.result: 在包含多种出库词汇结构化文本的新数据集上验证，模型在零样本场景下均实现专项OCR性能。
AI.conclusion: STEP通过结构化正则表达式约束实现了面向实际应用场景的专用文本识别能力。

authors_text: Ruixuan Liu,Yifan Sun,Changliu Liu
title: A Lightweight and Transferable Design for Robust LEGO Manipulation
title_zh: 轻巧且可转移的设计，可实现坚固的乐高操控
abstract: Lego is a well-known platform for prototyping pixelized objects. However, robotic Lego prototyping (i.e., manipulating Lego bricks) is challenging due to the tight connections and accuracy requirements. This paper investigates safe and efficient robotic Lego manipulation. In particular, this paper reduces the complexity of the manipulation by hardware-software co-design. An end-of-arm tool (EOAT) is designed, which reduces the problem dimension and allows large industrial robots to manipulate small Lego bricks. In addition, this paper uses evolution strategy to optimize the robot motion for Lego manipulation. Experiments demonstrate that the EOAT can reliably manipulate Lego bricks and the learning framework can effectively and safely improve the manipulation performance to a 100% success rate. The co-design is deployed to multiple robots (i.e., FANUC LR-mate 200id/7L and Yaskawa GP4) to demonstrate its generalizability and transferability. In the end, we show that the proposed solution enables sustainable robotic Lego prototyping, in which the robot can repeatedly assemble and disassemble different prototypes.
summary: Lego is a well-known platform for prototyping pixelized objects. However, robotic Lego prototyping (i.e., manipulating Lego bricks) is challenging due to the tight connections and accuracy requirements. This paper investigates safe and efficient robotic Lego manipulation. In particular, this paper reduces the complexity of the manipulation by hardware-software co-design. An end-of-arm tool (EOAT) is designed, which reduces the problem dimension and allows large industrial robots to manipulate small Lego bricks. In addition, this paper uses evolution strategy to optimize the robot motion for Lego manipulation. Experiments demonstrate that the EOAT can reliably manipulate Lego bricks and the learning framework can effectively and safely improve the manipulation performance to a 100% success rate. The co-design is deployed to multiple robots (i.e., FANUC LR-mate 200id/7L and Yaskawa GP4) to demonstrate its generalizability and transferability. In the end, we show that the proposed solution enables sustainable robotic Lego prototyping, in which the robot can repeatedly assemble and disassemble different prototypes.
abstract_zh: 乐高是一个著名的像素化物体原型制作平台。然而，由于紧密的连接和精度要求，机器人乐高原型制作（即操作乐高积木）具有挑战性。本文研究了安全高效的机器人乐高操作。特别是，本文通过软硬件协同设计降低了操作的复杂性。设计了一种臂端工具（EOAT），它可以减少问题维度，并允许大型工业机器人操纵小型乐高积木。此外，本文使用进化策略来优化乐高操纵的机器人运动。实验表明，EOAT能够可靠地操控乐高积木，并且学习框架能够有效、安全地提高操控性能，成功率达到100%。该协同设计被部署到多个机器人（即 FANUC LR-mate 200id/7L 和 Yaskawa GP4），以证明其通用性和可移植性。最后，我们证明所提出的解决方案可以实现可持续的机器人乐高原型制作，其中机器人可以重复组装和拆卸不同的原型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量且可迁移的设计方案，用于实现工业机器人对乐高积木的鲁棒操作。
AI.motivation: 乐高积木因连接紧密和精度要求高，传统机器人操作存在困难，需开发安全高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过硬件-软件协同设计，开发末端执行器（EOAT）简化操作维度，并采用进化策略优化机器人运动控制。
AI.result: EOAT可靠操作乐高积木，学习框架使成功率提升至100%，方案成功部署于多种工业机器人并验证其通用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方案通过协同设计实现了可持续的乐高机器人原型制作，具备重复组装与拆卸能力。

authors_text: Alhasan Abdellatif,Ahmed H. Elsheikh,Hannah P. Menke
title: Local Padding in Patch-Based GANs for Seamless Infinite-Sized Texture Synthesis
title_zh: 基于补丁的 GAN 中的局部填充用于无缝无限大小纹理合成
abstract: Texture models based on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) use zero-padding to implicitly encode positional information of the image features. However, when extending the spatial input to generate images at large sizes, zero-padding can often lead to degradation in image quality due to the incorrect positional information at the center of the image. Moreover, zero-padding can limit the diversity within the generated large images. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for generating stochastic texture images at large arbitrary sizes using GANs based on patch-by-patch generation. Instead of zero-padding, the model uses \textit{local padding} in the generator that shares border features between the generated patches; providing positional context and ensuring consistency at the boundaries. The proposed models are trainable on a single texture image and have a constant GPU scalability with respect to the output image size, and hence can generate images of infinite sizes. We show in the experiments that our method has a significant advancement beyond existing GANs-based texture models in terms of the quality and diversity of the generated textures. Furthermore, the implementation of local padding in the state-of-the-art super-resolution models effectively eliminates tiling artifacts enabling large-scale super-resolution. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/ai4netzero/Infinite_Texture_GANs}.
summary: Texture models based on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) use zero-padding to implicitly encode positional information of the image features. However, when extending the spatial input to generate images at large sizes, zero-padding can often lead to degradation in image quality due to the incorrect positional information at the center of the image. Moreover, zero-padding can limit the diversity within the generated large images. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for generating stochastic texture images at large arbitrary sizes using GANs based on patch-by-patch generation. Instead of zero-padding, the model uses \textit{local padding} in the generator that shares border features between the generated patches; providing positional context and ensuring consistency at the boundaries. The proposed models are trainable on a single texture image and have a constant GPU scalability with respect to the output image size, and hence can generate images of infinite sizes. We show in the experiments that our method has a significant advancement beyond existing GANs-based texture models in terms of the quality and diversity of the generated textures. Furthermore, the implementation of local padding in the state-of-the-art super-resolution models effectively eliminates tiling artifacts enabling large-scale super-resolution. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/ai4netzero/Infinite_Texture_GANs}.
abstract_zh: 基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的纹理模型使用零填充来隐式编码图像特征的位置信息。然而，当扩展空间输入以生成大尺寸图像时，由于图像中心的位置信息不正确，零填充通常会导致图像质量下降。此外，零填充会限制生成的大图像内的多样性。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用基于逐块生成的 GAN 生成任意大尺寸随机纹理图像的新方法。该模型不是使用零填充，而是在生成器中使用 \textit{local padding} 来共享生成的补丁之间的边界特征；提供位置背景并确保边界的一致性。所提出的模型可在单个纹理图像上进行训练，并且对于输出图像大小具有恒定的 GPU 可扩展性，因此可以生成无限大小的图像。我们在实验中表明，我们的方法在生成纹理的质量和多样性方面比现有的基于 GAN 的纹理模型有显着的进步。此外，在最先进的超分辨率模型中实施局部填充可以有效消除平铺伪影，从而实现大规模超分辨率。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/ai4netzero/Infinite_Texture_GANs} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于局部填充的补丁生成对抗网络（GAN），用于生成无缝且无限大的纹理图像。
AI.motivation: 传统基于GAN的纹理模型使用零填充导致大尺寸图像生成时质量下降和多样性受限，需改进填充策略以提升效果。
AI.method: 采用局部填充替代零填充，通过共享生成补丁间的边界特征，提供位置上下文并确保边界一致性，模型可单图训练且GPU可扩展。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在纹理质量和多样性上优于现有GAN模型，并有效消除超分辨率中的拼接伪影。
AI.conclusion: 局部填充策略显著提升了大尺度纹理生成与超分辨率性能，实现了无限尺寸纹理的高质量合成。

authors_text: Helena Williams,João Pedrosa,Muhammad Asad,Laura Cattani,Tom Vercauteren,Jan Deprest,Jan D'hooge
title: DEEPBEAS3D: Deep Learning and B-Spline Explicit Active Surfaces
title_zh: DEEPBEAS3D：深度学习和 B 样条显式活动曲面
abstract: Deep learning-based automatic segmentation methods have become state-of-the-art. However, they are often not robust enough for direct clinical application, as domain shifts between training and testing data affect their performance. Failure in automatic segmentation can cause sub-optimal results that require correction. To address these problems, we propose a novel 3D extension of an interactive segmentation framework that represents a segmentation from a convolutional neural network (CNN) as a B-spline explicit active surface (BEAS). BEAS ensures segmentations are smooth in 3D space, increasing anatomical plausibility, while allowing the user to precisely edit the 3D surface. We apply this framework to the task of 3D segmentation of the anal sphincter complex (AS) from transperineal ultrasound (TPUS) images, and compare it to the clinical tool used in the pelvic floor disorder clinic (4D View VOCAL, GE Healthcare; Zipf, Austria). Experimental results show that: 1) the proposed framework gives the user explicit control of the surface contour; 2) the perceived workload calculated via the NASA-TLX index was reduced by 30% compared to VOCAL; and 3) it required 7 0% (170 seconds) less user time than VOCAL (p< 0.00001)
summary: Deep learning-based automatic segmentation methods have become state-of-the-art. However, they are often not robust enough for direct clinical application, as domain shifts between training and testing data affect their performance. Failure in automatic segmentation can cause sub-optimal results that require correction. To address these problems, we propose a novel 3D extension of an interactive segmentation framework that represents a segmentation from a convolutional neural network (CNN) as a B-spline explicit active surface (BEAS). BEAS ensures segmentations are smooth in 3D space, increasing anatomical plausibility, while allowing the user to precisely edit the 3D surface. We apply this framework to the task of 3D segmentation of the anal sphincter complex (AS) from transperineal ultrasound (TPUS) images, and compare it to the clinical tool used in the pelvic floor disorder clinic (4D View VOCAL, GE Healthcare; Zipf, Austria). Experimental results show that: 1) the proposed framework gives the user explicit control of the surface contour; 2) the perceived workload calculated via the NASA-TLX index was reduced by 30% compared to VOCAL; and 3) it required 7 0% (170 seconds) less user time than VOCAL (p< 0.00001)
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的自动分割方法已经成为最先进的方法。然而，它们通常不够强大，无法直接应用于临床，因为训练和测试数据之间的领域转换会影响它们的性能。自动分割失败可能会导致结果不理想，需要纠正。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了交互式分割框架的一种新颖的 3D 扩展，该框架将卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的分割表示为 B 样条显式活动表面 (BEAS)。 BEAS 确保 3D 空间中的分割平滑，提高解剖学的合理性，同时允许用户精确编辑 3D 表面。我们将此框架应用于从经会阴超声 (TPUS) 图像中对肛门括约肌复合体 (AS) 进行 3D 分割的任务，并将其与盆底疾病诊所使用的临床工具进行比较（4D View VOCAL，GE Healthcare；Zipf，奥地利）。实验结果表明：1）所提出的框架为用户提供了对表面轮廓的明确控制； 2）通过NASA-TLX指数计算的感知工作量相比VOCAL减少了30%； 3) 比 VOCAL 所需的用户时间少 7 0%（170 秒）（p< 0.00001）

AI.tldr: 本文提出DEEPBEAS3D框架，结合深度学习与B样条显式活动曲面技术，用于改进3D医学图像分割的临床应用。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习分割方法在临床应用中因训练与测试数据域偏移导致鲁棒性不足，需人工修正，影响效率。
AI.method: 将CNN分割结果表示为B样条显式活动曲面（BEAS），实现3D平滑分割并支持用户精确编辑，应用于肛门括约肌复合体的经会阴超声图像分割。
AI.result: 相比临床工具VOCAL，用户操作时间减少70%（170秒），NASA-TLX感知工作量降低30%，且提供显式表面控制。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结合深度学习与交互式曲面优化，显著提升3D医学图像分割的效率与临床适用性。

search_text: DEEPBEAS3D: Deep Learning and B-Spline Explicit Active Surfaces DEEPBEAS3D：深度学习和 B 样条显式活动曲面 Deep learning-based automatic segmentation methods have become state-of-the-art. However, they are often not robust enough for direct clinical application, as domain shifts between training and testing data affect their performance. Failure in automatic segmentation can cause sub-optimal results that require correction. To address these problems, we propose a novel 3D extension of an interactive segmentation framework that represents a segmentation from a convolutional neural network (CNN) as a B-spline explicit active surface (BEAS). BEAS ensures segmentations are smooth in 3D space, increasing anatomical plausibility, while allowing the user to precisely edit the 3D surface. We apply this framework to the task of 3D segmentation of the anal sphincter complex (AS) from transperineal ultrasound (TPUS) images, and compare it to the clinical tool used in the pelvic floor disorder clinic (4D View VOCAL, GE Healthcare; Zipf, Austria). Experimental results show that: 1) the proposed framework gives the user explicit control of the surface contour; 2) the perceived workload calculated via the NASA-TLX index was reduced by 30% compared to VOCAL; and 3) it required 7 0% (170 seconds) less user time than VOCAL (p< 0.00001) 基于深度学习的自动分割方法已经成为最先进的方法。然而，它们通常不够强大，无法直接应用于临床，因为训练和测试数据之间的领域转换会影响它们的性能。自动分割失败可能会导致结果不理想，需要纠正。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了交互式分割框架的一种新颖的 3D 扩展，该框架将卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的分割表示为 B 样条显式活动表面 (BEAS)。 BEAS 确保 3D 空间中的分割平滑，提高解剖学的合理性，同时允许用户精确编辑 3D 表面。我们将此框架应用于从经会阴超声 (TPUS) 图像中对肛门括约肌复合体 (AS) 进行 3D 分割的任务，并将其与盆底疾病诊所使用的临床工具进行比较（4D View VOCAL，GE Healthcare；Zipf，奥地利）。实验结果表明：1）所提出的框架为用户提供了对表面轮廓的明确控制； 2）通过NASA-TLX指数计算的感知工作量相比VOCAL减少了30%； 3) 比 VOCAL 所需的用户时间少 7 0%（170 秒）（p< 0.00001） 本文提出DEEPBEAS3D框架，结合深度学习与B样条显式活动曲面技术，用于改进3D医学图像分割的临床应用。 Helena Williams,João Pedrosa,Muhammad Asad,Laura Cattani,Tom Vercauteren,Jan Deprest,Jan D'hooge eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Martin N. P. Nilsson
title: Information Processing by Neuron Populations in the Central Nervous System: Mathematical Structure of Data and Operations
title_zh: 中枢神经系统中神经元群的信息处理：数据和运算的数学结构
abstract: In the intricate architecture of the mammalian central nervous system, neurons form populations. Axonal bundles communicate between these clusters using spike trains. However, these neuron populations' precise encoding and operations have yet to be discovered. In our analysis, the starting point is a state-of-the-art mechanistic model of a generic neuron endowed with plasticity. From this simple framework emerges a subtle mathematical construct: The representation and manipulation of information can be precisely characterized by an algebra of convex cones. Furthermore, these neuron populations are not merely passive transmitters. They act as operators within this algebraic structure, mirroring the functionality of a low-level programming language. When these populations interconnect, they embody succinct yet potent algebraic expressions. These networks allow them to implement many operations, such as specialization, generalization, novelty detection, dimensionality reduction, inverse modeling, prediction, and associative memory. In broader terms, this work illuminates the potential of matrix embeddings in advancing our understanding in fields like cognitive science and AI. These embeddings enhance the capacity for concept processing and hierarchical description over their vector counterparts.
summary: In the intricate architecture of the mammalian central nervous system, neurons form populations. Axonal bundles communicate between these clusters using spike trains. However, these neuron populations' precise encoding and operations have yet to be discovered. In our analysis, the starting point is a state-of-the-art mechanistic model of a generic neuron endowed with plasticity. From this simple framework emerges a subtle mathematical construct: The representation and manipulation of information can be precisely characterized by an algebra of convex cones. Furthermore, these neuron populations are not merely passive transmitters. They act as operators within this algebraic structure, mirroring the functionality of a low-level programming language. When these populations interconnect, they embody succinct yet potent algebraic expressions. These networks allow them to implement many operations, such as specialization, generalization, novelty detection, dimensionality reduction, inverse modeling, prediction, and associative memory. In broader terms, this work illuminates the potential of matrix embeddings in advancing our understanding in fields like cognitive science and AI. These embeddings enhance the capacity for concept processing and hierarchical description over their vector counterparts.
abstract_zh: 在哺乳动物中枢神经系统的复杂结构中，神经元形成群体。轴突束使用尖峰序列在这些簇之间进行通信。然而，这些神经元群体的精确编码和操作仍有待发现。在我们的分析中，起点是具有可塑性的通用神经元的最先进的机械模型。从这个简单的框架中出现了一个微妙的数学结构：信息的表示和操作可以通过凸锥代数来精确表征。此外，这些神经元群不仅仅是被动的发射器。它们在这个代数结构中充当运算符，反映了低级编程语言的功能。当这些群体相互联系时，它们体现了简洁而有效的代数表达式。这些网络使它们能够实现许多操作，例如专业化、泛化、新颖性检测、降维、逆向建模、预测和联想记忆。从更广泛的角度来看，这项工作阐明了矩阵嵌入在增进我们对认知科学和人工智能等领域的理解方面的潜力。这些嵌入增强了概念处理和分层描述的能力（相对于向量对应物）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究中枢神经系统中神经元群体通过凸锥代数结构进行信息处理的数学框架，揭示其计算功能与编程语言的类比关系。
AI.motivation: 阐明哺乳动物中枢神经系统中神经元群体如何精确编码和操作信息，突破传统神经网络模型的局限性。
AI.method: 基于具有可塑性的通用神经元机制模型，构建凸锥代数数学结构，并通过神经元群体间连接实现代数运算。
AI.result: 发现神经元群体可执行专业化、降维、预测等操作，验证了矩阵嵌入在概念处理和层次化描述中的优势。
AI.conclusion: 凸锥代数为认知科学和人工智能提供了新的数学工具，推动对神经计算机制及高级认知功能的理解。

authors_text: Haozhe Lei,Quanyan Zhu
title: Neurosymbolic Meta-Reinforcement Lookahead Learning Achieves Safe Self-Driving in Non-Stationary Environments
title_zh: 神经符号元强化前瞻学习实现非静止环境中的安全自动驾驶
abstract: In the area of learning-driven artificial intelligence advancement, the integration of machine learning (ML) into self-driving (SD) technology stands as an impressive engineering feat. Yet, in real-world applications outside the confines of controlled laboratory scenarios, the deployment of self-driving technology assumes a life-critical role, necessitating heightened attention from researchers towards both safety and efficiency. To illustrate, when a self-driving model encounters an unfamiliar environment in real-time execution, the focus must not solely revolve around enhancing its anticipated performance; equal consideration must be given to ensuring its execution or real-time adaptation maintains a requisite level of safety. This study introduces an algorithm for online meta-reinforcement learning, employing lookahead symbolic constraints based on \emph{Neurosymbolic Meta-Reinforcement Lookahead Learning} (NUMERLA). NUMERLA proposes a lookahead updating mechanism that harmonizes the efficiency of online adaptations with the overarching goal of ensuring long-term safety. Experimental results demonstrate NUMERLA confers the self-driving agent with the capacity for real-time adaptability, leading to safe and self-adaptive driving under non-stationary urban human-vehicle interaction scenarios.
summary: In the area of learning-driven artificial intelligence advancement, the integration of machine learning (ML) into self-driving (SD) technology stands as an impressive engineering feat. Yet, in real-world applications outside the confines of controlled laboratory scenarios, the deployment of self-driving technology assumes a life-critical role, necessitating heightened attention from researchers towards both safety and efficiency. To illustrate, when a self-driving model encounters an unfamiliar environment in real-time execution, the focus must not solely revolve around enhancing its anticipated performance; equal consideration must be given to ensuring its execution or real-time adaptation maintains a requisite level of safety. This study introduces an algorithm for online meta-reinforcement learning, employing lookahead symbolic constraints based on \emph{Neurosymbolic Meta-Reinforcement Lookahead Learning} (NUMERLA). NUMERLA proposes a lookahead updating mechanism that harmonizes the efficiency of online adaptations with the overarching goal of ensuring long-term safety. Experimental results demonstrate NUMERLA confers the self-driving agent with the capacity for real-time adaptability, leading to safe and self-adaptive driving under non-stationary urban human-vehicle interaction scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在学习驱动的人工智能进步领域，机器学习 (ML) 与自动驾驶 (SD) 技术的集成是一项令人印象深刻的工程壮举。然而，在受控实验室场景之外的现实应用中，自动驾驶技术的部署发挥着至关重要的作用，需要研究人员高度关注安全性和效率。举例来说，当自动驾驶模型在实时执行中遇到陌生的环境时，重点不能仅仅围绕提高其预期性能；必须同等考虑确保其执行或实时适应保持必要的安全水平。本研究引入了一种在线元强化学习算法，采用基于\emph{神经符号元强化前瞻学习}（NUMERLA）的前瞻符号约束。 NUMERLA 提出了一种前瞻更新机制，该机制将在线适应的效率与确保长期安全的总体目标相协调。实验结果表明，NUMERLA赋予自动驾驶代理实时自适应的能力，从而在非静止城市人车交互场景下实现安全、自适应驾驶。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为NUMERLA的神经符号元强化前瞻学习算法，旨在提升自动驾驶系统在非平稳环境中的安全性和实时适应能力。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶技术在真实世界中的部署具有生命关键性，需在实时适应性提升的同时确保安全性，尤其面对陌生环境时需平衡性能与安全。
AI.method: 通过引入基于神经符号系统的前瞻更新机制，NUMERLA结合在线元强化学习与符号约束，实现效率与长期安全目标的协调。
AI.result: 实验表明NUMERLA使自动驾驶代理能在非平稳城市交通场景中实现安全、自适应的实时驾驶。
AI.conclusion: NUMERLA有效解决了动态环境下自动驾驶的安全与适应性矛盾，为复杂交互场景提供了可行的解决方案。

conclusion: NUMERLA有效解决了动态环境下自动驾驶的安全与适应性矛盾，为复杂交互场景提供了可行的解决方案。
search_text: Neurosymbolic Meta-Reinforcement Lookahead Learning Achieves Safe Self-Driving in Non-Stationary Environments 神经符号元强化前瞻学习实现非静止环境中的安全自动驾驶 In the area of learning-driven artificial intelligence advancement, the integration of machine learning (ML) into self-driving (SD) technology stands as an impressive engineering feat. Yet, in real-world applications outside the confines of controlled laboratory scenarios, the deployment of self-driving technology assumes a life-critical role, necessitating heightened attention from researchers towards both safety and efficiency. To illustrate, when a self-driving model encounters an unfamiliar environment in real-time execution, the focus must not solely revolve around enhancing its anticipated performance; equal consideration must be given to ensuring its execution or real-time adaptation maintains a requisite level of safety. This study introduces an algorithm for online meta-reinforcement learning, employing lookahead symbolic constraints based on \emph{Neurosymbolic Meta-Reinforcement Lookahead Learning} (NUMERLA). NUMERLA proposes a lookahead updating mechanism that harmonizes the efficiency of online adaptations with the overarching goal of ensuring long-term safety. Experimental results demonstrate NUMERLA confers the self-driving agent with the capacity for real-time adaptability, leading to safe and self-adaptive driving under non-stationary urban human-vehicle interaction scenarios. 在学习驱动的人工智能进步领域，机器学习 (ML) 与自动驾驶 (SD) 技术的集成是一项令人印象深刻的工程壮举。然而，在受控实验室场景之外的现实应用中，自动驾驶技术的部署发挥着至关重要的作用，需要研究人员高度关注安全性和效率。举例来说，当自动驾驶模型在实时执行中遇到陌生的环境时，重点不能仅仅围绕提高其预期性能；必须同等考虑确保其执行或实时适应保持必要的安全水平。本研究引入了一种在线元强化学习算法，采用基于\emph{神经符号元强化前瞻学习}（NUMERLA）的前瞻符号约束。 NUMERLA 提出了一种前瞻更新机制，该机制将在线适应的效率与确保长期安全的总体目标相协调。实验结果表明，NUMERLA赋予自动驾驶代理实时自适应的能力，从而在非静止城市人车交互场景下实现安全、自适应驾驶。 本文提出了一种名为NUMERLA的神经符号元强化前瞻学习算法，旨在提升自动驾驶系统在非平稳环境中的安全性和实时适应能力。 Haozhe Lei,Quanyan Zhu cs.RO,cs.AI,eess.SY,stat.ML

authors_text: Aakash Bansal,Chia-Yi Su,Collin McMillan
title: Revisiting File Context for Source Code Summarization
title_zh: 重新审视源代码摘要的文件上下文
abstract: Source code summarization is the task of writing natural language descriptions of source code. A typical use case is generating short summaries of subroutines for use in API documentation. The heart of almost all current research into code summarization is the encoder-decoder neural architecture, and the encoder input is almost always a single subroutine or other short code snippet. The problem with this setup is that the information needed to describe the code is often not present in the code itself -- that information often resides in other nearby code. In this paper, we revisit the idea of ``file context'' for code summarization. File context is the idea of encoding select information from other subroutines in the same file. We propose a novel modification of the Transformer architecture that is purpose-built to encode file context and demonstrate its improvement over several baselines. We find that file context helps on a subset of challenging examples where traditional approaches struggle.
summary: Source code summarization is the task of writing natural language descriptions of source code. A typical use case is generating short summaries of subroutines for use in API documentation. The heart of almost all current research into code summarization is the encoder-decoder neural architecture, and the encoder input is almost always a single subroutine or other short code snippet. The problem with this setup is that the information needed to describe the code is often not present in the code itself -- that information often resides in other nearby code. In this paper, we revisit the idea of ``file context'' for code summarization. File context is the idea of encoding select information from other subroutines in the same file. We propose a novel modification of the Transformer architecture that is purpose-built to encode file context and demonstrate its improvement over several baselines. We find that file context helps on a subset of challenging examples where traditional approaches struggle.
abstract_zh: 源代码摘要是编写源代码的自然语言描述的任务。一个典型的用例是生成子例程的简短摘要以供 API 文档使用。目前几乎所有代码摘要研究的核心都是编码器-解码器神经架构，编码器输入几乎总是单个子例程或其他短代码片段。这种设置的问题在于，描述代码所需的信息通常不存在于代码本身中——该信息通常驻留在附近的其他代码中。在本文中，我们重新审视用于代码摘要的“文件上下文”的概念。文件上下文是对同一文件中其他子例程的选择信息进行编码的想法。我们提出了对 Transformer 架构的一种新颖修改，该架构是专门为编码文件上下文而构建的，并展示了其在多个基线上的改进。我们发现文件上下文有助于解决传统方法难以解决的一些具有挑战性的示例。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用文件上下文信息改进源代码摘要生成任务，提出改进的Transformer架构以编码同一文件中其他子程序的信息。
AI.motivation: 现有代码摘要方法仅依赖单个代码片段，导致关键信息缺失；而实际中代码描述常需参考同一文件的其他子程序信息。
AI.method: 设计新型Transformer架构，通过编码同一文件中相关子程序的上下文信息增强模型表示能力。
AI.result: 在困难案例中表现优于基线方法，验证了文件上下文对代码摘要质量的提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 文件上下文机制能有效补充传统方法的不足，为代码摘要任务提供新思路，但需进一步探索适用场景。

authors_text: Xu Si,Xinming Wu,Hanlin Sheng,Jun Zhu,Zefeng Li
title: SeisCLIP: A seismology foundation model pre-trained by multi-modal data for multi-purpose seismic feature extraction
title_zh: SeisCLIP：通过多模态数据预训练的地震学基础模型，用于多用途地震特征提取
abstract: Training specific deep learning models for particular tasks is common across various domains within seismology. However, this approach encounters two limitations: inadequate labeled data for certain tasks and limited generalization across regions. To address these challenges, we develop SeisCLIP, a seismology foundation model trained through contrastive learning from multi-modal data. It consists of a transformer encoder for extracting crucial features from time-frequency seismic spectrum and an MLP encoder for integrating the phase and source information of the same event. These encoders are jointly pre-trained on a vast dataset and the spectrum encoder is subsequently fine-tuned on smaller datasets for various downstream tasks. Notably, SeisCLIP's performance surpasses that of baseline methods in event classification, localization, and focal mechanism analysis tasks, employing distinct datasets from different regions. In conclusion, SeisCLIP holds significant potential as a foundational model in the field of seismology, paving the way for innovative directions in foundation-model-based seismology research.
summary: Training specific deep learning models for particular tasks is common across various domains within seismology. However, this approach encounters two limitations: inadequate labeled data for certain tasks and limited generalization across regions. To address these challenges, we develop SeisCLIP, a seismology foundation model trained through contrastive learning from multi-modal data. It consists of a transformer encoder for extracting crucial features from time-frequency seismic spectrum and an MLP encoder for integrating the phase and source information of the same event. These encoders are jointly pre-trained on a vast dataset and the spectrum encoder is subsequently fine-tuned on smaller datasets for various downstream tasks. Notably, SeisCLIP's performance surpasses that of baseline methods in event classification, localization, and focal mechanism analysis tasks, employing distinct datasets from different regions. In conclusion, SeisCLIP holds significant potential as a foundational model in the field of seismology, paving the way for innovative directions in foundation-model-based seismology research.
abstract_zh: 针对特定任务训练特定的深度学习模型在地震学的各个领域都很常见。然而，这种方法遇到两个限制：某些任务的标记数据不足以及跨区域的泛化有限。为了应对这些挑战，我们开发了 SeisCLIP，这是一种通过多模态数据对比学习进行训练的地震学基础模型。它由一个用于从时频地震频谱中提取关键特征的变压器编码器和一个用于集成同一事件的相位和源信息的 MLP 编码器组成。这些编码器在庞大的数据集上联合预训练，随后频谱编码器在较小的数据集上针对各种下游任务进行微调。值得注意的是，SeisCLIP 使用来自不同地区的不同数据集，在事件分类、定位和震源机制分析任务中的性能超越了基线方法。总之，SeisCLIP 作为地震学领域的基础模型具有巨大的潜力，为基于基础模型的地震学研究的创新方向铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SeisCLIP，一种基于多模态数据预训练的地震学基础模型，用于解决地震特征提取任务中的数据不足和区域泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统地震学深度学习模型存在标注数据不足和区域泛化能力有限的缺陷，需开发通用性强的基础模型以提升多任务性能。
AI.method: 构建包含Transformer谱特征编码器和MLP相位/源信息编码器的双分支架构，通过对比学习在大规模多模态数据集上预训练，再对谱编码器进行任务特定微调。
AI.result: 在跨区域的事件分类、定位及震源机制分析任务中，SeisCLIP性能优于现有基准方法，验证了其优越的泛化能力与多任务适应性。
AI.conclusion: SeisCLIP作为地震学基础模型，为基于预训练模型的地震研究提供了新范式，具有广泛的应用前景。
