authors_text: Zhenghong Zhou,Huangxuan Zhao,Jiemin Fang,Dongqiao Xiang,Lei Chen,Lingxia Wu,Feihong Wu,Wenyu Liu,Chuansheng Zheng,Xinggang Wang
title: TiAVox: Time-aware Attenuation Voxels for Sparse-view 4D DSA Reconstruction
title_zh: TiAVox：用于稀疏视图 4D DSA 重建的时间感知衰减体素
abstract: Four-dimensional Digital Subtraction Angiography (4D DSA) plays a critical role in the diagnosis of many medical diseases, such as Arteriovenous Malformations (AVM) and Arteriovenous Fistulas (AVF). Despite its significant application value, the reconstruction of 4D DSA demands numerous views to effectively model the intricate vessels and radiocontrast flow, thereby implying a significant radiation dose. To address this high radiation issue, we propose a Time-aware Attenuation Voxel (TiAVox) approach for sparse-view 4D DSA reconstruction, which paves the way for high-quality 4D imaging. Additionally, 2D and 3D DSA imaging results can be generated from the reconstructed 4D DSA images. TiAVox introduces 4D attenuation voxel grids, which reflect attenuation properties from both spatial and temporal dimensions. It is optimized by minimizing discrepancies between the rendered images and sparse 2D DSA images. Without any neural network involved, TiAVox enjoys specific physical interpretability. The parameters of each learnable voxel represent the attenuation coefficients. We validated the TiAVox approach on both clinical and simulated datasets, achieving a 31.23 Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) for novel view synthesis using only 30 views on the clinically sourced dataset, whereas traditional Feldkamp-Davis-Kress methods required 133 views. Similarly, with merely 10 views from the synthetic dataset, TiAVox yielded a PSNR of 34.32 for novel view synthesis and 41.40 for 3D reconstruction. We also executed ablation studies to corroborate the essential components of TiAVox. The code will be publically available.
summary: Four-dimensional Digital Subtraction Angiography (4D DSA) plays a critical role in the diagnosis of many medical diseases, such as Arteriovenous Malformations (AVM) and Arteriovenous Fistulas (AVF). Despite its significant application value, the reconstruction of 4D DSA demands numerous views to effectively model the intricate vessels and radiocontrast flow, thereby implying a significant radiation dose. To address this high radiation issue, we propose a Time-aware Attenuation Voxel (TiAVox) approach for sparse-view 4D DSA reconstruction, which paves the way for high-quality 4D imaging. Additionally, 2D and 3D DSA imaging results can be generated from the reconstructed 4D DSA images. TiAVox introduces 4D attenuation voxel grids, which reflect attenuation properties from both spatial and temporal dimensions. It is optimized by minimizing discrepancies between the rendered images and sparse 2D DSA images. Without any neural network involved, TiAVox enjoys specific physical interpretability. The parameters of each learnable voxel represent the attenuation coefficients. We validated the TiAVox approach on both clinical and simulated datasets, achieving a 31.23 Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) for novel view synthesis using only 30 views on the clinically sourced dataset, whereas traditional Feldkamp-Davis-Kress methods required 133 views. Similarly, with merely 10 views from the synthetic dataset, TiAVox yielded a PSNR of 34.32 for novel view synthesis and 41.40 for 3D reconstruction. We also executed ablation studies to corroborate the essential components of TiAVox. The code will be publically available.
abstract_zh: 四维数字减影血管造影（4D DSA）在许多医学疾病的诊断中发挥着至关重要的作用，例如动静脉畸形（AVM）和动静脉瘘（AVF）。尽管其具有重要的应用价值，但 4D DSA 的重建需要大量视图来有效地模拟复杂的血管和放射造影流，从而意味着显着的辐射剂量。为了解决这个高辐射问题，我们提出了一种用于稀疏视图 4D DSA 重建的时间感知衰减体素 (TiAVox) 方法，这为高质量 4D 成像铺平了道路。此外，还可以根据重建的 4D DSA 图像生成 2D 和 3D DSA 成像结果。 TiAVox 引入了 4D 衰减体素网格，它反映了空间和时间维度的衰减特性。它通过最小化渲染图像和稀疏 2D DSA 图像之间的差异进行优化。在不涉及任何神经网络的情况下，TiAVox 具有特定的物理可解释性。每个可学习体素的参数表示衰减系数。我们在临床和模拟数据集上验证了 TiAVox 方法，仅使用临床来源数据集的 30 个视图即可实现 31.23 的峰值信噪比 (PSNR)，从而实现新颖的视图合成，而传统的 Feldkamp-Davis-Kress 方法需要 133 个视图。同样，仅使用合成数据集中的 10 个视图，TiAVox 的新视图合成的 PSNR 为 34.32，3D 重建的 PSNR 为 41.40。我们还进行了消融研究以证实 TiAVox 的基本成分。该代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TiAVox方法，用于稀疏视角的四维数字减影血管造影（4D DSA）重建，以减少辐射剂量并提高成像质量。
AI.motivation: 传统4D DSA重建需要大量视角以建模复杂血管和造影剂流动，导致高辐射剂量。现有方法如Feldkamp-Davis-Kress需133视角才能获得高质量图像，亟需降低辐射的稀疏视角重建技术。
AI.method: TiAVox引入时空衰减体素网格，通过优化渲染图像与稀疏2D DSA图像的差异进行重建。无需神经网络，体素参数直接表示衰减系数，具备物理可解释性。
AI.result: 在临床数据集上，仅用30视角实现31.23 PSNR的新型视角合成；合成数据集上10视角下新型视角合成PSNR达34.32，3D重建PSNR达41.40，优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: TiAVox通过时空衰减体素有效降低视角需求，在保证图像质量的同时减少辐射，且方法具备物理可解释性，具有临床应用潜力。

search_text: TiAVox: Time-aware Attenuation Voxels for Sparse-view 4D DSA Reconstruction TiAVox：用于稀疏视图 4D DSA 重建的时间感知衰减体素 Four-dimensional Digital Subtraction Angiography (4D DSA) plays a critical role in the diagnosis of many medical diseases, such as Arteriovenous Malformations (AVM) and Arteriovenous Fistulas (AVF). Despite its significant application value, the reconstruction of 4D DSA demands numerous views to effectively model the intricate vessels and radiocontrast flow, thereby implying a significant radiation dose. To address this high radiation issue, we propose a Time-aware Attenuation Voxel (TiAVox) approach for sparse-view 4D DSA reconstruction, which paves the way for high-quality 4D imaging. Additionally, 2D and 3D DSA imaging results can be generated from the reconstructed 4D DSA images. TiAVox introduces 4D attenuation voxel grids, which reflect attenuation properties from both spatial and temporal dimensions. It is optimized by minimizing discrepancies between the rendered images and sparse 2D DSA images. Without any neural network involved, TiAVox enjoys specific physical interpretability. The parameters of each learnable voxel represent the attenuation coefficients. We validated the TiAVox approach on both clinical and simulated datasets, achieving a 31.23 Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) for novel view synthesis using only 30 views on the clinically sourced dataset, whereas traditional Feldkamp-Davis-Kress methods required 133 views. Similarly, with merely 10 views from the synthetic dataset, TiAVox yielded a PSNR of 34.32 for novel view synthesis and 41.40 for 3D reconstruction. We also executed ablation studies to corroborate the essential components of TiAVox. The code will be publically available. 四维数字减影血管造影（4D DSA）在许多医学疾病的诊断中发挥着至关重要的作用，例如动静脉畸形（AVM）和动静脉瘘（AVF）。尽管其具有重要的应用价值，但 4D DSA 的重建需要大量视图来有效地模拟复杂的血管和放射造影流，从而意味着显着的辐射剂量。为了解决这个高辐射问题，我们提出了一种用于稀疏视图 4D DSA 重建的时间感知衰减体素 (TiAVox) 方法，这为高质量 4D 成像铺平了道路。此外，还可以根据重建的 4D DSA 图像生成 2D 和 3D DSA 成像结果。 TiAVox 引入了 4D 衰减体素网格，它反映了空间和时间维度的衰减特性。它通过最小化渲染图像和稀疏 2D DSA 图像之间的差异进行优化。在不涉及任何神经网络的情况下，TiAVox 具有特定的物理可解释性。每个可学习体素的参数表示衰减系数。我们在临床和模拟数据集上验证了 TiAVox 方法，仅使用临床来源数据集的 30 个视图即可实现 31.23 的峰值信噪比 (PSNR)，从而实现新颖的视图合成，而传统的 Feldkamp-Davis-Kress 方法需要 133 个视图。同样，仅使用合成数据集中的 10 个视图，TiAVox 的新视图合成的 PSNR 为 34.32，3D 重建的 PSNR 为 41.40。我们还进行了消融研究以证实 TiAVox 的基本成分。该代码将公开。 本文提出TiAVox方法，用于稀疏视角的四维数字减影血管造影（4D DSA）重建，以减少辐射剂量并提高成像质量。 Zhenghong Zhou,Huangxuan Zhao,Jiemin Fang,Dongqiao Xiang,Lei Chen,Lingxia Wu,Feihong Wu,Wenyu Liu,Chuansheng Zheng,Xinggang Wang cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Minjie Chen,Yao Cheng,Ye Wang,Xiang Li,Ming Gao
title: Graph Self-Contrast Representation Learning
title_zh: 图自对比表示学习
abstract: Graph contrastive learning (GCL) has recently emerged as a promising approach for graph representation learning. Some existing methods adopt the 1-vs-K scheme to construct one positive and K negative samples for each graph, but it is difficult to set K. For those methods that do not use negative samples, it is often necessary to add additional strategies to avoid model collapse, which could only alleviate the problem to some extent. All these drawbacks will undoubtedly have an adverse impact on the generalizability and efficiency of the model. In this paper, to address these issues, we propose a novel graph self-contrast framework GraphSC, which only uses one positive and one negative sample, and chooses triplet loss as the objective. Specifically, self-contrast has two implications. First, GraphSC generates both positive and negative views of a graph sample from the graph itself via graph augmentation functions of various intensities, and use them for self-contrast. Second, GraphSC uses Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (HSIC) to factorize the representations into multiple factors and proposes a masked self-contrast mechanism to better separate positive and negative samples. Further, Since the triplet loss only optimizes the relative distance between the anchor and its positive/negative samples, it is difficult to ensure the absolute distance between the anchor and positive sample. Therefore, we explicitly reduced the absolute distance between the anchor and positive sample to accelerate convergence. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments to evaluate the performance of GraphSC against 19 other state-of-the-art methods in both unsupervised and transfer learning settings.
summary: Graph contrastive learning (GCL) has recently emerged as a promising approach for graph representation learning. Some existing methods adopt the 1-vs-K scheme to construct one positive and K negative samples for each graph, but it is difficult to set K. For those methods that do not use negative samples, it is often necessary to add additional strategies to avoid model collapse, which could only alleviate the problem to some extent. All these drawbacks will undoubtedly have an adverse impact on the generalizability and efficiency of the model. In this paper, to address these issues, we propose a novel graph self-contrast framework GraphSC, which only uses one positive and one negative sample, and chooses triplet loss as the objective. Specifically, self-contrast has two implications. First, GraphSC generates both positive and negative views of a graph sample from the graph itself via graph augmentation functions of various intensities, and use them for self-contrast. Second, GraphSC uses Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (HSIC) to factorize the representations into multiple factors and proposes a masked self-contrast mechanism to better separate positive and negative samples. Further, Since the triplet loss only optimizes the relative distance between the anchor and its positive/negative samples, it is difficult to ensure the absolute distance between the anchor and positive sample. Therefore, we explicitly reduced the absolute distance between the anchor and positive sample to accelerate convergence. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments to evaluate the performance of GraphSC against 19 other state-of-the-art methods in both unsupervised and transfer learning settings.
abstract_zh: 图对比学习（GCL）最近成为图表示学习的一种有前景的方法。现有的一些方法采用1-vs-K方案，为每张图构造1个正样本和K个负样本，但K的设定比较困难。对于那些不使用负样本的方法，往往需要添加额外的策略来避免模型崩溃，这只能在一定程度上缓解问题。所有这些缺点无疑都会对模型的泛化性和效率产生不利影响。在本文中，为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的图自对比框架GraphSC，该框架仅使用一个正样本和一个负样本，并选择三元组损失作为目标。具体来说，自我对比有两个含义。首先，GraphSC 通过各种强度的图增强函数从图本身生成图样本的正视图和负视图，并将它们用于自对比。其次，GraphSC使用​​希尔伯特-施密特独立准则（HSIC）将表示分解为多个因素，并提出一种屏蔽自对比机制来更好地分离正样本和负样本。此外，由于三元组损失仅优化了anchor与其正/负样本之间的相对距离，因此很难保证anchor与其正样本之间的绝对距离。因此，我们明确地减少了anchor和正样本之间的绝对距离以加速收敛。最后，我们进行了大量的实验，以在无监督和迁移学习环境中评估 GraphSC 与其他 19 种最先进方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GraphSC的图自对比表示学习框架，通过改进对比学习策略解决现有方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有图对比学习方法在负样本数量设置和模型崩溃问题上存在局限，影响模型的泛化性和效率。
AI.method: GraphSC采用1-vs-1对比策略，结合图增强生成正负样本，并通过HSIC分解表示与掩码机制优化对比过程，同时引入绝对距离约束加速收敛。
AI.result: 在无监督和迁移学习场景下，GraphSC在19种先进方法中表现出更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: GraphSC通过自对比机制和优化策略有效解决了负样本设置与模型崩溃问题，提升了图表示学习的效果与效率。

Further, Since the triplet loss only optimizes the relative distance between the anchor and its positive/negative samples, it is difficult to ensure the absolute distance between the anchor and positive sample. authors_text: Hongyu Hu,Jiyuan Zhang,Minyi Zhao,Zhenbang Sun
title: CIEM: Contrastive Instruction Evaluation Method for Better Instruction Tuning
title_zh: CIEM：对比指令评估方法以实现更好的指令调整
abstract: Nowadays, the research on Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) has been significantly promoted thanks to the success of Large Language Models (LLM). Nevertheless, these Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are suffering from the drawback of hallucination -- due to insufficient understanding of vision and language modalities, VLMs may generate incorrect perception information when doing downstream applications, for example, captioning a non-existent entity. To address the hallucination phenomenon, on the one hand, we introduce a Contrastive Instruction Evaluation Method (CIEM), which is an automatic pipeline that leverages an annotated image-text dataset coupled with an LLM to generate factual/contrastive question-answer pairs for the evaluation of the hallucination of VLMs. On the other hand, based on CIEM, we further propose a new instruction tuning method called CIT (the abbreviation of Contrastive Instruction Tuning) to alleviate the hallucination of VLMs by automatically producing high-quality factual/contrastive question-answer pairs and corresponding justifications for model tuning. Through extensive experiments on CIEM and CIT, we pinpoint the hallucination issues commonly present in existing VLMs, the disability of the current instruction-tuning dataset to handle the hallucination phenomenon and the superiority of CIT-tuned VLMs over both CIEM and public datasets.
summary: Nowadays, the research on Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) has been significantly promoted thanks to the success of Large Language Models (LLM). Nevertheless, these Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are suffering from the drawback of hallucination -- due to insufficient understanding of vision and language modalities, VLMs may generate incorrect perception information when doing downstream applications, for example, captioning a non-existent entity. To address the hallucination phenomenon, on the one hand, we introduce a Contrastive Instruction Evaluation Method (CIEM), which is an automatic pipeline that leverages an annotated image-text dataset coupled with an LLM to generate factual/contrastive question-answer pairs for the evaluation of the hallucination of VLMs. On the other hand, based on CIEM, we further propose a new instruction tuning method called CIT (the abbreviation of Contrastive Instruction Tuning) to alleviate the hallucination of VLMs by automatically producing high-quality factual/contrastive question-answer pairs and corresponding justifications for model tuning. Through extensive experiments on CIEM and CIT, we pinpoint the hallucination issues commonly present in existing VLMs, the disability of the current instruction-tuning dataset to handle the hallucination phenomenon and the superiority of CIT-tuned VLMs over both CIEM and public datasets.
abstract_zh: 如今，由于大语言模型（LLM）的成功，大视觉语言模型（LVLM）的研究得到了显着的推动。然而，这些视觉语言模型（VLM）存在幻觉的缺点——由于对视觉和语言模态的理解不足，VLM在进行下游应用时可能会生成不正确的感知信息，例如为不存在的实体添加字幕。为了解决幻觉现象，一方面，我们引入了对比指令评估方法（CIEM），这是一种自动管道，利用带注释的图像文本数据集与法学硕士相结合，生成事实/对比问答对，以评估 VLM 的幻觉。另一方面，基于CIEM，我们进一步提出了一种新的指令调优方法，称为CIT（对比指令调优的缩写），通过自动生成高质量的事实/对比问答对以及相应的模型调优理由来减轻VLM的幻觉。通过对 CIEM 和 CIT 进行大量实验，我们查明了现有 VLM 中常见的幻觉问题、当前指令调整数据集处理幻觉现象的能力以及 CIT 调整的 VLM 相对于 CIEM 和公共数据集的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CIEM和CIT方法，通过生成事实/对比问题-答案对评估并缓解视觉-语言模型（VLMs）的幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VLMs在下游任务中易产生幻觉（如描述不存在实体），而当前指令调优数据集无法有效解决这一问题。
AI.method: 引入CIEM自动生成事实/对比问题-答案对评估幻觉，并基于CIEM提出CIT方法，通过生成高质量数据和理由进行模型调优。
AI.result: 实验表明CIEM能识别现有VLMs的幻觉问题，CIT调优后的模型在CIEM和公共数据集上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CIEM和CIT有效评估并缓解了VLMs的幻觉问题，CIT在指令调优中表现更优。

search_text: CIEM: Contrastive Instruction Evaluation Method for Better Instruction Tuning CIEM：对比指令评估方法以实现更好的指令调整 Nowadays, the research on Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) has been significantly promoted thanks to the success of Large Language Models (LLM). Nevertheless, these Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are suffering from the drawback of hallucination -- due to insufficient understanding of vision and language modalities, VLMs may generate incorrect perception information when doing downstream applications, for example, captioning a non-existent entity. To address the hallucination phenomenon, on the one hand, we introduce a Contrastive Instruction Evaluation Method (CIEM), which is an automatic pipeline that leverages an annotated image-text dataset coupled with an LLM to generate factual/contrastive question-answer pairs for the evaluation of the hallucination of VLMs. On the other hand, based on CIEM, we further propose a new instruction tuning method called CIT (the abbreviation of Contrastive Instruction Tuning) to alleviate the hallucination of VLMs by automatically producing high-quality factual/contrastive question-answer pairs and corresponding justifications for model tuning. Through extensive experiments on CIEM and CIT, we pinpoint the hallucination issues commonly present in existing VLMs, the disability of the current instruction-tuning dataset to handle the hallucination phenomenon and the superiority of CIT-tuned VLMs over both CIEM and public datasets. 如今，由于大语言模型（LLM）的成功，大视觉语言模型（LVLM）的研究得到了显着的推动。然而，这些视觉语言模型（VLM）存在幻觉的缺点——由于对视觉和语言模态的理解不足，VLM在进行下游应用时可能会生成不正确的感知信息，例如为不存在的实体添加字幕。为了解决幻觉现象，一方面，我们引入了对比指令评估方法（CIEM），这是一种自动管道，利用带注释的图像文本数据集与法学硕士相结合，生成事实/对比问答对，以评估 VLM 的幻觉。另一方面，基于CIEM，我们进一步提出了一种新的指令调优方法，称为CIT（对比指令调优的缩写），通过自动生成高质量的事实/对比问答对以及相应的模型调优理由来减轻VLM的幻觉。通过对 CIEM 和 CIT 进行大量实验，我们查明了现有 VLM 中常见的幻觉问题、当前指令调整数据集处理幻觉现象的能力以及 CIT 调整的 VLM 相对于 CIEM 和公共数据集的优越性。 本文提出CIEM和CIT方法，通过生成事实/对比问题-答案对评估并缓解视觉-语言模型（VLMs）的幻觉问题。 Hongyu Hu,Jiyuan Zhang,Minyi Zhao,Zhenbang Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Junwen Chen,Jie Zhu,Yu Kong
title: ATM: Action Temporality Modeling for Video Question Answering
title_zh: ATM：视频问答的动作时序建模
abstract: Despite significant progress in video question answering (VideoQA), existing methods fall short of questions that require causal/temporal reasoning across frames. This can be attributed to imprecise motion representations. We introduce Action Temporality Modeling (ATM) for temporality reasoning via three-fold uniqueness: (1) rethinking the optical flow and realizing that optical flow is effective in capturing the long horizon temporality reasoning; (2) training the visual-text embedding by contrastive learning in an action-centric manner, leading to better action representations in both vision and text modalities; and (3) preventing the model from answering the question given the shuffled video in the fine-tuning stage, to avoid spurious correlation between appearance and motion and hence ensure faithful temporality reasoning. In the experiments, we show that ATM outperforms previous approaches in terms of the accuracy on multiple VideoQAs and exhibits better true temporality reasoning ability.
summary: Despite significant progress in video question answering (VideoQA), existing methods fall short of questions that require causal/temporal reasoning across frames. This can be attributed to imprecise motion representations. We introduce Action Temporality Modeling (ATM) for temporality reasoning via three-fold uniqueness: (1) rethinking the optical flow and realizing that optical flow is effective in capturing the long horizon temporality reasoning; (2) training the visual-text embedding by contrastive learning in an action-centric manner, leading to better action representations in both vision and text modalities; and (3) preventing the model from answering the question given the shuffled video in the fine-tuning stage, to avoid spurious correlation between appearance and motion and hence ensure faithful temporality reasoning. In the experiments, we show that ATM outperforms previous approaches in terms of the accuracy on multiple VideoQAs and exhibits better true temporality reasoning ability.
abstract_zh: 尽管视频问答（VideoQA）取得了重大进展，但现有方法仍不足以解决需要跨帧进行因果/时间推理的问题。这可以归因于不精确的运动表示。我们通过三重独特性引入了用于时间性推理的动作时间性建模（ATM）：（1）重新思考光流并认识到光流可以有效地捕获长水平时间性推理； （2）通过以动作为中心的方式进行对比学习来训练视觉文本嵌入，从而在视觉和文本模态中获得更好的动作表示； （3）在微调阶段防止模型回答给定的打乱视频的问题，以避免外观和运动之间的虚假相关性，从而确保忠实的时间性推理。在实验中，我们表明 ATM 在多个 VideoQA 的准确性方面优于以前的方法，并表现出更好的真实时间推理能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ATM的动作时序建模方法，旨在提升视频问答（VideoQA）任务中对跨帧因果/时序推理的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答方法在需要跨帧因果或时序推理的问题上表现不足，主要原因是运动表示不够精确。
AI.method: 通过三方面创新：1）重新思考光流方法以捕捉长期时序信息；2）以动作为中心进行对比学习，优化视觉与文本模态的动作表示；3）在微调阶段通过打乱视频防止外观与运动之间的虚假关联。
AI.result: 实验表明，ATM在多个视频问答数据集上准确率优于现有方法，并展现出更强的真实时序推理能力。
AI.conclusion: ATM通过精确建模动作时序关系，有效解决了视频问答中跨帧推理的挑战，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Kim Hammar,Neil Dhir
title: Optimal Observation-Intervention Trade-Off in Optimisation Problems with Causal Structure
title_zh: 因果结构优化问题中的最优观察-干预权衡
abstract: We consider the problem of optimising an expensive-to-evaluate grey-box objective function, within a finite budget, where known side-information exists in the form of the causal structure between the design variables. Standard black-box optimisation ignores the causal structure, often making it inefficient and expensive. The few existing methods that consider the causal structure are myopic and do not fully accommodate the observation-intervention trade-off that emerges when estimating causal effects. In this paper, we show that the observation-intervention trade-off can be formulated as a non-myopic optimal stopping problem which permits an efficient solution. We give theoretical results detailing the structure of the optimal stopping times and demonstrate the generality of our approach by showing that it can be integrated with existing causal Bayesian optimisation algorithms. Experimental results show that our formulation can enhance existing algorithms on real and synthetic benchmarks.
summary: We consider the problem of optimising an expensive-to-evaluate grey-box objective function, within a finite budget, where known side-information exists in the form of the causal structure between the design variables. Standard black-box optimisation ignores the causal structure, often making it inefficient and expensive. The few existing methods that consider the causal structure are myopic and do not fully accommodate the observation-intervention trade-off that emerges when estimating causal effects. In this paper, we show that the observation-intervention trade-off can be formulated as a non-myopic optimal stopping problem which permits an efficient solution. We give theoretical results detailing the structure of the optimal stopping times and demonstrate the generality of our approach by showing that it can be integrated with existing causal Bayesian optimisation algorithms. Experimental results show that our formulation can enhance existing algorithms on real and synthetic benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在有限预算内优化评估成本高昂的灰盒目标函数的问题，其中已知的辅助信息以设计变量之间的因果结构的形式存在。标准的黑盒优化忽略了因果结构，通常使其效率低下且成本高昂。现有的少数考虑因果结构的方法都是短视的，并且不能完全适应估计因果效应时出现的观察与干预的权衡。在本文中，我们表明观察与干预的权衡可以表述为一个非近视的最优停止问题，它可以提供有效的解决方案。我们给出了详细说明最佳停止时间结构的理论结果，并通过表明它可以与现有的因果贝叶斯优化算法集成来证明我们的方法的通用性。实验结果表明，我们的公式可以增强真实和合成基准上的现有算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在有限预算下，利用已知的因果结构优化昂贵评估的灰盒目标函数的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒优化方法忽略变量间的因果结构，导致效率低下；少数考虑因果结构的方法存在短视性，无法有效平衡观察与干预的权衡。
AI.method: 将观察-干预权衡建模为非短视的最优停止问题，并提供理论结果指导停止时间选择，同时与因果贝叶斯优化算法结合。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在真实和合成基准测试中优于现有算法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合因果结构与最优停止理论，本文提出的方法能更高效地解决存在因果关系的优化问题。

We give theoretical results detailing the structure of the optimal stopping times and demonstrate the generality of our approach by showing that it can be integrated with existing causal Bayesian optimisation algorithms. Experimental results show that our formulation can enhance existing algorithms on real and synthetic benchmarks. 我们考虑在有限预算内优化评估成本高昂的灰盒目标函数的问题，其中已知的辅助信息以设计变量之间的因果结构的形式存在。标准的黑盒优化忽略了因果结构，通常使其效率低下且成本高昂。现有的少数考虑因果结构的方法都是短视的，并且不能完全适应估计因果效应时出现的观察与干预的权衡。在本文中，我们表明观察与干预的权衡可以表述为一个非近视的最优停止问题，它可以提供有效的解决方案。我们给出了详细说明最佳停止时间结构的理论结果，并通过表明它可以与现有的因果贝叶斯优化算法集成来证明我们的方法的通用性。实验结果表明，我们的公式可以增强真实和合成基准上的现有算法。 本文研究在有限预算下，利用已知的因果结构优化昂贵评估的灰盒目标函数的问题。 Kim Hammar,Neil Dhir cs.AI

authors_text: Julian Lorenz,Florian Barthel,Daniel Kienzle,Rainer Lienhart
title: Haystack: A Panoptic Scene Graph Dataset to Evaluate Rare Predicate Classes
title_zh: Haystack：用于评估稀有谓词类的全景场景图数据集
abstract: Current scene graph datasets suffer from strong long-tail distributions of their predicate classes. Due to a very low number of some predicate classes in the test sets, no reliable metrics can be retrieved for the rarest classes. We construct a new panoptic scene graph dataset and a set of metrics that are designed as a benchmark for the predictive performance especially on rare predicate classes. To construct the new dataset, we propose a model-assisted annotation pipeline that efficiently finds rare predicate classes that are hidden in a large set of images like needles in a haystack. Contrary to prior scene graph datasets, Haystack contains explicit negative annotations, i.e. annotations that a given relation does not have a certain predicate class. Negative annotations are helpful especially in the field of scene graph generation and open up a whole new set of possibilities to improve current scene graph generation models. Haystack is 100% compatible with existing panoptic scene graph datasets and can easily be integrated with existing evaluation pipelines. Our dataset and code can be found here: https://lorjul.github.io/haystack/. It includes annotation files and simple to use scripts and utilities, to help with integrating our dataset in existing work.
summary: Current scene graph datasets suffer from strong long-tail distributions of their predicate classes. Due to a very low number of some predicate classes in the test sets, no reliable metrics can be retrieved for the rarest classes. We construct a new panoptic scene graph dataset and a set of metrics that are designed as a benchmark for the predictive performance especially on rare predicate classes. To construct the new dataset, we propose a model-assisted annotation pipeline that efficiently finds rare predicate classes that are hidden in a large set of images like needles in a haystack. Contrary to prior scene graph datasets, Haystack contains explicit negative annotations, i.e. annotations that a given relation does not have a certain predicate class. Negative annotations are helpful especially in the field of scene graph generation and open up a whole new set of possibilities to improve current scene graph generation models. Haystack is 100% compatible with existing panoptic scene graph datasets and can easily be integrated with existing evaluation pipelines. Our dataset and code can be found here: https://lorjul.github.io/haystack/. It includes annotation files and simple to use scripts and utilities, to help with integrating our dataset in existing work.
abstract_zh: 当前的场景图数据集遭受其谓词类的强长尾分布的困扰。由于测试集中某些谓词类的数量非常少，因此无法为最稀有的类检索可靠的度量。我们构建了一个新的全景场景图数据集和一组指标，这些指标被设计为预测性能的基准，特别是在罕见的谓词类上。为了构建新的数据集，我们提出了一种模型辅助注释管道，可以有效地找到隐藏在大量图像中的罕见谓词类，就像大海捞针一样。与之前的场景图数据集相反，Haystack 包含显式的否定注释，即给定关系不具有特定谓词类的注释。负注释尤其在场景图生成领域很有帮助，并为改进当前场景图生成模型开辟了一套全新的可能性。 Haystack 与现有全景场景图数据集 100% 兼容，并且可以轻松与现有评估流程集成。我们的数据集和代码可以在这里找到：https://lorjul.github.io/haystack/。它包括注释文件和易于使用的脚本和实用程序，以帮助将我们的数据集集成到现有工作中。

AI.tldr: 构建用于评估罕见谓词类别的全景场景图数据集Haystack，以解决现有数据集在罕见类评估上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有场景图数据集存在谓词类别长尾分布问题，导致罕见谓词评估不可靠，需构建新数据集和指标以改进评估。
AI.method: 提出模型辅助注释流程，高效识别罕见谓词，并引入显式负注释，确保与现有数据集兼容。
AI.result: 构建了包含显式负注释的Haystack数据集，提供针对罕见谓词的评估指标，并实现与现有流程的兼容。
AI.conclusion: Haystack为评估罕见谓词提供了新基准，显式负注释有助于提升场景图生成模型性能。

authors_text: Yichong Leng,Zhifang Guo,Kai Shen,Xu Tan,Zeqian Ju,Yanqing Liu,Yufei Liu,Dongchao Yang,Leying Zhang,Kaitao Song,Lei He,Xiang-Yang Li,Sheng Zhao,Tao Qin,Jiang Bian
title: PromptTTS 2: Describing and Generating Voices with Text Prompt
title_zh: PromptTTS 2：用文本提示描述和生成声音
abstract: Speech conveys more information than text, as the same word can be uttered in various voices to convey diverse information. Compared to traditional text-to-speech (TTS) methods relying on speech prompts (reference speech) for voice variability, using text prompts (descriptions) is more user-friendly since speech prompts can be hard to find or may not exist at all. TTS approaches based on the text prompt face two main challenges: 1) the one-to-many problem, where not all details about voice variability can be described in the text prompt, and 2) the limited availability of text prompt datasets, where vendors and large cost of data labeling are required to write text prompts for speech. In this work, we introduce PromptTTS 2 to address these challenges with a variation network to provide variability information of voice not captured by text prompts, and a prompt generation pipeline to utilize the large language models (LLM) to compose high quality text prompts. Specifically, the variation network predicts the representation extracted from the reference speech (which contains full information about voice variability) based on the text prompt representation. For the prompt generation pipeline, it generates text prompts for speech with a speech language understanding model to recognize voice attributes (e.g., gender, speed) from speech and a large language model to formulate text prompts based on the recognition results. Experiments on a large-scale (44K hours) speech dataset demonstrate that compared to the previous works, PromptTTS 2 generates voices more consistent with text prompts and supports the sampling of diverse voice variability, thereby offering users more choices on voice generation. Additionally, the prompt generation pipeline produces high-quality text prompts, eliminating the large labeling cost. The demo page of PromptTTS 2 is available online.
summary: Speech conveys more information than text, as the same word can be uttered in various voices to convey diverse information. Compared to traditional text-to-speech (TTS) methods relying on speech prompts (reference speech) for voice variability, using text prompts (descriptions) is more user-friendly since speech prompts can be hard to find or may not exist at all. TTS approaches based on the text prompt face two main challenges: 1) the one-to-many problem, where not all details about voice variability can be described in the text prompt, and 2) the limited availability of text prompt datasets, where vendors and large cost of data labeling are required to write text prompts for speech. In this work, we introduce PromptTTS 2 to address these challenges with a variation network to provide variability information of voice not captured by text prompts, and a prompt generation pipeline to utilize the large language models (LLM) to compose high quality text prompts. Specifically, the variation network predicts the representation extracted from the reference speech (which contains full information about voice variability) based on the text prompt representation. For the prompt generation pipeline, it generates text prompts for speech with a speech language understanding model to recognize voice attributes (e.g., gender, speed) from speech and a large language model to formulate text prompts based on the recognition results. Experiments on a large-scale (44K hours) speech dataset demonstrate that compared to the previous works, PromptTTS 2 generates voices more consistent with text prompts and supports the sampling of diverse voice variability, thereby offering users more choices on voice generation. Additionally, the prompt generation pipeline produces high-quality text prompts, eliminating the large labeling cost. The demo page of PromptTTS 2 is available online.
abstract_zh: 语音比文本传达更多的信息，因为同一个词可以用不同的声音说出来传达不同的信息。与依赖语音提示（参考语音）实现语音变化的传统文本转语音 (TTS) 方法相比，使用文本提示（描述）更加用户友好，因为语音提示可能很难找到或可能根本不存在。基于文本提示的 TTS 方法面临两个主要挑战：1）一对多问题，即并非所有有关语音变化的细节都可以在文本提示中描述；2）文本提示数据集的可用性有限，需要供应商和大量数据标记成本来编写语音文本提示。在这项工作中，我们引入 PromptTTS 2 来解决这些挑战，通过变化网络提供文本提示未捕获的语音变化信息，并使用提示生成管道利用大语言模型 (LLM) 来编写高质量的文本提示。具体来说，变异网络根据文本提示表示来预测从参考语音（包含有关语音变异性的完整信息）中提取的表示。对于提示生成管道，它使用语音语言理解模型来生成语音的文本提示，以从语音中识别语音属性（例如性别、速度），并使用大型语言模型来根据识别结果制定文本提示。在大规模（44K小时）语音数据集上的实验表明，与之前的作品相比，PromptTTS 2生成的语音与文本提示更加一致，并支持多种语音变异性的采样，从而为用户提供了更多的语音生成选择。此外，提示生成管道可生成高质量的文本提示，从而消除大量标签成本。 PromptTTS 2 的演示页面可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PromptTTS 2模型，通过文本提示生成多样化语音，解决传统文本到语音合成中依赖语音提示的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统TTS方法依赖难以获取的语音提示，而文本提示更易用但存在描述不全和数据集匮乏的问题，需提升文本提示驱动语音生成的质量与多样性。
AI.method: 设计变异网络补全文本提示未涵盖的语音细节，并构建基于大语言模型的提示生成流水线，自动从语音中提取属性生成高质量文本提示。
AI.result: 在44K小时语音数据集实验中，生成语音与文本提示一致性优于现有方法，支持更多语音风格采样，且无需人工标注成本。
AI.conclusion: PromptTTS 2通过变异网络与自动提示生成技术，有效解决了文本提示驱动语音合成的关键挑战，提升了用户体验与生成多样性。

title: s-ID: Causal Effect Identification in a Sub-Population

abstract: Causal inference in a sub-population involves identifying the causal effect of an intervention on a specific subgroup, which is distinguished from the whole population through the influence of systematic biases in the sampling process. However, ignoring the subtleties introduced by sub-populations can either lead to erroneous inference or limit the applicability of existing methods. We introduce and advocate for a causal inference problem in sub-populations (henceforth called s-ID), in which we merely have access to observational data of the targeted sub-population (as opposed to the entire population). Existing inference problems in sub-populations operate on the premise that the given data distributions originate from the entire population, thus, cannot tackle the s-ID problem. To address this gap, we provide necessary and sufficient conditions that must hold in the causal graph for a causal effect in a sub-population to be identifiable from the observational distribution of that sub-population. Given these conditions, we present a sound and complete algorithm for the s-ID problem.
summary: Causal inference in a sub-population involves identifying the causal effect of an intervention on a specific subgroup, which is distinguished from the whole population through the influence of systematic biases in the sampling process. However, ignoring the subtleties introduced by sub-populations can either lead to erroneous inference or limit the applicability of existing methods. We introduce and advocate for a causal inference problem in sub-populations (henceforth called s-ID), in which we merely have access to observational data of the targeted sub-population (as opposed to the entire population). Existing inference problems in sub-populations operate on the premise that the given data distributions originate from the entire population, thus, cannot tackle the s-ID problem. To address this gap, we provide necessary and sufficient conditions that must hold in the causal graph for a causal effect in a sub-population to be identifiable from the observational distribution of that sub-population. Given these conditions, we present a sound and complete algorithm for the s-ID problem.
abstract_zh: 子群体中的因果推断涉及确定干预措施对特定子群体的因果影响，该子群体通过抽样过程中系统偏差的影响与整个群体区分开来。然而，忽视子群体引入的微妙之处可能会导致错误的推断或限制现有方法的适用性。我们引入并提倡子群体中的因果推理问题（以下称为 s-ID），其中我们只能访问目标子群体（而不是整个群体）的观测数据。现有的子群体推理问题的前提是给定的数据分布源自整个群体，因此无法解决 s-ID 问题。为了解决这一差距，我们提供了因果图中必须成立的充分必要条件，以便可以从该子群体的观测分布中识别出该子群体中的因果效应。考虑到这些条件，我们为 s-ID 问题提出了一个健全且完整的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并解决了一个新的因果推断问题——子群体因果效应识别（s-ID），研究在仅有子群体观测数据的情况下如何识别因果效应。
AI.motivation: 现有因果推断方法假设数据来自总体分布，无法处理子群体因抽样偏差导致的因果效应识别问题，容易引发错误推断或限制方法适用性。
AI.method: 通过分析因果图中必须满足的必要且充分条件，提出针对s-ID问题的完整算法，实现从子群体观测分布中识别因果效应。
AI.result: 在满足条件的情况下，所提算法能够准确识别子群体因果效应，填补了现有方法在子群体数据场景下的空白。
AI.conclusion: 本文为子群体因果推断提供了理论框架和有效算法，推动了因果效应识别在细分人群中的应用研究。

authors_text: Martin Nöllenburg,Markus Wallinger
title: Computing Hive Plots: A Combinatorial Framework
title_zh: 计算蜂巢图：组合框架
comment: Appears in the Proceedings of the 31st International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2023)
comments: Appears in the Proceedings of the 31st International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2023)
abstract: Hive plots are a graph visualization style placing vertices on a set of radial axes emanating from a common center and drawing edges as smooth curves connecting their respective endpoints. In previous work on hive plots, assignment to an axis and vertex positions on each axis were determined based on selected vertex attributes and the order of axes was prespecified. Here, we present a new framework focusing on combinatorial aspects of these drawings to extend the original hive plot idea and optimize visual properties such as the total edge length and the number of edge crossings in the resulting hive plots. Our framework comprises three steps: (1) partition the vertices into multiple groups, each corresponding to an axis of the hive plot; (2) optimize the cyclic axis order to bring more strongly connected groups near each other; (3) optimize the vertex ordering on each axis to minimize edge crossings. Each of the three steps is related to a well-studied, but NP-complete computational problem. We combine and adapt suitable algorithmic approaches, implement them as an instantiation of our framework and show in a case study how it can be applied in a practical setting. Furthermore, we conduct computational experiments to gain further insights regarding algorithmic choices of the framework. The code of the implementation and a prototype web application can be found on OSF.
summary: Hive plots are a graph visualization style placing vertices on a set of radial axes emanating from a common center and drawing edges as smooth curves connecting their respective endpoints. In previous work on hive plots, assignment to an axis and vertex positions on each axis were determined based on selected vertex attributes and the order of axes was prespecified. Here, we present a new framework focusing on combinatorial aspects of these drawings to extend the original hive plot idea and optimize visual properties such as the total edge length and the number of edge crossings in the resulting hive plots. Our framework comprises three steps: (1) partition the vertices into multiple groups, each corresponding to an axis of the hive plot; (2) optimize the cyclic axis order to bring more strongly connected groups near each other; (3) optimize the vertex ordering on each axis to minimize edge crossings. Each of the three steps is related to a well-studied, but NP-complete computational problem. We combine and adapt suitable algorithmic approaches, implement them as an instantiation of our framework and show in a case study how it can be applied in a practical setting. Furthermore, we conduct computational experiments to gain further insights regarding algorithmic choices of the framework. The code of the implementation and a prototype web application can be found on OSF.
abstract_zh: 蜂巢图是一种图形可视化样式，将顶点放置在从公共中心发出的一组径向轴上，并将边缘绘制为连接各自端点的平滑曲线。在之前关于蜂巢图的工作中，轴的分配以及每个轴上的顶点位置是根据选定的顶点属性确定的，并且轴的顺序是预先指定的。在这里，我们提出了一个新的框架，重点关注这些绘图的组合方面，以扩展原始蜂巢图的想法并优化视觉属性，例如所得蜂巢图中的总边长和边缘交叉数量。我们的框架包括三个步骤：（1）将顶点划分为多个组，每个组对应于蜂巢图的一个轴； (2) 优化循环轴顺序，使更强连接的组彼此靠近； (3) 优化每个轴上的顶点排序以最小化边交叉。这三个步骤中的每一个都与一个经过充分研究的 NP 完全计算问题相关。我们结合并调整合适的算法方法，将它们实现为我们框架的实例，并在案例研究中展示如何将其应用到实际环境中。此外，我们还进行了计算实验，以进一步了解框架的算法选择。实现代码和原型 Web 应用程序可以在 OSF 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的组合框架，用于优化蜂巢图的可视化效果，通过优化轴排列顺序和顶点分布以减少边交叉和总边长。
AI.motivation: 传统蜂巢图的轴顺序和顶点位置依赖预设规则，难以动态优化视觉效果。本文旨在通过组合优化方法提升蜂巢图的可视化质量。
AI.method: 框架分三步：1) 将顶点划分为多个轴对应组；2) 优化轴的循环顺序以增强强连接组邻近性；3) 优化各轴顶点排列以减少边交叉。结合NP难问题的算法进行实现。
AI.result: 通过案例研究验证框架实用性，计算实验分析算法选择的影响，并提供开源代码和网页原型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为蜂巢图优化提供灵活解决方案，在计算复杂性与可视化效果间取得平衡，且具备实际应用价值。

authors_text: Siwei Li,Mingxuan Liu,Yating Zhang,Shu Chen,Haoxiang Li,Zifei Dou,Hong Chen
title: SAM-Deblur: Let Segment Anything Boost Image Deblurring
title_zh: SAM-Deblur：对任何东西进行分割可以增强图像去模糊效果
abstract: Image deblurring is a critical task in the field of image restoration, aiming to eliminate blurring artifacts. However, the challenge of addressing non-uniform blurring leads to an ill-posed problem, which limits the generalization performance of existing deblurring models. To solve the problem, we propose a framework SAM-Deblur, integrating prior knowledge from the Segment Anything Model (SAM) into the deblurring task for the first time. In particular, SAM-Deblur is divided into three stages. First, we preprocess the blurred images, obtain segment masks via SAM, and propose a mask dropout method for training to enhance model robustness. Then, to fully leverage the structural priors generated by SAM, we propose a Mask Average Pooling (MAP) unit specifically designed to average SAM-generated segmented areas, serving as a plug-and-play component which can be seamlessly integrated into existing deblurring networks. Finally, we feed the fused features generated by the MAP Unit into the deblurring model to obtain a sharp image. Experimental results on the RealBlurJ, ReloBlur, and REDS datasets reveal that incorporating our methods improves GoPro-trained NAFNet's PSNR by 0.05, 0.96, and 7.03, respectively. Project page is available at GitHub \href{https://hplqaq.github.io/projects/sam-deblur}{HPLQAQ/SAM-Deblur}.
summary: Image deblurring is a critical task in the field of image restoration, aiming to eliminate blurring artifacts. However, the challenge of addressing non-uniform blurring leads to an ill-posed problem, which limits the generalization performance of existing deblurring models. To solve the problem, we propose a framework SAM-Deblur, integrating prior knowledge from the Segment Anything Model (SAM) into the deblurring task for the first time. In particular, SAM-Deblur is divided into three stages. First, we preprocess the blurred images, obtain segment masks via SAM, and propose a mask dropout method for training to enhance model robustness. Then, to fully leverage the structural priors generated by SAM, we propose a Mask Average Pooling (MAP) unit specifically designed to average SAM-generated segmented areas, serving as a plug-and-play component which can be seamlessly integrated into existing deblurring networks. Finally, we feed the fused features generated by the MAP Unit into the deblurring model to obtain a sharp image. Experimental results on the RealBlurJ, ReloBlur, and REDS datasets reveal that incorporating our methods improves GoPro-trained NAFNet's PSNR by 0.05, 0.96, and 7.03, respectively. Project page is available at GitHub \href{https://hplqaq.github.io/projects/sam-deblur}{HPLQAQ/SAM-Deblur}.
abstract_zh: 图像去模糊是图像恢复领域的一项关键任务，旨在消除模糊伪影。然而，解决非均匀模糊的挑战会导致不适定问题，从而限制了现有去模糊模型的泛化性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个框架 SAM-Deblur，首次将分段任意模型 (SAM) 的先验知识集成到去模糊任务中。特别地，SAM-Deblur分为三个阶段。首先，我们对模糊图像进行预处理，通过 SAM 获取分段掩模，并提出一种掩模 dropout 方法进行训练，以增强模型的鲁棒性。然后，为了充分利用 SAM 生成的结构先验，我们提出了一个掩模平均池（MAP）单元，专门设计用于平均 SAM 生成的分段区域，作为即插即用组件，可以无缝集成到现有的去模糊网络中。最后，我们将 MAP 单元生成的融合特征输入到去模糊模型中以获得清晰的图像。 RealBlurJ、ReloBlur 和 REDS 数据集上的实验结果表明，结合我们的方法可将 GoPro 训练的 NAFNet 的 PSNR 分别提高 0.05、0.96 和 7.03。项目页面位于 GitHub \href{https://hplqaq.github.io/projects/sam-deblur}{HPLQAQ/SAM-Deblur}。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出SAM-Deblur框架，通过整合Segment Anything Model（SAM）的先验知识来提升图像去模糊效果，特别是在处理非均匀模糊问题上。
AI.motivation: 现有去模糊模型在处理非均匀模糊时因问题病态而泛化能力有限，需引入结构先验知识以增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: SAM-Deblur分三阶段：1) 使用SAM生成分割掩码并引入掩码丢弃训练；2) 设计Mask Average Pooling（MAP）单元融合SAM结构先验；3) 将MAP特征输入去模糊网络生成清晰图像。
AI.result: 在RealBlurJ、ReloBlur和REDS数据集上，NAFNet模型的PSNR分别提升0.05、0.96和7.03，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过SAM结构先验与MAP单元的结合，显著提升了去模糊性能，为非均匀模糊问题提供了新思路。

search_text: SAM-Deblur: Let Segment Anything Boost Image Deblurring SAM-Deblur：对任何东西进行分割可以增强图像去模糊效果 Image deblurring is a critical task in the field of image restoration, aiming to eliminate blurring artifacts. However, the challenge of addressing non-uniform blurring leads to an ill-posed problem, which limits the generalization performance of existing deblurring models. To solve the problem, we propose a framework SAM-Deblur, integrating prior knowledge from the Segment Anything Model (SAM) into the deblurring task for the first time. In particular, SAM-Deblur is divided into three stages. First, we preprocess the blurred images, obtain segment masks via SAM, and propose a mask dropout method for training to enhance model robustness. Then, to fully leverage the structural priors generated by SAM, we propose a Mask Average Pooling (MAP) unit specifically designed to average SAM-generated segmented areas, serving as a plug-and-play component which can be seamlessly integrated into existing deblurring networks. Finally, we feed the fused features generated by the MAP Unit into the deblurring model to obtain a sharp image. Experimental results on the RealBlurJ, ReloBlur, and REDS datasets reveal that incorporating our methods improves GoPro-trained NAFNet's PSNR by 0.05, 0.96, and 7.03, respectively. Project page is available at GitHub \href{https://hplqaq.github.io/projects/sam-deblur}{HPLQAQ/SAM-Deblur}. 图像去模糊是图像恢复领域的一项关键任务，旨在消除模糊伪影。然而，解决非均匀模糊的挑战会导致不适定问题，从而限制了现有去模糊模型的泛化性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个框架 SAM-Deblur，首次将分段任意模型 (SAM) 的先验知识集成到去模糊任务中。特别地，SAM-Deblur分为三个阶段。首先，我们对模糊图像进行预处理，通过 SAM 获取分段掩模，并提出一种掩模 dropout 方法进行训练，以增强模型的鲁棒性。然后，为了充分利用 SAM 生成的结构先验，我们提出了一个掩模平均池（MAP）单元，专门设计用于平均 SAM 生成的分段区域，作为即插即用组件，可以无缝集成到现有的去模糊网络中。最后，我们将 MAP 单元生成的融合特征输入到去模糊模型中以获得清晰的图像。 RealBlurJ、ReloBlur 和 REDS 数据集上的实验结果表明，结合我们的方法可将 GoPro 训练的 NAFNet 的 PSNR 分别提高 0.05、0.96 和 7.03。项目页面位于 GitHub \href{https://hplqaq.github.io/projects/sam-deblur}{HPLQAQ/SAM-Deblur}。 该论文提出SAM-Deblur框架，通过整合Segment Anything Model（SAM）的先验知识来提升图像去模糊效果，特别是在处理非均匀模糊问题上。 Siwei Li,Mingxuan Liu,Yating Zhang,Shu Chen,Haoxiang Li,Zifei Dou,Hong Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Shanli Alefkhani,Nima Khodaveisi,Mathieu Mari
title: Online hitting set of $d$-dimensional fat objects
title_zh: 在线击中$d$维脂肪物体集合
abstract: We consider an online version of the geometric minimum hitting set problem that can be described as a game between an adversary and an algorithm. For some integers $d$ and $N$, let $P$ be the set of points in $(0, N)^d$ with integral coordinates, and let $\mathcal{O}$ be a family of subsets of $P$, called objects. Both $P$ and $\mathcal{O}$ are known in advance by the algorithm and by the adversary. Then, the adversary gives some objects one by one, and the algorithm has to maintain a valid hitting set for these objects using points from $P$, with an immediate and irrevocable decision. We measure the performance of the algorithm by its competitive ratio, that is the ratio between the number of points used by the algorithm and the offline minimum hitting set for the sub-sequence of objects chosen by the adversary. We present a simple deterministic online algorithm with competitive ratio $((4α+1)^{2d}\log N)$ when objects correspond to a family of $α$-fat objects. Informally, $α$-fatness measures how cube-like is an object. We show that no algorithm can achieve a better ratio when $α$ and $d$ are fixed constants. In particular, our algorithm works for two-dimensional disks and $d$-cubes which answers two open questions from related previous papers in the special case where the set of points corresponds to all the points of integral coordinates with a fixed $d$-cube.
summary: We consider an online version of the geometric minimum hitting set problem that can be described as a game between an adversary and an algorithm. For some integers $d$ and $N$, let $P$ be the set of points in $(0, N)^d$ with integral coordinates, and let $\mathcal{O}$ be a family of subsets of $P$, called objects. Both $P$ and $\mathcal{O}$ are known in advance by the algorithm and by the adversary. Then, the adversary gives some objects one by one, and the algorithm has to maintain a valid hitting set for these objects using points from $P$, with an immediate and irrevocable decision. We measure the performance of the algorithm by its competitive ratio, that is the ratio between the number of points used by the algorithm and the offline minimum hitting set for the sub-sequence of objects chosen by the adversary. We present a simple deterministic online algorithm with competitive ratio $((4α+1)^{2d}\log N)$ when objects correspond to a family of $α$-fat objects. Informally, $α$-fatness measures how cube-like is an object. We show that no algorithm can achieve a better ratio when $α$ and $d$ are fixed constants. In particular, our algorithm works for two-dimensional disks and $d$-cubes which answers two open questions from related previous papers in the special case where the set of points corresponds to all the points of integral coordinates with a fixed $d$-cube.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑几何最小命中集问题的在线版本，可以将其描述为对手和算法之间的游戏。对于某些整数 $d$ 和 $N$，令 $P$ 为 $(0, N)^d$ 中具有积分坐标的点集，并令 $\mathcal{O}$ 为 $P$ 的子集族，称为对象。 $P$ 和 $\mathcal{O}$ 都是算法和对手预先知道的。然后，对手一一给出一些物体，算法必须使用 $P$ 中的点来维护这些物体的有效命中集，并立即做出不可撤销的决定。我们通过竞争比来衡量算法的性能，即算法使用的点数与对手选择的对象子序列的离线最小命中集之间的比率。我们提出了一种简单的确定性在线算法，当对象对应于一系列 $α$-fat 对象时，竞争比为 $((4α+1)^{2d}\log N)$。非正式地，$α$-fatness 衡量一个物体的立方体形状。我们表明，当 $α$ 和 $d$ 是固定常数时，没有算法可以实现更好的比率。特别是，我们的算法适用于二维磁盘和 $d$ 立方体，它回答了先前相关论文中的两个开放问题，即点集对应于具有固定 $d$ 立方体的积分坐标的所有点的特殊情况。

AI.tldr: 研究d维胖物体的在线几何最小击中集问题，提出一个确定性在线算法，并证明其竞争比最优性。
AI.motivation: 解决先前工作中关于二维圆盘和d维立方体在线击中集问题的未解决问题，特别是针对整数坐标点集合的情形。
AI.method: 提出一个简单的确定性在线算法，其竞争比为((4α+1)^{2d} log N)，适用于α-胖物体族，通过将问题转化为网格划分和点覆盖策略实现。
AI.result: 算法达到((4α+1)^{2d} log N)的竞争比，且当α和d为固定常数时，没有算法能获得更好的竞争比，证明了该比率的渐近最优性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法统一解决了两类几何对象的在线击中集问题，填补了相关领域的理论空白，并展示了胖物体结构对在线算法设计的重要性。

authors_text: Alain Riou,Stefan Lattner,Gaëtan Hadjeres,Geoffroy Peeters
title: PESTO: Pitch Estimation with Self-supervised Transposition-equivariant Objective
title_zh: PESTO：具有自监督换位等变目标的音高估计
comment: Best Paper Award of the 24th International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference, ISMIR 2023
comments: Best Paper Award of the 24th International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference, ISMIR 2023
abstract: In this paper, we address the problem of pitch estimation using Self Supervised Learning (SSL). The SSL paradigm we use is equivariance to pitch transposition, which enables our model to accurately perform pitch estimation on monophonic audio after being trained only on a small unlabeled dataset. We use a lightweight ($<$ 30k parameters) Siamese neural network that takes as inputs two different pitch-shifted versions of the same audio represented by its Constant-Q Transform. To prevent the model from collapsing in an encoder-only setting, we propose a novel class-based transposition-equivariant objective which captures pitch information. Furthermore, we design the architecture of our network to be transposition-preserving by introducing learnable Toeplitz matrices. We evaluate our model for the two tasks of singing voice and musical instrument pitch estimation and show that our model is able to generalize across tasks and datasets while being lightweight, hence remaining compatible with low-resource devices and suitable for real-time applications. In particular, our results surpass self-supervised baselines and narrow the performance gap between self-supervised and supervised methods for pitch estimation.
summary: In this paper, we address the problem of pitch estimation using Self Supervised Learning (SSL). The SSL paradigm we use is equivariance to pitch transposition, which enables our model to accurately perform pitch estimation on monophonic audio after being trained only on a small unlabeled dataset. We use a lightweight ($<$ 30k parameters) Siamese neural network that takes as inputs two different pitch-shifted versions of the same audio represented by its Constant-Q Transform. To prevent the model from collapsing in an encoder-only setting, we propose a novel class-based transposition-equivariant objective which captures pitch information. Furthermore, we design the architecture of our network to be transposition-preserving by introducing learnable Toeplitz matrices. We evaluate our model for the two tasks of singing voice and musical instrument pitch estimation and show that our model is able to generalize across tasks and datasets while being lightweight, hence remaining compatible with low-resource devices and suitable for real-time applications. In particular, our results surpass self-supervised baselines and narrow the performance gap between self-supervised and supervised methods for pitch estimation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们使用自监督学习（SSL）解决音调估计问题。我们使用的 SSL 范式是音调换位的等变性，这使得我们的模型在仅在小型未标记数据集上进行训练后能够准确地对单声道音频执行音调估计。我们使用轻量级（$<$30k 参数）连体神经网络，该网络将由其恒定 Q 变换表示的同一音频的两个不同音调版本作为输入。为了防止模型在仅编码器的设置中崩溃，我们提出了一种新颖的基于类的转置等变目标，它捕获音调信息。此外，我们通过引入可学习的托普利茨矩阵将网络架构设计为转置保持。我们针对歌声和乐器音高估计这两个任务评估了我们的模型，并表明我们的模型能够在轻量级的同时跨任务和数据集进行泛化，因此保持与低资源设备的兼容性并适合实时应用。特别是，我们的结果超越了自监督基线，并缩小了自监督和监督音调估计方法之间的性能差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PESTO方法，利用自监督学习解决单音音频的音高估计问题，通过音高转置等变性目标实现轻量级模型。
AI.motivation: 传统音高估计依赖标注数据且模型复杂度高，难以适用于资源受限设备。本文旨在开发一种基于自监督学习的轻量级音高估计方法，提升跨任务泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计轻量级孪生网络，输入同一音频的两种音高移位Constant-Q变换表示，结合类别基于的转置等变性目标函数与可学习Toeplitz矩阵架构。
AI.result: 在歌声与乐器音高估计任务中超越自监督基线，缩小与监督方法的性能差距，模型参数少于3万个，适合实时低资源设备部署。
AI.conclusion: 转置等变性目标与网络架构设计有效提升了自监督音高估计性能，为轻量级实时应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: PESTO: Pitch Estimation with Self-supervised Transposition-equivariant Objective PESTO：具有自监督换位等变目标的音高估计 In this paper, we address the problem of pitch estimation using Self Supervised Learning (SSL). The SSL paradigm we use is equivariance to pitch transposition, which enables our model to accurately perform pitch estimation on monophonic audio after being trained only on a small unlabeled dataset. We use a lightweight ($<$ 30k parameters) Siamese neural network that takes as inputs two different pitch-shifted versions of the same audio represented by its Constant-Q Transform. To prevent the model from collapsing in an encoder-only setting, we propose a novel class-based transposition-equivariant objective which captures pitch information. Furthermore, we design the architecture of our network to be transposition-preserving by introducing learnable Toeplitz matrices. We evaluate our model for the two tasks of singing voice and musical instrument pitch estimation and show that our model is able to generalize across tasks and datasets while being lightweight, hence remaining compatible with low-resource devices and suitable for real-time applications. In particular, our results surpass self-supervised baselines and narrow the performance gap between self-supervised and supervised methods for pitch estimation. 在本文中，我们使用自监督学习（SSL）解决音调估计问题。我们使用的 SSL 范式是音调换位的等变性，这使得我们的模型在仅在小型未标记数据集上进行训练后能够准确地对单声道音频执行音调估计。我们使用轻量级（$<$30k 参数）连体神经网络，该网络将由其恒定 Q 变换表示的同一音频的两个不同音调版本作为输入。为了防止模型在仅编码器的设置中崩溃，我们提出了一种新颖的基于类的转置等变目标，它捕获音调信息。此外，我们通过引入可学习的托普利茨矩阵将网络架构设计为转置保持。我们针对歌声和乐器音高估计这两个任务评估了我们的模型，并表明我们的模型能够在轻量级的同时跨任务和数据集进行泛化，因此保持与低资源设备的兼容性并适合实时应用。特别是，我们的结果超越了自监督基线，并缩小了自监督和监督音调估计方法之间的性能差距。 本文提出PESTO方法，利用自监督学习解决单音音频的音高估计问题，通过音高转置等变性目标实现轻量级模型。 Alain Riou,Stefan Lattner,Gaëtan Hadjeres,Geoffroy Peeters eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Patricia Bachmann,Ignaz Rutter,Peter Stumpf
title: On 3-Coloring Circle Graphs
title_zh: 关于三色圆图
comment: Appears in the Proceedings of the 31st International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2023)
comments: Appears in the Proceedings of the 31st International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2023)
abstract: Given a graph $G$ with a fixed vertex order $\prec$, one obtains a circle graph $H$ whose vertices are the edges of $G$ and where two such edges are adjacent if and only if their endpoints are pairwise distinct and alternate in $\prec$. Therefore, the problem of determining whether $G$ has a $k$-page book embedding with spine order $\prec$ is equivalent to deciding whether $H$ can be colored with $k$ colors. Finding a $k$-coloring for a circle graph is known to be NP-complete for $k \geq 4$ and trivial for $k \leq 2$. For $k = 3$, Unger (1992) claims an efficient algorithm that finds a 3-coloring in $O(n \log n)$ time, if it exists. Given a circle graph $H$, Unger's algorithm (1) constructs a 3-\textsc{Sat} formula $Φ$ that is satisfiable if and only if $H$ admits a 3-coloring and (2) solves $Φ$ by a backtracking strategy that relies on the structure imposed by the circle graph. However, the extended abstract misses several details and Unger refers to his PhD thesis (in German) for details. In this paper we argue that Unger's algorithm for 3-coloring circle graphs is not correct and that 3-coloring circle graphs should be considered as an open problem. We show that step (1) of Unger's algorithm is incorrect by exhibiting a circle graph whose formula $Φ$ is satisfiable but that is not 3-colorable. We further show that Unger's backtracking strategy for solving $Φ$ in step (2) may produce incorrect results and give empirical evidence that it exhibits a runtime behaviour that is not consistent with the claimed running time.

Therefore, the problem of determining whether $G$ has a $k$-page book embedding with spine order $\prec$ is equivalent to deciding whether $H$ can be colored with $k$ colors. For $k = 3$, Unger (1992) claims an efficient algorithm that finds a 3-coloring in $O(n \log n)$ time, if it exists. Given a circle graph $H$, Unger's algorithm (1) constructs a 3-\textsc{Sat} formula $Φ$ that is satisfiable if and only if $H$ admits a 3-coloring and (2) solves $Φ$ by a backtracking strategy that relies on the structure imposed by the circle graph. However, the extended abstract misses several details and Unger refers to his PhD thesis (in German) for details. In this paper we argue that Unger's algorithm for 3-coloring circle graphs is not correct and that 3-coloring circle graphs should be considered as an open problem. We show that step (1) of Unger's algorithm is incorrect by exhibiting a circle graph whose formula $Φ$ is satisfiable but that is not 3-colorable. abstract_zh: 给定一个具有固定顶点顺序 $\prec$ 的图 $G$，我们会得到一个圆形图 $H$，其顶点是 $G$ 的边，并且当且仅当它们的端点在 $\prec$ 中成对不同且交替时，两个这样的边相邻。因此，确定$G$是否具有书脊顺序为$\prec$的$k$页书嵌入问题相当于确定$H$是否可以用$k$颜色进行着色。已知为圆图找到 $k$ 着色对于 $k \geq 4$ 来说是 NP 完全的，对于 $k \leq 2$ 来说是微不足道的。对于 $k = 3$，Unger (1992) 声称有一种有效的算法，可以在 $O(n \log n)$ 时间内找到 3 着色（如果存在）。给定一个圆图 $H$，Unger 算法 (1) 构造一个 3-\textsc{Sat} 公式 $Φ$，当且仅当 $H$ 允许 3 着色时该公式是可满足的，并且 (2) 通过依赖于圆图强加的结构的回溯策略来求解 $Φ$。然而，扩展摘要遗漏了一些细节，昂格尔参考了他的博士论文（德语）以获取详细信息。在本文中，我们认为 Unger 的 3 着色圆图算法是不正确的，并且 3 着色圆图应该被视为一个开放问题。我们通过展示一个圆图来证明 Unger 算法的步骤 (1) 是不正确的，该圆图的公式 $Φ$ 是可满足的，但不是 3 色的。我们进一步表明，Unger 在步骤（2）中求解 $Φ$ 的回溯策略可能会产生不正确的结果，并提供经验证据表明它表现出与声称的运行时间不一致的运行时行为。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了Unger提出的圆图3着色算法的正确性，指出其存在错误并重新提出该问题为开放性问题。
AI.motivation: 圆图的3着色问题在理论计算中具有重要意义，但Unger的算法细节不完整且未被验证，需重新评估其正确性。
AI.method: 通过构造反例证明Unger算法第一步的公式构建存在错误，并通过实证分析其回溯策略的运行时行为与声称不符。
AI.result: 发现存在满足Unger公式但无法3着色的圆图，且其回溯策略可能产生错误结果，算法时间复杂度也未达到宣称的O(n log n)。
AI.conclusion: Unger的3着色算法不可行，圆图3着色问题仍需进一步研究，应视为开放性问题。

authors_text: Elena L. Glassman
title: Designing Interfaces for Human-Computer Communication: An On-Going Collection of Considerations
title_zh: 设计人机通信界面：持续的注意事项集合
abstract: While we do not always use words, communicating what we want to an AI is a conversation -- with ourselves as well as with it, a recurring loop with optional steps depending on the complexity of the situation and our request. Any given conversation of this type may include: (a) the human forming an intent, (b) the human expressing that intent as a command or utterance, (c) the AI performing one or more rounds of inference on that command to resolve ambiguities and/or requesting clarifications from the human, (d) the AI showing the inferred meaning of the command and/or its execution on current and future situations or data, (e) the human hopefully correctly recognizing whether the AI's interpretation actually aligns with their intent. In the process, they may (f) update their model of the AI's capabilities and characteristics, (g) update their model of the situations in which the AI is executing its interpretation of their intent, (h) confirm or refine their intent, and (i) revise their expression of their intent to the AI, where the loop repeats until the human is satisfied. With these critical cognitive and computational steps within this back-and-forth laid out as a framework, it is easier to anticipate where communication can fail, and design algorithms and interfaces that ameliorate those failure points.
summary: While we do not always use words, communicating what we want to an AI is a conversation -- with ourselves as well as with it, a recurring loop with optional steps depending on the complexity of the situation and our request. Any given conversation of this type may include: (a) the human forming an intent, (b) the human expressing that intent as a command or utterance, (c) the AI performing one or more rounds of inference on that command to resolve ambiguities and/or requesting clarifications from the human, (d) the AI showing the inferred meaning of the command and/or its execution on current and future situations or data, (e) the human hopefully correctly recognizing whether the AI's interpretation actually aligns with their intent. In the process, they may (f) update their model of the AI's capabilities and characteristics, (g) update their model of the situations in which the AI is executing its interpretation of their intent, (h) confirm or refine their intent, and (i) revise their expression of their intent to the AI, where the loop repeats until the human is satisfied. With these critical cognitive and computational steps within this back-and-forth laid out as a framework, it is easier to anticipate where communication can fail, and design algorithms and interfaces that ameliorate those failure points.
abstract_zh: 虽然我们并不总是使用语言，但向人工智能传达我们想要的东西是一种对话——与我们自己以及与它之间的对话，这是一个循环，根据情况的复杂性和我们的要求，可以选择步骤。这种类型的任何给定对话可能包括：（a）人类形成意图，（b）人类以命令或话语的形式表达该意图，（c）人工智能对该命令执行一轮或多轮推理以解决歧义和/或请求人类澄清，（d）人工智能显示命令的推断含义和/或其对当前和未来情况或数据的执行，（e）人类希望正确识别人工智能的解释是否实际上与他们的一致意图。在此过程中，他们可以（f）更新人工智能能力和特征的模型，（g）更新人工智能执行对其意图的解释的情况的模型，（h）确认或完善他们的意图，以及（i）修改他们对人工智能的意图表达，循环不断重复，直到人类满意为止。通过将这些关键的认知和计算步骤作为一个框架来回布置，可以更容易地预测通信可能失败的地方，并设计改善这些失败点的算法和界面。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过分析人类与AI交互中的沟通循环框架，为设计更有效的交互界面提供指导。
AI.motivation: 人类与AI的沟通存在意图表达、歧义解析和反馈确认等复杂环节，传统界面设计难以应对动态交互中的失败点。
AI.method: 提出包含意图形成、指令表达、AI推理、反馈验证及意图修正的循环框架，系统化分析沟通各阶段的认知与计算步骤。
AI.result: 明确了沟通失败的关键节点，为优化算法和界面设计提供了可操作的改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化框架揭示交互本质，有助于开发更符合人类认知规律的AI沟通界面。

search_text: Designing Interfaces for Human-Computer Communication: An On-Going Collection of Considerations 设计人机通信界面：持续的注意事项集合 While we do not always use words, communicating what we want to an AI is a conversation -- with ourselves as well as with it, a recurring loop with optional steps depending on the complexity of the situation and our request. Any given conversation of this type may include: (a) the human forming an intent, (b) the human expressing that intent as a command or utterance, (c) the AI performing one or more rounds of inference on that command to resolve ambiguities and/or requesting clarifications from the human, (d) the AI showing the inferred meaning of the command and/or its execution on current and future situations or data, (e) the human hopefully correctly recognizing whether the AI's interpretation actually aligns with their intent. In the process, they may (f) update their model of the AI's capabilities and characteristics, (g) update their model of the situations in which the AI is executing its interpretation of their intent, (h) confirm or refine their intent, and (i) revise their expression of their intent to the AI, where the loop repeats until the human is satisfied. With these critical cognitive and computational steps within this back-and-forth laid out as a framework, it is easier to anticipate where communication can fail, and design algorithms and interfaces that ameliorate those failure points. 虽然我们并不总是使用语言，但向人工智能传达我们想要的东西是一种对话——与我们自己以及与它之间的对话，这是一个循环，根据情况的复杂性和我们的要求，可以选择步骤。这种类型的任何给定对话可能包括：（a）人类形成意图，（b）人类以命令或话语的形式表达该意图，（c）人工智能对该命令执行一轮或多轮推理以解决歧义和/或请求人类澄清，（d）人工智能显示命令的推断含义和/或其对当前和未来情况或数据的执行，（e）人类希望正确识别人工智能的解释是否实际上与他们的一致意图。在此过程中，他们可以（f）更新人工智能能力和特征的模型，（g）更新人工智能执行对其意图的解释的情况的模型，（h）确认或完善他们的意图，以及（i）修改他们对人工智能的意图表达，循环不断重复，直到人类满意为止。通过将这些关键的认知和计算步骤作为一个框架来回布置，可以更容易地预测通信可能失败的地方，并设计改善这些失败点的算法和界面。 本文旨在通过分析人类与AI交互中的沟通循环框架，为设计更有效的交互界面提供指导。 Elena L. Glassman cs.HC

authors_text: Lucas Correia,Jan-Christoph Goos,Philipp Klein,Thomas Bäck,Anna V. Kononova
title: MA-VAE: Multi-head Attention-based Variational Autoencoder Approach for Anomaly Detection in Multivariate Time-series Applied to Automotive Endurance Powertrain Testing
title_zh: MA-VAE：基于多头注意力的变分自动编码器方法，用于在汽车耐力动力系统测试中应用多变量时间序列进行异常检测
abstract: A clear need for automatic anomaly detection applied to automotive testing has emerged as more and more attention is paid to the data recorded and manual evaluation by humans reaches its capacity. Such real-world data is massive, diverse, multivariate and temporal in nature, therefore requiring modelling of the testee behaviour. We propose a variational autoencoder with multi-head attention (MA-VAE), which, when trained on unlabelled data, not only provides very few false positives but also manages to detect the majority of the anomalies presented. In addition to that, the approach offers a novel way to avoid the bypass phenomenon, an undesirable behaviour investigated in literature. Lastly, the approach also introduces a new method to remap individual windows to a continuous time series. The results are presented in the context of a real-world industrial data set and several experiments are undertaken to further investigate certain aspects of the proposed model. When configured properly, it is 9% of the time wrong when an anomaly is flagged and discovers 67% of the anomalies present. Also, MA-VAE has the potential to perform well with only a fraction of the training and validation subset, however, to extract it, a more sophisticated threshold estimation method is required.
summary: A clear need for automatic anomaly detection applied to automotive testing has emerged as more and more attention is paid to the data recorded and manual evaluation by humans reaches its capacity. Such real-world data is massive, diverse, multivariate and temporal in nature, therefore requiring modelling of the testee behaviour. We propose a variational autoencoder with multi-head attention (MA-VAE), which, when trained on unlabelled data, not only provides very few false positives but also manages to detect the majority of the anomalies presented. In addition to that, the approach offers a novel way to avoid the bypass phenomenon, an undesirable behaviour investigated in literature. Lastly, the approach also introduces a new method to remap individual windows to a continuous time series. The results are presented in the context of a real-world industrial data set and several experiments are undertaken to further investigate certain aspects of the proposed model. When configured properly, it is 9% of the time wrong when an anomaly is flagged and discovers 67% of the anomalies present. Also, MA-VAE has the potential to perform well with only a fraction of the training and validation subset, however, to extract it, a more sophisticated threshold estimation method is required.
abstract_zh: 随着人们越来越关注记录的数据以及人类手动评估的能力，对自动异常检测应用于汽车测试的明显需求已经出现。这些现实世界的数据本质上是海量的、多样化的、多变量的和时间性的，因此需要对被测试者的行为进行建模。我们提出了一种具有多头注意力的变分自动编码器（MA-VAE），当对未标记的数据进行训练时，它不仅提供很少的误报，而且还能够检测到大多数出现的异常。除此之外，该方法还提供了一种避免旁路现象（文献中研究的不良行为）的新颖方法。最后，该方法还引入了一种将单个窗口重新映射到连续时间序列的新方法。结果在现实世界的工业数据集的背景下呈现，并进行了多项实验以进一步研究所提出模型的某些方面。如果配置正确，当标记异常并发现 67% 的异常时，错误率是 9%。此外，MA-VAE 有潜力仅用训练和验证子集的一小部分就表现良好，但是，要提取它，需要更复杂的阈值估计方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多头注意力机制的变分自编码器（MA-VAE），用于在汽车耐久性动力总成测试中检测多变量时间序列中的异常。
AI.motivation: 随着汽车测试数据量的增加，人工评估已无法满足需求，需自动化的异常检测方法。现有方法存在误报率高、绕过现象等问题，需改进模型以提高检测效果。
AI.method: 设计MA-VAE模型，结合多头注意力机制和变分自编码器，利用未标记数据训练，通过新型窗口映射方法避免绕过现象，并优化连续时间序列重构。
AI.result: 在工业数据集上实验显示，当配置合理时，MA-VAE的误报率为9%，检测到67%的异常。模型在少量训练数据下仍具潜力，但需更复杂的阈值估计方法。
AI.conclusion: MA-VAE有效提升了多变量时间序列异常检测的准确性，尤其适用于汽车测试场景，但需进一步优化阈值估计以提高效率。

authors_text: Smit Marvaniya,Jitendra Singh,Nicolas Galichet,Fred Ochieng Otieno,Geeth De Mel,Kommy Weldemariam
title: Encoding Seasonal Climate Predictions for Demand Forecasting with Modular Neural Network
title_zh: 使用模块化神经网络编码季节性气候预测以进行需求预测
abstract: Current time-series forecasting problems use short-term weather attributes as exogenous inputs. However, in specific time-series forecasting solutions (e.g., demand prediction in the supply chain), seasonal climate predictions are crucial to improve its resilience. Representing mid to long-term seasonal climate forecasts is challenging as seasonal climate predictions are uncertain, and encoding spatio-temporal relationship of climate forecasts with demand is complex. We propose a novel modeling framework that efficiently encodes seasonal climate predictions to provide robust and reliable time-series forecasting for supply chain functions. The encoding framework enables effective learning of latent representations -- be it uncertain seasonal climate prediction or other time-series data (e.g., buyer patterns) -- via a modular neural network architecture. Our extensive experiments indicate that learning such representations to model seasonal climate forecast results in an error reduction of approximately 13\% to 17\% across multiple real-world data sets compared to existing demand forecasting methods.
summary: Current time-series forecasting problems use short-term weather attributes as exogenous inputs. However, in specific time-series forecasting solutions (e.g., demand prediction in the supply chain), seasonal climate predictions are crucial to improve its resilience. Representing mid to long-term seasonal climate forecasts is challenging as seasonal climate predictions are uncertain, and encoding spatio-temporal relationship of climate forecasts with demand is complex. We propose a novel modeling framework that efficiently encodes seasonal climate predictions to provide robust and reliable time-series forecasting for supply chain functions. The encoding framework enables effective learning of latent representations -- be it uncertain seasonal climate prediction or other time-series data (e.g., buyer patterns) -- via a modular neural network architecture. Our extensive experiments indicate that learning such representations to model seasonal climate forecast results in an error reduction of approximately 13\% to 17\% across multiple real-world data sets compared to existing demand forecasting methods.
abstract_zh: 当前的时间序列预测问题使用短期天气属性作为外生输入。然而，在特定的时间序列预测解决方案（例如供应链中的需求预测）中，季节性气候预测对于提高其弹性至关重要。表示中长期季节性气候预测具有挑战性，因为季节性气候预测是不确定的，并且编码气候预测与需求的时空关系也很复杂。我们提出了一种新颖的建模框架，可以有效地编码季节性气候预测，为供应链功能提供稳健且可靠的时间序列预测。该编码框架能够通过模块化神经网络架构有效学习潜在表示——无论是不确定的季节性气候预测还是其他时间序列数据（例如买家模式）。我们的大量实验表明，与现有的需求预测方法相比，学习此类表示来模拟季节性气候预测可以在多个现实世界数据集上将误差减少约 13% 至 17%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模块化神经网络的框架，通过有效编码季节性气候预测来提升供应链需求预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有需求预测方法依赖短期天气数据，但供应链场景中季节性气候预测对提升预测鲁棒性至关重要，而其不确定性及与需求的时空关系建模存在挑战。
AI.method: 设计模块化神经网络架构，学习季节气候预测的潜在表示，同时整合其他时间序列数据（如买家行为）以捕捉复杂依赖关系。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上，该方法相比现有需求预测模型将误差降低了13%至17%。
AI.conclusion: 编码季节性气候预测能显著提升需求预测性能，为供应链管理提供了更可靠的技术支持。

We propose a novel modeling framework that efficiently encodes seasonal climate predictions to provide robust and reliable time-series forecasting for supply chain functions. The encoding framework enables effective learning of latent representations -- be it uncertain seasonal climate prediction or other time-series data (e.g., buyer patterns) -- via a modular neural network architecture. Our extensive experiments indicate that learning such representations to model seasonal climate forecast results in an error reduction of approximately 13\% to 17\% across multiple real-world data sets compared to existing demand forecasting methods. 当前的时间序列预测问题使用短期天气属性作为外生输入。然而，在特定的时间序列预测解决方案（例如供应链中的需求预测）中，季节性气候预测对于提高其弹性至关重要。表示中长期季节性气候预测具有挑战性，因为季节性气候预测是不确定的，并且编码气候预测与需求的时空关系也很复杂。我们提出了一种新颖的建模框架，可以有效地编码季节性气候预测，为供应链功能提供稳健且可靠的时间序列预测。该编码框架能够通过模块化神经网络架构有效学习潜在表示——无论是不确定的季节性气候预测还是其他时间序列数据（例如买家模式）。我们的大量实验表明，与现有的需求预测方法相比，学习此类表示来模拟季节性气候预测可以在多个现实世界数据集上将误差减少约 13% 至 17%。 本文提出一种基于模块化神经网络的框架，通过有效编码季节性气候预测来提升供应链需求预测的准确性。 Smit Marvaniya,Jitendra Singh,Nicolas Galichet,Fred Ochieng Otieno,Geeth De Mel,Kommy Weldemariam cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Veronika Cheplygina,Cathrine Damgaard,Trine Naja Eriksen,Dovile Juodelyte,Amelia Jiménez-Sánchez
title: Augmenting Chest X-ray Datasets with Non-Expert Annotations
title_zh: 使用非专家注释增强胸部 X 射线数据集
comment: Medical Image Understanding and Analysis Conference - MIUA 2025
comments: Medical Image Understanding and Analysis Conference - MIUA 2025
abstract: The advancement of machine learning algorithms in medical image analysis requires the expansion of training datasets. A popular and cost-effective approach is automated annotation extraction from free-text medical reports, primarily due to the high costs associated with expert clinicians annotating medical images, such as chest X-rays. However, it has been shown that the resulting datasets are susceptible to biases and shortcuts. Another strategy to increase the size of a dataset is crowdsourcing, a widely adopted practice in general computer vision with some success in medical image analysis. In a similar vein to crowdsourcing, we enhance two publicly available chest X-ray datasets by incorporating non-expert annotations. However, instead of using diagnostic labels, we annotate shortcuts in the form of tubes. We collect 3.5k chest drain annotations for NIH-CXR14, and 1k annotations for four different tube types in PadChest, and create the Non-Expert Annotations of Tubes in X-rays (NEATX) dataset. We train a chest drain detector with the non-expert annotations that generalizes well to expert labels. Moreover, we compare our annotations to those provided by experts and show "moderate" to "almost perfect" agreement. Finally, we present a pathology agreement study to raise awareness about the quality of ground truth annotations. We make our dataset available on Zenodo at https://zenodo.org/records/14944064 and our code available at https://github.com/purrlab/chestxr-label-reliability.

A popular and cost-effective approach is automated annotation extraction from free-text medical reports, primarily due to the high costs associated with expert clinicians annotating medical images, such as chest X-rays. However, it has been shown that the resulting datasets are susceptible to biases and shortcuts. Another strategy to increase the size of a dataset is crowdsourcing, a widely adopted practice in general computer vision with some success in medical image analysis. In a similar vein to crowdsourcing, we enhance two publicly available chest X-ray datasets by incorporating non-expert annotations. However, instead of using diagnostic labels, we annotate shortcuts in the form of tubes. We collect 3.5k chest drain annotations for NIH-CXR14, and 1k annotations for four different tube types in PadChest, and create the Non-Expert Annotations of Tubes in X-rays (NEATX) dataset. We train a chest drain detector with the non-expert annotations that generalizes well to expert labels. Moreover, we compare our annotations to those provided by experts and show "moderate" to "almost perfect" agreement. Finally, we present a pathology agreement study to raise awareness about the quality of ground truth annotations. We make our dataset available on Zenodo at https://zenodo.org/records/14944064 and our code available at https://github.com/purrlab/chestxr-label-reliability.
abstract_zh: 机器学习算法在医学图像分析中的进步需要扩展训练数据集。一种流行且经济高效的方法是从自由文本医疗报告中自动提取注释，这主要是因为专家临床医生注释医学图像（例如胸部 X 射线）的成本很高。然而，事实证明，生成的数据集容易受到偏差和捷径的影响。增加数据集大小的另一种策略是众包，这是通用计算机视觉领域广泛采用的做法，在医学图像分析方面取得了一些成功。与众包类似，我们通过合并非专家注释来增强两个公开可用的胸部 X 射线数据集。然而，我们不使用诊断标签，而是以管的形式注释快捷方式。我们收集了 NIH-CXR14 的 3.5k 胸腔引流注释，以及 PadChest 中四种不同管类型的 1k 注释，并创建了 X 射线管的非专家注释 (NEATX) 数据集。我们使用非专家注释来训练胸腔引流检测器，这些注释可以很好地推广到专家标签。此外，我们将我们的注释与专家提供的注释进行比较，并显示出“中等”到“几乎完美”的一致性。最后，我们提出了一项病理学一致性研究，以提高人们对地面实况注释质量的认识。我们在 Zenodo 上提供我们的数据集（https://zenodo.org/records/14944064），并在 https://github.com/purrlab/chestxr-label-reliability 上提供我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文通过收集非专家对胸部X光片中导管等结构的标注，创建NEATX数据集以增强现有数据集，并验证其与专家标注的一致性。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析需大量标注数据，但专家标注成本高且存在偏差，非专家标注作为替代方案需验证其有效性与可靠性。
AI.method: 收集非专家对NIH-CXR14和PadChest数据集的导管标注（共4.5k条），构建NEATX数据集，训练检测模型并对比专家标注一致性，同时开展标注质量研究。
AI.result: 非专家标注与专家标注达成中等到几乎完美一致性，训练的检测模型在专家标签上泛化良好，揭示了现有标注质量的潜在问题。
AI.conclusion: 非专家标注可有效扩充医学图像数据集且质量可靠，但需持续关注标注协议的标准化以确保数据质量。

authors_text: Geoffroy Peeters
title: Self-Similarity-Based and Novelty-based loss for music structure analysis
title_zh: 用于音乐结构分析的基于自相似性和基于新颖性的损失
abstract: Music Structure Analysis (MSA) is the task aiming at identifying musical segments that compose a music track and possibly label them based on their similarity. In this paper we propose a supervised approach for the task of music boundary detection. In our approach we simultaneously learn features and convolution kernels. For this we jointly optimize -- a loss based on the Self-Similarity-Matrix (SSM) obtained with the learned features, denoted by SSM-loss, and -- a loss based on the novelty score obtained applying the learned kernels to the estimated SSM, denoted by novelty-loss. We also demonstrate that relative feature learning, through self-attention, is beneficial for the task of MSA. Finally, we compare the performances of our approach to previously proposed approaches on the standard RWC-Pop, and various subsets of SALAMI.
summary: Music Structure Analysis (MSA) is the task aiming at identifying musical segments that compose a music track and possibly label them based on their similarity. In this paper we propose a supervised approach for the task of music boundary detection. In our approach we simultaneously learn features and convolution kernels. For this we jointly optimize -- a loss based on the Self-Similarity-Matrix (SSM) obtained with the learned features, denoted by SSM-loss, and -- a loss based on the novelty score obtained applying the learned kernels to the estimated SSM, denoted by novelty-loss. We also demonstrate that relative feature learning, through self-attention, is beneficial for the task of MSA. Finally, we compare the performances of our approach to previously proposed approaches on the standard RWC-Pop, and various subsets of SALAMI.
abstract_zh: 音乐结构分析（MSA）是一项旨在识别组成音乐曲目的音乐片段并可能根据它们的相似性对其进行标记的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于音乐边界检测任务的监督方法。在我们的方法中，我们同时学习特征和卷积核。为此，我们联合优化——基于通过学习特征获得的自相似矩阵（SSM）的损失，表示为SSM-loss；以及——基于将学习内核应用于估计的SSM而获得的新颖性分数的损失，表示为新颖性损失。我们还证明，通过自注意力进行相关特征学习对于 MSA 任务是有益的。最后，我们将我们的方法与之前在标准 RWC-Pop 和 SALAMI 的各种子集上提出的方法的性能进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自相似性和新颖性损失的监督方法，用于音乐结构分析中的音乐边界检测任务。
AI.motivation: 传统音乐结构分析方法在特征学习和边界检测上存在局限性，需通过联合优化自相似性矩阵和新颖性分数提升性能。
AI.method: 联合优化自相似性矩阵损失（SSM-loss）和新颖性损失（novelty-loss），同时学习特征和卷积核，并引入自注意力机制增强特征表示。
AI.result: 在RWC-Pop和SALAMI数据集上，该方法优于现有方法，验证了联合损失函数和自注意力机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合自相似性与新颖性损失的框架，配合自注意力机制，能有效提升音乐结构分析性能，未来可拓展至更多数据集和应用场景。
