authors_text: Shyam Sundhar Ramesh,Pier Giuseppe Sessa,Yifan Hu,Andreas Krause,Ilija Bogunovic
title: Distributionally Robust Model-based Reinforcement Learning with Large State Spaces
title_zh: 具有大状态空间的基于分布式鲁棒模型的强化学习
abstract: Three major challenges in reinforcement learning are the complex dynamical systems with large state spaces, the costly data acquisition processes, and the deviation of real-world dynamics from the training environment deployment. To overcome these issues, we study distributionally robust Markov decision processes with continuous state spaces under the widely used Kullback-Leibler, chi-square, and total variation uncertainty sets. We propose a model-based approach that utilizes Gaussian Processes and the maximum variance reduction algorithm to efficiently learn multi-output nominal transition dynamics, leveraging access to a generative model (i.e., simulator). We further demonstrate the statistical sample complexity of the proposed method for different uncertainty sets. These complexity bounds are independent of the number of states and extend beyond linear dynamics, ensuring the effectiveness of our approach in identifying near-optimal distributionally-robust policies. The proposed method can be further combined with other model-free distributionally robust reinforcement learning methods to obtain a near-optimal robust policy. Experimental results demonstrate the robustness of our algorithm to distributional shifts and its superior performance in terms of the number of samples needed.
summary: Three major challenges in reinforcement learning are the complex dynamical systems with large state spaces, the costly data acquisition processes, and the deviation of real-world dynamics from the training environment deployment. To overcome these issues, we study distributionally robust Markov decision processes with continuous state spaces under the widely used Kullback-Leibler, chi-square, and total variation uncertainty sets. We propose a model-based approach that utilizes Gaussian Processes and the maximum variance reduction algorithm to efficiently learn multi-output nominal transition dynamics, leveraging access to a generative model (i.e., simulator). We further demonstrate the statistical sample complexity of the proposed method for different uncertainty sets. These complexity bounds are independent of the number of states and extend beyond linear dynamics, ensuring the effectiveness of our approach in identifying near-optimal distributionally-robust policies. The proposed method can be further combined with other model-free distributionally robust reinforcement learning methods to obtain a near-optimal robust policy. Experimental results demonstrate the robustness of our algorithm to distributional shifts and its superior performance in terms of the number of samples needed.
abstract_zh: 强化学习的三大挑战是具有大状态空间的复杂动态系统、昂贵的数据获取过程以及现实世界动态与训练环境部署的偏差。为了克服这些问题，我们在广泛使用的 Kullback-Leibler、卡方和总变差不确定性集下研究具有连续状态空间的分布鲁棒马尔可夫决策过程。我们提出了一种基于模型的方法，利用高斯过程和最大方差减少算法，利用生成模型（即模拟器）来有效地学习多输出名义转换动态。我们进一步证明了所提出的方法对于不同不确定性集的统计样本复杂性。这些复杂性界限与状态数量无关，并且超出了线性动态范围，确保了我们的方法在识别近乎最优的分布稳健策略方面的有效性。该方法可以进一步与其他无模型的分布式鲁棒强化学习方法相结合，以获得接近最优的鲁棒策略。实验结果证明了我们的算法对分布变化的鲁棒性及其在所需样本数量方面的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在大规模状态空间中基于分布鲁棒性的模型强化学习方法，以应对复杂动态系统、数据采集成本高及现实环境与训练环境偏差等问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在大规模状态空间、高数据采集成本及环境动态偏差场景下存在局限性，需设计鲁棒性更强的算法以适应实际应用需求。
AI.method: 提出基于高斯过程与最大方差缩减算法的模型方法，利用生成模型学习多输出名义转移动态，并针对KL散度、卡方和总变分不确定集分析统计样本复杂度。
AI.result: 所提方法样本复杂度与状态数量无关且适用于非线性动态，实验验证了其对分布偏移的鲁棒性及样本效率优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了大规模状态空间下的分布鲁棒强化学习问题，且可与无模型方法结合进一步提升策略鲁棒性。

search_text: Distributionally Robust Model-based Reinforcement Learning with Large State Spaces 具有大状态空间的基于分布式鲁棒模型的强化学习 Three major challenges in reinforcement learning are the complex dynamical systems with large state spaces, the costly data acquisition processes, and the deviation of real-world dynamics from the training environment deployment. To overcome these issues, we study distributionally robust Markov decision processes with continuous state spaces under the widely used Kullback-Leibler, chi-square, and total variation uncertainty sets. We propose a model-based approach that utilizes Gaussian Processes and the maximum variance reduction algorithm to efficiently learn multi-output nominal transition dynamics, leveraging access to a generative model (i.e., simulator). We further demonstrate the statistical sample complexity of the proposed method for different uncertainty sets. These complexity bounds are independent of the number of states and extend beyond linear dynamics, ensuring the effectiveness of our approach in identifying near-optimal distributionally-robust policies. The proposed method can be further combined with other model-free distributionally robust reinforcement learning methods to obtain a near-optimal robust policy. Experimental results demonstrate the robustness of our algorithm to distributional shifts and its superior performance in terms of the number of samples needed. 强化学习的三大挑战是具有大状态空间的复杂动态系统、昂贵的数据获取过程以及现实世界动态与训练环境部署的偏差。为了克服这些问题，我们在广泛使用的 Kullback-Leibler、卡方和总变差不确定性集下研究具有连续状态空间的分布鲁棒马尔可夫决策过程。我们提出了一种基于模型的方法，利用高斯过程和最大方差减少算法，利用生成模型（即模拟器）来有效地学习多输出名义转换动态。我们进一步证明了所提出的方法对于不同不确定性集的统计样本复杂性。这些复杂性界限与状态数量无关，并且超出了线性动态范围，确保了我们的方法在识别近乎最优的分布稳健策略方面的有效性。该方法可以进一步与其他无模型的分布式鲁棒强化学习方法相结合，以获得接近最优的鲁棒策略。实验结果证明了我们的算法对分布变化的鲁棒性及其在所需样本数量方面的优越性能。 本文研究了在大规模状态空间中基于分布鲁棒性的模型强化学习方法，以应对复杂动态系统、数据采集成本高及现实环境与训练环境偏差等问题。 Shyam Sundhar Ramesh,Pier Giuseppe Sessa,Yifan Hu,Andreas Krause,Ilija Bogunovic cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Yubo Wang,Xueguang Ma,Wenhu Chen
title: Augmenting Black-box LLMs with Medical Textbooks for Biomedical Question Answering
title_zh: 用医学教科书增强黑盒法学硕士的生物医学问答能力
comment: This version has been accepted and published at EMNLP Findings 2024
comments: This version has been accepted and published at EMNLP Findings 2024
abstract: Large-scale language models (LLMs) like ChatGPT have demonstrated impressive abilities in generating responses based on human instructions. However, their use in the medical field can be challenging due to their lack of specific, in-depth knowledge. In this study, we present a system called LLMs Augmented with Medical Textbooks (LLM-AMT) designed to enhance the proficiency of LLMs in specialized domains. LLM-AMT integrates authoritative medical textbooks into the LLMs' framework using plug-and-play modules. These modules include a Query Augmenter, a Hybrid Textbook Retriever, and a Knowledge Self-Refiner. Together, they incorporate authoritative medical knowledge. Additionally, an LLM Reader aids in contextual understanding. Our experimental results on three medical QA tasks demonstrate that LLMAMT significantly improves response quality, with accuracy gains ranging from 11.6% to 16.6%. Notably, with GPT-4-Turbo as the base model, LLM-AMT outperforms the specialized Med-PaLM 2 model pre-trained on a massive amount of medical corpus by 2-3%. We found that despite being 100x smaller in size, medical textbooks as a retrieval corpus is proven to be a more effective knowledge database than Wikipedia in the medical domain, boosting performance by 7.8%-13.7%.
summary: Large-scale language models (LLMs) like ChatGPT have demonstrated impressive abilities in generating responses based on human instructions. However, their use in the medical field can be challenging due to their lack of specific, in-depth knowledge. In this study, we present a system called LLMs Augmented with Medical Textbooks (LLM-AMT) designed to enhance the proficiency of LLMs in specialized domains. LLM-AMT integrates authoritative medical textbooks into the LLMs' framework using plug-and-play modules. These modules include a Query Augmenter, a Hybrid Textbook Retriever, and a Knowledge Self-Refiner. Together, they incorporate authoritative medical knowledge. Additionally, an LLM Reader aids in contextual understanding. Our experimental results on three medical QA tasks demonstrate that LLMAMT significantly improves response quality, with accuracy gains ranging from 11.6% to 16.6%. Notably, with GPT-4-Turbo as the base model, LLM-AMT outperforms the specialized Med-PaLM 2 model pre-trained on a massive amount of medical corpus by 2-3%. We found that despite being 100x smaller in size, medical textbooks as a retrieval corpus is proven to be a more effective knowledge database than Wikipedia in the medical domain, boosting performance by 7.8%-13.7%.
abstract_zh: 像 ChatGPT 这样的大规模语言模型 (LLM) 在根据人类指令生成响应方面表现出了令人印象深刻的能力。然而，由于缺乏具体、深入的知识，它们在医学领域的使用可能具有挑战性。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个名为法学硕士增强医学教科书（LLM-AMT）的系统，旨在提高法学硕士在专业领域的熟练程度。 LLM-AMT使用即插即用模块将权威医学教科书集成到LLM的框架中。这些模块包括查询增强器、混合教科书检索器和知识自我精炼器。它们共同融合了权威的医学知识。此外，法学硕士读者有助于上下文理解。我们在三项医学 QA 任务上的实验结果表明，LLMAMT 显着提高了响应质量，准确率提高了 11.6% 至 16.6%。值得注意的是，以 GPT-4-Turbo 作为基础模型，LLM-AMT 的性能比在大量医学语料库上预训练的专门 Med-PaLM 2 模型高出 2-3%。我们发现，尽管尺寸小了 100 倍，但医学教科书作为检索语料库被证明是比医学领域维基百科更有效的知识数据库，性能提高了 7.8%-13.7%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过整合医学教科书来增强大型语言模型（LLMs）在生物医学问答任务中表现的系统LLM-AMT。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLMs在生成回答方面表现出色，但其在医疗领域因缺乏具体、深入的专业知识而面临挑战。
AI.method: 设计了包含查询增强器、混合教科书检索器、知识自优化模块和LLM阅读器的插件式框架，将权威医学知识融入LLMs。
AI.result: 在三个医学问答任务中，LLM-AMT准确率提升11.6%-16.6%，且在GPT-4-Turbo基础上超越Med-PaLM 2模型2-3%。
AI.conclusion: 医学教科书作为检索语料库在医疗领域比维基百科更有效，即使其规模小100倍，仍能显著提升模型性能。

authors_text: Yuankun Xie,Jingjing Zhou,Xiaolin Lu,Zhenghao Jiang,Yuxin Yang,Haonan Cheng,Long Ye
title: FSD: An Initial Chinese Dataset for Fake Song Detection
title_zh: FSD：用于假歌曲检测的初始中文数据集
abstract: Singing voice synthesis and singing voice conversion have significantly advanced, revolutionizing musical experiences. However, the rise of "Deepfake Songs" generated by these technologies raises concerns about authenticity. Unlike Audio DeepFake Detection (ADD), the field of song deepfake detection lacks specialized datasets or methods for song authenticity verification. In this paper, we initially construct a Chinese Fake Song Detection (FSD) dataset to investigate the field of song deepfake detection. The fake songs in the FSD dataset are generated by five state-of-the-art singing voice synthesis and singing voice conversion methods. Our initial experiments on FSD revealed the ineffectiveness of existing speech-trained ADD models for the task of song deepFake detection. Thus, we employ the FSD dataset for the training of ADD models. We subsequently evaluate these models under two scenarios: one with the original songs and another with separated vocal tracks. Experiment results show that song-trained ADD models exhibit a 38.58% reduction in average equal error rate compared to speech-trained ADD models on the FSD test set.
summary: Singing voice synthesis and singing voice conversion have significantly advanced, revolutionizing musical experiences. However, the rise of "Deepfake Songs" generated by these technologies raises concerns about authenticity. Unlike Audio DeepFake Detection (ADD), the field of song deepfake detection lacks specialized datasets or methods for song authenticity verification. In this paper, we initially construct a Chinese Fake Song Detection (FSD) dataset to investigate the field of song deepfake detection. The fake songs in the FSD dataset are generated by five state-of-the-art singing voice synthesis and singing voice conversion methods. Our initial experiments on FSD revealed the ineffectiveness of existing speech-trained ADD models for the task of song deepFake detection. Thus, we employ the FSD dataset for the training of ADD models. We subsequently evaluate these models under two scenarios: one with the original songs and another with separated vocal tracks. Experiment results show that song-trained ADD models exhibit a 38.58% reduction in average equal error rate compared to speech-trained ADD models on the FSD test set.
abstract_zh: 歌声合成和歌声转换显着进步，彻底改变了音乐体验。然而，这些技术产生的“深度伪造歌曲”的兴起引发了人们对真实性的担忧。与音频 DeepFake 检测（ADD）不同，歌曲 Deepfake 检测领域缺乏用于歌曲真实性验证的专门数据集或方法。在本文中，我们最初构建了中文假歌曲检测（FSD）数据集来研究歌曲深度伪造检测领域。 FSD数据集中的假歌曲是通过五种最先进的歌声合成和歌声转换方法生成的。我们在 FSD 上的初步实验揭示了现有的语音训练 ADD 模型对于歌曲 DeepFake 检测任务的无效性。因此，我们使用 FSD 数据集来训练 ADD 模型。我们随后在两种情况下评估这些模型：一种是原始歌曲，另一种是分离的声乐轨道。实验结果表明，在 FSD 测试集上，与语音训练的 ADD 模型相比，歌曲训练的 ADD 模型的平均等错误率降低了 38.58%。

AI.tldr: 构建中文假歌曲检测数据集FSD，并评估现有音频深度伪造检测模型在歌曲检测中的效果，提出针对歌曲训练的改进方法。
AI.motivation: 现有音频深度伪造检测方法在歌曲检测任务中效果不佳，缺乏专门针对歌曲的检测数据集和方法，需构建FSD数据集以推动该领域研究。
AI.method: 构建包含五种先进歌声合成与转换方法生成的假歌曲的FSD数据集，训练并评估音频深度伪造检测模型，比较原始歌曲与分离人声轨道两种场景下的模型表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于歌曲训练的ADD模型在FSD测试集上的平均等错误率比语音训练模型降低38.58%。

search_text: FSD: An Initial Chinese Dataset for Fake Song Detection FSD：用于假歌曲检测的初始中文数据集 Singing voice synthesis and singing voice conversion have significantly advanced, revolutionizing musical experiences. However, the rise of "Deepfake Songs" generated by these technologies raises concerns about authenticity. Unlike Audio DeepFake Detection (ADD), the field of song deepfake detection lacks specialized datasets or methods for song authenticity verification. In this paper, we initially construct a Chinese Fake Song Detection (FSD) dataset to investigate the field of song deepfake detection. The fake songs in the FSD dataset are generated by five state-of-the-art singing voice synthesis and singing voice conversion methods. Our initial experiments on FSD revealed the ineffectiveness of existing speech-trained ADD models for the task of song deepFake detection. Thus, we employ the FSD dataset for the training of ADD models. We subsequently evaluate these models under two scenarios: one with the original songs and another with separated vocal tracks. Experiment results show that song-trained ADD models exhibit a 38.58% reduction in average equal error rate compared to speech-trained ADD models on the FSD test set. 歌声合成和歌声转换显着进步，彻底改变了音乐体验。然而，这些技术产生的“深度伪造歌曲”的兴起引发了人们对真实性的担忧。与音频 DeepFake 检测（ADD）不同，歌曲 Deepfake 检测领域缺乏用于歌曲真实性验证的专门数据集或方法。在本文中，我们最初构建了中文假歌曲检测（FSD）数据集来研究歌曲深度伪造检测领域。 FSD数据集中的假歌曲是通过五种最先进的歌声合成和歌声转换方法生成的。我们在 FSD 上的初步实验揭示了现有的语音训练 ADD 模型对于歌曲 DeepFake 检测任务的无效性。因此，我们使用 FSD 数据集来训练 ADD 模型。我们随后在两种情况下评估这些模型：一种是原始歌曲，另一种是分离的声乐轨道。实验结果表明，在 FSD 测试集上，与语音训练的 ADD 模型相比，歌曲训练的 ADD 模型的平均等错误率降低了 38.58%。 构建中文假歌曲检测数据集FSD，并评估现有音频深度伪造检测模型在歌曲检测中的效果，提出针对歌曲训练的改进方法。 Yuankun Xie,Jingjing Zhou,Xiaolin Lu,Zhenghao Jiang,Yuxin Yang,Haonan Cheng,Long Ye cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Zhechao Wang,Peirui Cheng,Shujing Duan,Kaiqiang Chen,Zhirui Wang,Xinming Li,Xian Sun
title: DCP-Net: A Distributed Collaborative Perception Network for Remote Sensing Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: DCP-Net：用于遥感语义分割的分布式协作感知网络
abstract: Onboard intelligent processing is widely applied in emergency tasks in the field of remote sensing. However, it is predominantly confined to an individual platform with a limited observation range as well as susceptibility to interference, resulting in limited accuracy. Considering the current state of multi-platform collaborative observation, this article innovatively presents a distributed collaborative perception network called DCP-Net. Firstly, the proposed DCP-Net helps members to enhance perception performance by integrating features from other platforms. Secondly, a self-mutual information match module is proposed to identify collaboration opportunities and select suitable partners, prioritizing critical collaborative features and reducing redundant transmission cost. Thirdly, a related feature fusion module is designed to address the misalignment between local and collaborative features, improving the quality of fused features for the downstream task. We conduct extensive experiments and visualization analyses using three semantic segmentation datasets, including Potsdam, iSAID and DFC23. The results demonstrate that DCP-Net outperforms the existing methods comprehensively, improving mIoU by 2.61%~16.89% at the highest collaboration efficiency, which promotes the performance to a state-of-the-art level.
summary: Onboard intelligent processing is widely applied in emergency tasks in the field of remote sensing. However, it is predominantly confined to an individual platform with a limited observation range as well as susceptibility to interference, resulting in limited accuracy. Considering the current state of multi-platform collaborative observation, this article innovatively presents a distributed collaborative perception network called DCP-Net. Firstly, the proposed DCP-Net helps members to enhance perception performance by integrating features from other platforms. Secondly, a self-mutual information match module is proposed to identify collaboration opportunities and select suitable partners, prioritizing critical collaborative features and reducing redundant transmission cost. Thirdly, a related feature fusion module is designed to address the misalignment between local and collaborative features, improving the quality of fused features for the downstream task. We conduct extensive experiments and visualization analyses using three semantic segmentation datasets, including Potsdam, iSAID and DFC23. The results demonstrate that DCP-Net outperforms the existing methods comprehensively, improving mIoU by 2.61%~16.89% at the highest collaboration efficiency, which promotes the performance to a state-of-the-art level.
abstract_zh: 机载智能处理广泛应用于遥感领域的应急任务。然而，它主要局限于单个平台，观测范围有限且易受干扰，导致精度有限。考虑到多平台协作观测的现状，本文创新性地提出了一种分布式协作感知网络，称为DCP-Net。首先，所提出的 DCP-Net 通过集成其他平台的功能来帮助成员增强感知性能。其次，提出了自互信息匹配模块来识别协作机会并选择合适的合作伙伴，优先考虑关键协作功能并减少冗余传输成本。第三，设计了相关的特征融合模块来解决本地特征和协作特征之间的不一致问题，提高下游任务的融合特征的质量。我们使用三个语义分割数据集（包括 Potsdam、iSAID 和 DFC23）进行了广泛的实验和可视化分析。结果表明，DCP-Net全面优于现有方法，在最高协作效率下，mIoU提高了2.61%~16.89%，将性能提升到了state-of-the-art水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DCP-Net的分布式协作感知网络，用于遥感语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的遥感智能处理方法受限于单个平台的观测范围和易受干扰的问题，导致精度有限。因此，需要一种多平台协作的方法来提升感知性能。
AI.method: 提出DCP-Net，包括特征融合模块、自互信息匹配模块和相关特征融合模块，以提高协作效率并减少冗余传输成本。
AI.result: 在Potsdam、iSAID和DFC23三个数据集上的实验结果表明，DCP-Net在最高协作效率下mIoU提升了2.61%~16.89%，达到最先进的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: DCP-Net通过多平台协作显著提升了遥感语义分割的性能，为未来分布式协作感知提供了有效方法。

authors_text: Wencan Huang,Daizong Liu,Wei Hu
title: Dense Object Grounding in 3D Scenes
title_zh: 3D 场景中的密集对象接地
abstract: Localizing objects in 3D scenes according to the semantics of a given natural language is a fundamental yet important task in the field of multimedia understanding, which benefits various real-world applications such as robotics and autonomous driving. However, the majority of existing 3D object grounding methods are restricted to a single-sentence input describing an individual object, which cannot comprehend and reason more contextualized descriptions of multiple objects in more practical 3D cases. To this end, we introduce a new challenging task, called 3D Dense Object Grounding (3D DOG), to jointly localize multiple objects described in a more complicated paragraph rather than a single sentence. Instead of naively localizing each sentence-guided object independently, we found that dense objects described in the same paragraph are often semantically related and spatially located in a focused region of the 3D scene. To explore such semantic and spatial relationships of densely referred objects for more accurate localization, we propose a novel Stacked Transformer based framework for 3D DOG, named 3DOGSFormer. Specifically, we first devise a contextual query-driven local transformer decoder to generate initial grounding proposals for each target object. Then, we employ a proposal-guided global transformer decoder that exploits the local object features to learn their correlation for further refining initial grounding proposals. Extensive experiments on three challenging benchmarks (Nr3D, Sr3D, and ScanRefer) show that our proposed 3DOGSFormer outperforms state-of-the-art 3D single-object grounding methods and their dense-object variants by significant margins.
summary: Localizing objects in 3D scenes according to the semantics of a given natural language is a fundamental yet important task in the field of multimedia understanding, which benefits various real-world applications such as robotics and autonomous driving. However, the majority of existing 3D object grounding methods are restricted to a single-sentence input describing an individual object, which cannot comprehend and reason more contextualized descriptions of multiple objects in more practical 3D cases. To this end, we introduce a new challenging task, called 3D Dense Object Grounding (3D DOG), to jointly localize multiple objects described in a more complicated paragraph rather than a single sentence. Instead of naively localizing each sentence-guided object independently, we found that dense objects described in the same paragraph are often semantically related and spatially located in a focused region of the 3D scene. To explore such semantic and spatial relationships of densely referred objects for more accurate localization, we propose a novel Stacked Transformer based framework for 3D DOG, named 3DOGSFormer. Specifically, we first devise a contextual query-driven local transformer decoder to generate initial grounding proposals for each target object. Then, we employ a proposal-guided global transformer decoder that exploits the local object features to learn their correlation for further refining initial grounding proposals. Extensive experiments on three challenging benchmarks (Nr3D, Sr3D, and ScanRefer) show that our proposed 3DOGSFormer outperforms state-of-the-art 3D single-object grounding methods and their dense-object variants by significant margins.
abstract_zh: 根据给定自然语言的语义定位 3D 场景中的对象是多媒体理解领域的一项基本但重要的任务，这有​​利于机器人和自动驾驶等各种现实应用。然而，大多数现有的 3D 对象基础方法仅限于描述单个对象的单句输入，无法在更实际的 3D 情况下理解和推理多个对象的更上下文化的描述。为此，我们引入了一项新的挑战性任务，称为 3D 密集对象接地（3D DOG），以联合定位更复杂的段落而不是单个句子中描述的多个对象。我们发现同一段落中描述的密集对象通常在语义上相关并且在空间上位于 3D 场景的聚焦区域中，而不是天真地独立地定位每个句子引导的对象。为了探索密集引用对象的语义和空间关系以实现更准确的定位，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 Stacked Transformer 的 3D DOG 框架，名为 3DOGSFormer。具体来说，我们首先设计一个上下文查询驱动的本地转换器解码器来为每个目标对象生成初始接地建议。然后，我们采用提案引导的全局转换器解码器，该解码器利用局部对象特征来学习它们的相关性，以进一步完善初始接地提案。对三个具有挑战性的基准（Nr3D、Sr3D 和 ScanRefer）进行的大量实验表明，我们提出的 3DOGSFormer 明显优于最先进的 3D 单对象接地方法及其密集对象变体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的3D密集物体定位任务（3D DOG），旨在根据复杂段落描述在3D场景中联合定位多个物体。
AI.motivation: 现有3D物体定位方法仅支持单句描述单个物体，无法处理实际场景中多物体的上下文化描述，缺乏对语义和空间关系的联合建模。
AI.method: 设计了基于堆叠Transformer的3DOGSFormer框架，包含上下文查询驱动的局部解码器生成初始定位提案，以及提案引导的全局解码器通过物体特征关联优化定位结果。
AI.result: 在Nr3D、Sr3D和ScanRefer三个基准测试中，3DOGSFormer显著优于现有单物体及密集物体定位方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模多物体间的语义与空间关系，3DOGSFormer有效提升了复杂场景下多物体联合定位的准确性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种新的3D密集物体定位任务（3D DOG），旨在根据复杂段落描述在3D场景中联合定位多个物体。
motivation: 现有3D物体定位方法仅支持单句描述单个物体，无法处理实际场景中多物体的上下文化描述，缺乏对语义和空间关系的联合建模。
method: 设计了基于堆叠Transformer的3DOGSFormer框架，包含上下文查询驱动的局部解码器生成初始定位提案，以及提案引导的全局解码器通过物体特征关联优化定位结果。
result: 在Nr3D、Sr3D和ScanRefer三个基准测试中，3DOGSFormer显著优于现有单物体及密集物体定位方法。
conclusion: 通过建模多物体间的语义与空间关系，3DOGSFormer有效提升了复杂场景下多物体联合定位的准确性。
search_text: Dense Object Grounding in 3D Scenes 3D 场景中的密集对象接地 Localizing objects in 3D scenes according to the semantics of a given natural language is a fundamental yet important task in the field of multimedia understanding, which benefits various real-world applications such as robotics and autonomous driving. However, the majority of existing 3D object grounding methods are restricted to a single-sentence input describing an individual object, which cannot comprehend and reason more contextualized descriptions of multiple objects in more practical 3D cases. To this end, we introduce a new challenging task, called 3D Dense Object Grounding (3D DOG), to jointly localize multiple objects described in a more complicated paragraph rather than a single sentence. Instead of naively localizing each sentence-guided object independently, we found that dense objects described in the same paragraph are often semantically related and spatially located in a focused region of the 3D scene. To explore such semantic and spatial relationships of densely referred objects for more accurate localization, we propose a novel Stacked Transformer based framework for 3D DOG, named 3DOGSFormer. Specifically, we first devise a contextual query-driven local transformer decoder to generate initial grounding proposals for each target object. Then, we employ a proposal-guided global transformer decoder that exploits the local object features to learn their correlation for further refining initial grounding proposals. Extensive experiments on three challenging benchmarks (Nr3D, Sr3D, and ScanRefer) show that our proposed 3DOGSFormer outperforms state-of-the-art 3D single-object grounding methods and their dense-object variants by significant margins. 根据给定自然语言的语义定位 3D 场景中的对象是多媒体理解领域的一项基本但重要的任务，这有​​利于机器人和自动驾驶等各种现实应用。然而，大多数现有的 3D 对象基础方法仅限于描述单个对象的单句输入，无法在更实际的 3D 情况下理解和推理多个对象的更上下文化的描述。为此，我们引入了一项新的挑战性任务，称为 3D 密集对象接地（3D DOG），以联合定位更复杂的段落而不是单个句子中描述的多个对象。我们发现同一段落中描述的密集对象通常在语义上相关并且在空间上位于 3D 场景的聚焦区域中，而不是天真地独立地定位每个句子引导的对象。为了探索密集引用对象的语义和空间关系以实现更准确的定位，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 Stacked Transformer 的 3D DOG 框架，名为 3DOGSFormer。具体来说，我们首先设计一个上下文查询驱动的本地转换器解码器来为每个目标对象生成初始接地建议。然后，我们采用提案引导的全局转换器解码器，该解码器利用局部对象特征来学习它们的相关性，以进一步完善初始接地提案。对三个具有挑战性的基准（Nr3D、Sr3D 和 ScanRefer）进行的大量实验表明，我们提出的 3DOGSFormer 明显优于最先进的 3D 单对象接地方法及其密集对象变体。 本文提出了一种新的3D密集物体定位任务（3D DOG），旨在根据复杂段落描述在3D场景中联合定位多个物体。 Wencan Huang,Daizong Liu,Wei Hu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Haixu Song,Shiyu Huang,Yinpeng Dong,Wei-Wei Tu
title: Robustness and Generalizability of Deepfake Detection: A Study with Diffusion Models
title_zh: Deepfake 检测的鲁棒性和泛化性：扩散模型的研究
abstract: The rise of deepfake images, especially of well-known personalities, poses a serious threat to the dissemination of authentic information. To tackle this, we present a thorough investigation into how deepfakes are produced and how they can be identified. The cornerstone of our research is a rich collection of artificial celebrity faces, titled DeepFakeFace (DFF). We crafted the DFF dataset using advanced diffusion models and have shared it with the community through online platforms. This data serves as a robust foundation to train and test algorithms designed to spot deepfakes. We carried out a thorough review of the DFF dataset and suggest two evaluation methods to gauge the strength and adaptability of deepfake recognition tools. The first method tests whether an algorithm trained on one type of fake images can recognize those produced by other methods. The second evaluates the algorithm's performance with imperfect images, like those that are blurry, of low quality, or compressed. Given varied results across deepfake methods and image changes, our findings stress the need for better deepfake detectors. Our DFF dataset and tests aim to boost the development of more effective tools against deepfakes.
summary: The rise of deepfake images, especially of well-known personalities, poses a serious threat to the dissemination of authentic information. To tackle this, we present a thorough investigation into how deepfakes are produced and how they can be identified. The cornerstone of our research is a rich collection of artificial celebrity faces, titled DeepFakeFace (DFF). We crafted the DFF dataset using advanced diffusion models and have shared it with the community through online platforms. This data serves as a robust foundation to train and test algorithms designed to spot deepfakes. We carried out a thorough review of the DFF dataset and suggest two evaluation methods to gauge the strength and adaptability of deepfake recognition tools. The first method tests whether an algorithm trained on one type of fake images can recognize those produced by other methods. The second evaluates the algorithm's performance with imperfect images, like those that are blurry, of low quality, or compressed. Given varied results across deepfake methods and image changes, our findings stress the need for better deepfake detectors. Our DFF dataset and tests aim to boost the development of more effective tools against deepfakes.
abstract_zh: 深度造假图像（尤其是知名人士的深度造假图像）的兴起，对真实信息的传播构成了严重威胁。为了解决这个问题，我们对 Deepfake 的产生方式以及如何识别进行了彻底的调查。我们研究的基石是丰富的人造名人面孔集合，名为 DeepFakeFace (DFF)。我们使用先进的扩散模型制作了 DFF 数据集，并通过在线平台与社区共享。这些数据为训练和测试旨在发现深度伪造的算法奠定了坚实的基础。我们对 DFF 数据集进行了彻底的审查，并提出了两种评估方法来衡量 Deepfake 识别工具的强度和适应性。第一种方法测试在一种类型的假图像上训练的算法是否可以识别其他方法生成的图像。第二个评估算法在不完美图像（例如模糊、低质量或压缩图像）下的性能。鉴于深度造假方法和图像变化的不同结果，我们的研究结果强调需要更好的深度造假检测器。我们的 DFF 数据集和测试旨在促进更有效的深度伪造工具的开发。

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建基于扩散模型的DeepFakeFace数据集，研究深度伪造检测的鲁棒性与泛化能力，并提出两种评估方法。
AI.motivation: 深度伪造图像（尤其是名人图像）的广泛传播威胁信息真实性，现有检测方法在面对不同生成方式和图像质量时存在局限性。
AI.method: 利用扩散模型生成DeepFakeFace数据集，设计两种评估方法：1）跨生成方法的检测泛化能力测试；2）低质量图像（模糊、压缩等）下的检测性能评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有检测算法在不同伪造方法和图像退化条件下表现差异显著，凸显出提升检测鲁棒性的必要性。
AI.conclusion: DeepFakeFace数据集和评估框架为开发更有效的深度伪造检测工具提供了基础，强调了检测模型需兼顾泛化能力与鲁棒性的研究方向。

ai_content.result: 实验表明，现有检测算法在不同伪造方法和图像退化条件下表现差异显著，凸显出提升检测鲁棒性的必要性。

authors_text: Yifan Song,Mengkun She,Kevin Köser
title: Advanced Underwater Image Restoration in Complex Illumination Conditions
title_zh: 复杂光照条件下的先进水下图像恢复
comment: ef:ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing, Volume 209, March 2024, Pages 197-212
comments: ef:ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing, Volume 209, March 2024, Pages 197-212
abstract: Underwater image restoration has been a challenging problem for decades since the advent of underwater photography. Most solutions focus on shallow water scenarios, where the scene is uniformly illuminated by the sunlight. However, the vast majority of uncharted underwater terrain is located beyond 200 meters depth where natural light is scarce and artificial illumination is needed. In such cases, light sources co-moving with the camera, dynamically change the scene appearance, which make shallow water restoration methods inadequate. In particular for multi-light source systems (composed of dozens of LEDs nowadays), calibrating each light is time-consuming, error-prone and tedious, and we observe that only the integrated illumination within the viewing volume of the camera is critical, rather than the individual light sources. The key idea of this paper is therefore to exploit the appearance changes of objects or the seafloor, when traversing the viewing frustum of the camera. Through new constraints assuming Lambertian surfaces, corresponding image pixels constrain the light field in front of the camera, and for each voxel a signal factor and a backscatter value are stored in a volumetric grid that can be used for very efficient image restoration of camera-light platforms, which facilitates consistently texturing large 3D models and maps that would otherwise be dominated by lighting and medium artifacts. To validate the effectiveness of our approach, we conducted extensive experiments on simulated and real-world datasets. The results of these experiments demonstrate the robustness of our approach in restoring the true albedo of objects, while mitigating the influence of lighting and medium effects. Furthermore, we demonstrate our approach can be readily extended to other scenarios, including in-air imaging with artificial illumination or other similar cases.
summary: Underwater image restoration has been a challenging problem for decades since the advent of underwater photography. Most solutions focus on shallow water scenarios, where the scene is uniformly illuminated by the sunlight. However, the vast majority of uncharted underwater terrain is located beyond 200 meters depth where natural light is scarce and artificial illumination is needed. In such cases, light sources co-moving with the camera, dynamically change the scene appearance, which make shallow water restoration methods inadequate. In particular for multi-light source systems (composed of dozens of LEDs nowadays), calibrating each light is time-consuming, error-prone and tedious, and we observe that only the integrated illumination within the viewing volume of the camera is critical, rather than the individual light sources. The key idea of this paper is therefore to exploit the appearance changes of objects or the seafloor, when traversing the viewing frustum of the camera. Through new constraints assuming Lambertian surfaces, corresponding image pixels constrain the light field in front of the camera, and for each voxel a signal factor and a backscatter value are stored in a volumetric grid that can be used for very efficient image restoration of camera-light platforms, which facilitates consistently texturing large 3D models and maps that would otherwise be dominated by lighting and medium artifacts. To validate the effectiveness of our approach, we conducted extensive experiments on simulated and real-world datasets. The results of these experiments demonstrate the robustness of our approach in restoring the true albedo of objects, while mitigating the influence of lighting and medium effects. Furthermore, we demonstrate our approach can be readily extended to other scenarios, including in-air imaging with artificial illumination or other similar cases.
abstract_zh: 自水下摄影出现以来的几十年里，水下图像恢复一直是一个具有挑战性的问题。大多数解决方案都专注于浅水场景，其中场景被阳光均匀照亮。然而，绝大多数未知的水下地形位于200米深度以上，自然光稀缺，需要人工照明。在这种情况下，光源与相机共同移动，动态改变场景外观，这使得浅水恢复方法不够充分。特别是对于多光源系统（如今由数十个 LED 组成），校准每个光源非常耗时、容易出错且繁琐，而且我们观察到只有相机观察范围内的集成照明才是关键，而不是单个光源。因此，本文的关键思想是在穿过相机的视锥体时，利用物体或海底的外观变化。通过假设朗伯表面的新约束，相应的图像像素约束相机前面的光场，并且对于每个体素，信号因子和反向散射值存储在体积网格中，可用于相机光平台的非常有效的图像恢复，这有助于对大型 3D 模型和地图进行一致的纹理处理，否则这些模型和地图将由照明和介质伪像主导。为了验证我们方法的有效性，我们对模拟和真实数据集进行了广泛的实验。这些实验的结果证明了我们的方法在恢复物体真实反照率方面的稳健性，同时减轻了照明和介质效果的影响。此外，我们证明我们的方法可以轻松扩展到其他场景，包括人工照明的空中成像或其他类似情况。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在复杂光照条件下进行水下图像复原的先进方法，特别针对深海环境中人工光源的动态变化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有水下图像复原方法主要针对浅水区自然光照场景，难以应对深海区域人工光源动态变化及多光源校准困难的问题。
AI.method: 通过利用物体或海床在摄像机视锥体内的外观变化，结合兰伯特表面假设，构建体素网格存储信号因子和散射值，实现高效图像复原。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效恢复物体真实反照率，降低光照和介质效应影响，并可扩展至其他人工照明场景。
AI.conclusion: 提出的体素网格方法为深海大范围三维建模提供了鲁棒的光照校正方案，具有广泛的应用前景。

search_text: Advanced Underwater Image Restoration in Complex Illumination Conditions 复杂光照条件下的先进水下图像恢复 Underwater image restoration has been a challenging problem for decades since the advent of underwater photography. Most solutions focus on shallow water scenarios, where the scene is uniformly illuminated by the sunlight. However, the vast majority of uncharted underwater terrain is located beyond 200 meters depth where natural light is scarce and artificial illumination is needed. In such cases, light sources co-moving with the camera, dynamically change the scene appearance, which make shallow water restoration methods inadequate. In particular for multi-light source systems (composed of dozens of LEDs nowadays), calibrating each light is time-consuming, error-prone and tedious, and we observe that only the integrated illumination within the viewing volume of the camera is critical, rather than the individual light sources. The key idea of this paper is therefore to exploit the appearance changes of objects or the seafloor, when traversing the viewing frustum of the camera. Through new constraints assuming Lambertian surfaces, corresponding image pixels constrain the light field in front of the camera, and for each voxel a signal factor and a backscatter value are stored in a volumetric grid that can be used for very efficient image restoration of camera-light platforms, which facilitates consistently texturing large 3D models and maps that would otherwise be dominated by lighting and medium artifacts. To validate the effectiveness of our approach, we conducted extensive experiments on simulated and real-world datasets. The results of these experiments demonstrate the robustness of our approach in restoring the true albedo of objects, while mitigating the influence of lighting and medium effects. Furthermore, we demonstrate our approach can be readily extended to other scenarios, including in-air imaging with artificial illumination or other similar cases. 自水下摄影出现以来的几十年里，水下图像恢复一直是一个具有挑战性的问题。大多数解决方案都专注于浅水场景，其中场景被阳光均匀照亮。然而，绝大多数未知的水下地形位于200米深度以上，自然光稀缺，需要人工照明。在这种情况下，光源与相机共同移动，动态改变场景外观，这使得浅水恢复方法不够充分。特别是对于多光源系统（如今由数十个 LED 组成），校准每个光源非常耗时、容易出错且繁琐，而且我们观察到只有相机观察范围内的集成照明才是关键，而不是单个光源。因此，本文的关键思想是在穿过相机的视锥体时，利用物体或海底的外观变化。通过假设朗伯表面的新约束，相应的图像像素约束相机前面的光场，并且对于每个体素，信号因子和反向散射值存储在体积网格中，可用于相机光平台的非常有效的图像恢复，这有助于对大型 3D 模型和地图进行一致的纹理处理，否则这些模型和地图将由照明和介质伪像主导。为了验证我们方法的有效性，我们对模拟和真实数据集进行了广泛的实验。这些实验的结果证明了我们的方法在恢复物体真实反照率方面的稳健性，同时减轻了照明和介质效果的影响。此外，我们证明我们的方法可以轻松扩展到其他场景，包括人工照明的空中成像或其他类似情况。 本文提出了一种在复杂光照条件下进行水下图像复原的先进方法，特别针对深海环境中人工光源的动态变化问题。 Yifan Song,Mengkun She,Kevin Köser cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Axel Laborieux,Friedemann Zenke
title: Improving equilibrium propagation without weight symmetry through Jacobian homeostasis
title_zh: 通过雅可比稳态改善平衡传播，无需重量对称
abstract: Equilibrium propagation (EP) is a compelling alternative to the backpropagation of error algorithm (BP) for computing gradients of neural networks on biological or analog neuromorphic substrates. Still, the algorithm requires weight symmetry and infinitesimal equilibrium perturbations, i.e., nudges, to estimate unbiased gradients efficiently. Both requirements are challenging to implement in physical systems. Yet, whether and how weight asymmetry affects its applicability is unknown because, in practice, it may be masked by biases introduced through the finite nudge. To address this question, we study generalized EP, which can be formulated without weight symmetry, and analytically isolate the two sources of bias. For complex-differentiable non-symmetric networks, we show that the finite nudge does not pose a problem, as exact derivatives can still be estimated via a Cauchy integral. In contrast, weight asymmetry introduces bias resulting in low task performance due to poor alignment of EP's neuronal error vectors compared to BP. To mitigate this issue, we present a new homeostatic objective that directly penalizes functional asymmetries of the Jacobian at the network's fixed point. This homeostatic objective dramatically improves the network's ability to solve complex tasks such as ImageNet 32x32. Our results lay the theoretical groundwork for studying and mitigating the adverse effects of imperfections of physical networks on learning algorithms that rely on the substrate's relaxation dynamics.
summary: Equilibrium propagation (EP) is a compelling alternative to the backpropagation of error algorithm (BP) for computing gradients of neural networks on biological or analog neuromorphic substrates. Still, the algorithm requires weight symmetry and infinitesimal equilibrium perturbations, i.e., nudges, to estimate unbiased gradients efficiently. Both requirements are challenging to implement in physical systems. Yet, whether and how weight asymmetry affects its applicability is unknown because, in practice, it may be masked by biases introduced through the finite nudge. To address this question, we study generalized EP, which can be formulated without weight symmetry, and analytically isolate the two sources of bias. For complex-differentiable non-symmetric networks, we show that the finite nudge does not pose a problem, as exact derivatives can still be estimated via a Cauchy integral. In contrast, weight asymmetry introduces bias resulting in low task performance due to poor alignment of EP's neuronal error vectors compared to BP. To mitigate this issue, we present a new homeostatic objective that directly penalizes functional asymmetries of the Jacobian at the network's fixed point. This homeostatic objective dramatically improves the network's ability to solve complex tasks such as ImageNet 32x32. Our results lay the theoretical groundwork for studying and mitigating the adverse effects of imperfections of physical networks on learning algorithms that rely on the substrate's relaxation dynamics.
abstract_zh: 平衡传播 (EP) 是误差反向传播算法 (BP) 的一个引人注目的替代方案，用于计算生物或模拟神经形态基底上的神经网络梯度。尽管如此，该算法仍然需要权重对称性和无穷小的平衡扰动（即微移）来有效地估计无偏梯度。这两个要求在物理系统中实现起来都具有挑战性。然而，权重不对称是否以及如何影响其适用性尚不清楚，因为在实践中，它可能会被有限微调引入的偏差所掩盖。为了解决这个问题，我们研究了广义 EP，它可以在没有权重对称性的情况下制定，并分析隔离这两个偏差来源。对于复数可微非对称网络，我们表明有限微移不会造成问题，因为精确导数仍然可以通过柯西积分来估计。相反，权重不对称会引入偏差，导致任务性能较低，因为与 BP 相比，EP 的神经元误差向量对齐较差。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一个新的稳态目标，它直接惩罚网络固定点雅可比行列式的功能不对称性。这种稳态目标极大地提高了网络解决 ImageNet 32​​x32 等复杂任务的能力。我们的结果为研究和减轻物理网络缺陷对依赖于基底松弛动力学的学习算法的不利影响奠定了理论基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过雅可比稳态机制改进无需权重对称性的平衡传播算法，以解决神经网络梯度计算中的物理系统实现难题。
AI.motivation: 平衡传播（EP）虽可替代反向传播，但依赖权重对称性和微小扰动，难以在物理系统中实现。权重不对称性对EP性能的影响尚不明确，需研究其影响及缓解方法。
AI.method: 提出广义EP框架，分析权重不对称性与有限扰动的偏差来源，针对复数可微网络采用柯西积分法，并设计雅可比矩阵稳态目标函数以抑制功能不对称性。
AI.result: 新方法显著提升网络在ImageNet 32x32等复杂任务的表现，验证了雅可比稳态目标对缓解权重不对称性偏差的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 研究为物理网络不完美性对依赖弛豫动力学的学习算法的影响提供了理论基础，为生物或类脑计算系统优化梯度计算开辟新方向。

authors_text: Paolo Cudrano,Matteo Bellusci,Giuseppe Macino,Matteo Matteucci
title: Continual Cross-Dataset Adaptation in Road Surface Classification
title_zh: 路面分类中的持续跨数据集适应
comment: To be published in Proceedings of 26th IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC 2023)
comments: To be published in Proceedings of 26th IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC 2023)
abstract: Accurate road surface classification is crucial for autonomous vehicles (AVs) to optimize driving conditions, enhance safety, and enable advanced road mapping. However, deep learning models for road surface classification suffer from poor generalization when tested on unseen datasets. To update these models with new information, also the original training dataset must be taken into account, in order to avoid catastrophic forgetting. This is, however, inefficient if not impossible, e.g., when the data is collected in streams or large amounts. To overcome this limitation and enable fast and efficient cross-dataset adaptation, we propose to employ continual learning finetuning methods designed to retain past knowledge while adapting to new data, thus effectively avoiding forgetting. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of this approach over naive finetuning, achieving performance close to fresh retraining. While solving this known problem, we also provide a general description of how the same technique can be adopted in other AV scenarios. We highlight the potential computational and economic benefits that a continual-based adaptation can bring to the AV industry, while also reducing greenhouse emissions due to unnecessary joint retraining.
summary: Accurate road surface classification is crucial for autonomous vehicles (AVs) to optimize driving conditions, enhance safety, and enable advanced road mapping. However, deep learning models for road surface classification suffer from poor generalization when tested on unseen datasets. To update these models with new information, also the original training dataset must be taken into account, in order to avoid catastrophic forgetting. This is, however, inefficient if not impossible, e.g., when the data is collected in streams or large amounts. To overcome this limitation and enable fast and efficient cross-dataset adaptation, we propose to employ continual learning finetuning methods designed to retain past knowledge while adapting to new data, thus effectively avoiding forgetting. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of this approach over naive finetuning, achieving performance close to fresh retraining. While solving this known problem, we also provide a general description of how the same technique can be adopted in other AV scenarios. We highlight the potential computational and economic benefits that a continual-based adaptation can bring to the AV industry, while also reducing greenhouse emissions due to unnecessary joint retraining.
abstract_zh: 准确的路面分类对于自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 优化驾驶条件、提高安全性和实现高级道路测绘至关重要。然而，在未见过的数据集上进行测试时，用于路面分类的深度学习模型泛化性较差。为了用新信息更新这些模型，还必须考虑原始训练数据集，以避免灾难性遗忘。然而，这即使不是不可能，也是低效的，例如，当数据以流的形式或大量收集时。为了克服这一限制并实现快速有效的跨数据集适应，我们建议采用持续学习微调方法，旨在保留过去的知识，同时适应新数据，从而有效避免遗忘。实验结果证明了这种方法相对于朴素微调的优越性，实现了接近新再训练的性能。在解决这个已知问题的同时，我们还提供了如何在其他 AV 场景中采用相同技术的一般描述。我们强调基于持续的适应可以为自动驾驶行业带来潜在的计算和经济效益，同时还可以减少由于不必要的联合再培训而产生的温室气体排放。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种持续学习微调方法，解决道路表面分类模型在跨数据集适应时的泛化能力差和灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在未见过的数据集上泛化能力不足，且传统更新方法需重新训练原始数据，导致效率低下且难以处理流式数据。
AI.method: 采用持续学习框架下的微调技术，在更新模型时保留历史知识，实现跨数据集的高效适应。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法性能接近重新训练，优于传统微调，且能有效避免遗忘。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅解决道路分类问题，还可推广至其他自动驾驶场景，带来计算成本降低和环保效益。

Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of this approach over naive finetuning, achieving performance close to fresh retraining. While solving this known problem, we also provide a general description of how the same technique can be adopted in other AV scenarios. We highlight the potential computational and economic benefits that a continual-based adaptation can bring to the AV industry, while also reducing greenhouse emissions due to unnecessary joint retraining. 准确的路面分类对于自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 优化驾驶条件、提高安全性和实现高级道路测绘至关重要。然而，在未见过的数据集上进行测试时，用于路面分类的深度学习模型泛化性较差。为了用新信息更新这些模型，还必须考虑原始训练数据集，以避免灾难性遗忘。然而，这即使不是不可能，也是低效的，例如，当数据以流的形式或大量收集时。为了克服这一限制并实现快速有效的跨数据集适应，我们建议采用持续学习微调方法，旨在保留过去的知识，同时适应新数据，从而有效避免遗忘。实验结果证明了这种方法相对于朴素微调的优越性，实现了接近新再训练的性能。在解决这个已知问题的同时，我们还提供了如何在其他 AV 场景中采用相同技术的一般描述。我们强调基于持续的适应可以为自动驾驶行业带来潜在的计算和经济效益，同时还可以减少由于不必要的联合再培训而产生的温室气体排放。 本文提出一种持续学习微调方法，解决道路表面分类模型在跨数据集适应时的泛化能力差和灾难性遗忘问题。 Paolo Cudrano,Matteo Bellusci,Giuseppe Macino,Matteo Matteucci cs.CV

authors_text: Thai Ngoc Toan Truong,Thanh-Huy Nguyen,Ba Thinh Lam,Vu Minh Duy Nguyen,Hong Phuc Nguyen
title: Delving into Ipsilateral Mammogram Assessment under Multi-View Network
title_zh: 多视角网络下同侧乳腺X线检查评估探讨
abstract: In many recent years, multi-view mammogram analysis has been focused widely on AI-based cancer assessment. In this work, we aim to explore diverse fusion strategies (average and concatenate) and examine the model's learning behavior with varying individuals and fusion pathways, involving Coarse Layer and Fine Layer. The Ipsilateral Multi-View Network, comprising five fusion types (Pre, Early, Middle, Last, and Post Fusion) in ResNet-18, is employed. Notably, the Middle Fusion emerges as the most balanced and effective approach, enhancing deep-learning models' generalization performance by +2.06% (concatenate) and +5.29% (average) in VinDr-Mammo dataset and +2.03% (concatenate) and +3% (average) in CMMD dataset on macro F1-Score. The paper emphasizes the crucial role of layer assignment in multi-view network extraction with various strategies.
summary: In many recent years, multi-view mammogram analysis has been focused widely on AI-based cancer assessment. In this work, we aim to explore diverse fusion strategies (average and concatenate) and examine the model's learning behavior with varying individuals and fusion pathways, involving Coarse Layer and Fine Layer. The Ipsilateral Multi-View Network, comprising five fusion types (Pre, Early, Middle, Last, and Post Fusion) in ResNet-18, is employed. Notably, the Middle Fusion emerges as the most balanced and effective approach, enhancing deep-learning models' generalization performance by +2.06% (concatenate) and +5.29% (average) in VinDr-Mammo dataset and +2.03% (concatenate) and +3% (average) in CMMD dataset on macro F1-Score. The paper emphasizes the crucial role of layer assignment in multi-view network extraction with various strategies.
abstract_zh: 近年来，多视图乳房X光检查分析已广泛关注基于人工智能的癌症评估。在这项工作中，我们的目标是探索不同的融合策略（平均和连接），并检查模型在不同个体和融合路径下的学习行为，包括粗层和精细层。采用 ResNet-18 中的同侧多视图网络，包括五种融合类型（融合前、融合前、融合中、融合后和融合后）。值得注意的是，Middle Fusion 是最平衡、最有效的方法，在宏观 F1-Score 上，VinDr-Mammo 数据集深度学习模型的泛化性能提高了 2.06%（连接）和 5.29%（平均），CMMD 数据集提高了 2.03%（连接）和 3%（平均）。本文强调了层分配在采用各种策略的多视图网络提取中的关键作用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在多视图网络中对同侧乳腺X光片进行评估的多种融合策略，以提升AI在乳腺癌检测中的性能。
AI.motivation: 近年来，基于AI的多视图乳腺X光片分析在乳腺癌评估中受到广泛关注，但如何有效融合多视图信息以提高模型性能仍是研究重点。
AI.method: 该研究采用了Ipsilateral Multi-View Network，并在ResNet-18中引入了五种融合方式（预融合、早期融合、中期融合、晚期融合和后融合），通过比较不同融合策略在粗层和细层中的表现，评估模型的学习行为。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，中期融合策略在VinDr-Mammo数据集上分别提升了2.06%（拼接）和5.29%（平均）的宏F1分数，在CMMD数据集上分别提升了2.03%（拼接）和3%（平均）。
AI.conclusion: 本文强调了在多视图网络中，不同层分配策略对模型性能的重要影响，中期融合策略在提升模型泛化能力方面表现最佳。

authors_text: Renyu Zhu,Chengcheng Han,Yong Qian,Qiushi Sun,Xiang Li,Ming Gao,Xuezhi Cao,Yunsen Xian
title: Exchanging-based Multimodal Fusion with Transformer
title_zh: 基于交换的 Transformer 多模态融合
abstract: We study the problem of multimodal fusion in this paper. Recent exchanging-based methods have been proposed for vision-vision fusion, which aim to exchange embeddings learned from one modality to the other. However, most of them project inputs of multimodalities into different low-dimensional spaces and cannot be applied to the sequential input data. To solve these issues, in this paper, we propose a novel exchanging-based multimodal fusion model MuSE for text-vision fusion based on Transformer. We first use two encoders to separately map multimodal inputs into different low-dimensional spaces. Then we employ two decoders to regularize the embeddings and pull them into the same space. The two decoders capture the correlations between texts and images with the image captioning task and the text-to-image generation task, respectively. Further, based on the regularized embeddings, we present CrossTransformer, which uses two Transformer encoders with shared parameters as the backbone model to exchange knowledge between multimodalities. Specifically, CrossTransformer first learns the global contextual information of the inputs in the shallow layers. After that, it performs inter-modal exchange by selecting a proportion of tokens in one modality and replacing their embeddings with the average of embeddings in the other modality. We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate the performance of MuSE on the Multimodal Named Entity Recognition task and the Multimodal Sentiment Analysis task. Our results show the superiority of MuSE against other competitors. Our code and data are provided at https://github.com/RecklessRonan/MuSE.
summary: We study the problem of multimodal fusion in this paper. Recent exchanging-based methods have been proposed for vision-vision fusion, which aim to exchange embeddings learned from one modality to the other. However, most of them project inputs of multimodalities into different low-dimensional spaces and cannot be applied to the sequential input data. To solve these issues, in this paper, we propose a novel exchanging-based multimodal fusion model MuSE for text-vision fusion based on Transformer. We first use two encoders to separately map multimodal inputs into different low-dimensional spaces. Then we employ two decoders to regularize the embeddings and pull them into the same space. The two decoders capture the correlations between texts and images with the image captioning task and the text-to-image generation task, respectively. Further, based on the regularized embeddings, we present CrossTransformer, which uses two Transformer encoders with shared parameters as the backbone model to exchange knowledge between multimodalities. Specifically, CrossTransformer first learns the global contextual information of the inputs in the shallow layers. After that, it performs inter-modal exchange by selecting a proportion of tokens in one modality and replacing their embeddings with the average of embeddings in the other modality. We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate the performance of MuSE on the Multimodal Named Entity Recognition task and the Multimodal Sentiment Analysis task. Our results show the superiority of MuSE against other competitors. Our code and data are provided at https://github.com/RecklessRonan/MuSE.
abstract_zh: 我们在本文中研究了多模态融合问题。最近提出了基于交换的方法用于视觉-视觉融合，其目的是将从一种模态学到的嵌入交换到另一种模态。然而，它们大多数将多模态的输入投影到不同的低维空间中，并且不能应用于顺序输入数据。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的新型基于交换的多模态融合模型 MuSE，用于文本视觉融合。我们首先使用两个编码器将多模态输入分别映射到不同的低维空间。然后我们使用两个解码器来规范嵌入并将它们拉入同一空间。两个解码器分别通过图像字幕任务和文本到图像生成任务捕获文本和图像之间的相关性。此外，基于正则化嵌入，我们提出了 CrossTransformer，它使用两个具有共享参数的 Transformer 编码器作为骨干模型来在多模态之间交换知识。具体来说，CrossTransformer 首先学习浅层输入的全局上下文信息。之后，它通过选择一种模态中的一定比例的令牌并将其嵌入替换为另一种模态中嵌入的平均值来执行模间交换。我们进行了大量的实验来评估 MuSE 在多模态命名实体识别任务和多模态情感分析任务上的性能。我们的结果显示了 MuSE 相对于其他竞争对手的优势。我们的代码和数据位于 https://github.com/RecklessRonan/MuSE。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的多模态融合模型MuSE，解决文本-视觉融合中的跨模态对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有交换式多模态方法无法处理序列输入且局限于视觉-视觉融合，缺乏对文本与视觉模态间复杂关联的建模能力。
AI.method: 构建双编码器映射多模态输入至低维空间，通过图像描述与文生图任务的双解码器正则化嵌入；设计共享参数的CrossTransformer模块，通过跨模态token替换实现知识交换。
AI.result: 在多模态命名实体识别和情感分析任务中，MuSE相较其他方法取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: MuSE通过结构化跨模态交互机制有效提升了文本-视觉融合效果，为多模态学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Elvys Linhares Pontes,Mohamed Benjannet,Lam Kim Ming
title: Leveraging BERT Language Models for Multi-Lingual ESG Issue Identification
title_zh: 利用 BERT 语言模型进行多语言 ESG 问题识别
abstract: Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) has been used as a metric to measure the negative impacts and enhance positive outcomes of companies in areas such as the environment, society, and governance. Recently, investors have increasingly recognized the significance of ESG criteria in their investment choices, leading businesses to integrate ESG principles into their operations and strategies. The Multi-Lingual ESG Issue Identification (ML-ESG) shared task encompasses the classification of news documents into 35 distinct ESG issue labels. In this study, we explored multiple strategies harnessing BERT language models to achieve accurate classification of news documents across these labels. Our analysis revealed that the RoBERTa classifier emerged as one of the most successful approaches, securing the second-place position for the English test dataset, and sharing the fifth-place position for the French test dataset. Furthermore, our SVM-based binary model tailored for the Chinese language exhibited exceptional performance, earning the second-place rank on the test dataset.
summary: Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) has been used as a metric to measure the negative impacts and enhance positive outcomes of companies in areas such as the environment, society, and governance. Recently, investors have increasingly recognized the significance of ESG criteria in their investment choices, leading businesses to integrate ESG principles into their operations and strategies. The Multi-Lingual ESG Issue Identification (ML-ESG) shared task encompasses the classification of news documents into 35 distinct ESG issue labels. In this study, we explored multiple strategies harnessing BERT language models to achieve accurate classification of news documents across these labels. Our analysis revealed that the RoBERTa classifier emerged as one of the most successful approaches, securing the second-place position for the English test dataset, and sharing the fifth-place position for the French test dataset. Furthermore, our SVM-based binary model tailored for the Chinese language exhibited exceptional performance, earning the second-place rank on the test dataset.
abstract_zh: 环境、社会和治理（ESG）已被用作衡量公司在环境、社会和治理等领域的负面影响和增强公司积极成果的指标。近年来，投资者越来越认识到ESG标准在投资选择中的重要性，促使企业将ESG原则融入其运营和战略中。多语言 ESG 问题识别 (ML-ESG) 共享任务包括将新闻文档分类为 35 个不同的 ESG 问题标签。在这项研究中，我们探索了利用 BERT 语言模型的多种策略来实现跨这些标签的新闻文档的准确分类。我们的分析表明，RoBERTa 分类器成为最成功的方法之一，在英语测试数据集上获得第二名的位置，并在法语测试数据集上并列第五名的位置。此外，我们为中文量身定制的基于 SVM 的二元模型表现出了出色的性能，在测试数据集上获得了第二名。

AI.tldr: 本研究探索使用BERT语言模型进行多语言ESG议题分类任务，针对英语、法语和中文新闻文档进行35类ESG标签分类。
AI.motivation: 随着ESG投资重要性提升，需有效识别企业相关议题。现有方法在多语言场景下存在分类准确率不足的问题，需探索更优的自然语言处理模型方案。
AI.method: 采用RoBERTa分类器处理英语和法语数据，针对中文数据构建基于SVM的二分类模型，通过微调预训练BERT模型实现跨语言ESG议题识别。
AI.result: RoBERTa在英语测试集排名第二，法语测试集并列第五；中文SVM模型在测试集排名第二，验证了不同语言适配模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: BERT系列模型在多语言ESG分类任务中表现优异，但需针对不同语言特性调整模型结构，未来可探索更精细化的跨语言迁移学习方法。

authors_text: Yue Wu,Sicheng Xu,Jianfeng Xiang,Fangyun Wei,Qifeng Chen,Jiaolong Yang,Xin Tong
title: AniPortraitGAN: Animatable 3D Portrait Generation from 2D Image Collections
title_zh: AniPortraitGAN：从 2D 图像集合生成可动画的 3D 肖像
abstract: Previous animatable 3D-aware GANs for human generation have primarily focused on either the human head or full body. However, head-only videos are relatively uncommon in real life, and full body generation typically does not deal with facial expression control and still has challenges in generating high-quality results. Towards applicable video avatars, we present an animatable 3D-aware GAN that generates portrait images with controllable facial expression, head pose, and shoulder movements. It is a generative model trained on unstructured 2D image collections without using 3D or video data. For the new task, we base our method on the generative radiance manifold representation and equip it with learnable facial and head-shoulder deformations. A dual-camera rendering and adversarial learning scheme is proposed to improve the quality of the generated faces, which is critical for portrait images. A pose deformation processing network is developed to generate plausible deformations for challenging regions such as long hair. Experiments show that our method, trained on unstructured 2D images, can generate diverse and high-quality 3D portraits with desired control over different properties.
summary: Previous animatable 3D-aware GANs for human generation have primarily focused on either the human head or full body. However, head-only videos are relatively uncommon in real life, and full body generation typically does not deal with facial expression control and still has challenges in generating high-quality results. Towards applicable video avatars, we present an animatable 3D-aware GAN that generates portrait images with controllable facial expression, head pose, and shoulder movements. It is a generative model trained on unstructured 2D image collections without using 3D or video data. For the new task, we base our method on the generative radiance manifold representation and equip it with learnable facial and head-shoulder deformations. A dual-camera rendering and adversarial learning scheme is proposed to improve the quality of the generated faces, which is critical for portrait images. A pose deformation processing network is developed to generate plausible deformations for challenging regions such as long hair. Experiments show that our method, trained on unstructured 2D images, can generate diverse and high-quality 3D portraits with desired control over different properties.
abstract_zh: 之前用于人类生成的可动画 3D 感知 GAN 主要关注人类头部或全身。然而，仅头部视频在现实生活中相对罕见，全身生成通常不涉及面部表情控制，并且在生成高质量结果方面仍然面临挑战。针对适用的视频头像，我们提出了一种可动画的 3D 感知 GAN，它可以生成具有可控面部表情、头部姿势和肩膀运动的肖像图像。它是一种在非结构化 2D 图像集合上训练的生成模型，不使用 3D 或视频数据。对于新任务，我们的方法基于生成辐射流形表示，并为其配备可学习的面部和头肩变形。提出了双摄像头渲染和对抗性学习方案来提高生成的人脸质量，这对于肖像图像至关重要。开发了姿势变形处理网络来为长发等具有挑战性的区域生成合理的变形。实验表明，我们的方法在非结构化 2D 图像上进行训练，可以生成多样化且高质量的 3D 肖像，并对不同属性进行所需的控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AniPortraitGAN，一种从2D图像集合生成可控动画3D人像的生成对抗网络。
AI.motivation: 现有可动画的3D生成模型要么专注头部要么专注全身，但头部视频稀缺且全身生成难以控制面部表情，高质量生成仍具挑战。
AI.method: 基于生成辐射流形表示，引入可学习的面部及肩部变形模块，结合双摄像头渲染与对抗学习方案，并开发姿态变形网络处理复杂区域如长发。
AI.result: 模型在无3D/视频数据条件下，通过2D图像训练生成具有可控表情、姿态及肩部运动的高质量3D人像。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为创建可控动画人像提供了新范式，验证了仅依赖2D图像进行高精度3D可动画生成的可行性。

authors_text: Yuxiang Yang,Yingqi Deng,Mian Pan,Zheng-Jun Zha,Jing Zhang
title: BEVTrack: A Simple and Strong Baseline for 3D Single Object Tracking in Bird's-Eye View
title_zh: BEVTrack：鸟瞰图 3D 单对象跟踪的简单而强大的基线
abstract: 3D Single Object Tracking (SOT) is a fundamental task in computer vision and plays a critical role in applications like autonomous driving. However, existing algorithms often involve complex designs and multiple loss functions, making model training and deployment challenging. Furthermore, their reliance on fixed probability distribution assumptions (e.g., Laplacian or Gaussian) hinders their ability to adapt to diverse target characteristics such as varying sizes and motion patterns, ultimately affecting tracking precision and robustness. To address these issues, we propose BEVTrack, a simple yet effective motion-based tracking method. BEVTrack directly estimates object motion in Bird's-Eye View (BEV) using a single regression loss. To enhance accuracy for targets with diverse attributes, it learns adaptive likelihood functions tailored to individual targets, avoiding the limitations of fixed distribution assumptions in previous methods. This approach provides valuable priors for tracking and significantly boosts performance. Comprehensive experiments on KITTI, NuScenes, and Waymo Open Dataset demonstrate that BEVTrack achieves state-of-the-art results while operating at 200 FPS, enabling real-time applicability. The code will be released at https://github.com/xmm-prio/BEVTrack.
summary: 3D Single Object Tracking (SOT) is a fundamental task in computer vision and plays a critical role in applications like autonomous driving. However, existing algorithms often involve complex designs and multiple loss functions, making model training and deployment challenging. Furthermore, their reliance on fixed probability distribution assumptions (e.g., Laplacian or Gaussian) hinders their ability to adapt to diverse target characteristics such as varying sizes and motion patterns, ultimately affecting tracking precision and robustness. To address these issues, we propose BEVTrack, a simple yet effective motion-based tracking method. BEVTrack directly estimates object motion in Bird's-Eye View (BEV) using a single regression loss. To enhance accuracy for targets with diverse attributes, it learns adaptive likelihood functions tailored to individual targets, avoiding the limitations of fixed distribution assumptions in previous methods. This approach provides valuable priors for tracking and significantly boosts performance. Comprehensive experiments on KITTI, NuScenes, and Waymo Open Dataset demonstrate that BEVTrack achieves state-of-the-art results while operating at 200 FPS, enabling real-time applicability. The code will be released at https://github.com/xmm-prio/BEVTrack.
abstract_zh: 3D 单目标跟踪 (SOT) 是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务，在自动驾驶等应用中发挥着关键作用。然而，现有算法通常涉及复杂的设计和多个损失函数，使得模型训练和部署具有挑战性。此外，它们对固定概率分布假设（例如拉普拉斯或高斯）的依赖阻碍了它们适应不同目标特征（例如不同尺寸和运动模式）的能力，最终影响跟踪精度和鲁棒性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 BEVTrack，一种简单而有效的基于运动的跟踪方法。 BEVTrack 使用单个回归损失直接估计鸟瞰图 (BEV) 中的对象运动。为了提高具有不同属性的目标的准确性，它学习针对单个目标定制的自适应似然函数，避免了先前方法中固定分布假设的局限性。这种方法为跟踪提供了有价值的先验，并显着提高了性能。对 KITTI、NuScenes 和 Waymo 开放数据集的综合实验表明，BEVTrack 在以 200 FPS 运行时实现了最先进的结果，实现了实时适用性。代码将在 https://github.com/xmm-prio/BEVTrack 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BEVTrack，一种基于鸟瞰图的简单高效的3D单目标跟踪方法。
AI.motivation: 现有3D单目标跟踪算法设计复杂、依赖固定概率分布假设，难以适应目标多样性和运动模式变化，影响跟踪精度与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过单回归损失直接估计鸟瞰图中目标运动，学习针对个体目标的自适应似然函数，避免固定分布假设的局限性。
AI.result: 在KITTI、NuScenes和Waymo数据集上达到SOTA性能，实时性达200 FPS。
AI.conclusion: BEVTrack以简洁设计实现高精度跟踪，为复杂场景下的实时应用提供有效解决方案。

search_text: BEVTrack: A Simple and Strong Baseline for 3D Single Object Tracking in Bird's-Eye View BEVTrack：鸟瞰图 3D 单对象跟踪的简单而强大的基线 3D Single Object Tracking (SOT) is a fundamental task in computer vision and plays a critical role in applications like autonomous driving. However, existing algorithms often involve complex designs and multiple loss functions, making model training and deployment challenging. Furthermore, their reliance on fixed probability distribution assumptions (e.g., Laplacian or Gaussian) hinders their ability to adapt to diverse target characteristics such as varying sizes and motion patterns, ultimately affecting tracking precision and robustness. To address these issues, we propose BEVTrack, a simple yet effective motion-based tracking method. BEVTrack directly estimates object motion in Bird's-Eye View (BEV) using a single regression loss. To enhance accuracy for targets with diverse attributes, it learns adaptive likelihood functions tailored to individual targets, avoiding the limitations of fixed distribution assumptions in previous methods. This approach provides valuable priors for tracking and significantly boosts performance. Comprehensive experiments on KITTI, NuScenes, and Waymo Open Dataset demonstrate that BEVTrack achieves state-of-the-art results while operating at 200 FPS, enabling real-time applicability. The code will be released at https://github.com/xmm-prio/BEVTrack. 3D 单目标跟踪 (SOT) 是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务，在自动驾驶等应用中发挥着关键作用。然而，现有算法通常涉及复杂的设计和多个损失函数，使得模型训练和部署具有挑战性。此外，它们对固定概率分布假设（例如拉普拉斯或高斯）的依赖阻碍了它们适应不同目标特征（例如不同尺寸和运动模式）的能力，最终影响跟踪精度和鲁棒性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 BEVTrack，一种简单而有效的基于运动的跟踪方法。 BEVTrack 使用单个回归损失直接估计鸟瞰图 (BEV) 中的对象运动。为了提高具有不同属性的目标的准确性，它学习针对单个目标定制的自适应似然函数，避免了先前方法中固定分布假设的局限性。这种方法为跟踪提供了有价值的先验，并显着提高了性能。对 KITTI、NuScenes 和 Waymo 开放数据集的综合实验表明，BEVTrack 在以 200 FPS 运行时实现了最先进的结果，实现了实时适用性。代码将在 https://github.com/xmm-prio/BEVTrack 发布。 本文提出BEVTrack，一种基于鸟瞰图的简单高效的3D单目标跟踪方法。 Yuxiang Yang,Yingqi Deng,Mian Pan,Zheng-Jun Zha,Jing Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Christoforos Galazis,Anil Anthony Bharath,Marta Varela
title: High-resolution 3D Maps of Left Atrial Displacements using an Unsupervised Image Registration Neural Network
title_zh: 使用无监督图像配准神经网络绘制左心房位移的高分辨率 3D 地图
comment: ef:Medical Imaging with Deep Learning, short paper track, 2023
comments: ef:Medical Imaging with Deep Learning, short paper track, 2023
abstract: Functional analysis of the left atrium (LA) plays an increasingly important role in the prognosis and diagnosis of cardiovascular diseases. Echocardiography-based measurements of LA dimensions and strains are useful biomarkers, but they provide an incomplete picture of atrial deformations. High-resolution dynamic magnetic resonance images (Cine MRI) offer the opportunity to examine LA motion and deformation in 3D, at higher spatial resolution and with full LA coverage. However, there are no dedicated tools to automatically characterise LA motion in 3D. Thus, we propose a tool that automatically segments the LA and extracts the displacement fields across the cardiac cycle. The pipeline is able to accurately track the LA wall across the cardiac cycle with an average Hausdorff distance of $2.51 \pm 1.3~mm$ and Dice score of $0.96 \pm 0.02$.
summary: Functional analysis of the left atrium (LA) plays an increasingly important role in the prognosis and diagnosis of cardiovascular diseases. Echocardiography-based measurements of LA dimensions and strains are useful biomarkers, but they provide an incomplete picture of atrial deformations. High-resolution dynamic magnetic resonance images (Cine MRI) offer the opportunity to examine LA motion and deformation in 3D, at higher spatial resolution and with full LA coverage. However, there are no dedicated tools to automatically characterise LA motion in 3D. Thus, we propose a tool that automatically segments the LA and extracts the displacement fields across the cardiac cycle. The pipeline is able to accurately track the LA wall across the cardiac cycle with an average Hausdorff distance of $2.51 \pm 1.3~mm$ and Dice score of $0.96 \pm 0.02$.
abstract_zh: 左心房（LA）的功能分析在心血管疾病的预后和诊断中发挥着越来越重要的作用。基于超声心动图的左房尺寸和应变测量是有用的生物标志物，但它们提供的心房变形的完整图像。高分辨率动态磁共振图像 (Cine MRI) 提供了以更高的空间分辨率和完整的 LA 覆盖范围以 3D 方式检查 LA 运动和变形的机会。然而，没有专用工具可以自动表征 LA 运动的 3D 特征。因此，我们提出了一种自动分割 LA 并提取整个心动周期位移场的工具。该管道能够准确跟踪整个心动周期的 LA 壁，平均 Hausdorff 距离为 $2.51 \pm 1.3~mm$，Dice 得分为 $0.96 \pm 0.02$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无监督图像配准神经网络的工具，用于自动分割左心房并提取整个心动周期中的位移场，生成高分辨率的3D位移图。
AI.motivation: 左心房功能分析对心血管疾病的预后和诊断至关重要，但现有超声心动图测量方法无法全面反映心房变形，而高分辨率动态MRI虽能提供3D运动信息，却缺乏自动分析工具。
AI.method: 开发了一种无监督图像配准神经网络，通过自动分割左心房并追踪心动周期中的壁运动，结合Hausdorff距离和Dice评分评估分割精度。
AI.result: 该方法在左心房壁追踪中达到平均Hausdorff距离2.51±1.3mm和Dice评分为0.96±0.02，验证了其高精度。
AI.conclusion: 该工具为左心房3D运动分析提供了有效解决方案，可应用于心血管疾病的研究和临床评估。

authors_text: Erwin de Gelder,Olaf Op den Camp
title: A Quantitative Method to Determine What Collisions Are Reasonably Foreseeable and Preventable
title_zh: 确定哪些碰撞是可以合理预见和预防的定量方法
abstract: The development of Automated Driving Systems (ADSs) has made significant progress in the last years. To enable the deployment of Automated Vehicles (AVs) equipped with such ADSs, regulations concerning the approval of these systems need to be established. In 2021, the World Forum for Harmonization of Vehicle Regulations has approved a new United Nations regulation concerning the approval of Automated Lane Keeping Systems (ALKSs). An important aspect of this regulation is that "the activated system shall not cause any collisions that are reasonably foreseeable and preventable." The phrasing of "reasonably foreseeable and preventable" might be subjected to different interpretations and, therefore, this might result in disagreements among AV developers and the authorities that are requested to approve AVs. The objective of this work is to propose a method for quantifying what is "reasonably foreseeable and preventable". The proposed method considers the Operational Design Domain (ODD) of the system and can be applied to any ODD. Having a quantitative method for determining what is reasonably foreseeable and preventable provides developers, authorities, and the users of ADSs a better understanding of the residual risks to be expected when deploying these systems in real traffic. Using our proposed method, we can estimate what collisions are reasonably foreseeable and preventable. This will help in setting requirements regarding the safety of ADSs and can lead to stronger justification for design decisions and test coverage for developing ADSs.
summary: The development of Automated Driving Systems (ADSs) has made significant progress in the last years. To enable the deployment of Automated Vehicles (AVs) equipped with such ADSs, regulations concerning the approval of these systems need to be established. The objective of this work is to propose a method for quantifying what is "reasonably foreseeable and preventable". The proposed method considers the Operational Design Domain (ODD) of the system and can be applied to any ODD. Having a quantitative method for determining what is reasonably foreseeable and preventable provides developers, authorities, and the users of ADSs a better understanding of the residual risks to be expected when deploying these systems in real traffic. Using our proposed method, we can estimate what collisions are reasonably foreseeable and preventable. This will help in setting requirements regarding the safety of ADSs and can lead to stronger justification for design decisions and test coverage for developing ADSs.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶系统（ADS）的发展在过去几年中取得了重大进展。为了部署配备此类 ADS 的自动驾驶汽车 (AV)，需要制定有关批准这些系统的法规。 2021 年，世界车辆法规协调论坛批准了一项关于批准自动车道保持系统 (ALKS) 的联合国新法规。该规定的一个重要方面是“启动的系统不得造成任何可合理预见和预防的碰撞”。 “合理可预见和可预防”的措辞可能会受到不同的解释，因此，这可能会导致自动驾驶汽车开发商和被要求批准自动驾驶汽车的当局之间产生分歧。这项工作的目的是提出一种量化“合理可预见和可预防”的方法。所提出的方法考虑了系统的操作设计域（ODD）并且可以应用于任何ODD。通过定量方法来确定什么是合理可预见和可预防的，ADS 的开发人员、主管部门和用户可以更好地了解在实际交通中部署这些系统时预期的剩余风险。使用我们提出的方法，我们可以估计哪些碰撞是可以合理预见和预防的。这将有助于制定有关 ADS 安全性的要求，并为开发 ADS 的设计决策和测试覆盖范围提供更有力的理由。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种量化方法，用于确定自动驾驶系统（ADS）在特定操作设计域（ODD）中可能合理预见且可预防的碰撞。
AI.motivation: 随着自动驾驶技术的发展，现有法规中关于‘合理预见且可预防的碰撞’的表述存在歧义，导致开发者与监管机构在审批自动驾驶车辆时产生分歧，亟需量化标准以明确安全要求。
AI.method: 基于系统操作设计域（ODD）的特性，提出一种通用量化框架，通过分析碰撞在ODD内的可预见性与可预防性，评估残余风险。
AI.result: 该方法能够估算特定场景下可预见且可预防的碰撞，为制定ADS安全标准、设计决策及测试覆盖范围提供依据。
AI.conclusion: 量化方法有助于各方更清晰地理解ADS部署风险，推动法规落地并提升自动驾驶系统的安全性和可接受性。

The proposed method considers the Operational Design Domain (ODD) of the system and can be applied to any ODD. Having a quantitative method for determining what is reasonably foreseeable and preventable provides developers, authorities, and the users of ADSs a better understanding of the residual risks to be expected when deploying these systems in real traffic. Using our proposed method, we can estimate what collisions are reasonably foreseeable and preventable. This will help in setting requirements regarding the safety of ADSs and can lead to stronger justification for design decisions and test coverage for developing ADSs. 自动驾驶系统（ADS）的发展在过去几年中取得了重大进展。为了部署配备此类 ADS 的自动驾驶汽车 (AV)，需要制定有关批准这些系统的法规。 2021 年，世界车辆法规协调论坛批准了一项关于批准自动车道保持系统 (ALKS) 的联合国新法规。该规定的一个重要方面是“启动的系统不得造成任何可合理预见和预防的碰撞”。 “合理可预见和可预防”的措辞可能会受到不同的解释，因此，这可能会导致自动驾驶汽车开发商和被要求批准自动驾驶汽车的当局之间产生分歧。这项工作的目的是提出一种量化“合理可预见和可预防”的方法。所提出的方法考虑了系统的操作设计域（ODD）并且可以应用于任何ODD。通过定量方法来确定什么是合理可预见和可预防的，ADS 的开发人员、主管部门和用户可以更好地了解在实际交通中部署这些系统时预期的剩余风险。使用我们提出的方法，我们可以估计哪些碰撞是可以合理预见和预防的。这将有助于制定有关 ADS 安全性的要求，并为开发 ADS 的设计决策和测试覆盖范围提供更有力的理由。 本文提出一种量化方法，用于确定自动驾驶系统（ADS）在特定操作设计域（ODD）中可能合理预见且可预防的碰撞。 Erwin de Gelder,Olaf Op den Camp cs.RO

authors_text: Xintong Jiang,Yaxiong Wang,Yujiao Wu,Meng Wang,Xueming Qian
title: Dual Relation Alignment for Composed Image Retrieval
title_zh: 用于合成图像检索的双重关系对齐
comment: The architecture of our model changes, hence methodolgy and experiments changes a lot, We have significantly revised the original manuscript of the paper, so a withdraw of our original script is needed
comments: The architecture of our model changes, hence methodolgy and experiments changes a lot, We have significantly revised the original manuscript of the paper, so a withdraw of our original script is needed
abstract: Composed image retrieval, a task involving the search for a target image using a reference image and a complementary text as the query, has witnessed significant advancements owing to the progress made in cross-modal modeling. Unlike the general image-text retrieval problem with only one alignment relation, i.e., image-text, we argue for the existence of two types of relations in composed image retrieval. The explicit relation pertains to the reference image & complementary text-target image, which is commonly exploited by existing methods. Besides this intuitive relation, the observations during our practice have uncovered another implicit yet crucial relation, i.e., reference image & target image-complementary text, since we found that the complementary text can be inferred by studying the relation between the target image and the reference image. Regrettably, existing methods largely focus on leveraging the explicit relation to learn their networks, while overlooking the implicit relation. In response to this weakness, We propose a new framework for composed image retrieval, termed dual relation alignment, which integrates both explicit and implicit relations to fully exploit the correlations among the triplets. Specifically, we design a vision compositor to fuse reference image and target image at first, then the resulted representation will serve two roles: (1) counterpart for semantic alignment with the complementary text and (2) compensation for the complementary text to boost the explicit relation modeling, thereby implant the implicit relation into the alignment learning. Our method is evaluated on two popular datasets, CIRR and FashionIQ, through extensive experiments. The results confirm the effectiveness of our dual-relation learning in substantially enhancing composed image retrieval performance.

Unlike the general image-text retrieval problem with only one alignment relation, i.e., image-text, we argue for the existence of two types of relations in composed image retrieval. The explicit relation pertains to the reference image & complementary text-target image, which is commonly exploited by existing methods. Besides this intuitive relation, the observations during our practice have uncovered another implicit yet crucial relation, i.e., reference image & target image-complementary text, since we found that the complementary text can be inferred by studying the relation between the target image and the reference image. Regrettably, existing methods largely focus on leveraging the explicit relation to learn their networks, while overlooking the implicit relation. In response to this weakness, We propose a new framework for composed image retrieval, termed dual relation alignment, which integrates both explicit and implicit relations to fully exploit the correlations among the triplets. Specifically, we design a vision compositor to fuse reference image and target image at first, then the resulted representation will serve two roles: (1) counterpart for semantic alignment with the complementary text and (2) compensation for the complementary text to boost the explicit relation modeling, thereby implant the implicit relation into the alignment learning. Our method is evaluated on two popular datasets, CIRR and FashionIQ, through extensive experiments. The results confirm the effectiveness of our dual-relation learning in substantially enhancing composed image retrieval performance.
abstract_zh: 组合图像检索是一项涉及使用参考图像和补充文本作为查询来搜索目标图像的任务，由于跨模式建模的进步，该任务已经取得了显着的进步。与只有一种对齐关系（即图像文本）的一般图像文本检索问题不同，我们认为组合图像检索中存在两种类型的关系。显式关系涉及参考图像和互补文本目标图像，这是现有方法普遍利用的。除了这种直观的关系之外，我们实践中的观察发现了另一种隐含但至关重要的关系，即参考图像和目标图像-互补文本，因为我们发现可以通过研究目标图像和参考图像之间的关系来推断互补文本。遗憾的是，现有的方法主要侧重于利用显式关系来学习网络，而忽略了隐式关系。针对这一弱点，我们提出了一种新的组合图像检索框架，称为对偶关系对齐，它集成了显式和隐式关系，以充分利用三元组之间的相关性。具体来说，我们设计了一个视觉合成器，首先融合参考图像和目标图像，然后得到的表示将起到两个作用：（1）与互补文本进行语义对齐的对应部分；（2）对互补文本进行补偿以促进显式关系建模，从而将隐式关系植入到对齐学习中。我们的方法通过大量实验在两个流行的数据集 CIRR 和 FashionIQ 上进行了评估。结果证实了我们的双关系学习在显着增强组合图像检索性能方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双关系对齐框架，用于组合图像检索任务，通过同时利用显式和隐式关系提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注参考图像与互补文本-目标图像的显式关系，忽略了参考图像与目标图像可推导互补文本的隐式关系，导致信息利用不充分。
AI.method: 设计视觉组合器融合参考图像与目标图像，生成双重表征：一方面与互补文本进行语义对齐，另一方面补偿互补文本以增强显式关系建模，实现双关系联合学习。
AI.result: 在CIRR和FashionIQ数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于现有方法，验证了双关系学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 显式与隐式关系的联合建模能够更全面挖掘三元组关联，为组合图像检索提供新思路。

authors_text: Yiwei Bao,Feng Lu
title: PCFGaze: Physics-Consistent Feature for Appearance-based Gaze Estimation
title_zh: PCFGaze：基于外观的注视估计的物理一致特征
abstract: Although recent deep learning based gaze estimation approaches have achieved much improvement, we still know little about how gaze features are connected to the physics of gaze. In this paper, we try to answer this question by analyzing the gaze feature manifold. Our analysis revealed the insight that the geodesic distance between gaze features is consistent with the gaze differences between samples. According to this finding, we construct the Physics- Consistent Feature (PCF) in an analytical way, which connects gaze feature to the physical definition of gaze. We further propose the PCFGaze framework that directly optimizes gaze feature space by the guidance of PCF. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework alleviates the overfitting problem and significantly improves cross-domain gaze estimation accuracy without extra training data. The insight of gaze feature has the potential to benefit other regression tasks with physical meanings.
summary: Although recent deep learning based gaze estimation approaches have achieved much improvement, we still know little about how gaze features are connected to the physics of gaze. In this paper, we try to answer this question by analyzing the gaze feature manifold. Our analysis revealed the insight that the geodesic distance between gaze features is consistent with the gaze differences between samples. According to this finding, we construct the Physics- Consistent Feature (PCF) in an analytical way, which connects gaze feature to the physical definition of gaze. We further propose the PCFGaze framework that directly optimizes gaze feature space by the guidance of PCF. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework alleviates the overfitting problem and significantly improves cross-domain gaze estimation accuracy without extra training data. The insight of gaze feature has the potential to benefit other regression tasks with physical meanings.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近基于深度学习的注视估计方法已经取得了很大的进步，但我们仍然对注视特征如何与注视物理学相关联知之甚少。在本文中，我们尝试通过分析注视特征流形来回答这个问题。我们的分析揭示了注视特征之间的测地距离与样本之间的注视差异一致的见解。根据这一发现，我们以分析的方式构建了物理一致性特征（PCF），它将注视特征与注视的物理定义联系起来。我们进一步提出了 PCFGaze 框架，通过 PCF 的指导直接优化注视特征空间。实验结果表明，所提出的框架缓解了过度拟合问题，并在无需额外训练数据的情况下显着提高了跨域注视估计精度。注视特征的洞察力有可能使其他具有物理意义的回归任务受益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PCFGaze框架，通过构建物理一致特征（PCF）优化基于外观的凝视估计，提升跨域准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习凝视估计方法缺乏对凝视特征与物理规律关联性的理解，导致过拟合和跨域性能不足。
AI.method: 分析凝视特征流形的测地距离与物理差异的一致性，构建PCF并设计PCFGaze框架直接优化特征空间。
AI.result: 有效缓解过拟合问题，在无额外训练数据情况下显著提升跨域凝视估计精度。
AI.conclusion: 凝视特征的物理关联性洞察可拓展至其他具有物理意义的回归任务。
