authors_text: Dudi Biton,Aditi Misra,Efrat Levy,Jaidip Kotak,Ron Bitton,Roei Schuster,Nicolas Papernot,Yuval Elovici,Ben Nassi
title: The Adversarial Implications of Variable-Time Inference
title_zh: 可变时间推理的对抗性影响
abstract: Machine learning (ML) models are known to be vulnerable to a number of attacks that target the integrity of their predictions or the privacy of their training data. To carry out these attacks, a black-box adversary must typically possess the ability to query the model and observe its outputs (e.g., labels). In this work, we demonstrate, for the first time, the ability to enhance such decision-based attacks. To accomplish this, we present an approach that exploits a novel side channel in which the adversary simply measures the execution time of the algorithm used to post-process the predictions of the ML model under attack. The leakage of inference-state elements into algorithmic timing side channels has never been studied before, and we have found that it can contain rich information that facilitates superior timing attacks that significantly outperform attacks based solely on label outputs. In a case study, we investigate leakage from the non-maximum suppression (NMS) algorithm, which plays a crucial role in the operation of object detectors. In our examination of the timing side-channel vulnerabilities associated with this algorithm, we identified the potential to enhance decision-based attacks. We demonstrate attacks against the YOLOv3 detector, leveraging the timing leakage to successfully evade object detection using adversarial examples, and perform dataset inference. Our experiments show that our adversarial examples exhibit superior perturbation quality compared to a decision-based attack. In addition, we present a new threat model in which dataset inference based solely on timing leakage is performed. To address the timing leakage vulnerability inherent in the NMS algorithm, we explore the potential and limitations of implementing constant-time inference passes as a mitigation strategy.

In a case study, we investigate leakage from the non-maximum suppression (NMS) algorithm, which plays a crucial role in the operation of object detectors. In our examination of the timing side-channel vulnerabilities associated with this algorithm, we identified the potential to enhance decision-based attacks. We demonstrate attacks against the YOLOv3 detector, leveraging the timing leakage to successfully evade object detection using adversarial examples, and perform dataset inference. Our experiments show that our adversarial examples exhibit superior perturbation quality compared to a decision-based attack. In addition, we present a new threat model in which dataset inference based solely on timing leakage is performed. To address the timing leakage vulnerability inherent in the NMS algorithm, we explore the potential and limitations of implementing constant-time inference passes as a mitigation strategy.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，机器学习 (ML) 模型容易受到许多针对其预测完整性或训练数据隐私的攻击。为了进行这些攻击，黑盒对手通常必须具备查询模型并观察其输出（例如标签）的能力。在这项工作中，我们首次展示了增强此类基于决策的攻击的能力。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种利用新颖的侧通道的方法，其中对手只需测量用于对受攻击的 ML 模型的预测进行后处理的算法的执行时间。之前从未研究过将推理状态元素泄漏到算法定时侧通道中，并且我们发现它可以包含丰富的信息，有助于高级定时攻击，其性能明显优于仅基于标签输出的攻击。在一个案例研究中，我们研究了非极大值抑制（NMS）算法的泄漏，该算法在物体检测器的操作中起着至关重要的作用。在检查与该算法相关的定时侧信道漏洞时，我们发现了增强基于决策的攻击的潜力。我们演示了针对 YOLOv3 检测器的攻击，利用时序泄漏使用对抗性示例成功逃避对象检测，并执行数据集推断。我们的实验表明，与基于决策的攻击相比，我们的对抗性示例表现出卓越的扰动质量。此外，我们提出了一种新的威胁模型，其中仅基于时序泄漏执行数据集推断。为了解决 NMS 算法中固有的时序泄漏漏洞，我们探索了实现恒定时间推理过程作为缓解策略的潜力和局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用机器学习模型推理过程中的时间侧信道（如非极大值抑制算法的执行时间）来增强决策型攻击，通过时间信息泄露实现更高效的对抗样本生成和数据集推断。
AI.motivation: 现有攻击主要依赖模型输出标签，但未充分研究推理时间等侧信道信息的泄露风险。作者发现时间侧信道可能包含比标签更丰富的信息，可显著提升攻击效果。
AI.method: 通过测量目标模型（如YOLOv3）中非极大值抑制（NMS）算法的执行时间，构建时间侧信道攻击框架，结合对抗样本生成技术实现检测规避和数据集推断，并提出常量时间推理作为缓解方案。
AI.result: 实验表明时间侧信道攻击在扰动质量上优于传统标签攻击，成功实现目标检测规避，并提出仅基于时间泄露的数据集推断威胁模型，同时验证了常量时间推理的可行性与局限性。
AI.conclusion: 时间侧信道是新型安全威胁，需重新审视模型推理过程的时序特性，现有缓解方案存在实施难度与效率权衡问题，需进一步研究更全面的防御机制。

search_text: The Adversarial Implications of Variable-Time Inference 可变时间推理的对抗性影响 Machine learning (ML) models are known to be vulnerable to a number of attacks that target the integrity of their predictions or the privacy of their training data. To carry out these attacks, a black-box adversary must typically possess the ability to query the model and observe its outputs (e.g., labels). In this work, we demonstrate, for the first time, the ability to enhance such decision-based attacks. To accomplish this, we present an approach that exploits a novel side channel in which the adversary simply measures the execution time of the algorithm used to post-process the predictions of the ML model under attack. The leakage of inference-state elements into algorithmic timing side channels has never been studied before, and we have found that it can contain rich information that facilitates superior timing attacks that significantly outperform attacks based solely on label outputs. In a case study, we investigate leakage from the non-maximum suppression (NMS) algorithm, which plays a crucial role in the operation of object detectors. In our examination of the timing side-channel vulnerabilities associated with this algorithm, we identified the potential to enhance decision-based attacks. We demonstrate attacks against the YOLOv3 detector, leveraging the timing leakage to successfully evade object detection using adversarial examples, and perform dataset inference. Our experiments show that our adversarial examples exhibit superior perturbation quality compared to a decision-based attack. In addition, we present a new threat model in which dataset inference based solely on timing leakage is performed. To address the timing leakage vulnerability inherent in the NMS algorithm, we explore the potential and limitations of implementing constant-time inference passes as a mitigation strategy. 众所周知，机器学习 (ML) 模型容易受到许多针对其预测完整性或训练数据隐私的攻击。为了进行这些攻击，黑盒对手通常必须具备查询模型并观察其输出（例如标签）的能力。在这项工作中，我们首次展示了增强此类基于决策的攻击的能力。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种利用新颖的侧通道的方法，其中对手只需测量用于对受攻击的 ML 模型的预测进行后处理的算法的执行时间。之前从未研究过将推理状态元素泄漏到算法定时侧通道中，并且我们发现它可以包含丰富的信息，有助于高级定时攻击，其性能明显优于仅基于标签输出的攻击。在一个案例研究中，我们研究了非极大值抑制（NMS）算法的泄漏，该算法在物体检测器的操作中起着至关重要的作用。在检查与该算法相关的定时侧信道漏洞时，我们发现了增强基于决策的攻击的潜力。我们演示了针对 YOLOv3 检测器的攻击，利用时序泄漏使用对抗性示例成功逃避对象检测，并执行数据集推断。我们的实验表明，与基于决策的攻击相比，我们的对抗性示例表现出卓越的扰动质量。此外，我们提出了一种新的威胁模型，其中仅基于时序泄漏执行数据集推断。为了解决 NMS 算法中固有的时序泄漏漏洞，我们探索了实现恒定时间推理过程作为缓解策略的潜力和局限性。 本文提出利用机器学习模型推理过程中的时间侧信道（如非极大值抑制算法的执行时间）来增强决策型攻击，通过时间信息泄露实现更高效的对抗样本生成和数据集推断。 Dudi Biton,Aditi Misra,Efrat Levy,Jaidip Kotak,Ron Bitton,Roei Schuster,Nicolas Papernot,Yuval Elovici,Ben Nassi cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Svetlana Pavlitska,Nico Lambing,Ashok Kumar Bangaru,J. Marius Zöllner
title: Traffic Light Recognition using Convolutional Neural Networks: A Survey
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络进行交通灯识别：调查
abstract: Real-time traffic light recognition is essential for autonomous driving. Yet, a cohesive overview of the underlying model architectures for this task is currently missing. In this work, we conduct a comprehensive survey and analysis of traffic light recognition methods that use convolutional neural networks (CNNs). We focus on two essential aspects: datasets and CNN architectures. Based on an underlying architecture, we cluster methods into three major groups: (1) modifications of generic object detectors which compensate for specific task characteristics, (2) multi-stage approaches involving both rule-based and CNN components, and (3) task-specific single-stage methods. We describe the most important works in each cluster, discuss the usage of the datasets, and identify research gaps.
summary: Real-time traffic light recognition is essential for autonomous driving. Yet, a cohesive overview of the underlying model architectures for this task is currently missing. In this work, we conduct a comprehensive survey and analysis of traffic light recognition methods that use convolutional neural networks (CNNs). We focus on two essential aspects: datasets and CNN architectures. Based on an underlying architecture, we cluster methods into three major groups: (1) modifications of generic object detectors which compensate for specific task characteristics, (2) multi-stage approaches involving both rule-based and CNN components, and (3) task-specific single-stage methods. We describe the most important works in each cluster, discuss the usage of the datasets, and identify research gaps.
abstract_zh: 实时交通灯识别对于自动驾驶至关重要。然而，目前缺少对该任务的底层模型架构的整体概述。在这项工作中，我们对使用卷积神经网络（CNN）的交通灯识别方法进行了全面的调查和分析。我们关注两个重要方面：数据集和 CNN 架构。基于底层架构，我们将方法分为三大类：（1）对通用目标检测器进行修改，以补偿特定任务特征；（2）涉及基于规则和 CNN 组件的多阶段方法；（3）特定于任务的单阶段方法。我们描述每个集群中最重要的工作，讨论数据集的使用，并确定研究差距。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了使用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行交通灯识别的方法，分析了数据集和模型架构的演进。
AI.motivation: 实时交通灯识别对自动驾驶至关重要，但现有研究缺乏对CNN方法的系统性总结和对比分析。
AI.method: 通过分类整理现有方法（通用检测器改进/多阶段混合方法/单阶段专用方法），分析主流数据集使用情况并识别研究空白。
AI.result: 总结了三类主流方法的技术特点，对比了常用数据集的优缺点，指出在复杂环境适应性和小样本学习方面的研究不足。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究跨场景泛化能力更强的模型架构和更高效的数据标注方法以推动自动驾驶技术发展。

authors_text: Junming Yang,Xingguo Chen,Shengyuan Wang,Bolei Zhang
title: Model-based Offline Policy Optimization with Adversarial Network
title_zh: 基于模型的对抗网络离线策略优化
comment: Accepted by 26th European Conference on Artificial Intelligence ECAI 2023
comments: Accepted by 26th European Conference on Artificial Intelligence ECAI 2023
abstract: Model-based offline reinforcement learning (RL), which builds a supervised transition model with logging dataset to avoid costly interactions with the online environment, has been a promising approach for offline policy optimization. As the discrepancy between the logging data and online environment may result in a distributional shift problem, many prior works have studied how to build robust transition models conservatively and estimate the model uncertainty accurately. However, the over-conservatism can limit the exploration of the agent, and the uncertainty estimates may be unreliable. In this work, we propose a novel Model-based Offline policy optimization framework with Adversarial Network (MOAN). The key idea is to use adversarial learning to build a transition model with better generalization, where an adversary is introduced to distinguish between in-distribution and out-of-distribution samples. Moreover, the adversary can naturally provide a quantification of the model's uncertainty with theoretical guarantees. Extensive experiments showed that our approach outperforms existing state-of-the-art baselines on widely studied offline RL benchmarks. It can also generate diverse in-distribution samples, and quantify the uncertainty more accurately.
summary: Model-based offline reinforcement learning (RL), which builds a supervised transition model with logging dataset to avoid costly interactions with the online environment, has been a promising approach for offline policy optimization. As the discrepancy between the logging data and online environment may result in a distributional shift problem, many prior works have studied how to build robust transition models conservatively and estimate the model uncertainty accurately. However, the over-conservatism can limit the exploration of the agent, and the uncertainty estimates may be unreliable. In this work, we propose a novel Model-based Offline policy optimization framework with Adversarial Network (MOAN). The key idea is to use adversarial learning to build a transition model with better generalization, where an adversary is introduced to distinguish between in-distribution and out-of-distribution samples. Moreover, the adversary can naturally provide a quantification of the model's uncertainty with theoretical guarantees. Extensive experiments showed that our approach outperforms existing state-of-the-art baselines on widely studied offline RL benchmarks. It can also generate diverse in-distribution samples, and quantify the uncertainty more accurately.
abstract_zh: 基于模型的离线强化学习（RL）是一种有前途的离线策略优化方法，它利用日志数据集构建有监督的转换模型，以避免与在线环境进行成本高昂的交互。由于测井数据和在线环境之间的差异可能会导致分布偏移问题，许多先前的工作已经研究了如何保守地构建鲁棒的转移模型并准确地估计模型的不确定性。然而，过度保守会限制智能体的探索，并且不确定性估计可能不可靠。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于模型的离线策略优化框架和对抗网络（MOAN）。关键思想是使用对抗性学习来构建具有更好泛化性的转换模型，其中引入对手来区分分布内和分布外样本。此外，对手自然可以通过理论保证提供模型不确定性的量化。大量实验表明，我们的方法在广泛研究的离线 RL 基准上优于现有的最先进基线。它还可以生成多样化的分布样本，并更准确地量化不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对抗网络的离线强化学习框架（MOAN），通过对抗学习构建更通用的转移模型以解决分布偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有离线策略优化方法因过度保守限制了智能体探索能力，且模型不确定性估计不可靠，难以有效应对日志数据与在线环境的分布差异。
AI.method: 引入对抗网络区分分布内/外样本，通过对抗学习提升转移模型泛化能力，同时利用对抗器输出量化模型不确定性并提供理论保证。
AI.result: 在多个离线RL基准测试中优于现有最优方法，能生成更多样化的分布内样本并实现更准确的不确定性量化。
AI.conclusion: MOAN框架通过对抗学习有效缓解分布偏移问题，在保持模型鲁棒性的同时提升了离线策略优化的探索效率与不确定性估计可靠性。

search_text: Model-based Offline Policy Optimization with Adversarial Network 基于模型的对抗网络离线策略优化 Model-based offline reinforcement learning (RL), which builds a supervised transition model with logging dataset to avoid costly interactions with the online environment, has been a promising approach for offline policy optimization. As the discrepancy between the logging data and online environment may result in a distributional shift problem, many prior works have studied how to build robust transition models conservatively and estimate the model uncertainty accurately. However, the over-conservatism can limit the exploration of the agent, and the uncertainty estimates may be unreliable. In this work, we propose a novel Model-based Offline policy optimization framework with Adversarial Network (MOAN). The key idea is to use adversarial learning to build a transition model with better generalization, where an adversary is introduced to distinguish between in-distribution and out-of-distribution samples. Moreover, the adversary can naturally provide a quantification of the model's uncertainty with theoretical guarantees. Extensive experiments showed that our approach outperforms existing state-of-the-art baselines on widely studied offline RL benchmarks. It can also generate diverse in-distribution samples, and quantify the uncertainty more accurately. 基于模型的离线强化学习（RL）是一种有前途的离线策略优化方法，它利用日志数据集构建有监督的转换模型，以避免与在线环境进行成本高昂的交互。由于测井数据和在线环境之间的差异可能会导致分布偏移问题，许多先前的工作已经研究了如何保守地构建鲁棒的转移模型并准确地估计模型的不确定性。然而，过度保守会限制智能体的探索，并且不确定性估计可能不可靠。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于模型的离线策略优化框架和对抗网络（MOAN）。关键思想是使用对抗性学习来构建具有更好泛化性的转换模型，其中引入对手来区分分布内和分布外样本。此外，对手自然可以通过理论保证提供模型不确定性的量化。大量实验表明，我们的方法在广泛研究的离线 RL 基准上优于现有的最先进基线。它还可以生成多样化的分布样本，并更准确地量化不确定性。 本文提出了一种基于对抗网络的离线强化学习框架（MOAN），通过对抗学习构建更通用的转移模型以解决分布偏移问题。 Junming Yang,Xingguo Chen,Shengyuan Wang,Bolei Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Wei Suo,Mengyang Sun,Weisong Liu,Yiqi Gao,Peng Wang,Yanning Zhang,Qi Wu
title: S3C: Semi-Supervised VQA Natural Language Explanation via Self-Critical Learning
title_zh: S3C：通过自我批判学习进行半监督 VQA 自然语言解释
abstract: VQA Natural Language Explanation (VQA-NLE) task aims to explain the decision-making process of VQA models in natural language. Unlike traditional attention or gradient analysis, free-text rationales can be easier to understand and gain users' trust. Existing methods mostly use post-hoc or self-rationalization models to obtain a plausible explanation. However, these frameworks are bottlenecked by the following challenges: 1) the reasoning process cannot be faithfully responded to and suffer from the problem of logical inconsistency. 2) Human-annotated explanations are expensive and time-consuming to collect. In this paper, we propose a new Semi-Supervised VQA-NLE via Self-Critical Learning (S3C), which evaluates the candidate explanations by answering rewards to improve the logical consistency between answers and rationales. With a semi-supervised learning framework, the S3C can benefit from a tremendous amount of samples without human-annotated explanations. A large number of automatic measures and human evaluations all show the effectiveness of our method. Meanwhile, the framework achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on the two VQA-NLE datasets.
summary: VQA Natural Language Explanation (VQA-NLE) task aims to explain the decision-making process of VQA models in natural language. Unlike traditional attention or gradient analysis, free-text rationales can be easier to understand and gain users' trust. Existing methods mostly use post-hoc or self-rationalization models to obtain a plausible explanation. However, these frameworks are bottlenecked by the following challenges: 1) the reasoning process cannot be faithfully responded to and suffer from the problem of logical inconsistency. 2) Human-annotated explanations are expensive and time-consuming to collect. In this paper, we propose a new Semi-Supervised VQA-NLE via Self-Critical Learning (S3C), which evaluates the candidate explanations by answering rewards to improve the logical consistency between answers and rationales. With a semi-supervised learning framework, the S3C can benefit from a tremendous amount of samples without human-annotated explanations. A large number of automatic measures and human evaluations all show the effectiveness of our method. Meanwhile, the framework achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on the two VQA-NLE datasets.
abstract_zh: VQA自然语言解释（VQA-NLE）任务旨在用自然语言解释VQA模型的决策过程。与传统的注意力或梯度分析不同，自由文本的基本原理可以更容易理解并获得用户的信任。现有的方法大多使用事后或自我合理化模型来获得合理的解释。然而，这些框架面临以下挑战：1）推理过程无法忠实响应，存在逻辑不一致的问题。 2) 收集人工注释的解释既昂贵又耗时。在本文中，我们通过自我批判学习（S3C）提出了一种新的半监督 VQA-NLE，它通过回答奖励来评估候选解释，以提高答案和理由之间的逻辑一致性。借助半监督学习框架，S3C 可以从大量样本中受益，而无需人工注释解释。大量的自动测量和人工评估都显示了我们方法的有效性。同时，该框架在两个 VQA-NLE 数据集上实现了新的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出S3C方法，通过自批判学习解决VQA自然语言解释任务中的逻辑不一致问题，并降低对人工标注解释的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA-NLE方法存在逻辑不一致性及依赖昂贵人工标注解释的缺陷，需更高效且逻辑严谨的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于半监督学习框架，利用自批判学习机制通过回答奖励评估候选解释，提升答案与解释间的逻辑一致性。
AI.result: 在两个VQA-NLE数据集上达到新SOTA，大量自动指标和人工评估均验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: S3C通过半监督自批判学习有效解决了VQA-NLE的逻辑一致性与数据成本问题，具有显著实践价值。

authors_text: Andrew Du,Anh-Dzung Doan,Yee Wei Law,Tat-Jun Chin
title: Domain Adaptation for Satellite-Borne Hyperspectral Cloud Detection
title_zh: 星载高光谱云检测的域适应
abstract: The advent of satellite-borne machine learning hardware accelerators has enabled the on-board processing of payload data using machine learning techniques such as convolutional neural networks (CNN). A notable example is using a CNN to detect the presence of clouds in hyperspectral data captured on Earth observation (EO) missions, whereby only clear sky data is downlinked to conserve bandwidth. However, prior to deployment, new missions that employ new sensors will not have enough representative datasets to train a CNN model, while a model trained solely on data from previous missions will underperform when deployed to process the data on the new missions. This underperformance stems from the domain gap, i.e., differences in the underlying distributions of the data generated by the different sensors in previous and future missions. In this paper, we address the domain gap problem in the context of on-board hyperspectral cloud detection. Our main contributions lie in formulating new domain adaptation tasks that are motivated by a concrete EO mission, developing a novel algorithm for bandwidth-efficient supervised domain adaptation, and demonstrating test-time adaptation algorithms on space deployable neural network accelerators. Our contributions enable minimal data transmission to be invoked (e.g., only 1% of the weights in ResNet50) to achieve domain adaptation, thereby allowing more sophisticated CNN models to be deployed and updated on satellites without being hampered by domain gap and bandwidth limitations.
summary: The advent of satellite-borne machine learning hardware accelerators has enabled the on-board processing of payload data using machine learning techniques such as convolutional neural networks (CNN). A notable example is using a CNN to detect the presence of clouds in hyperspectral data captured on Earth observation (EO) missions, whereby only clear sky data is downlinked to conserve bandwidth. However, prior to deployment, new missions that employ new sensors will not have enough representative datasets to train a CNN model, while a model trained solely on data from previous missions will underperform when deployed to process the data on the new missions. This underperformance stems from the domain gap, i.e., differences in the underlying distributions of the data generated by the different sensors in previous and future missions. In this paper, we address the domain gap problem in the context of on-board hyperspectral cloud detection. Our main contributions lie in formulating new domain adaptation tasks that are motivated by a concrete EO mission, developing a novel algorithm for bandwidth-efficient supervised domain adaptation, and demonstrating test-time adaptation algorithms on space deployable neural network accelerators. Our contributions enable minimal data transmission to be invoked (e.g., only 1% of the weights in ResNet50) to achieve domain adaptation, thereby allowing more sophisticated CNN models to be deployed and updated on satellites without being hampered by domain gap and bandwidth limitations.
abstract_zh: 星载机器学习硬件加速器的出现使得能够使用卷积神经网络（CNN）等机器学习技术对有效载荷数据进行星上处理。一个值得注意的例子是使用 CNN 来检测地球观测 (EO) 任务捕获的高光谱数据中云的存在，从而仅下行传输晴空数据以节省带宽。然而，在部署之前，采用新传感器的新任务将没有足够的代表性数据集来训练 CNN 模型，而仅根据先前任务的数据训练的模型在部署来处理新任务的数据时将表现不佳。这种表现不佳源于域差距，即之前和未来任务中不同传感器生成的数据的基本分布存在差异。在本文中，我们解决了机载高光谱云检测中的域间隙问题。我们的主要贡献在于制定由具体的 EO 任务驱动的新域适应任务，开发一种用于带宽高效的监督域适应的新算法，并在空间可部署神经网络加速器上演示测试时适应算法。我们的贡献使得能够调用最少的数据传输（例如，仅 ResNet50 中权重的 1%）来实现域自适应，从而允许在卫星上部署和更新更复杂的 CNN 模型，而不受域间隙和带宽限制的阻碍。

AI.tldr: 本文研究卫星载荷高光谱云检测中的领域自适应问题，提出减少数据传输并提升模型适应性的方法。
AI.motivation: 新卫星任务因传感器差异导致数据分布不同，传统模型因领域差异表现不佳，且带宽限制难以传输足够训练数据。
AI.method: 设计面向具体任务的领域自适应框架，开发高效监督领域自适应算法，并在可部署加速器上实现测试时适应，仅传输少量模型权重（如ResNet50的1%）。
AI.result: 通过传输极少量权重实现领域自适应，使复杂CNN模型能在卫星上部署，克服领域差异与带宽限制。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为卫星上部署和更新复杂CNN模型提供了可行方案，有效解决领域差异与带宽矛盾。

search_text: Domain Adaptation for Satellite-Borne Hyperspectral Cloud Detection 星载高光谱云检测的域适应 The advent of satellite-borne machine learning hardware accelerators has enabled the on-board processing of payload data using machine learning techniques such as convolutional neural networks (CNN). A notable example is using a CNN to detect the presence of clouds in hyperspectral data captured on Earth observation (EO) missions, whereby only clear sky data is downlinked to conserve bandwidth. However, prior to deployment, new missions that employ new sensors will not have enough representative datasets to train a CNN model, while a model trained solely on data from previous missions will underperform when deployed to process the data on the new missions. This underperformance stems from the domain gap, i.e., differences in the underlying distributions of the data generated by the different sensors in previous and future missions. In this paper, we address the domain gap problem in the context of on-board hyperspectral cloud detection. Our main contributions lie in formulating new domain adaptation tasks that are motivated by a concrete EO mission, developing a novel algorithm for bandwidth-efficient supervised domain adaptation, and demonstrating test-time adaptation algorithms on space deployable neural network accelerators. Our contributions enable minimal data transmission to be invoked (e.g., only 1% of the weights in ResNet50) to achieve domain adaptation, thereby allowing more sophisticated CNN models to be deployed and updated on satellites without being hampered by domain gap and bandwidth limitations. 星载机器学习硬件加速器的出现使得能够使用卷积神经网络（CNN）等机器学习技术对有效载荷数据进行星上处理。一个值得注意的例子是使用 CNN 来检测地球观测 (EO) 任务捕获的高光谱数据中云的存在，从而仅下行传输晴空数据以节省带宽。然而，在部署之前，采用新传感器的新任务将没有足够的代表性数据集来训练 CNN 模型，而仅根据先前任务的数据训练的模型在部署来处理新任务的数据时将表现不佳。这种表现不佳源于域差距，即之前和未来任务中不同传感器生成的数据的基本分布存在差异。在本文中，我们解决了机载高光谱云检测中的域间隙问题。我们的主要贡献在于制定由具体的 EO 任务驱动的新域适应任务，开发一种用于带宽高效的监督域适应的新算法，并在空间可部署神经网络加速器上演示测试时适应算法。我们的贡献使得能够调用最少的数据传输（例如，仅 ResNet50 中权重的 1%）来实现域自适应，从而允许在卫星上部署和更新更复杂的 CNN 模型，而不受域间隙和带宽限制的阻碍。 本文研究卫星载荷高光谱云检测中的领域自适应问题，提出减少数据传输并提升模型适应性的方法。 Andrew Du,Anh-Dzung Doan,Yee Wei Law,Tat-Jun Chin cs.CV

authors_text: Amirhossein Sajedi,Mohammad Javad Fadaeieslam
title: INCEPTNET: Precise And Early Disease Detection Application For Medical Images Analyses
title_zh: INCEPTNET：用于医学图像分析的精确早期疾病检测应用
abstract: In view of the recent paradigm shift in deep AI based image processing methods, medical image processing has advanced considerably. In this study, we propose a novel deep neural network (DNN), entitled InceptNet, in the scope of medical image processing, for early disease detection and segmentation of medical images in order to enhance precision and performance. We also investigate the interaction of users with the InceptNet application to present a comprehensive application including the background processes, and foreground interactions with users. Fast InceptNet is shaped by the prominent Unet architecture, and it seizes the power of an Inception module to be fast and cost effective while aiming to approximate an optimal local sparse structure. Adding Inception modules with various parallel kernel sizes can improve the network's ability to capture the variations in the scaled regions of interest. To experiment, the model is tested on four benchmark datasets, including retina blood vessel segmentation, lung nodule segmentation, skin lesion segmentation, and breast cancer cell detection. The improvement was more significant on images with small scale structures. The proposed method improved the accuracy from 0.9531, 0.8900, 0.9872, and 0.9881 to 0.9555, 0.9510, 0.9945, and 0.9945 on the mentioned datasets, respectively, which show outperforming of the proposed method over the previous works. Furthermore, by exploring the procedure from start to end, individuals who have utilized a trial edition of InceptNet, in the form of a complete application, are presented with thirteen multiple choice questions in order to assess the proposed method. The outcomes are evaluated through the means of Human Computer Interaction.
summary: In view of the recent paradigm shift in deep AI based image processing methods, medical image processing has advanced considerably. In this study, we propose a novel deep neural network (DNN), entitled InceptNet, in the scope of medical image processing, for early disease detection and segmentation of medical images in order to enhance precision and performance. We also investigate the interaction of users with the InceptNet application to present a comprehensive application including the background processes, and foreground interactions with users. Fast InceptNet is shaped by the prominent Unet architecture, and it seizes the power of an Inception module to be fast and cost effective while aiming to approximate an optimal local sparse structure. Adding Inception modules with various parallel kernel sizes can improve the network's ability to capture the variations in the scaled regions of interest. To experiment, the model is tested on four benchmark datasets, including retina blood vessel segmentation, lung nodule segmentation, skin lesion segmentation, and breast cancer cell detection. The improvement was more significant on images with small scale structures. The proposed method improved the accuracy from 0.9531, 0.8900, 0.9872, and 0.9881 to 0.9555, 0.9510, 0.9945, and 0.9945 on the mentioned datasets, respectively, which show outperforming of the proposed method over the previous works. Furthermore, by exploring the procedure from start to end, individuals who have utilized a trial edition of InceptNet, in the form of a complete application, are presented with thirteen multiple choice questions in order to assess the proposed method. The outcomes are evaluated through the means of Human Computer Interaction.
abstract_zh: 鉴于最近基于深度人工智能的图像处理方法的范式转变，医学图像处理取得了长足的进步。在本研究中，我们在医学图像处理领域提出了一种名为 InceptNet 的新型深度神经网络（DNN），用于早期疾病检测和医学图像分割，以提高精度和性能。我们还研究了用户与 InceptNet 应用程序的交互，以呈现一个全面的应用程序，包括后台进程以及与用户的前台交互。 Fast InceptNet 由著名的 Unet 架构塑造而成，它利用了 Inception 模块的强大功能，既快速又经济高效，同时旨在近似最佳的局部稀疏结构。添加具有各种并行内核大小的 Inception 模块可以提高网络捕获缩放感兴趣区域变化的能力。为了进行实验，该模型在四个基准数据集上进行了测试，包括视网膜血管分割、肺结节分割、皮肤病变分割和乳腺癌细胞检测。对于具有小尺度结构的图像，改进更为显着。所提出的方法在上述数据集上的准确率分别从 0.9531、0.8900、0.9872 和 0.9881 提高到 0.9555、0.9510、0.9945 和 0.9945，这表明所提出的方法优于以前的工作。此外，通过从头到尾探索该过程，以完整应用程序的形式使用过 InceptNet 试用版的个人将面临 13 个多项选择题，以评估所提出的方法。结果通过人机交互的方式进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为InceptNet的深度神经网络，用于医疗图像的早期疾病检测与分割，并通过多数据集验证其性能。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像处理需要更高的精度与效率，传统方法在小尺度结构检测上存在局限，亟需改进模型以提升早期疾病诊断能力。
AI.method: 基于Unet架构设计InceptNet，融合Inception模块的多尺度卷积核，优化局部稀疏结构；通过四类医学图像数据集（视网膜血管、肺结节、皮肤病变、乳腺癌细胞）进行实验，并结合用户交互测试评估应用效果。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上，InceptNet的准确率分别提升至0.9555、0.9510、0.9945和0.9945，显著优于现有方法，尤其在小尺度结构图像中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: InceptNet通过多尺度特征提取与用户交互优化，在医疗图像分割任务中展现出优越性能，为早期疾病检测提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Patrick Eickhoff,Matthias Möller,Theresa Pekarek Rosin,Johannes Twiefel,Stefan Wermter
title: Bring the Noise: Introducing Noise Robustness to Pretrained Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 引入噪声：将噪声鲁棒性引入预训练的自动语音识别中
comment: Submitted and accepted for ICANN 2023 (32nd International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks)
comments: Submitted and accepted for ICANN 2023 (32nd International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks)
abstract: In recent research, in the domain of speech processing, large End-to-End (E2E) systems for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) have reported state-of-the-art performance on various benchmarks. These systems intrinsically learn how to handle and remove noise conditions from speech. Previous research has shown, that it is possible to extract the denoising capabilities of these models into a preprocessor network, which can be used as a frontend for downstream ASR models. However, the proposed methods were limited to specific fully convolutional architectures. In this work, we propose a novel method to extract the denoising capabilities, that can be applied to any encoder-decoder architecture. We propose the Cleancoder preprocessor architecture that extracts hidden activations from the Conformer ASR model and feeds them to a decoder to predict denoised spectrograms. We train our pre-processor on the Noisy Speech Database (NSD) to reconstruct denoised spectrograms from noisy inputs. Then, we evaluate our model as a frontend to a pretrained Conformer ASR model as well as a frontend to train smaller Conformer ASR models from scratch. We show that the Cleancoder is able to filter noise from speech and that it improves the total Word Error Rate (WER) of the downstream model in noisy conditions for both applications.
summary: In recent research, in the domain of speech processing, large End-to-End (E2E) systems for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) have reported state-of-the-art performance on various benchmarks. These systems intrinsically learn how to handle and remove noise conditions from speech. Previous research has shown, that it is possible to extract the denoising capabilities of these models into a preprocessor network, which can be used as a frontend for downstream ASR models. However, the proposed methods were limited to specific fully convolutional architectures. In this work, we propose a novel method to extract the denoising capabilities, that can be applied to any encoder-decoder architecture. We propose the Cleancoder preprocessor architecture that extracts hidden activations from the Conformer ASR model and feeds them to a decoder to predict denoised spectrograms. We train our pre-processor on the Noisy Speech Database (NSD) to reconstruct denoised spectrograms from noisy inputs. Then, we evaluate our model as a frontend to a pretrained Conformer ASR model as well as a frontend to train smaller Conformer ASR models from scratch. We show that the Cleancoder is able to filter noise from speech and that it improves the total Word Error Rate (WER) of the downstream model in noisy conditions for both applications.
abstract_zh: 在最近的研究中，在语音处理领域，用于自动语音识别（ASR）的大型端到端（E2E）系统在各种基准测试中报告了最先进的性能。这些系统本质上学习如何处理和消除语音中的噪声条件。先前的研究表明，可以将这些模型的去噪能力提取到预处理器网络中，该网络可以用作下游 ASR 模型的前端。然而，所提出的方法仅限于特定的全卷积架构。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种提取去噪能力的新方法，可以应用于任何编码器-解码器架构。我们提出了 Cleancoder 预处理器架构，该架构从 Conformer ASR 模型中提取隐藏的激活并将其输入解码器以预测去噪频谱图。我们在噪声语音数据库（NSD）上训练预处理器，以从噪声输入中重建去噪频谱图。然后，我们将我们的模型作为预训练的 Conformer ASR 模型的前端以及从头开始训练较小的 Conformer ASR 模型的前端进行评估。我们证明 Cleancoder 能够过滤语音中的噪声，并且它可以提高两个应用程序在噪声条件下下游模型的总字错误率 (WER)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用方法，通过提取预训练语音识别模型的去噪能力，提升其在噪声环境下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有去噪方法局限于特定全卷积架构，难以适配多样化的编码器-解码器结构，需开发更通用的解决方案以增强ASR系统的抗噪能力。
AI.method: 设计Cleancoder预处理器，从Conformer模型中提取隐藏激活并输入解码器生成去噪频谱图，基于NSD数据集训练后作为前端应用于下游ASR模型。
AI.result: Cleancoder有效过滤噪声，在两种应用中均降低下游模型词错误率（WER），验证其提升噪声条件下ASR性能的效果。
AI.conclusion: Cleancoder方法证明了从预训练模型中提取通用去噪能力的可行性，为构建鲁棒ASR系统提供新思路。

conclusion: Cleancoder方法证明了从预训练模型中提取通用去噪能力的可行性，为构建鲁棒ASR系统提供新思路。
search_text: Bring the Noise: Introducing Noise Robustness to Pretrained Automatic Speech Recognition 引入噪声：将噪声鲁棒性引入预训练的自动语音识别中 In recent research, in the domain of speech processing, large End-to-End (E2E) systems for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) have reported state-of-the-art performance on various benchmarks. These systems intrinsically learn how to handle and remove noise conditions from speech. Previous research has shown, that it is possible to extract the denoising capabilities of these models into a preprocessor network, which can be used as a frontend for downstream ASR models. However, the proposed methods were limited to specific fully convolutional architectures. In this work, we propose a novel method to extract the denoising capabilities, that can be applied to any encoder-decoder architecture. We propose the Cleancoder preprocessor architecture that extracts hidden activations from the Conformer ASR model and feeds them to a decoder to predict denoised spectrograms. We train our pre-processor on the Noisy Speech Database (NSD) to reconstruct denoised spectrograms from noisy inputs. Then, we evaluate our model as a frontend to a pretrained Conformer ASR model as well as a frontend to train smaller Conformer ASR models from scratch. We show that the Cleancoder is able to filter noise from speech and that it improves the total Word Error Rate (WER) of the downstream model in noisy conditions for both applications. 在最近的研究中，在语音处理领域，用于自动语音识别（ASR）的大型端到端（E2E）系统在各种基准测试中报告了最先进的性能。这些系统本质上学习如何处理和消除语音中的噪声条件。先前的研究表明，可以将这些模型的去噪能力提取到预处理器网络中，该网络可以用作下游 ASR 模型的前端。然而，所提出的方法仅限于特定的全卷积架构。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种提取去噪能力的新方法，可以应用于任何编码器-解码器架构。我们提出了 Cleancoder 预处理器架构，该架构从 Conformer ASR 模型中提取隐藏的激活并将其输入解码器以预测去噪频谱图。我们在噪声语音数据库（NSD）上训练预处理器，以从噪声输入中重建去噪频谱图。然后，我们将我们的模型作为预训练的 Conformer ASR 模型的前端以及从头开始训练较小的 Conformer ASR 模型的前端进行评估。我们证明 Cleancoder 能够过滤语音中的噪声，并且它可以提高两个应用程序在噪声条件下下游模型的总字错误率 (WER)。 本文提出一种通用方法，通过提取预训练语音识别模型的去噪能力，提升其在噪声环境下的性能。 Patrick Eickhoff,Matthias Möller,Theresa Pekarek Rosin,Johannes Twiefel,Stefan Wermter cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Peiyi Wang,Lei Li,Liang Chen,Feifan Song,Binghuai Lin,Yunbo Cao,Tianyu Liu,Zhifang Sui
title: Making Large Language Models Better Reasoners with Alignment
title_zh: 通过对齐使大型语言模型成为更好的推理者
abstract: Reasoning is a cognitive process of using evidence to reach a sound conclusion. The reasoning capability is essential for large language models (LLMs) to serve as the brain of the artificial general intelligence agent. Recent studies reveal that fine-tuning LLMs on data with the chain of thought (COT) reasoning process can significantly enhance their reasoning capabilities. However, we find that the fine-tuned LLMs suffer from an \textit{Assessment Misalignment} problem, i.e., they frequently assign higher scores to subpar COTs, leading to potential limitations in their reasoning abilities. To address this problem, we introduce an \textit{Alignment Fine-Tuning (AFT)} paradigm, which involves three steps: 1) fine-tuning LLMs with COT training data; 2) generating multiple COT responses for each question, and categorizing them into positive and negative ones based on whether they achieve the correct answer; 3) calibrating the scores of positive and negative responses given by LLMs with a novel constraint alignment loss. Specifically, the constraint alignment loss has two objectives: a) Alignment, which guarantees that positive scores surpass negative scores to encourage answers with high-quality COTs; b) Constraint, which keeps the negative scores confined to a reasonable range to prevent the model degradation. Beyond just the binary positive and negative feedback, the constraint alignment loss can be seamlessly adapted to the ranking situations when ranking feedback is accessible. Furthermore, we also delve deeply into recent ranking-based alignment methods, such as DPO, RRHF, and PRO, and discover that the constraint, which has been overlooked by these approaches, is also crucial for their performance. Extensive experiments on four reasoning benchmarks with both binary and ranking feedback demonstrate the effectiveness of AFT.
summary: Reasoning is a cognitive process of using evidence to reach a sound conclusion. The reasoning capability is essential for large language models (LLMs) to serve as the brain of the artificial general intelligence agent. Recent studies reveal that fine-tuning LLMs on data with the chain of thought (COT) reasoning process can significantly enhance their reasoning capabilities. However, we find that the fine-tuned LLMs suffer from an \textit{Assessment Misalignment} problem, i.e., they frequently assign higher scores to subpar COTs, leading to potential limitations in their reasoning abilities. To address this problem, we introduce an \textit{Alignment Fine-Tuning (AFT)} paradigm, which involves three steps: 1) fine-tuning LLMs with COT training data; 2) generating multiple COT responses for each question, and categorizing them into positive and negative ones based on whether they achieve the correct answer; 3) calibrating the scores of positive and negative responses given by LLMs with a novel constraint alignment loss. Specifically, the constraint alignment loss has two objectives: a) Alignment, which guarantees that positive scores surpass negative scores to encourage answers with high-quality COTs; b) Constraint, which keeps the negative scores confined to a reasonable range to prevent the model degradation. Beyond just the binary positive and negative feedback, the constraint alignment loss can be seamlessly adapted to the ranking situations when ranking feedback is accessible. Furthermore, we also delve deeply into recent ranking-based alignment methods, such as DPO, RRHF, and PRO, and discover that the constraint, which has been overlooked by these approaches, is also crucial for their performance. Extensive experiments on four reasoning benchmarks with both binary and ranking feedback demonstrate the effectiveness of AFT.
abstract_zh: 推理是利用证据得出合理结论的认知过程。推理能力对于大型语言模型（LLM）作为通用人工智能代理的大脑至关重要。最近的研究表明，利用思想链（COT）推理过程对数据进行微调可以显着增强法学硕士的推理能力。然而，我们发现经过微调的法学硕士存在 \textit{评估错位} 问题，即他们经常为低于标准的 COT 分配较高的分数，从而导致其推理能力受到潜在限制。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 \textit{对齐微调（AFT）} 范式，它涉及三个步骤：1）使用 COT 训练数据微调 LLM； 2）为每个问题生成多个COT答案，并根据是否获得正确答案将其分为正面和负面； 3）用一种新颖的约束对齐损失来校准法学硕士给出的正面和负面反应的分数。具体来说，约束对齐损失有两个目标：a）对齐，保证正分数超过负分数，以鼓励高质量 COT 的答案； b) 约束，将负分数限制在合理的范围内，以防止模型退化。除了二元正反馈和负反馈之外，当可以访问排名反馈时，约束对齐损失可以无缝地适应排名情况。此外，我们还深入研究了最近的基于排名的对齐方法，例如 DPO、RRHF 和 PRO，并发现这些方法忽略的约束对其性能也至关重要。在四个推理基准上进行的大量实验（包括二元反馈和排序反馈）证明了 AFT 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AFT的对齐微调方法，通过解决大型语言模型在推理过程中存在的评估偏差问题，提升其推理能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管链式思维（COT）训练数据能增强模型推理能力，但现有方法存在评估偏差问题，即模型倾向于对低质量COT赋予过高评分，导致推理效果受限。
AI.method: AFT包含三步：1）用COT数据微调模型；2）生成多组COT响应并按正确性分类；3）引入约束对齐损失函数，通过正负样本评分对比实现对齐目标与约束控制。
AI.result: 在四个推理基准测试中，AFT在二元反馈和排序反馈场景下均显著优于现有方法如DPO、RRHF等。
AI.conclusion: AFT通过显式约束评分分布和对齐机制，有效解决了评估偏差问题，为提升模型推理能力提供了新范式。

authors_text: Daniel Capellán-Martín,Juan J. Gómez-Valverde,David Bermejo-Peláez,María J. Ledesma-Carbayo
title: A Lightweight, Rapid and Efficient Deep Convolutional Network for Chest X-Ray Tuberculosis Detection
title_zh: 用于胸部 X 射线结核病检测的轻量级、快速且高效的深度卷积网络
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. This paper has been accepted at ISBI 2023
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. This paper has been accepted at ISBI 2023
abstract: Tuberculosis (TB) is still recognized as one of the leading causes of death worldwide. Recent advances in deep learning (DL) have shown to enhance radiologists' ability to interpret chest X-ray (CXR) images accurately and with fewer errors, leading to a better diagnosis of this disease. However, little work has been done to develop models capable of diagnosing TB that offer good performance while being efficient, fast and computationally inexpensive. In this work, we propose LightTBNet, a novel lightweight, fast and efficient deep convolutional network specially customized to detect TB from CXR images. Using a total of 800 frontal CXR images from two publicly available datasets, our solution yielded an accuracy, F1 and area under the ROC curve (AUC) of 0.906, 0.907 and 0.961, respectively, on an independent test subset. The proposed model demonstrates outstanding performance while delivering a rapid prediction, with minimal computational and memory requirements, making it highly suitable for deployment in handheld devices that can be used in low-resource areas with high TB prevalence. Code publicly available at https://github.com/dani-capellan/LightTBNet.
summary: Tuberculosis (TB) is still recognized as one of the leading causes of death worldwide. Recent advances in deep learning (DL) have shown to enhance radiologists' ability to interpret chest X-ray (CXR) images accurately and with fewer errors, leading to a better diagnosis of this disease. However, little work has been done to develop models capable of diagnosing TB that offer good performance while being efficient, fast and computationally inexpensive. In this work, we propose LightTBNet, a novel lightweight, fast and efficient deep convolutional network specially customized to detect TB from CXR images. Using a total of 800 frontal CXR images from two publicly available datasets, our solution yielded an accuracy, F1 and area under the ROC curve (AUC) of 0.906, 0.907 and 0.961, respectively, on an independent test subset. The proposed model demonstrates outstanding performance while delivering a rapid prediction, with minimal computational and memory requirements, making it highly suitable for deployment in handheld devices that can be used in low-resource areas with high TB prevalence. Code publicly available at https://github.com/dani-capellan/LightTBNet.
abstract_zh: 结核病 (TB) 仍然被认为是全世界导致死亡的主要原因之一。深度学习 (DL) 的最新进展表明，放射科医生能够准确解读胸部 X 射线 (CXR) 图像并减少错误，从而更好地诊断这种疾病。然而，在开发能够诊断结核病的模型方面所做的工作还很少，这些模型能够提供良好的性能，同时高效、快速且计算成本低廉。在这项工作中，我们提出了 LightTBNet，这是一种新颖的轻量级、快速且高效的深度卷积网络，专门用于从 CXR 图像中检测结核病。使用来自两个公开数据集的总共 800 张正面 CXR 图像，我们的解决方案在独立测试子集上产生的准确度、F1 和 ROC 曲线下面积 (AUC) 分别为 0.906、0.907 和 0.961。所提出的模型展示了出色的性能，同时提供快速预测，且计算和内存要求极低，使其非常适合部署在可在结核病高流行的资源匮乏地区使用的手持设备中。代码可在 https://github.com/dani-capellan/LightTBNet 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级、快速且高效的深度卷积网络LightTBNet，专门用于从胸部X光片中检测结核病。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习提升了放射科医生对胸部X光片的解读能力，但现有模型在性能、效率和计算成本之间缺乏平衡，尤其在资源匮乏地区亟需高效解决方案。
AI.method: 基于两个公开数据集的800张正面胸部X光图像，设计轻量级卷积网络LightTBNet，并在独立测试集上评估其性能。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上达到90.6%的准确率、90.7%的F1分数和96.1%的AUC值，同时具备低计算和内存需求，适合部署在便携设备上。
AI.conclusion: LightTBNet在保持高性能的同时实现了高效计算，为高结核病流行且资源有限地区提供了可行的部署方案。

ai_content.conclusion: LightTBNet在保持高性能的同时实现了高效计算，为高结核病流行且资源有限地区提供了可行的部署方案。

result: 模型在测试集上达到90.6%的准确率、90.7%的F1分数和96.1%的AUC值，同时具备低计算和内存需求，适合部署在便携设备上。
conclusion: LightTBNet在保持高性能的同时实现了高效计算，为高结核病流行且资源有限地区提供了可行的部署方案。
search_text: A Lightweight, Rapid and Efficient Deep Convolutional Network for Chest X-Ray Tuberculosis Detection 用于胸部 X 射线结核病检测的轻量级、快速且高效的深度卷积网络 Tuberculosis (TB) is still recognized as one of the leading causes of death worldwide. Recent advances in deep learning (DL) have shown to enhance radiologists' ability to interpret chest X-ray (CXR) images accurately and with fewer errors, leading to a better diagnosis of this disease. However, little work has been done to develop models capable of diagnosing TB that offer good performance while being efficient, fast and computationally inexpensive. In this work, we propose LightTBNet, a novel lightweight, fast and efficient deep convolutional network specially customized to detect TB from CXR images. Using a total of 800 frontal CXR images from two publicly available datasets, our solution yielded an accuracy, F1 and area under the ROC curve (AUC) of 0.906, 0.907 and 0.961, respectively, on an independent test subset. The proposed model demonstrates outstanding performance while delivering a rapid prediction, with minimal computational and memory requirements, making it highly suitable for deployment in handheld devices that can be used in low-resource areas with high TB prevalence. Code publicly available at https://github.com/dani-capellan/LightTBNet. 结核病 (TB) 仍然被认为是全世界导致死亡的主要原因之一。深度学习 (DL) 的最新进展表明，放射科医生能够准确解读胸部 X 射线 (CXR) 图像并减少错误，从而更好地诊断这种疾病。然而，在开发能够诊断结核病的模型方面所做的工作还很少，这些模型能够提供良好的性能，同时高效、快速且计算成本低廉。在这项工作中，我们提出了 LightTBNet，这是一种新颖的轻量级、快速且高效的深度卷积网络，专门用于从 CXR 图像中检测结核病。使用来自两个公开数据集的总共 800 张正面 CXR 图像，我们的解决方案在独立测试子集上产生的准确度、F1 和 ROC 曲线下面积 (AUC) 分别为 0.906、0.907 和 0.961。所提出的模型展示了出色的性能，同时提供快速预测，且计算和内存要求极低，使其非常适合部署在可在结核病高流行的资源匮乏地区使用的手持设备中。代码可在 https://github.com/dani-capellan/LightTBNet 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种轻量级、快速且高效的深度卷积网络LightTBNet，专门用于从胸部X光片中检测结核病。 Daniel Capellán-Martín,Juan J. Gómez-Valverde,David Bermejo-Peláez,María J. Ledesma-Carbayo eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Mariona Carós,Ariadna Just,Santi Seguí,Jordi Vitrià
title: Self-Supervised Pre-Training Boosts Semantic Scene Segmentation on LiDAR Data
title_zh: 自监督预训练增强 LiDAR 数据的语义场景分割
abstract: Airborne LiDAR systems have the capability to capture the Earth's surface by generating extensive point cloud data comprised of points mainly defined by 3D coordinates. However, labeling such points for supervised learning tasks is time-consuming. As a result, there is a need to investigate techniques that can learn from unlabeled data to significantly reduce the number of annotated samples. In this work, we propose to train a self-supervised encoder with Barlow Twins and use it as a pre-trained network in the task of semantic scene segmentation. The experimental results demonstrate that our unsupervised pre-training boosts performance once fine-tuned on the supervised task, especially for under-represented categories.
summary: Airborne LiDAR systems have the capability to capture the Earth's surface by generating extensive point cloud data comprised of points mainly defined by 3D coordinates. However, labeling such points for supervised learning tasks is time-consuming. As a result, there is a need to investigate techniques that can learn from unlabeled data to significantly reduce the number of annotated samples. In this work, we propose to train a self-supervised encoder with Barlow Twins and use it as a pre-trained network in the task of semantic scene segmentation. The experimental results demonstrate that our unsupervised pre-training boosts performance once fine-tuned on the supervised task, especially for under-represented categories.
abstract_zh: 机载 LiDAR 系统能够通过生成主要由 3D 坐标定义的点组成的广泛点云数据来捕获地球表面。然而，为监督学习任务标记这些点非常耗时。因此，需要研究可以从未标记数据中学习的技术，以显着减少带注释样本的数量。在这项工作中，我们建议使用 Barlow Twins 训练自监督编码器，并将其用作语义场景分割任务中的预训练网络。实验结果表明，一旦对监督任务进行微调，我们的无监督预训练就会提高性能，特别是对于代表性不足的类别。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用自监督预训练方法提升LiDAR点云数据的语义场景分割性能
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习依赖大量标注数据，而LiDAR数据标注成本高，因此需要探索无监督或自监督方法以减少标注需求
AI.method: 采用Barlow Twins框架进行自监督预训练，训练编码器并将其作为预训练模型应用于语义分割任务
AI.result: 实验表明，预训练模型在微调后显著提升分割效果，尤其在数据不足的类别上表现更优
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练能有效提升语义分割性能，减少对标注数据的依赖，尤其对小样本类别有帮助

authors_text: Claudio Battiloro,Lucia Testa,Lorenzo Giusti,Stefania Sardellitti,Paolo Di Lorenzo,Sergio Barbarossa
title: Generalized Simplicial Attention Neural Networks
title_zh: 广义单纯注意力神经网络
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.07485 (preliminary version of this paper). 16 pages, accepted for publication at IEEE TSIPN
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.07485 (preliminary version of this paper). 16 pages, accepted for publication at IEEE TSIPN
abstract: Graph machine learning methods excel at leveraging pairwise relations present in the data. However, graphs are unable to fully capture the multi-way interactions inherent in many complex systems. An effective way to incorporate them is to model the data on higher-order combinatorial topological spaces, such as Simplicial Complexes (SCs) or Cell Complexes. For this reason, we introduce Generalized Simplicial Attention Neural Networks (GSANs), novel neural network architectures designed to process data living on simplicial complexes using masked self-attentional layers. Hinging on topological signal processing principles, we devise a series of principled self-attention mechanisms able to process data associated with simplices of various order, such as nodes, edges, triangles, and beyond. These schemes learn how to combine data associated with neighbor simplices of consecutive order in a task-oriented fashion, leveraging on the simplicial Dirac operator and its Dirac decomposition. We also prove that GSAN satisfies two fundamental properties: permutation equivariance and simplicial-awareness. Finally, we illustrate how our approach compares favorably with other simplicial and graph models when applied to several (inductive and transductive) tasks such as trajectory prediction, missing data imputation, graph classification, and simplex prediction.
summary: Graph machine learning methods excel at leveraging pairwise relations present in the data. However, graphs are unable to fully capture the multi-way interactions inherent in many complex systems. An effective way to incorporate them is to model the data on higher-order combinatorial topological spaces, such as Simplicial Complexes (SCs) or Cell Complexes. For this reason, we introduce Generalized Simplicial Attention Neural Networks (GSANs), novel neural network architectures designed to process data living on simplicial complexes using masked self-attentional layers. Hinging on topological signal processing principles, we devise a series of principled self-attention mechanisms able to process data associated with simplices of various order, such as nodes, edges, triangles, and beyond. These schemes learn how to combine data associated with neighbor simplices of consecutive order in a task-oriented fashion, leveraging on the simplicial Dirac operator and its Dirac decomposition. We also prove that GSAN satisfies two fundamental properties: permutation equivariance and simplicial-awareness. Finally, we illustrate how our approach compares favorably with other simplicial and graph models when applied to several (inductive and transductive) tasks such as trajectory prediction, missing data imputation, graph classification, and simplex prediction.
abstract_zh: 图机器学习方法擅长利用数据中存在的成对关系。然而，图无法完全捕捉许多复杂系统中固有的多向交互。合并它们的一种有效方法是在高阶组合拓扑空间（例如单纯复形 (SC) 或元胞复形）上对数据进行建模。因此，我们引入了广义单纯注意力神经网络（GSAN），这是一种新颖的神经网络架构，旨在使用屏蔽自注意力层处理单纯复合体上的数据。根据拓扑信号处理原理，我们设计了一系列有原则的自注意力机制，能够处理与各种阶单纯形相关的数据，例如节点、边、三角形等。这些方案学习如何利用单纯狄拉克算子及其狄拉克分解，以面向任务的方式组合与连续顺序的邻居单纯形相关的数据。我们还证明了 GSAN 满足两个基本属性：排列等变性和单纯意识。最后，我们说明了当应用于轨迹预测、缺失数据插补、图分类和单纯形预测等多个（归纳和转导）任务时，我们的方法如何与其他单纯模型和图模型进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为广义单纯形注意力神经网络（GSAN）的新架构，用于处理单纯复形上的数据，以捕捉复杂系统中的多维交互。
AI.motivation: 传统图神经网络难以充分捕捉复杂系统中的多维交互关系，需借助更高阶的拓扑结构（如单纯复形）进行建模。
AI.method: 基于拓扑信号处理原理，设计掩码自注意力机制，结合单纯形狄拉克算子及其分解，实现对不同阶单纯形数据的融合处理。
AI.result: 在轨迹预测、缺失数据填补、图分类和单纯形预测等任务中，GSAN优于其他单纯形和图模型，且具有置换等变性和单纯形感知性。
AI.conclusion: GSAN通过引入高阶拓扑结构和自注意力机制，有效建模复杂系统的多维交互，为图机器学习提供了新方法。

authors_text: Mengyao Guo,Xiaolin Zhang,Yuan Zhuang,Jing Chen,Pengfei Wang,Ze Gao
title: Exploring the Intersection of Complex Aesthetics and Generative AI for Promoting Cultural Creativity in Rural China after the Post-Pandemic Era
title_zh: 探索复杂美学与生成人工智能的交叉点，促进后疫情时代中国乡村的文化创意
comment: Accepted by 2023 the 1st International Conference on AI-generated Content (AIGC2023)
comments: Accepted by 2023 the 1st International Conference on AI-generated Content (AIGC2023)
abstract: This paper explores using generative AI and aesthetics to promote cultural creativity in rural China amidst COVID-19's impact. Through literature reviews, case studies, surveys, and text analysis, it examines art and technology applications in rural contexts and identifies key challenges. The study finds artworks often fail to resonate locally, while reliance on external artists limits sustainability. Hence, nurturing grassroots "artist villagers" through AI is proposed. Our approach involves training machine learning on subjective aesthetics to generate culturally relevant content. Interactive AI media can also boost tourism while preserving heritage. This pioneering research puts forth original perspectives on the intersection of AI and aesthetics to invigorate rural culture. It advocates holistic integration of technology and emphasizes AI's potential as a creative enabler versus replacement. Ultimately, it lays the groundwork for further exploration of leveraging AI innovations to empower rural communities. This timely study contributes to growing interest in emerging technologies to address critical issues facing rural China.
summary: This paper explores using generative AI and aesthetics to promote cultural creativity in rural China amidst COVID-19's impact. Ultimately, it lays the groundwork for further exploration of leveraging AI innovations to empower rural communities. This timely study contributes to growing interest in emerging technologies to address critical issues facing rural China.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了在 COVID-19 的影响下，利用生成式人工智能和美学来促进中国农村的文化创造力。通过文献综述、案例研究、调查和文本分析，它审视了农村背景下的艺术和技术应用，并确定了关键挑战。研究发现，艺术品往往无法在当地引起共鸣，而对外部艺术家的依赖限制了可持续性。由此，提出通过人工智能培育草根“艺术家村民”。我们的方法涉及对主观美学进行机器学习训练，以生成文化相关的内容。交互式人工智能媒体还可以在保护遗产的同时促进旅游业的发展。这项开创性的研究提出了人工智能与美学交叉以振兴乡村文化的独到视角。它提倡技术的整体整合，并强调人工智能作为创造性推动者而不是替代者的潜力。最终，它为进一步探索利用人工智能创新赋能农村社区奠定了基础。这项及时的研究有助于激发人们对新兴技术的兴趣，以解决中国农村面临的关键问题。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨利用生成式AI与美学促进后疫情时代中国农村文化创造力，通过技术与艺术结合解决当地文化创新难题。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情对农村文化生态造成冲击，传统艺术创作难以持续，需探索可持续且具本地化特色的文化创新路径。
AI.method: 结合文献综述、案例研究、问卷调查与文本分析，训练机器学习模型解析主观美学，开发互动式AI媒介工具。
AI.result: 发现外来艺术家主导模式难以为继，提出培养本地‘艺术家村民’计划，AI生成内容可提升文化认同并促进文旅融合。
AI.conclusion: AI应作为文化赋能工具而非替代者，研究为农村社区技术赋能让能提供了理论框架与实践方向。

search_text: Exploring the Intersection of Complex Aesthetics and Generative AI for Promoting Cultural Creativity in Rural China after the Post-Pandemic Era 探索复杂美学与生成人工智能的交叉点，促进后疫情时代中国乡村的文化创意 This paper explores using generative AI and aesthetics to promote cultural creativity in rural China amidst COVID-19's impact. Through literature reviews, case studies, surveys, and text analysis, it examines art and technology applications in rural contexts and identifies key challenges. The study finds artworks often fail to resonate locally, while reliance on external artists limits sustainability. Hence, nurturing grassroots "artist villagers" through AI is proposed. Our approach involves training machine learning on subjective aesthetics to generate culturally relevant content. Interactive AI media can also boost tourism while preserving heritage. This pioneering research puts forth original perspectives on the intersection of AI and aesthetics to invigorate rural culture. It advocates holistic integration of technology and emphasizes AI's potential as a creative enabler versus replacement. Ultimately, it lays the groundwork for further exploration of leveraging AI innovations to empower rural communities. This timely study contributes to growing interest in emerging technologies to address critical issues facing rural China. 本文探讨了在 COVID-19 的影响下，利用生成式人工智能和美学来促进中国农村的文化创造力。通过文献综述、案例研究、调查和文本分析，它审视了农村背景下的艺术和技术应用，并确定了关键挑战。研究发现，艺术品往往无法在当地引起共鸣，而对外部艺术家的依赖限制了可持续性。由此，提出通过人工智能培育草根“艺术家村民”。我们的方法涉及对主观美学进行机器学习训练，以生成文化相关的内容。交互式人工智能媒体还可以在保护遗产的同时促进旅游业的发展。这项开创性的研究提出了人工智能与美学交叉以振兴乡村文化的独到视角。它提倡技术的整体整合，并强调人工智能作为创造性推动者而不是替代者的潜力。最终，它为进一步探索利用人工智能创新赋能农村社区奠定了基础。这项及时的研究有助于激发人们对新兴技术的兴趣，以解决中国农村面临的关键问题。 本文探讨利用生成式AI与美学促进后疫情时代中国农村文化创造力，通过技术与艺术结合解决当地文化创新难题。 Mengyao Guo,Xiaolin Zhang,Yuan Zhuang,Jing Chen,Pengfei Wang,Ze Gao cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.MM

authors_text: Wen-Chin Huang,Tomoki Toda
title: Evaluating Methods for Ground-Truth-Free Foreign Accent Conversion
title_zh: 评估无地面真实性的外国口音转换方法
comment: Accepted to the 2023 Asia Pacific Signal and Information Processing Association Annual Summit and Conference (APSIPA ASC). Demo page: https://unilight.github.io/Publication-Demos/publications/fac-evaluate. Code: https://github.com/unilight/seq2seq-vc
comments: Accepted to the 2023 Asia Pacific Signal and Information Processing Association Annual Summit and Conference (APSIPA ASC). Demo page: https://unilight.github.io/Publication-Demos/publications/fac-evaluate. Code: https://github.com/unilight/seq2seq-vc
abstract: Foreign accent conversion (FAC) is a special application of voice conversion (VC) which aims to convert the accented speech of a non-native speaker to a native-sounding speech with the same speaker identity. FAC is difficult since the native speech from the desired non-native speaker to be used as the training target is impossible to collect. In this work, we evaluate three recently proposed methods for ground-truth-free FAC, where all of them aim to harness the power of sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) and non-parallel VC models to properly convert the accent and control the speaker identity. Our experimental evaluation results show that no single method was significantly better than the others in all evaluation axes, which is in contrast to conclusions drawn in previous studies. We also explain the effectiveness of these methods with the training input and output of the seq2seq model and examine the design choice of the non-parallel VC model, and show that intelligibility measures such as word error rates do not correlate well with subjective accentedness. Finally, our implementation is open-sourced to promote reproducible research and help future researchers improve upon the compared systems.
summary: Foreign accent conversion (FAC) is a special application of voice conversion (VC) which aims to convert the accented speech of a non-native speaker to a native-sounding speech with the same speaker identity. FAC is difficult since the native speech from the desired non-native speaker to be used as the training target is impossible to collect. In this work, we evaluate three recently proposed methods for ground-truth-free FAC, where all of them aim to harness the power of sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) and non-parallel VC models to properly convert the accent and control the speaker identity. Our experimental evaluation results show that no single method was significantly better than the others in all evaluation axes, which is in contrast to conclusions drawn in previous studies. We also explain the effectiveness of these methods with the training input and output of the seq2seq model and examine the design choice of the non-parallel VC model, and show that intelligibility measures such as word error rates do not correlate well with subjective accentedness. Finally, our implementation is open-sourced to promote reproducible research and help future researchers improve upon the compared systems.
abstract_zh: 外国口音转换（FAC）是语音转换（VC）的一种特殊应用，旨在将非母语者的口音语音转换为具有相同说话者身份的母语语音。 FAC 很困难，因为无法收集用作训练目标的所需非母语人士的母语语音。在这项工作中，我们评估了最近提出的三种无地面实况 FAC 方法，它们都旨在利用序列到序列 (seq2seq) 和非并行 VC 模型的力量来正确转换口音并控制说话者身份。我们的实验评估结果表明，没有任何一种方法在所有评估轴上都明显优于其他方法，这与之前的研究得出的结论形成鲜明对比。我们还通过 seq2seq 模型的训练输入和输出解释了这些方法的有效性，并检查了非并行 VC 模型的设计选择，并表明诸如单词错误率之类的可懂度测量与主观口音没有很好的相关性。最后，我们的实现是开源的，以促进可重复的研究并帮助未来的研究人员改进比较系统。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了三种无需真实标签的外语口音转换方法，旨在将非母语者的口音转换为母语口音。
AI.motivation: 由于无法收集目标母语者的语音作为训练数据，外语口音转换（FAC）面临挑战，因此需要探索无需真实标签的FAC方法。
AI.method: 本文评估了三种基于序列到序列（seq2seq）和非并行语音转换模型的方法，并分析了它们的训练输入和输出。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，没有一种方法在所有评估维度上显著优于其他方法，且字错误率等可理解性指标与主观口音程度关联不大。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过开源实现推动了可重复研究，并为未来改进FAC系统提供了参考。

authors_text: Lorenzo Mur-Labadia,Jose J. Guerrero,Ruben Martinez-Cantin
title: Multi-label affordance mapping from egocentric vision
title_zh: 来自自我中心视觉的多标签可供性映射
abstract: Accurate affordance detection and segmentation with pixel precision is an important piece in many complex systems based on interactions, such as robots and assitive devices. We present a new approach to affordance perception which enables accurate multi-label segmentation. Our approach can be used to automatically extract grounded affordances from first person videos of interactions using a 3D map of the environment providing pixel level precision for the affordance location. We use this method to build the largest and most complete dataset on affordances based on the EPIC-Kitchen dataset, EPIC-Aff, which provides interaction-grounded, multi-label, metric and spatial affordance annotations. Then, we propose a new approach to affordance segmentation based on multi-label detection which enables multiple affordances to co-exists in the same space, for example if they are associated with the same object. We present several strategies of multi-label detection using several segmentation architectures. The experimental results highlight the importance of the multi-label detection. Finally, we show how our metric representation can be exploited for build a map of interaction hotspots in spatial action-centric zones and use that representation to perform a task-oriented navigation.
summary: Accurate affordance detection and segmentation with pixel precision is an important piece in many complex systems based on interactions, such as robots and assitive devices. We present a new approach to affordance perception which enables accurate multi-label segmentation. Our approach can be used to automatically extract grounded affordances from first person videos of interactions using a 3D map of the environment providing pixel level precision for the affordance location. We use this method to build the largest and most complete dataset on affordances based on the EPIC-Kitchen dataset, EPIC-Aff, which provides interaction-grounded, multi-label, metric and spatial affordance annotations. Then, we propose a new approach to affordance segmentation based on multi-label detection which enables multiple affordances to co-exists in the same space, for example if they are associated with the same object. We present several strategies of multi-label detection using several segmentation architectures. The experimental results highlight the importance of the multi-label detection. Finally, we show how our metric representation can be exploited for build a map of interaction hotspots in spatial action-centric zones and use that representation to perform a task-oriented navigation.
abstract_zh: 具有像素精度的准确可供性检测和分割是许多基于交互的复杂系统（例如机器人和辅助设备）中的重要组成部分。我们提出了一种新的可供性感知方法，可以实现准确的多标签分割。我们的方法可用于使用环境的 3D 地图从第一人称交互视频中自动提取接地可供性，为可供性位置提供像素级精度。我们使用这种方法基于 EPIC-Kitchen 数据集 EPIC-Aff 构建最大、最完整的可供性数据集，EPIC-Aff，它提供基于交互的、多标签、度量和空间可供性注释。然后，我们提出了一种基于多标签检测的可供性分割的新方法，该方法使得多个可供性能够在同一空间中共存，例如，如果它们与同一对象相关联。我们提出了使用多种分割架构的多标签检测的几种策略。实验结果凸显了多标签检测的重要性。最后，我们展示了如何利用我们的度量表示来构建以空间动作为中心的区域中的交互热点地图，并使用该表示来执行面向任务的导航。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于第一视角视觉的多标签亲和力映射方法，实现精确的亲和力分割与空间交互热点建模。
AI.motivation: 精确的亲和力检测对机器人和辅助设备等交互系统至关重要，现有方法难以实现多标签共存的像素级分割。
AI.method: 结合3D环境地图与多标签检测架构，构建EPIC-Aff数据集，并提出多策略分割框架实现同一空间内多亲和力共存检测。
AI.result: 创建了最大的交互 grounded 多标签亲和力数据集，验证了多标签检测的重要性，并实现了任务导向的导航应用。
AI.conclusion: 多标签亲和力分割方法有效提升了交互场景理解能力，为智能系统提供了精确的空间动作区域建模方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 多标签亲和力分割方法有效提升了交互场景理解能力，为智能系统提供了精确的空间动作区域建模方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于第一视角视觉的多标签亲和力映射方法，实现精确的亲和力分割与空间交互热点建模。
motivation: 精确的亲和力检测对机器人和辅助设备等交互系统至关重要，现有方法难以实现多标签共存的像素级分割。
method: 结合3D环境地图与多标签检测架构，构建EPIC-Aff数据集，并提出多策略分割框架实现同一空间内多亲和力共存检测。
result: 创建了最大的交互 grounded 多标签亲和力数据集，验证了多标签检测的重要性，并实现了任务导向的导航应用。
conclusion: 多标签亲和力分割方法有效提升了交互场景理解能力，为智能系统提供了精确的空间动作区域建模方案。
search_text: Multi-label affordance mapping from egocentric vision 来自自我中心视觉的多标签可供性映射 Accurate affordance detection and segmentation with pixel precision is an important piece in many complex systems based on interactions, such as robots and assitive devices. We present a new approach to affordance perception which enables accurate multi-label segmentation. Our approach can be used to automatically extract grounded affordances from first person videos of interactions using a 3D map of the environment providing pixel level precision for the affordance location. We use this method to build the largest and most complete dataset on affordances based on the EPIC-Kitchen dataset, EPIC-Aff, which provides interaction-grounded, multi-label, metric and spatial affordance annotations. Then, we propose a new approach to affordance segmentation based on multi-label detection which enables multiple affordances to co-exists in the same space, for example if they are associated with the same object. We present several strategies of multi-label detection using several segmentation architectures. The experimental results highlight the importance of the multi-label detection. Finally, we show how our metric representation can be exploited for build a map of interaction hotspots in spatial action-centric zones and use that representation to perform a task-oriented navigation. 具有像素精度的准确可供性检测和分割是许多基于交互的复杂系统（例如机器人和辅助设备）中的重要组成部分。我们提出了一种新的可供性感知方法，可以实现准确的多标签分割。我们的方法可用于使用环境的 3D 地图从第一人称交互视频中自动提取接地可供性，为可供性位置提供像素级精度。我们使用这种方法基于 EPIC-Kitchen 数据集 EPIC-Aff 构建最大、最完整的可供性数据集，EPIC-Aff，它提供基于交互的、多标签、度量和空间可供性注释。然后，我们提出了一种基于多标签检测的可供性分割的新方法，该方法使得多个可供性能够在同一空间中共存，例如，如果它们与同一对象相关联。我们提出了使用多种分割架构的多标签检测的几种策略。实验结果凸显了多标签检测的重要性。最后，我们展示了如何利用我们的度量表示来构建以空间动作为中心的区域中的交互热点地图，并使用该表示来执行面向任务的导航。 本文提出一种基于第一视角视觉的多标签亲和力映射方法，实现精确的亲和力分割与空间交互热点建模。 Lorenzo Mur-Labadia,Jose J. Guerrero,Ruben Martinez-Cantin cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Fanda Fan,Chaoxu Guo,Litong Gong,Biao Wang,Tiezheng Ge,Yuning Jiang,Chunjie Luo,Jianfeng Zhan
title: Hierarchical Masked 3D Diffusion Model for Video Outpainting
title_zh: 用于视频外绘的分层蒙版 3D 扩散模型
abstract: Video outpainting aims to adequately complete missing areas at the edges of video frames. Compared to image outpainting, it presents an additional challenge as the model should maintain the temporal consistency of the filled area. In this paper, we introduce a masked 3D diffusion model for video outpainting. We use the technique of mask modeling to train the 3D diffusion model. This allows us to use multiple guide frames to connect the results of multiple video clip inferences, thus ensuring temporal consistency and reducing jitter between adjacent frames. Meanwhile, we extract the global frames of the video as prompts and guide the model to obtain information other than the current video clip using cross-attention. We also introduce a hybrid coarse-to-fine inference pipeline to alleviate the artifact accumulation problem. The existing coarse-to-fine pipeline only uses the infilling strategy, which brings degradation because the time interval of the sparse frames is too large. Our pipeline benefits from bidirectional learning of the mask modeling and thus can employ a hybrid strategy of infilling and interpolation when generating sparse frames. Experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art results in video outpainting tasks. More results and codes are provided at our https://fanfanda.github.io/M3DDM/.
summary: Video outpainting aims to adequately complete missing areas at the edges of video frames. Compared to image outpainting, it presents an additional challenge as the model should maintain the temporal consistency of the filled area. In this paper, we introduce a masked 3D diffusion model for video outpainting. We use the technique of mask modeling to train the 3D diffusion model. This allows us to use multiple guide frames to connect the results of multiple video clip inferences, thus ensuring temporal consistency and reducing jitter between adjacent frames. Meanwhile, we extract the global frames of the video as prompts and guide the model to obtain information other than the current video clip using cross-attention. We also introduce a hybrid coarse-to-fine inference pipeline to alleviate the artifact accumulation problem. The existing coarse-to-fine pipeline only uses the infilling strategy, which brings degradation because the time interval of the sparse frames is too large. Our pipeline benefits from bidirectional learning of the mask modeling and thus can employ a hybrid strategy of infilling and interpolation when generating sparse frames. Experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art results in video outpainting tasks. More results and codes are provided at our https://fanfanda.github.io/M3DDM/.
abstract_zh: 视频修复的目的是充分补全视频帧边缘的缺失区域。与图像外画相比，它提出了额外的挑战，因为模型应该保持填充区域的时间一致性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种用于视频绘制的蒙版 3D 扩散模型。我们使用掩模建模技术来训练 3D 扩散模型。这使得我们可以使用多个引导帧来连接多个视频剪辑推理的结果，从而保证时间一致性并减少相邻帧之间的抖动。同时，我们提取视频的全局帧作为提示，并利用交叉注意力引导模型获取当前视频片段之外的信息。我们还引入了混合从粗到精的推理管道来缓解伪影累积问题。现有的从粗到精的管道仅使用填充策略，由于稀疏帧的时间间隔过大，带来了性能退化。我们的管道受益于掩模建模的双向学习，因此可以在生成稀疏帧时采用填充和插值的混合策略。实验表明，我们的方法在视频绘制任务中取得了最先进的结果。更多结果和代码请参见我们的 https://fanfanda.github.io/M3DDM/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层遮罩3D扩散模型，用于解决视频外推任务中边缘区域补全和时间一致性保持的问题。
AI.motivation: 与图像外推相比，视频外推需额外保证补全区域的时间一致性，现有方法存在帧间抖动和稀疏帧插值退化等问题。
AI.method: 采用遮罩建模训练3D扩散模型，结合多引导帧连接多视频片段；利用全局帧作为提示通过交叉注意力获取跨片段信息；设计混合粗到细推理流程，结合补全与插值策略减少伪影累积。
AI.result: 在视频外推任务中达到最先进水平，实验验证了方法在时间一致性和视觉质量上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过遮罩建模和混合推理策略有效解决了视频外推中的时间一致性与伪影问题，为视频生成领域提供新思路。

authors_text: Mikail Yayla,Simon Thomann,Ming-Liang Wei,Chia-Lin Yang,Jian-Jia Chen,Hussam Amrouch
title: HW/SW Codesign for Robust and Efficient Binarized SNNs by Capacitor Minimization
title_zh: 通过电容器最小化实现稳健、高效的二值化 SNN 的硬件/软件协同设计
abstract: Using accelerators based on analog computing is an efficient way to process the immensely large workloads in Neural Networks (NNs). One example of an analog computing scheme for NNs is Integrate-and-Fire (IF) Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs). However, to achieve high inference accuracy in IF-SNNs, the analog hardware needs to represent current-based multiply-accumulate (MAC) levels as spike times, for which a large membrane capacitor needs to be charged for a certain amount of time. A large capacitor results in high energy use, considerable area cost, and long latency, constituting one of the major bottlenecks in analog IF-SNN implementations. In this work, we propose a HW/SW Codesign method, called CapMin, for capacitor size minimization in analog computing IF-SNNs. CapMin minimizes the capacitor size by reducing the number of spike times needed for accurate operation of the HW, based on the absolute frequency of MAC level occurrences in the SW. To increase the operation of IF-SNNs to current variation, we propose the method CapMin-V, which trades capacitor size for protection based on the reduced capacitor size found in CapMin. In our experiments, CapMin achieves more than a 14$\times$ reduction in capacitor size over the state of the art, while CapMin-V achieves increased variation tolerance in the IF-SNN operation, requiring only a small increase in capacitor size.
summary: Using accelerators based on analog computing is an efficient way to process the immensely large workloads in Neural Networks (NNs). One example of an analog computing scheme for NNs is Integrate-and-Fire (IF) Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs). However, to achieve high inference accuracy in IF-SNNs, the analog hardware needs to represent current-based multiply-accumulate (MAC) levels as spike times, for which a large membrane capacitor needs to be charged for a certain amount of time. A large capacitor results in high energy use, considerable area cost, and long latency, constituting one of the major bottlenecks in analog IF-SNN implementations. In this work, we propose a HW/SW Codesign method, called CapMin, for capacitor size minimization in analog computing IF-SNNs. CapMin minimizes the capacitor size by reducing the number of spike times needed for accurate operation of the HW, based on the absolute frequency of MAC level occurrences in the SW. To increase the operation of IF-SNNs to current variation, we propose the method CapMin-V, which trades capacitor size for protection based on the reduced capacitor size found in CapMin. In our experiments, CapMin achieves more than a 14$\times$ reduction in capacitor size over the state of the art, while CapMin-V achieves increased variation tolerance in the IF-SNN operation, requiring only a small increase in capacitor size.
abstract_zh: 使用基于模拟计算的加速器是处理神经网络 (NN) 中巨大工作负载的有效方法。神经网络模拟计算方案的一个例子是集成激发 (IF) 尖峰神经网络 (SNN)。然而，为了在 IF-SNN 中实现高推理精度，模拟硬件需要将基于电流的乘法累加 (MAC) 电平表示为尖峰时间，为此需要对大型薄膜电容器充电一定的时间。大电容器会导致高能耗、相当大的面积成本和长延迟，构成模拟 IF-SNN 实现的主要瓶颈之一。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为 CapMin 的 HW/SW 协同设计方法，用于模拟计算 IF-SNN 中的电容器尺寸最小化。 CapMin 根据软件中 MAC 电平出现的绝对频率，通过减少硬件精确操作所需的尖峰次数来最小化电容器尺寸。为了增加 IF-SNN 对电流变化的操作，我们提出了 CapMin-V 方法，该方法根据 CapMin 中发现的减小的电容器尺寸，以电容器尺寸换取保护。在我们的实验中，与现有技术相比，CapMin 的电容器尺寸减少了 14 倍以上，而 CapMin-V 在 IF-SNN 操作中实现了更高的变化容限，只需要稍微增加电容器尺寸。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种硬件/软件协同设计方法CapMin，通过最小化电容大小提升模拟计算IF-SNN的能效与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有IF-SNN为实现高精度需大电容充电，导致高能耗、大面积和长延迟，成为模拟计算SNN的瓶颈。
AI.method: 基于软件中MAC操作频率统计，设计CapMin减少硬件所需脉冲次数；进一步提出CapMin-V，在电容缩减基础上增强对电流波动的容错能力。
AI.result: CapMin使电容尺寸较现有方法减少14倍，CapMin-V在保持容错性的同时仅需小幅增加电容。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了模拟SNN的电容瓶颈问题，为高效能、鲁棒的神经网络硬件实现提供新思路。

CapMin minimizes the capacitor size by reducing the number of spike times needed for accurate operation of the HW, based on the absolute frequency of MAC level occurrences in the SW. To increase the operation of IF-SNNs to current variation, we propose the method CapMin-V, which trades capacitor size for protection based on the reduced capacitor size found in CapMin. In our experiments, CapMin achieves more than a 14$\times$ reduction in capacitor size over the state of the art, while CapMin-V achieves increased variation tolerance in the IF-SNN operation, requiring only a small increase in capacitor size. 使用基于模拟计算的加速器是处理神经网络 (NN) 中巨大工作负载的有效方法。神经网络模拟计算方案的一个例子是集成激发 (IF) 尖峰神经网络 (SNN)。然而，为了在 IF-SNN 中实现高推理精度，模拟硬件需要将基于电流的乘法累加 (MAC) 电平表示为尖峰时间，为此需要对大型薄膜电容器充电一定的时间。大电容器会导致高能耗、相当大的面积成本和长延迟，构成模拟 IF-SNN 实现的主要瓶颈之一。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为 CapMin 的 HW/SW 协同设计方法，用于模拟计算 IF-SNN 中的电容器尺寸最小化。 CapMin 根据软件中 MAC 电平出现的绝对频率，通过减少硬件精确操作所需的尖峰次数来最小化电容器尺寸。为了增加 IF-SNN 对电流变化的操作，我们提出了 CapMin-V 方法，该方法根据 CapMin 中发现的减小的电容器尺寸，以电容器尺寸换取保护。在我们的实验中，与现有技术相比，CapMin 的电容器尺寸减少了 14 倍以上，而 CapMin-V 在 IF-SNN 操作中实现了更高的变化容限，只需要稍微增加电容器尺寸。 本文提出一种硬件/软件协同设计方法CapMin，通过最小化电容大小提升模拟计算IF-SNN的能效与鲁棒性。 Mikail Yayla,Simon Thomann,Ming-Liang Wei,Chia-Lin Yang,Jian-Jia Chen,Hussam Amrouch cs.AR,cs.ET

authors_text: Peiying Wang,Sunlu Zeng,Junqing Chen,Lu Fan,Meng Chen,Youzheng Wu,Xiaodong He
title: Leveraging Label Information for Multimodal Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 利用标签信息进行多模式情绪识别
abstract: Multimodal emotion recognition (MER) aims to detect the emotional status of a given expression by combining the speech and text information. Intuitively, label information should be capable of helping the model locate the salient tokens/frames relevant to the specific emotion, which finally facilitates the MER task. Inspired by this, we propose a novel approach for MER by leveraging label information. Specifically, we first obtain the representative label embeddings for both text and speech modalities, then learn the label-enhanced text/speech representations for each utterance via label-token and label-frame interactions. Finally, we devise a novel label-guided attentive fusion module to fuse the label-aware text and speech representations for emotion classification. Extensive experiments were conducted on the public IEMOCAP dataset, and experimental results demonstrate that our proposed approach outperforms existing baselines and achieves new state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Multimodal emotion recognition (MER) aims to detect the emotional status of a given expression by combining the speech and text information. Intuitively, label information should be capable of helping the model locate the salient tokens/frames relevant to the specific emotion, which finally facilitates the MER task. Inspired by this, we propose a novel approach for MER by leveraging label information. Specifically, we first obtain the representative label embeddings for both text and speech modalities, then learn the label-enhanced text/speech representations for each utterance via label-token and label-frame interactions. Finally, we devise a novel label-guided attentive fusion module to fuse the label-aware text and speech representations for emotion classification. Extensive experiments were conducted on the public IEMOCAP dataset, and experimental results demonstrate that our proposed approach outperforms existing baselines and achieves new state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 多模态情感识别（MER）旨在通过结合语音和文本信息来检测给定表达的情感状态。直观上，标签信息应该能够帮助模型找到与特定情绪相关的显着标记/框架，从而最终促进 MER 任务。受此启发，我们提出了一种利用标签信息的 MER 新颖方法。具体来说，我们首先获得文本和语音模态的代表性标签嵌入，然后通过标签-令牌和标签-框架交互学习每个话语的标签增强文本/语音表示。最后，我们设计了一种新颖的标签引导注意力融合模块来融合标签感知文本和语音表示以进行情感分类。在公共 IEMOCAP 数据集上进行了大量实验，实验结果表明我们提出的方法优于现有基线并实现了新的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用标签信息的多模态情绪识别方法，通过结合语音和文本信息提升情绪分类效果。
AI.motivation: 标签信息能帮助模型定位与特定情感相关的显著特征，从而增强多模态情绪识别的性能。
AI.method: 获取文本和语音的标签嵌入，通过标签-词/标签-帧交互学习增强表示，并设计标签引导的注意力融合模块进行情绪分类。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP数据集上实验表明，该方法优于现有基线，达到新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 标签信息有效提升了多模态情绪识别性能，所提方法在情感分类任务中具有优势。

authors_text: Tiezheng Yu,Ziwei Ji,Pascale Fung
title: Improving Query-Focused Meeting Summarization with Query-Relevant Knowledge
title_zh: 利用查询相关知识改进以查询为中心的会议总结
abstract: Query-Focused Meeting Summarization (QFMS) aims to generate a summary of a given meeting transcript conditioned upon a query. The main challenges for QFMS are the long input text length and sparse query-relevant information in the meeting transcript. In this paper, we propose a knowledge-enhanced two-stage framework called Knowledge-Aware Summarizer (KAS) to tackle the challenges. In the first stage, we introduce knowledge-aware scores to improve the query-relevant segment extraction. In the second stage, we incorporate query-relevant knowledge in the summary generation. Experimental results on the QMSum dataset show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance. Further analysis proves the competency of our methods in generating relevant and faithful summaries.
summary: Query-Focused Meeting Summarization (QFMS) aims to generate a summary of a given meeting transcript conditioned upon a query. The main challenges for QFMS are the long input text length and sparse query-relevant information in the meeting transcript. In this paper, we propose a knowledge-enhanced two-stage framework called Knowledge-Aware Summarizer (KAS) to tackle the challenges. In the first stage, we introduce knowledge-aware scores to improve the query-relevant segment extraction. In the second stage, we incorporate query-relevant knowledge in the summary generation. Experimental results on the QMSum dataset show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance. Further analysis proves the competency of our methods in generating relevant and faithful summaries.
abstract_zh: 以查询为中心的会议摘要 (QFMS) 旨在根据查询生成给定会议记录的摘要。 QFMS 的主要挑战是输入文本长度较长，会议记录中与查询相关的信息稀疏。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为知识感知摘要器（KAS）的知识增强两阶段框架来应对这些挑战。在第一阶段，我们引入知识感知分数来改进与查询相关的片段提取。在第二阶段，我们将与查询相关的知识纳入摘要生成中。 QMSum 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能。进一步的分析证明了我们的方法在生成相关且忠实的摘要方面的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种知识增强的两阶段框架KAS，用于解决查询聚焦会议摘要中的长文本输入和查询相关信息稀疏的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理会议记录的长文本长度及查询相关信息的稀疏性，导致生成的摘要相关性不足。
AI.method: 设计知识感知评分机制进行查询相关段落提取，并在摘要生成阶段融合查询相关知识，形成两阶段的Knowledge-Aware Summarizer框架。
AI.result: 在QMSum数据集上达到SOTA性能，实验验证了方法在生成相关且忠实摘要方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 知识增强的两阶段框架能有效提升查询聚焦会议摘要的质量，为该领域提供了新思路。
