authors_text: Stephan Alaniz,Massimiliano Mancini,Zeynep Akata
title: Iterative Superquadric Recomposition of 3D Objects from Multiple Views
title_zh: 从多个视图迭代超二次重构 3D 对象
abstract: Humans are good at recomposing novel objects, i.e. they can identify commonalities between unknown objects from general structure to finer detail, an ability difficult to replicate by machines. We propose a framework, ISCO, to recompose an object using 3D superquadrics as semantic parts directly from 2D views without training a model that uses 3D supervision. To achieve this, we optimize the superquadric parameters that compose a specific instance of the object, comparing its rendered 3D view and 2D image silhouette. Our ISCO framework iteratively adds new superquadrics wherever the reconstruction error is high, abstracting first coarse regions and then finer details of the target object. With this simple coarse-to-fine inductive bias, ISCO provides consistent superquadrics for related object parts, despite not having any semantic supervision. Since ISCO does not train any neural network, it is also inherently robust to out-of-distribution objects. Experiments show that, compared to recent single instance superquadrics reconstruction approaches, ISCO provides consistently more accurate 3D reconstructions, even from images in the wild. Code available at https://github.com/ExplainableML/ISCO .
summary: Humans are good at recomposing novel objects, i.e. they can identify commonalities between unknown objects from general structure to finer detail, an ability difficult to replicate by machines. We propose a framework, ISCO, to recompose an object using 3D superquadrics as semantic parts directly from 2D views without training a model that uses 3D supervision. To achieve this, we optimize the superquadric parameters that compose a specific instance of the object, comparing its rendered 3D view and 2D image silhouette. Our ISCO framework iteratively adds new superquadrics wherever the reconstruction error is high, abstracting first coarse regions and then finer details of the target object. With this simple coarse-to-fine inductive bias, ISCO provides consistent superquadrics for related object parts, despite not having any semantic supervision. Since ISCO does not train any neural network, it is also inherently robust to out-of-distribution objects. Experiments show that, compared to recent single instance superquadrics reconstruction approaches, ISCO provides consistently more accurate 3D reconstructions, even from images in the wild. Code available at https://github.com/ExplainableML/ISCO .
abstract_zh: 人类擅长重组新奇物体，即他们可以识别未知物体之间从一般结构到更精细细节的共性，这是机器难以复制的能力。我们提出了一个框架 ISCO，可以直接从 2D 视图使用 3D 超二次曲面作为语义部分来重构对象，而无需训练使用 3D 监督的模型。为了实现这一目标，我们优化了构成对象特定实例的超二次参数，比较其渲染的 3D 视图和 2D 图像轮廓。我们的 ISCO 框架会在重建误差较高的地方迭代地添加新的超二次曲面，首先抽象出粗略区域，然后抽象出目标对象的更精细细节。通过这种简单的从粗到细的归纳偏差，ISCO 为相关对象部分提供了一致的超二次曲面，尽管没有任何语义监督。由于 ISCO 不训练任何神经网络，因此它对于分布外的对象也具有固有的鲁棒性。实验表明，与最近的单实例超二次重建方法相比，ISCO 始终提供更准确的 3D 重建，即使是来自野外图像。代码可在 https://github.com/ExplainableML/ISCO 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需3D监督训练的框架ISCO，通过迭代优化超二次曲面参数从多视角2D图像重建3D物体。
AI.motivation: 人类能从多视角中抽象物体结构，而现有方法依赖3D监督或单实例训练，难以处理分布外物体且缺乏语义一致性。
AI.method: 通过比较渲染的3D视图与2D图像轮廓迭代优化超二次曲面参数，从粗到细逐步添加曲面部件完成重建。
AI.result: 在野外图像中优于单实例超二次曲面重建方法，无需神经网络训练且对分布外物体具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: ISCO框架通过简单归纳偏置实现无需语义监督的3D重建，代码开源便于应用。

ai_content_json.result: 在野外图像中优于单实例超二次曲面重建方法，无需神经网络训练且对分布外物体具有鲁棒性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: ISCO框架通过简单归纳偏置实现无需语义监督的3D重建，代码开源便于应用。

tldr: 本文提出一种无需3D监督训练的框架ISCO，通过迭代优化超二次曲面参数从多视角2D图像重建3D物体。
motivation: 人类能从多视角中抽象物体结构，而现有方法依赖3D监督或单实例训练，难以处理分布外物体且缺乏语义一致性。
method: 通过比较渲染的3D视图与2D图像轮廓迭代优化超二次曲面参数，从粗到细逐步添加曲面部件完成重建。
result: 在野外图像中优于单实例超二次曲面重建方法，无需神经网络训练且对分布外物体具有鲁棒性。
conclusion: ISCO框架通过简单归纳偏置实现无需语义监督的3D重建，代码开源便于应用。
search_text: Iterative Superquadric Recomposition of 3D Objects from Multiple Views 从多个视图迭代超二次重构 3D 对象 Humans are good at recomposing novel objects, i.e. they can identify commonalities between unknown objects from general structure to finer detail, an ability difficult to replicate by machines. We propose a framework, ISCO, to recompose an object using 3D superquadrics as semantic parts directly from 2D views without training a model that uses 3D supervision. To achieve this, we optimize the superquadric parameters that compose a specific instance of the object, comparing its rendered 3D view and 2D image silhouette. Our ISCO framework iteratively adds new superquadrics wherever the reconstruction error is high, abstracting first coarse regions and then finer details of the target object. With this simple coarse-to-fine inductive bias, ISCO provides consistent superquadrics for related object parts, despite not having any semantic supervision. Since ISCO does not train any neural network, it is also inherently robust to out-of-distribution objects. Experiments show that, compared to recent single instance superquadrics reconstruction approaches, ISCO provides consistently more accurate 3D reconstructions, even from images in the wild. Code available at https://github.com/ExplainableML/ISCO . 人类擅长重组新奇物体，即他们可以识别未知物体之间从一般结构到更精细细节的共性，这是机器难以复制的能力。我们提出了一个框架 ISCO，可以直接从 2D 视图使用 3D 超二次曲面作为语义部分来重构对象，而无需训练使用 3D 监督的模型。为了实现这一目标，我们优化了构成对象特定实例的超二次参数，比较其渲染的 3D 视图和 2D 图像轮廓。我们的 ISCO 框架会在重建误差较高的地方迭代地添加新的超二次曲面，首先抽象出粗略区域，然后抽象出目标对象的更精细细节。通过这种简单的从粗到细的归纳偏差，ISCO 为相关对象部分提供了一致的超二次曲面，尽管没有任何语义监督。由于 ISCO 不训练任何神经网络，因此它对于分布外的对象也具有固有的鲁棒性。实验表明，与最近的单实例超二次重建方法相比，ISCO 始终提供更准确的 3D 重建，即使是来自野外图像。代码可在 https://github.com/ExplainableML/ISCO 获取。 本文提出一种无需3D监督训练的框架ISCO，通过迭代优化超二次曲面参数从多视角2D图像重建3D物体。 Stephan Alaniz,Massimiliano Mancini,Zeynep Akata cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Wataru Shimoda,Daichi Haraguchi,Seiichi Uchida,Kota Yamaguchi
title: Towards Diverse and Consistent Typography Generation
title_zh: 实现多样化且一致的版式生成
abstract: In this work, we consider the typography generation task that aims at producing diverse typographic styling for the given graphic document. We formulate typography generation as a fine-grained attribute generation for multiple text elements and build an autoregressive model to generate diverse typography that matches the input design context. We further propose a simple yet effective sampling approach that respects the consistency and distinction principle of typography so that generated examples share consistent typographic styling across text elements. Our empirical study shows that our model successfully generates diverse typographic designs while preserving a consistent typographic structure.
summary: In this work, we consider the typography generation task that aims at producing diverse typographic styling for the given graphic document. We formulate typography generation as a fine-grained attribute generation for multiple text elements and build an autoregressive model to generate diverse typography that matches the input design context. We further propose a simple yet effective sampling approach that respects the consistency and distinction principle of typography so that generated examples share consistent typographic styling across text elements. Our empirical study shows that our model successfully generates diverse typographic designs while preserving a consistent typographic structure.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们考虑排版生成任务，旨在为给定的图形文档生成不同的排版样式。我们将版式生成制定为多个文本元素的细粒度属性生成，并构建自回归模型以生成与输入设计上下文相匹配的多种版式。我们进一步提出了一种简单而有效的采样方法，该方法尊重排版的一致性和区分原则，以便生成的示例在文本元素之间共享一致的排版样式。我们的实证研究表明，我们的模型成功地生成了多样化的版式设计，同时保留了一致的版式结构。

AI.tldr: 该论文的主要任务是为给定的图形文档生成多样化且保持一致的排版样式。
AI.motivation: 现有排版生成方法难以在多样性和一致性之间取得平衡，需解决生成多样化排版同时保持结构一致的问题。
AI.method: 提出自回归模型生成细粒度属性，并设计采样方法确保排版一致性和区分性。
AI.result: 实证研究表明模型能有效生成多样化排版设计，同时保持结构一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持排版一致性的同时实现多样性，为图形文档排版生成提供新思路。

authors_text: Romeo Kienzler,Leonardo Pondian Tizzei,Benedikt Blumenstiel,Zoltan Arnold Nagy,S. Karthik Mukkavilli,Johannes Schmude,Marcus Freitag,Michael Behrendt,Daniel Salles Civitarese,Naomi Simumba,Daiki Kimura,Hendrik Hamann
title: TensorBank: Tensor Lakehouse for Foundation Model Training
title_zh: TensorBank：用于基础模型训练的 Tensor Lakehouse
abstract: Storing and streaming high dimensional data for foundation model training became a critical requirement with the rise of foundation models beyond natural language. In this paper we introduce TensorBank, a petabyte scale tensor lakehouse capable of streaming tensors from Cloud Object Store (COS) to GPU memory at wire speed based on complex relational queries. We use Hierarchical Statistical Indices (HSI) for query acceleration. Our architecture allows to directly address tensors on block level using HTTP range reads. Once in GPU memory, data can be transformed using PyTorch transforms. We provide a generic PyTorch dataset type with a corresponding dataset factory translating relational queries and requested transformations as an instance. By making use of the HSI, irrelevant blocks can be skipped without reading them as those indices contain statistics on their content at different hierarchical resolution levels. This is an opinionated architecture powered by open standards and making heavy use of open-source technology. Although, hardened for production use using geospatial-temporal data, this architecture generalizes to other use case like computer vision, computational neuroscience, biological sequence analysis and more.
summary: Storing and streaming high dimensional data for foundation model training became a critical requirement with the rise of foundation models beyond natural language. In this paper we introduce TensorBank, a petabyte scale tensor lakehouse capable of streaming tensors from Cloud Object Store (COS) to GPU memory at wire speed based on complex relational queries. We use Hierarchical Statistical Indices (HSI) for query acceleration. Our architecture allows to directly address tensors on block level using HTTP range reads. Once in GPU memory, data can be transformed using PyTorch transforms. We provide a generic PyTorch dataset type with a corresponding dataset factory translating relational queries and requested transformations as an instance. By making use of the HSI, irrelevant blocks can be skipped without reading them as those indices contain statistics on their content at different hierarchical resolution levels. This is an opinionated architecture powered by open standards and making heavy use of open-source technology. Although, hardened for production use using geospatial-temporal data, this architecture generalizes to other use case like computer vision, computational neuroscience, biological sequence analysis and more.
abstract_zh: 随着自然语言之外的基础模型的兴起，存储和流式传输用于基础模型训练的高维数据成为一项关键要求。在本文中，我们介绍了 TensorBank，这是一个 PB 级张量 Lakehouse，能够基于复杂的关系查询以线速将张量从云对象存储 (COS) 流式传输到 GPU 内存。我们使用分层统计索引（HSI）来加速查询。我们的架构允许使用 HTTP 范围读取直接在块级别上寻址张量。一旦进入 GPU 内存，就可以使用 PyTorch 转换来转换数据。我们提供通用的 PyTorch 数据集类型和相应的数据集工厂，将关系查询和请求的转换作为实例进行转换。通过利用 HSI，可以跳过不相关的块而不读取它们，因为这些索引包含其在不同层次分辨率级别的内容的统计数据。这是一种由开放标准支持并大量使用开源技术的固执己见的架构。尽管使用地理空间-时间数据对生产用途进行了强化，但该架构可推广到其他用例，例如计算机视觉、计算神经科学、生物序列分析等。

AI.tldr: 提出TensorBank，一种用于基础模型训练的高维数据存储与流式传输系统。
AI.motivation: 随着基础模型的发展，高维数据的存储和高效流式传输成为关键需求，传统方法存在效率瓶颈。
AI.method: 基于分层统计索引（HSI）加速查询，结合HTTP范围读取和PyTorch数据转换，构建开放标准的湖仓架构。
AI.result: 实现高效的数据流式传输，通过HSI跳过无关数据块，支持多种应用场景。
AI.conclusion: TensorBank架构基于开放标准，适用于生产环境，可扩展到计算机视觉、生物序列分析等领域。

authors_text: Sander Riisøen Jyhne,Per-Arne Andersen,Morten Goodwin
title: DeNISE: Deep Networks for Improved Segmentation Edges
title_zh: DeNISE：用于改进分割边缘的深度网络
abstract: This paper presents Deep Networks for Improved Segmentation Edges (DeNISE), a novel data enhancement technique using edge detection and segmentation models to improve the boundary quality of segmentation masks. DeNISE utilizes the inherent differences in two sequential deep neural architectures to improve the accuracy of the predicted segmentation edge. DeNISE applies to all types of neural networks and is not trained end-to-end, allowing rapid experiments to discover which models complement each other. We test and apply DeNISE for building segmentation in aerial images. Aerial images are known for difficult conditions as they have a low resolution with optical noise, such as reflections, shadows, and visual obstructions. Overall the paper demonstrates the potential for DeNISE. Using the technique, we improve the baseline results with a building IoU of 78.9%.
summary: This paper presents Deep Networks for Improved Segmentation Edges (DeNISE), a novel data enhancement technique using edge detection and segmentation models to improve the boundary quality of segmentation masks. DeNISE utilizes the inherent differences in two sequential deep neural architectures to improve the accuracy of the predicted segmentation edge. DeNISE applies to all types of neural networks and is not trained end-to-end, allowing rapid experiments to discover which models complement each other. We test and apply DeNISE for building segmentation in aerial images. Aerial images are known for difficult conditions as they have a low resolution with optical noise, such as reflections, shadows, and visual obstructions. Overall the paper demonstrates the potential for DeNISE. Using the technique, we improve the baseline results with a building IoU of 78.9%.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了改进分割边缘的深度网络（DeNISE），这是一种利用边缘检测和分割模型来提高分割掩模的边界质量的新型数据增强技术。 DeNISE 利用两个连续深度神经架构的固有差异来提高预测分割边缘的准确性。 DeNISE 适用于所有类型的神经网络，并且未进行端到端训练，因此可以通过快速实验来发现哪些模型可以相互补充。我们测试并应用 DeNISE 在航空图像中构建分割。众所周知，航空图像的条件很困难，因为它们的分辨率较低，并且存在光学噪声，例如反射、阴影和视觉障碍。总体而言，本文展示了 DeNISE 的潜力。使用该技术，我们将基线结果改进为 78.9% 的建筑 IoU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeNISE方法，通过结合边缘检测与分割模型的数据增强技术，提升分割掩码的边界质量，并在航拍图像建筑分割任务中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有分割模型在低分辨率且含噪声的航拍图像中难以准确捕捉边界，需一种无需端到端训练的通用方法提升分割精度。
AI.method: 利用两种深度网络架构的差异性，通过边缘检测结果指导分割模型优化，以非端到端方式增强数据并适配各类神经网络。
AI.result: 在航拍图像建筑分割任务中，DeNISE将基线模型的IoU指标提升至78.9%。
AI.conclusion: DeNISE验证了通过架构差异优化分割边界的可行性，为复杂场景下的分割任务提供了通用且灵活的解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: DeNISE验证了通过架构差异优化分割边界的可行性，为复杂场景下的分割任务提供了通用且灵活的解决方案。

search_text: DeNISE: Deep Networks for Improved Segmentation Edges DeNISE：用于改进分割边缘的深度网络 This paper presents Deep Networks for Improved Segmentation Edges (DeNISE), a novel data enhancement technique using edge detection and segmentation models to improve the boundary quality of segmentation masks. DeNISE utilizes the inherent differences in two sequential deep neural architectures to improve the accuracy of the predicted segmentation edge. DeNISE applies to all types of neural networks and is not trained end-to-end, allowing rapid experiments to discover which models complement each other. We test and apply DeNISE for building segmentation in aerial images. Aerial images are known for difficult conditions as they have a low resolution with optical noise, such as reflections, shadows, and visual obstructions. Overall the paper demonstrates the potential for DeNISE. Using the technique, we improve the baseline results with a building IoU of 78.9%. 本文提出了改进分割边缘的深度网络（DeNISE），这是一种利用边缘检测和分割模型来提高分割掩模的边界质量的新型数据增强技术。 DeNISE 利用两个连续深度神经架构的固有差异来提高预测分割边缘的准确性。 DeNISE 适用于所有类型的神经网络，并且未进行端到端训练，因此可以通过快速实验来发现哪些模型可以相互补充。我们测试并应用 DeNISE 在航空图像中构建分割。众所周知，航空图像的条件很困难，因为它们的分辨率较低，并且存在光学噪声，例如反射、阴影和视觉障碍。总体而言，本文展示了 DeNISE 的潜力。使用该技术，我们将基线结果改进为 78.9% 的建筑 IoU。 本文提出DeNISE方法，通过结合边缘检测与分割模型的数据增强技术，提升分割掩码的边界质量，并在航拍图像建筑分割任务中验证其有效性。 Sander Riisøen Jyhne,Per-Arne Andersen,Morten Goodwin cs.CV

authors_text: Siyang Jiang,Rui Fang,Hsi-Wen Chen,Wei Ding,Ming-Syan Chen
title: Dual Adversarial Alignment for Realistic Support-Query Shift Few-shot Learning
title_zh: 用于现实支持查询转移的双对抗对齐少样本学习
abstract: Support-query shift few-shot learning aims to classify unseen examples (query set) to labeled data (support set) based on the learned embedding in a low-dimensional space under a distribution shift between the support set and the query set. However, in real-world scenarios the shifts are usually unknown and varied, making it difficult to estimate in advance. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a novel but more difficult challenge, RSQS, focusing on Realistic Support-Query Shift few-shot learning. The key feature of RSQS is that the individual samples in a meta-task are subjected to multiple distribution shifts in each meta-task. In addition, we propose a unified adversarial feature alignment method called DUal adversarial ALignment framework (DuaL) to relieve RSQS from two aspects, i.e., inter-domain bias and intra-domain variance. On the one hand, for the inter-domain bias, we corrupt the original data in advance and use the synthesized perturbed inputs to train the repairer network by minimizing distance in the feature level. On the other hand, for intra-domain variance, we proposed a generator network to synthesize hard, i.e., less similar, examples from the support set in a self-supervised manner and introduce regularized optimal transportation to derive a smooth optimal transportation plan. Lastly, a benchmark of RSQS is built with several state-of-the-art baselines among three datasets (CIFAR100, mini-ImageNet, and Tiered-Imagenet). Experiment results show that DuaL significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in our benchmark.
summary: Support-query shift few-shot learning aims to classify unseen examples (query set) to labeled data (support set) based on the learned embedding in a low-dimensional space under a distribution shift between the support set and the query set. However, in real-world scenarios the shifts are usually unknown and varied, making it difficult to estimate in advance. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a novel but more difficult challenge, RSQS, focusing on Realistic Support-Query Shift few-shot learning. The key feature of RSQS is that the individual samples in a meta-task are subjected to multiple distribution shifts in each meta-task. In addition, we propose a unified adversarial feature alignment method called DUal adversarial ALignment framework (DuaL) to relieve RSQS from two aspects, i.e., inter-domain bias and intra-domain variance. On the one hand, for the inter-domain bias, we corrupt the original data in advance and use the synthesized perturbed inputs to train the repairer network by minimizing distance in the feature level. On the other hand, for intra-domain variance, we proposed a generator network to synthesize hard, i.e., less similar, examples from the support set in a self-supervised manner and introduce regularized optimal transportation to derive a smooth optimal transportation plan. Lastly, a benchmark of RSQS is built with several state-of-the-art baselines among three datasets (CIFAR100, mini-ImageNet, and Tiered-Imagenet). Experiment results show that DuaL significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in our benchmark.
abstract_zh: 支持查询偏移少镜头学习旨在基于在支持集和查询集之间的分布偏移下在低维空间中学习到的嵌入，将未见过的示例（查询集）分类为标记数据（支持集）。然而，在现实场景中，这些变化通常是未知的且多种多样，因此很难提前估计。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一个新颖但更困难的挑战，RSQS，重点关注现实支持-查询转移少样本学习。 RSQS 的关键特征是元任务中的各个样本在每个元任务中都会经历多次分布变化。此外，我们提出了一种统一的对抗性特征对齐方法，称为 DUal adversarial ALignment 框架（DuaL），从域间偏差和域内方差两个方面缓解 RSQS。一方面，对于域间偏差，我们提前破坏原始数据，并使用合成的扰动输入通过最小化特征级别的距离来训练修复器网络。另一方面，对于域内方差，我们提出了一个生成器网络，以自监督的方式合成支持集中的硬样本，即不太相似的样本，并引入正则化最优运输来导出平滑的最优运输计划。最后，RSQS 基准是使用三个数据集（CIFAR100、mini-ImageNet 和 Tiered-Imagenet）中的几个最先进的基线构建的。实验结果表明，DuaL 在我们的基准测试中显着优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DuaL的统一对抗特征对齐方法，以解决现实场景中支持集与查询集之间分布偏移的少样本学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中支持集与查询集的分布偏移通常未知且多样，现有方法难以应对这种复杂偏移带来的挑战。
AI.method: DuaL框架通过两个方面缓解问题：1）利用合成扰动数据训练修复网络以减少域间偏差；2）通过生成器合成困难样本并结合正则化最优运输理论降低域内方差。
AI.result: 在CIFAR100、mini-ImageNet和Tiered-ImageNet三个数据集上的实验表明，DuaL显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DuaL通过对抗对齐有效解决了现实支持-查询偏移问题，为少样本学习提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Anita Vrins,Ethel Pruss,Caterina Ceccato,Jos Prinsen,Maryam Alimardani
title: Investigating the Impact of a Dual Musical Brain-Computer Interface on Interpersonal Synchrony: A Pilot Study
title_zh: 调查双重音乐脑机接口对人际同步性的影响：一项试点研究
abstract: This study looked into how effective a Musical Brain-Computer Interface (MBCI) can be in providing feedback about synchrony between two people. Using a double EEG setup, we compared two types of musical feedback; one that adapted in real-time based on the inter-brain synchrony between participants (Neuroadaptive condition), and another music that was randomly generated (Random condition). We evaluated how these two conditions were perceived by 8 dyads (n = 16) and whether the generated music could influence the perceived connection and EEG synchrony between them. The findings indicated that Neuroadaptive musical feedback could potentially boost synchrony levels between people compared to Random feedback, as seen by a significant increase in EEG phase-locking values. Additionally, the real-time measurement of synchrony was successfully validated and musical neurofeedback was generally well-received by the participants. However, more research is needed for conclusive results due to the small sample size. This study is a stepping stone towards creating music that can audibly reflect the level of synchrony between individuals.
summary: This study looked into how effective a Musical Brain-Computer Interface (MBCI) can be in providing feedback about synchrony between two people. Using a double EEG setup, we compared two types of musical feedback; one that adapted in real-time based on the inter-brain synchrony between participants (Neuroadaptive condition), and another music that was randomly generated (Random condition). We evaluated how these two conditions were perceived by 8 dyads (n = 16) and whether the generated music could influence the perceived connection and EEG synchrony between them. The findings indicated that Neuroadaptive musical feedback could potentially boost synchrony levels between people compared to Random feedback, as seen by a significant increase in EEG phase-locking values. Additionally, the real-time measurement of synchrony was successfully validated and musical neurofeedback was generally well-received by the participants. However, more research is needed for conclusive results due to the small sample size. This study is a stepping stone towards creating music that can audibly reflect the level of synchrony between individuals.
abstract_zh: 这项研究探讨了音乐脑机接口 (MBCI) 在提供有关两个人之间同步性的反馈方面的有效性。使用双脑电图设置，我们比较了两种类型的音乐反馈；一种是根据参与者之间的大脑间同步进行实时适应（神经适应条件），另一种是随机生成的音乐（随机条件）。我们评估了 8 个二人组 (n = 16) 如何感知这两种情况，以及生成的音乐是否会影响他们之间的感知联系和脑电图同步性。研究结果表明，与随机反馈相比，神经适应性音乐反馈可能会提高人与人之间的同步水平，从脑电图锁相值的显着增加可以看出。此外，同步性的实时测量得到了成功验证，音乐神经反馈普遍受到参与者的好评。然而，由于样本量较小，需要更多的研究才能得出结论性的结果。这项研究是创造可以在听觉上反映个体之间同步水平的音乐的垫脚石。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了一种双人音乐脑机接口（MBCI）在促进人际同步性方面的效果。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在探索音乐反馈是否能有效提升两人之间的同步性，并验证实时同步性测量的可行性。
AI.method: 研究使用双EEG系统，比较了两种音乐反馈条件：基于脑间同步性的实时适应性音乐（Neuroadaptive）和随机生成的音乐（Random），并评估了8对参与者（共16人）对这两种条件的感知。
AI.result: 研究发现，Neuroadaptive音乐反馈相较于Random反馈能够显著提升EEG相位锁定值，表明人际同步性有所增强，且音乐神经反馈受到参与者的普遍好评。
AI.conclusion: 该研究初步验证了音乐神经反馈在提升人际同步性方面的潜力，但由于样本量较小，仍需进一步研究以得出更明确的结论。

conclusion: 该研究初步验证了音乐神经反馈在提升人际同步性方面的潜力，但由于样本量较小，仍需进一步研究以得出更明确的结论。
search_text: Investigating the Impact of a Dual Musical Brain-Computer Interface on Interpersonal Synchrony: A Pilot Study 调查双重音乐脑机接口对人际同步性的影响：一项试点研究 This study looked into how effective a Musical Brain-Computer Interface (MBCI) can be in providing feedback about synchrony between two people. Using a double EEG setup, we compared two types of musical feedback; one that adapted in real-time based on the inter-brain synchrony between participants (Neuroadaptive condition), and another music that was randomly generated (Random condition). We evaluated how these two conditions were perceived by 8 dyads (n = 16) and whether the generated music could influence the perceived connection and EEG synchrony between them. The findings indicated that Neuroadaptive musical feedback could potentially boost synchrony levels between people compared to Random feedback, as seen by a significant increase in EEG phase-locking values. Additionally, the real-time measurement of synchrony was successfully validated and musical neurofeedback was generally well-received by the participants. However, more research is needed for conclusive results due to the small sample size. This study is a stepping stone towards creating music that can audibly reflect the level of synchrony between individuals. 这项研究探讨了音乐脑机接口 (MBCI) 在提供有关两个人之间同步性的反馈方面的有效性。使用双脑电图设置，我们比较了两种类型的音乐反馈；一种是根据参与者之间的大脑间同步进行实时适应（神经适应条件），另一种是随机生成的音乐（随机条件）。我们评估了 8 个二人组 (n = 16) 如何感知这两种情况，以及生成的音乐是否会影响他们之间的感知联系和脑电图同步性。研究结果表明，与随机反馈相比，神经适应性音乐反馈可能会提高人与人之间的同步水平，从脑电图锁相值的显着增加可以看出。此外，同步性的实时测量得到了成功验证，音乐神经反馈普遍受到参与者的好评。然而，由于样本量较小，需要更多的研究才能得出结论性的结果。这项研究是创造可以在听觉上反映个体之间同步水平的音乐的垫脚石。 本研究探讨了一种双人音乐脑机接口（MBCI）在促进人际同步性方面的效果。 Anita Vrins,Ethel Pruss,Caterina Ceccato,Jos Prinsen,Maryam Alimardani cs.HC

authors_text: Chen Liu,Minh-Ngoc Tran,Chao Wang,Richard Gerlach,Robert Kohn
title: Global Neural Networks and The Data Scaling Effect in Financial Time Series Forecasting
title_zh: 全球神经网络和金融时间序列预测中的数据缩放效应
abstract: Neural networks have revolutionized many empirical fields, yet their application to financial time series forecasting remains controversial. In this study, we demonstrate that the conventional practice of estimating models locally in data-scarce environments may underlie the mixed empirical performance observed in prior work. By focusing on volatility forecasting, we employ a dataset comprising over 10,000 global stocks and implement a global estimation strategy that pools information across cross-sections. Our econometric analysis reveals that forecasting accuracy improves markedly as the training dataset becomes larger and more heterogeneous. Notably, even with as little as 12 months of data, globally trained networks deliver robust predictions for individual stocks and portfolios that are not even in the training dataset. Furthermore, our interpretation of the model dynamics shows that these networks not only capture key stylized facts of volatility but also exhibit resilience to outliers and rapid adaptation to market regime changes. These findings underscore the importance of leveraging extensive and diverse datasets in financial forecasting and advocate for a shift from traditional local training approaches to integrated global estimation methods.
summary: Neural networks have revolutionized many empirical fields, yet their application to financial time series forecasting remains controversial. In this study, we demonstrate that the conventional practice of estimating models locally in data-scarce environments may underlie the mixed empirical performance observed in prior work. By focusing on volatility forecasting, we employ a dataset comprising over 10,000 global stocks and implement a global estimation strategy that pools information across cross-sections. Our econometric analysis reveals that forecasting accuracy improves markedly as the training dataset becomes larger and more heterogeneous. Notably, even with as little as 12 months of data, globally trained networks deliver robust predictions for individual stocks and portfolios that are not even in the training dataset. Furthermore, our interpretation of the model dynamics shows that these networks not only capture key stylized facts of volatility but also exhibit resilience to outliers and rapid adaptation to market regime changes. These findings underscore the importance of leveraging extensive and diverse datasets in financial forecasting and advocate for a shift from traditional local training approaches to integrated global estimation methods.
abstract_zh: 神经网络已经彻底改变了许多经验领域，但它们在金融时间序列预测中的应用仍然存在争议。在这项研究中，我们证明了在数据稀缺环境中本地估计模型的传统做法可能是先前工作中观察到的混合经验性能的基础。通过专注于波动性预测，我们采用了包含 10,000 多种全球股票的数据集，并实施了汇集各个横截面信息的全球估计策略。我们的计量经济学分析表明，随着训练数据集变得更大、更异构，预测准确性显着提高。值得注意的是，即使只有 12 个月的数据，经过全球训练的网络也能为训练数据集中不存在的个股和投资组合提供可靠的预测。此外，我们对模型动态的解释表明，这些网络不仅捕获了波动性的关键程式化事实，而且还表现出对异常值的弹性和对市场机制变化的快速适应。这些发现强调了在金融预测中利用广泛且多样化的数据集的重要性，并提倡从传统的本地培训方法转向综合的全球估计方法。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在全球神经网络和数据规模效应下，金融时间序列预测的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在数据稀缺环境下进行局部建模，导致金融时间序列预测效果不佳，因此需要探索更有效的全球建模方法。
AI.method: 作者使用包含超过10,000只全球股票的数据集，采用跨截面信息整合的全局估计策略进行波动率预测，并通过计量经济学分析验证模型性能。
AI.result: 训练数据集规模和异质性增加后，预测准确性显著提升。即使仅使用12个月的数据，全局训练的网络也能为未在训练数据中的个股和投资组合提供稳健预测。
AI.conclusion: 本文强调了在金融预测中利用大规模和多样化数据集的重要性，并提倡从传统的局部训练方法转向集成的全球估计方法。

authors_text: Anand Sharma,A. G. Ramakrishnan
title: Histograms of Points, Orientations, and Dynamics of Orientations Features for Hindi Online Handwritten Character Recognition
title_zh: 用于印地语在线手写字符识别的点、方向和方向特征动态的直方图
abstract: A set of features independent of character stroke direction and order variations is proposed for online handwritten character recognition. A method is developed that maps features like co-ordinates of points, orientations of strokes at points, and dynamics of orientations of strokes at points spatially as a function of co-ordinate values of the points and computes histograms of these features from different regions in the spatial map. Different features like spatio-temporal, discrete Fourier transform, discrete cosine transform, discrete wavelet transform, spatial, and histograms of oriented gradients used in other studies for training classifiers for character recognition are considered. The classifier chosen for classification performance comparison, when trained with different features, is support vector machines (SVM). The character datasets used for training and testing the classifiers consist of online handwritten samples of 96 different Hindi characters. There are 12832 and 2821 samples in training and testing datasets, respectively. SVM classifiers trained with the proposed features has the highest classification accuracy of 92.9\% when compared to the performances of SVM classifiers trained with the other features and tested on the same testing dataset. Therefore, the proposed features have better character discriminative capability than the other features considered for comparison.
summary: A set of features independent of character stroke direction and order variations is proposed for online handwritten character recognition. A method is developed that maps features like co-ordinates of points, orientations of strokes at points, and dynamics of orientations of strokes at points spatially as a function of co-ordinate values of the points and computes histograms of these features from different regions in the spatial map. Different features like spatio-temporal, discrete Fourier transform, discrete cosine transform, discrete wavelet transform, spatial, and histograms of oriented gradients used in other studies for training classifiers for character recognition are considered. The classifier chosen for classification performance comparison, when trained with different features, is support vector machines (SVM). The character datasets used for training and testing the classifiers consist of online handwritten samples of 96 different Hindi characters. There are 12832 and 2821 samples in training and testing datasets, respectively. SVM classifiers trained with the proposed features has the highest classification accuracy of 92.9\% when compared to the performances of SVM classifiers trained with the other features and tested on the same testing dataset. Therefore, the proposed features have better character discriminative capability than the other features considered for comparison.
abstract_zh: 提出了一组独立于字符笔划方向和顺序变化的特征用于在线手写字符识别。开发了一种方法，将点的坐标、点处的笔划方向和点处笔划方向的动态等特征映射为空间点坐标值的函数，并计算来自空间地图中不同区域的这些特征的直方图。考虑了其他研究中用于训练字符识别分类器的不同特征，如时空、离散傅立叶变换、离散余弦变换、离散小波变换、空间和定向梯度直方图。当使用不同的特征进行训练时，选择用于分类性能比较的分类器是支持向量机（SVM）。用于训练和测试分类器的字符数据集由 96 个不同印地语字符的在线手写样本组成。训练和测试数据集中有 12832 个样本和 2821 个样本。与使用其他特征训练并在同一测试数据集上测试的 SVM 分类器的性能相比，使用所提出的特征训练的 SVM 分类器具有最高的分类精度，为 92.9%。因此，所提出的特征比考虑进行比较的其他特征具有更好的字符辨别能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于在线手写 Hindi 字符识别的特征提取方法，通过点坐标、笔画方向及其动态变化的空间映射和直方图计算来提高识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有特征对笔画方向和顺序变化敏感，难以有效区分不同手写字符，需设计更具判别性的特征以提升识别性能。
AI.method: 将点坐标、笔画方向及方向动态变化映射到空间坐标函数中，划分区域计算直方图特征，并与时空特征、傅里叶变换等传统方法对比，采用支持向量机（SVM）进行分类验证。
AI.result: 在包含96个Hindi字符的数据集上，基于提出特征的SVM分类器测试准确率达92.9%，优于其他对比特征方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提特征能有效捕捉手写字符的空间与动态信息，具有更强的判别能力，适用于在线手写字符识别任务。

authors_text: Yongkang Zhao,Chuang Zhu,Yuan Li,Shuaishuai Wang,Zihan Lan,Yuanyuan Qiao
title: An Adaptive Spatial-Temporal Local Feature Difference Method for Infrared Small-moving Target Detection
title_zh: 红外小运动目标检测的自适应时空局部特征差分法
abstract: Detecting small moving targets accurately in infrared (IR) image sequences is a significant challenge. To address this problem, we propose a novel method called spatial-temporal local feature difference (STLFD) with adaptive background suppression (ABS). Our approach utilizes filters in the spatial and temporal domains and performs pixel-level ABS on the output to enhance the contrast between the target and the background. The proposed method comprises three steps. First, we obtain three temporal frame images based on the current frame image and extract two feature maps using the designed spatial domain and temporal domain filters. Next, we fuse the information of the spatial domain and temporal domain to produce the spatial-temporal feature maps and suppress noise using our pixel-level ABS module. Finally, we obtain the segmented binary map by applying a threshold. Our experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods for infrared small-moving target detection.
summary: Detecting small moving targets accurately in infrared (IR) image sequences is a significant challenge. To address this problem, we propose a novel method called spatial-temporal local feature difference (STLFD) with adaptive background suppression (ABS). Our approach utilizes filters in the spatial and temporal domains and performs pixel-level ABS on the output to enhance the contrast between the target and the background. The proposed method comprises three steps. First, we obtain three temporal frame images based on the current frame image and extract two feature maps using the designed spatial domain and temporal domain filters. Next, we fuse the information of the spatial domain and temporal domain to produce the spatial-temporal feature maps and suppress noise using our pixel-level ABS module. Finally, we obtain the segmented binary map by applying a threshold. Our experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods for infrared small-moving target detection.
abstract_zh: 在红外 (IR) 图像序列中准确检测小型移动目标是一项重大挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为时空局部特征差异（STLFD）和自适应背景抑制（ABS）的新方法。我们的方法利用空间和时间域中的滤波器，并对输出执行像素级 ABS，以增强目标和背景之间的对比度。所提出的方法包括三个步骤。首先，我们基于当前帧图像获得三个时间帧图像，并使用设计的空间域和时间域滤波器提取两个特征图。接下来，我们融合空间域和时间域的信息来生成时空特征图，并使用像素级 ABS 模块抑制噪声。最后，我们通过应用阈值获得分段的二值图。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于现有的最先进的红外小移动目标检测方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应时空局部特征差分方法（STLFD），用于提高红外小目标检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 红外图像序列中精确检测小运动目标存在背景干扰大、目标特征弱等挑战，现有方法难以有效区分目标与背景。
AI.method: 方法包含三步骤：1）通过时空域滤波器提取当前帧的时序图像和特征图；2）融合时空特征并利用像素级自适应背景抑制模块（ABS）降噪；3）阈值分割生成二值目标图。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在红外小目标检测任务中优于现有最先进算法，检测精度和鲁棒性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: STLFD方法通过时空特征融合与自适应背景抑制，有效增强了目标与背景的对比度，为红外小目标检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ashmi Banerjee,Paromita Banik,Wolfgang Wörndl
title: Towards Individual and Multistakeholder Fairness in Tourism Recommender Systems
title_zh: 实现旅游推荐系统中个人和多利益相关者的公平
comment: Position Paper for FAcctRec 2023 at RecSys 2023
comments: Position Paper for FAcctRec 2023 at RecSys 2023
abstract: This position paper summarizes our published review on individual and multistakeholder fairness in Tourism Recommender Systems (TRS). Recently, there has been growing attention to fairness considerations in recommender systems (RS). It has been acknowledged in research that fairness in RS is often closely tied to the presence of multiple stakeholders, such as end users, item providers, and platforms, as it raises concerns for the fair treatment of all parties involved. Hence, fairness in RS is a multi-faceted concept that requires consideration of the perspectives and needs of the different stakeholders to ensure fair outcomes for them. However, there may often be instances where achieving the goals of one stakeholder could conflict with those of another, resulting in trade-offs. In this paper, we emphasized addressing the unique challenges of ensuring fairness in RS within the tourism domain. We aimed to discuss potential strategies for mitigating the aforementioned challenges and examine the applicability of solutions from other domains to tackle fairness issues in tourism. By exploring cross-domain approaches and strategies for incorporating S-Fairness, we can uncover valuable insights and determine how these solutions can be adapted and implemented effectively in the context of tourism to enhance fairness in RS.
summary: This position paper summarizes our published review on individual and multistakeholder fairness in Tourism Recommender Systems (TRS). Recently, there has been growing attention to fairness considerations in recommender systems (RS). It has been acknowledged in research that fairness in RS is often closely tied to the presence of multiple stakeholders, such as end users, item providers, and platforms, as it raises concerns for the fair treatment of all parties involved. Hence, fairness in RS is a multi-faceted concept that requires consideration of the perspectives and needs of the different stakeholders to ensure fair outcomes for them. However, there may often be instances where achieving the goals of one stakeholder could conflict with those of another, resulting in trade-offs. In this paper, we emphasized addressing the unique challenges of ensuring fairness in RS within the tourism domain. We aimed to discuss potential strategies for mitigating the aforementioned challenges and examine the applicability of solutions from other domains to tackle fairness issues in tourism. By exploring cross-domain approaches and strategies for incorporating S-Fairness, we can uncover valuable insights and determine how these solutions can be adapted and implemented effectively in the context of tourism to enhance fairness in RS.
abstract_zh: 本立场文件总结了我们已发表的关于旅游推荐系统 (TRS) 中个人和多利益相关者公平性的评论。最近，人们越来越关注推荐系统（RS）中的公平性考虑。研究已经承认，RS 的公平性往往与多个利益相关者的存在密切相关，例如最终用户、物品提供商和平台，因为它引起了对所有相关方公平对待的担忧。因此，RS中的公平是一个多方面的概念，需要考虑不同利益相关者的观点和需求，以确保他们获得公平的结果。然而，在某些情况下，一个利益相关者的目标的实现可能与另一利益相关者的目标发生冲突，从而导致权衡。在本文中，我们强调解决确保旅游领域 RS 公平性的独特挑战。我们的目的是讨论缓解上述挑战的潜在策略，并研究其他领域解决方案的适用性，以解决旅游业的公平问题。通过探索整合 S-Fairness 的跨领域方法和策略，我们可以发现有价值的见解，并确定如何在旅游业的背景下有效地调整和实施这些解决方案，以增强 RS 的公平性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探讨旅游推荐系统中个体与多方利益相关者的公平性问题，提出解决冲突的策略并分析跨领域方法的适用性。
AI.motivation: 随着推荐系统公平性研究的兴起，旅游领域需平衡用户、服务提供者及平台等多方利益，但现有解决方案常存在目标冲突。
AI.method: 通过文献综述总结现有研究，分析多利益相关者公平性挑战，探讨其他领域解决方案的迁移应用及S-Fairness策略的整合方法。
AI.result: 识别出旅游推荐系统中的公平性矛盾，提出跨领域策略适应性框架，并为实现多方利益平衡提供可行方向。
AI.conclusion: 旅游推荐系统的公平性需综合考虑多方需求，未来研究应加强跨领域方法的本地化适配与多目标优化技术的探索。

search_text: Towards Individual and Multistakeholder Fairness in Tourism Recommender Systems 实现旅游推荐系统中个人和多利益相关者的公平 This position paper summarizes our published review on individual and multistakeholder fairness in Tourism Recommender Systems (TRS). Recently, there has been growing attention to fairness considerations in recommender systems (RS). It has been acknowledged in research that fairness in RS is often closely tied to the presence of multiple stakeholders, such as end users, item providers, and platforms, as it raises concerns for the fair treatment of all parties involved. Hence, fairness in RS is a multi-faceted concept that requires consideration of the perspectives and needs of the different stakeholders to ensure fair outcomes for them. However, there may often be instances where achieving the goals of one stakeholder could conflict with those of another, resulting in trade-offs. In this paper, we emphasized addressing the unique challenges of ensuring fairness in RS within the tourism domain. We aimed to discuss potential strategies for mitigating the aforementioned challenges and examine the applicability of solutions from other domains to tackle fairness issues in tourism. authors_text: Xin Zhou,Jinghua Hou,Tingting Yao,Dingkang Liang,Zhe Liu,Zhikang Zou,Xiaoqing Ye,Jianwei Cheng,Xiang Bai
title: Diffusion-based 3D Object Detection with Random Boxes
title_zh: 使用随机框进行基于扩散的 3D 对象检测
abstract: 3D object detection is an essential task for achieving autonomous driving. Existing anchor-based detection methods rely on empirical heuristics setting of anchors, which makes the algorithms lack elegance. In recent years, we have witnessed the rise of several generative models, among which diffusion models show great potential for learning the transformation of two distributions. Our proposed Diff3Det migrates the diffusion model to proposal generation for 3D object detection by considering the detection boxes as generative targets. During training, the object boxes diffuse from the ground truth boxes to the Gaussian distribution, and the decoder learns to reverse this noise process. In the inference stage, the model progressively refines a set of random boxes to the prediction results. We provide detailed experiments on the KITTI benchmark and achieve promising performance compared to classical anchor-based 3D detection methods.
summary: 3D object detection is an essential task for achieving autonomous driving. Existing anchor-based detection methods rely on empirical heuristics setting of anchors, which makes the algorithms lack elegance. In recent years, we have witnessed the rise of several generative models, among which diffusion models show great potential for learning the transformation of two distributions. Our proposed Diff3Det migrates the diffusion model to proposal generation for 3D object detection by considering the detection boxes as generative targets. During training, the object boxes diffuse from the ground truth boxes to the Gaussian distribution, and the decoder learns to reverse this noise process. In the inference stage, the model progressively refines a set of random boxes to the prediction results. We provide detailed experiments on the KITTI benchmark and achieve promising performance compared to classical anchor-based 3D detection methods.
abstract_zh: 3D物体检测是实现自动驾驶的一项重要任务。现有的基于锚点的检测方法依赖于锚点的经验启发式设置，这使得算法缺乏优雅性。近年来，我们见证了多种生成模型的兴起，其中扩散模型在学习两种分布的转换方面表现出巨大的潜力。我们提出的 Diff3Det 通过将检测框视为生成目标，将扩散模型迁移到建议生成以进行 3D 对象检测。在训练过程中，目标框从地面实况框扩散到高斯分布，并且解码器学习反转此噪声过程。在推理阶段，模型逐步将一组随机框细化为预测结果。我们在 KITTI 基准上提供了详细的实验，与经典的基于锚点的 3D 检测方法相比，取得了有希望的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的3D目标检测方法Diff3Det，通过生成随机框并逐步优化实现检测。
AI.motivation: 传统锚点式3D检测方法依赖经验设定锚点，缺乏灵活性和优雅性，而扩散模型在分布转换学习中展现潜力。
AI.method: 将扩散模型迁移至3D检测，训练时从真实框扩散至高斯分布，解码器学习逆向噪声过程；推理时逐步优化随机框得到预测结果。
AI.result: 在KITTI基准测试中，Diff3Det相较经典锚点式方法取得有竞争力的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型为3D目标检测提供了新思路，通过生成式框架有效避免了锚点设计的局限性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的3D目标检测方法Diff3Det，通过生成随机框并逐步优化实现检测。
ai_content.motivation: 传统锚点式3D检测方法依赖经验设定锚点，缺乏灵活性和优雅性，而扩散模型在分布转换学习中展现潜力。
ai_content.method: 将扩散模型迁移至3D检测，训练时从真实框扩散至高斯分布，解码器学习逆向噪声过程；推理时逐步优化随机框得到预测结果。

ai_content.conclusion: 扩散模型为3D目标检测提供了新思路，通过生成式框架有效避免了锚点设计的局限性。

search_text: Diffusion-based 3D Object Detection with Random Boxes 使用随机框进行基于扩散的 3D 对象检测 3D object detection is an essential task for achieving autonomous driving. Existing anchor-based detection methods rely on empirical heuristics setting of anchors, which makes the algorithms lack elegance. In recent years, we have witnessed the rise of several generative models, among which diffusion models show great potential for learning the transformation of two distributions. Our proposed Diff3Det migrates the diffusion model to proposal generation for 3D object detection by considering the detection boxes as generative targets. During training, the object boxes diffuse from the ground truth boxes to the Gaussian distribution, and the decoder learns to reverse this noise process. In the inference stage, the model progressively refines a set of random boxes to the prediction results. We provide detailed experiments on the KITTI benchmark and achieve promising performance compared to classical anchor-based 3D detection methods. 3D物体检测是实现自动驾驶的一项重要任务。现有的基于锚点的检测方法依赖于锚点的经验启发式设置，这使得算法缺乏优雅性。近年来，我们见证了多种生成模型的兴起，其中扩散模型在学习两种分布的转换方面表现出巨大的潜力。我们提出的 Diff3Det 通过将检测框视为生成目标，将扩散模型迁移到建议生成以进行 3D 对象检测。在训练过程中，目标框从地面实况框扩散到高斯分布，并且解码器学习反转此噪声过程。在推理阶段，模型逐步将一组随机框细化为预测结果。我们在 KITTI 基准上提供了详细的实验，与经典的基于锚点的 3D 检测方法相比，取得了有希望的性能。 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的3D目标检测方法Diff3Det，通过生成随机框并逐步优化实现检测。 Xin Zhou,Jinghua Hou,Tingting Yao,Dingkang Liang,Zhe Liu,Zhikang Zou,Xiaoqing Ye,Jianwei Cheng,Xiang Bai cs.CV

authors_text: Yajing Wang,Zongwei Luo
title: Enhance Multi-domain Sentiment Analysis of Review Texts through Prompting Strategies
title_zh: 通过提示策略增强评论文本的多领域情感分析
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have made significant strides in both scientific research and practical applications. Existing studies have demonstrated the state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance of LLMs in various natural language processing tasks. However, the question of how to further enhance LLMs' performance in specific task using prompting strategies remains a pivotal concern. This paper explores the enhancement of LLMs' performance in sentiment analysis through the application of prompting strategies. We formulate the process of prompting for sentiment analysis tasks and introduce two novel strategies tailored for sentiment analysis: RolePlaying (RP) prompting and Chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting. Specifically, we also propose the RP-CoT prompting strategy which is a combination of RP prompting and CoT prompting. We conduct comparative experiments on three distinct domain datasets to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed sentiment analysis strategies. The results demonstrate that the adoption of the proposed prompting strategies leads to a increasing enhancement in sentiment analysis accuracy. Further, the CoT prompting strategy exhibits a notable impact on implicit sentiment analysis, with the RP-CoT prompting strategy delivering the most superior performance among all strategies.
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have made significant strides in both scientific research and practical applications. Existing studies have demonstrated the state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance of LLMs in various natural language processing tasks. However, the question of how to further enhance LLMs' performance in specific task using prompting strategies remains a pivotal concern. This paper explores the enhancement of LLMs' performance in sentiment analysis through the application of prompting strategies. We formulate the process of prompting for sentiment analysis tasks and introduce two novel strategies tailored for sentiment analysis: RolePlaying (RP) prompting and Chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting. Specifically, we also propose the RP-CoT prompting strategy which is a combination of RP prompting and CoT prompting. We conduct comparative experiments on three distinct domain datasets to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed sentiment analysis strategies. The results demonstrate that the adoption of the proposed prompting strategies leads to a increasing enhancement in sentiment analysis accuracy. Further, the CoT prompting strategy exhibits a notable impact on implicit sentiment analysis, with the RP-CoT prompting strategy delivering the most superior performance among all strategies.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在科学研究和实际应用方面都取得了重大进展。现有的研究已经证明了法学硕士在各种自然语言处理任务中的最先进（SOTA）表现。然而，如何利用激励策略进一步提高法学硕士在特定任务中的表现仍然是一个关键问题。本文探讨了通过应用提示策略来提高法学硕士在情感分析方面的表现。我们制定了情感分析任务的提示过程，并引入了两种专为情感分析量身定制的新颖策略：角色扮演（RP）提示和思想链（CoT）提示。具体来说，我们还提出了RP-CoT激励策略，它是RP激励和CoT激励的结合。我们对三个不同领域的数据集进行比较实验，以评估所提出的情感分析策略的有效性。结果表明，采用所提出的提示策略可以提高情绪分析的准确性。此外，CoT 提示策略对隐性情绪分析具有显着影响，其中 RP-CoT 提示策略在所有策略中提供了最优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 通过提示策略增强多领域评论文本的情感分析性能
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在自然语言处理任务中表现优异，但如何通过提示策略进一步提升其在特定任务（如情感分析）中的性能仍是关键问题
AI.method: 提出角色扮演（RP）提示、思维链（CoT）提示及组合策略RP-CoT，设计针对情感分析的提示框架并在三个领域数据集进行对比实验
AI.result: 实验表明所提策略显著提升情感分析准确率，其中RP-CoT在隐含情感分析中表现最优
AI.conclusion: 提示策略能有效增强LLM的情感分析能力，特别是RP-CoT策略在多领域场景下具有最佳效果

authors_text: Yufei Wang,Yuxin Mao,Qi Liu,Yuchao Dai
title: Decomposed Guided Dynamic Filters for Efficient RGB-Guided Depth Completion
title_zh: 用于高效 RGB 引导深度补全的分解引导动态滤波器
abstract: RGB-guided depth completion aims at predicting dense depth maps from sparse depth measurements and corresponding RGB images, where how to effectively and efficiently exploit the multi-modal information is a key issue. Guided dynamic filters, which generate spatially-variant depth-wise separable convolutional filters from RGB features to guide depth features, have been proven to be effective in this task. However, the dynamically generated filters require massive model parameters, computational costs and memory footprints when the number of feature channels is large. In this paper, we propose to decompose the guided dynamic filters into a spatially-shared component multiplied by content-adaptive adaptors at each spatial location. Based on the proposed idea, we introduce two decomposition schemes A and B, which decompose the filters by splitting the filter structure and using spatial-wise attention, respectively. The decomposed filters not only maintain the favorable properties of guided dynamic filters as being content-dependent and spatially-variant, but also reduce model parameters and hardware costs, as the learned adaptors are decoupled with the number of feature channels. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that the methods using our schemes outperform state-of-the-art methods on the KITTI dataset, and rank 1st and 2nd on the KITTI benchmark at the time of submission. Meanwhile, they also achieve comparable performance on the NYUv2 dataset. In addition, our proposed methods are general and could be employed as plug-and-play feature fusion blocks in other multi-modal fusion tasks such as RGB-D salient object detection.
summary: RGB-guided depth completion aims at predicting dense depth maps from sparse depth measurements and corresponding RGB images, where how to effectively and efficiently exploit the multi-modal information is a key issue. Guided dynamic filters, which generate spatially-variant depth-wise separable convolutional filters from RGB features to guide depth features, have been proven to be effective in this task. However, the dynamically generated filters require massive model parameters, computational costs and memory footprints when the number of feature channels is large. In this paper, we propose to decompose the guided dynamic filters into a spatially-shared component multiplied by content-adaptive adaptors at each spatial location. Based on the proposed idea, we introduce two decomposition schemes A and B, which decompose the filters by splitting the filter structure and using spatial-wise attention, respectively. The decomposed filters not only maintain the favorable properties of guided dynamic filters as being content-dependent and spatially-variant, but also reduce model parameters and hardware costs, as the learned adaptors are decoupled with the number of feature channels. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that the methods using our schemes outperform state-of-the-art methods on the KITTI dataset, and rank 1st and 2nd on the KITTI benchmark at the time of submission. Meanwhile, they also achieve comparable performance on the NYUv2 dataset. In addition, our proposed methods are general and could be employed as plug-and-play feature fusion blocks in other multi-modal fusion tasks such as RGB-D salient object detection.
abstract_zh: RGB引导的深度补全旨在从稀疏深度测量和相应的RGB图像预测密集深度图，其中如何有效且高效地利用多模态信息是一个关键问题。引导动态滤波器可以从 RGB 特征生成空间变化的深度可分离卷积滤波器来引导深度特征，已被证明在此任务中是有效的。然而，当特征通道数量很大时，动态生成的滤波器需要大量的模型参数、计算成本和内存占用。在本文中，我们建议将引导动态滤波器分解为空间共享组件，乘以每个空间位置的内容自适应适配器。基于所提出的想法，我们引入了两种分解方案 A 和 B，分别通过分割滤波器结构和使用空间注意力来分解滤波器。分解的滤波器不仅保持了引导动态滤波器的内容相关和空间变化的有利特性，而且还减少了模型参数和硬件成本，因为学习的适配器与特征通道的数量解耦。大量的实验结果表明，使用我们的方案的方法优于 KITTI 数据集上最先进的方法，并且在提交时在 KITTI 基准上排名第一和第二。同时，他们在 NYUv2 数据集上也取得了可比的性能。此外，我们提出的方法是通用的，可以用作其他多模态融合任务（例如 RGB-D 显着对象检测）中的即插即用特征融合块。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的RGB引导深度补全方法，通过分解引导动态滤波器降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有引导动态滤波器在深度补全任务中参数量大、计算成本高，难以处理高通道特征。
AI.method: 将动态滤波器分解为空间共享组件与内容自适应适配器，提出两种分解方案A/B分别通过结构拆分和空间注意力实现。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上超越现有方法并取得前两名，在NYUv2上表现相当，且方法可泛化到其他多模态任务。
AI.conclusion: 分解方案有效平衡了内容依赖性与计算效率，为多模态特征融合提供通用模块。

authors_text: Guanghui Li,Mingqi Gao,Heng Liu,Xiantong Zhen,Feng Zheng
title: Learning Cross-Modal Affinity for Referring Video Object Segmentation Targeting Limited Samples
title_zh: 学习跨模态亲和力以参考针对有限样本的视频对象分割
abstract: Referring video object segmentation (RVOS), as a supervised learning task, relies on sufficient annotated data for a given scene. However, in more realistic scenarios, only minimal annotations are available for a new scene, which poses significant challenges to existing RVOS methods. With this in mind, we propose a simple yet effective model with a newly designed cross-modal affinity (CMA) module based on a Transformer architecture. The CMA module builds multimodal affinity with a few samples, thus quickly learning new semantic information, and enabling the model to adapt to different scenarios. Since the proposed method targets limited samples for new scenes, we generalize the problem as - few-shot referring video object segmentation (FS-RVOS). To foster research in this direction, we build up a new FS-RVOS benchmark based on currently available datasets. The benchmark covers a wide range and includes multiple situations, which can maximally simulate real-world scenarios. Extensive experiments show that our model adapts well to different scenarios with only a few samples, reaching state-of-the-art performance on the benchmark. On Mini-Ref-YouTube-VOS, our model achieves an average performance of 53.1 J and 54.8 F, which are 10% better than the baselines. Furthermore, we show impressive results of 77.7 J and 74.8 F on Mini-Ref-SAIL-VOS, which are significantly better than the baselines. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/hengliusky/Few_shot_RVOS.
summary: Referring video object segmentation (RVOS), as a supervised learning task, relies on sufficient annotated data for a given scene. However, in more realistic scenarios, only minimal annotations are available for a new scene, which poses significant challenges to existing RVOS methods. With this in mind, we propose a simple yet effective model with a newly designed cross-modal affinity (CMA) module based on a Transformer architecture. The CMA module builds multimodal affinity with a few samples, thus quickly learning new semantic information, and enabling the model to adapt to different scenarios. Since the proposed method targets limited samples for new scenes, we generalize the problem as - few-shot referring video object segmentation (FS-RVOS). To foster research in this direction, we build up a new FS-RVOS benchmark based on currently available datasets. The benchmark covers a wide range and includes multiple situations, which can maximally simulate real-world scenarios. Extensive experiments show that our model adapts well to different scenarios with only a few samples, reaching state-of-the-art performance on the benchmark. On Mini-Ref-YouTube-VOS, our model achieves an average performance of 53.1 J and 54.8 F, which are 10% better than the baselines. Furthermore, we show impressive results of 77.7 J and 74.8 F on Mini-Ref-SAIL-VOS, which are significantly better than the baselines. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/hengliusky/Few_shot_RVOS.
abstract_zh: 参考视频对象分割（RVOS）作为一种监督学习任务，依赖于给定场景的足够的注释数据。然而，在更现实的场景中，新场景只能使用最少的注释，这对现有的 RVOS 方法提出了重大挑战。考虑到这一点，我们提出了一个简单而有效的模型，具有基于 Transformer 架构的新设计的跨模式亲和力 (CMA) 模块。 CMA模块通过少量样本构建多模态亲和力，从而快速学习新的语义信息，并使模型能够适应不同的场景。由于所提出的方法针对新场景的样本有限，因此我们将问题概括为少镜头参考视频对象分割（FS-RVOS）。为了促进这个方向的研究，我们根据当前可用的数据集建立了一个新的 FS-RVOS 基准。该基准测试覆盖范围广，包含多种情况，可以最大限度地模拟真实场景。大量的实验表明，我们的模型只需少量样本就能很好地适应不同的场景，在基准测试中达到了最先进的性能。在 Mini-Ref-YouTube-VOS 上，我们的模型实现了 53.1 J 和 54.8 F 的平均性能，比基线好 10%。此外，我们在 Mini-Ref-SAIL-VOS 上展示了 77.7 J 和 74.8 F 的令人印象深刻的结果，这明显优于基线。代码可在 https://github.com/hengliusky/Few_shot_RVOS 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对有限样本的跨模态亲和力学习模型，用于解决指称视频对象分割（RVOS）任务。
AI.motivation: 现有RVOS方法依赖大量标注数据，但在实际场景中新场景的标注样本通常非常有限，导致方法难以适应。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer架构的跨模态亲和力（CMA）模块，通过少量样本构建多模态亲和关系，快速学习新语义信息，并构建FS-RVOS基准测试集。
AI.result: 在Mini-Ref-YouTube-VOS上达到53.1 J和54.8 F指标（优于基线10%），在Mini-Ref-SAIL-VOS上达到77.7 J和74.8 F（显著优于基线）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在有限样本下表现出色，实现了FS-RVOS任务的最先进性能，为小样本视频分割研究提供了新方向。

However, in more realistic scenarios, only minimal annotations are available for a new scene, which poses significant challenges to existing RVOS methods. With this in mind, we propose a simple yet effective model with a newly designed cross-modal affinity (CMA) module based on a Transformer architecture. The CMA module builds multimodal affinity with a few samples, thus quickly learning new semantic information, and enabling the model to adapt to different scenarios. Since the proposed method targets limited samples for new scenes, we generalize the problem as - few-shot referring video object segmentation (FS-RVOS). To foster research in this direction, we build up a new FS-RVOS benchmark based on currently available datasets. The benchmark covers a wide range and includes multiple situations, which can maximally simulate real-world scenarios. Extensive experiments show that our model adapts well to different scenarios with only a few samples, reaching state-of-the-art performance on the benchmark. On Mini-Ref-YouTube-VOS, our model achieves an average performance of 53.1 J and 54.8 F, which are 10% better than the baselines. Furthermore, we show impressive results of 77.7 J and 74.8 F on Mini-Ref-SAIL-VOS, which are significantly better than the baselines. authors_text: Marin Vlastelica,Tatiana López-Guevara,Kelsey Allen,Peter Battaglia,Arnaud Doucet,Kimberley Stachenfeld
title: Diffusion Generative Inverse Design
title_zh: 扩散生成逆设计
comment: ICML workshop on Structured Probabilistic Inference & Generative Modeling
comments: ICML workshop on Structured Probabilistic Inference & Generative Modeling
abstract: Inverse design refers to the problem of optimizing the input of an objective function in order to enact a target outcome. For many real-world engineering problems, the objective function takes the form of a simulator that predicts how the system state will evolve over time, and the design challenge is to optimize the initial conditions that lead to a target outcome. Recent developments in learned simulation have shown that graph neural networks (GNNs) can be used for accurate, efficient, differentiable estimation of simulator dynamics, and support high-quality design optimization with gradient- or sampling-based optimization procedures. However, optimizing designs from scratch requires many expensive model queries, and these procedures exhibit basic failures on either non-convex or high-dimensional problems. In this work, we show how denoising diffusion models (DDMs) can be used to solve inverse design problems efficiently and propose a particle sampling algorithm for further improving their efficiency. We perform experiments on a number of fluid dynamics design challenges, and find that our approach substantially reduces the number of calls to the simulator compared to standard techniques.
summary: Inverse design refers to the problem of optimizing the input of an objective function in order to enact a target outcome. For many real-world engineering problems, the objective function takes the form of a simulator that predicts how the system state will evolve over time, and the design challenge is to optimize the initial conditions that lead to a target outcome. Recent developments in learned simulation have shown that graph neural networks (GNNs) can be used for accurate, efficient, differentiable estimation of simulator dynamics, and support high-quality design optimization with gradient- or sampling-based optimization procedures. However, optimizing designs from scratch requires many expensive model queries, and these procedures exhibit basic failures on either non-convex or high-dimensional problems. In this work, we show how denoising diffusion models (DDMs) can be used to solve inverse design problems efficiently and propose a particle sampling algorithm for further improving their efficiency. We perform experiments on a number of fluid dynamics design challenges, and find that our approach substantially reduces the number of calls to the simulator compared to standard techniques.
abstract_zh: 逆向设计是指优化目标函数的输入以实现目标结果的问题。对于许多现实世界的工程问题，目标函数采用模拟器的形式，预测系统状态将如何随时间演变，而设计挑战是优化导致目标结果的初始条件。学习模拟的最新发展表明，图神经网络 (GNN) 可用于准确、高效、可微分地估计模拟器动力学，并通过基于梯度或采样的优化程序支持高质量的设计优化。然而，从头开始优化设计需要许多昂贵的模型查询，并且这些过程在非凸或高维问题上表现出基本失败。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何使用去噪扩散模型（DDM）来有效地解决逆向设计问题，并提出了一种粒子采样算法以进一步提高其效率。我们针对许多流体动力学设计挑战进行了实验，发现与标准技术相比，我们的方法大大减少了对模拟器的调用次数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用去噪扩散模型（DDMs）结合粒子采样算法，高效解决工程领域的逆向设计问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于梯度或采样的优化方法在处理非凸或高维问题时效率低下，且需大量模拟器调用。
AI.method: 设计基于扩散生成模型的逆向设计框架，并引入粒子采样算法提升计算效率。
AI.result: 在流体动力学设计任务中，相比标准方法显著减少模拟器调用次数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂工程逆向设计提供了更高效可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Lorenzo Papa,Paolo Russo,Irene Amerini,Luping Zhou
title: A survey on efficient vision transformers: algorithms, techniques, and performance benchmarking
title_zh: 关于高效视觉转换器的调查：算法、技术和性能基准测试
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence. 2024 Apr 24
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence. 2024 Apr 24
abstract: Vision Transformer (ViT) architectures are becoming increasingly popular and widely employed to tackle computer vision applications. Their main feature is the capacity to extract global information through the self-attention mechanism, outperforming earlier convolutional neural networks. However, ViT deployment and performance have grown steadily with their size, number of trainable parameters, and operations. Furthermore, self-attention's computational and memory cost quadratically increases with the image resolution. Generally speaking, it is challenging to employ these architectures in real-world applications due to many hardware and environmental restrictions, such as processing and computational capabilities. Therefore, this survey investigates the most efficient methodologies to ensure sub-optimal estimation performances. More in detail, four efficient categories will be analyzed: compact architecture, pruning, knowledge distillation, and quantization strategies. Moreover, a new metric called Efficient Error Rate has been introduced in order to normalize and compare models' features that affect hardware devices at inference time, such as the number of parameters, bits, FLOPs, and model size. Summarizing, this paper firstly mathematically defines the strategies used to make Vision Transformer efficient, describes and discusses state-of-the-art methodologies, and analyzes their performances over different application scenarios. Toward the end of this paper, we also discuss open challenges and promising research directions.
summary: Vision Transformer (ViT) architectures are becoming increasingly popular and widely employed to tackle computer vision applications. Their main feature is the capacity to extract global information through the self-attention mechanism, outperforming earlier convolutional neural networks. However, ViT deployment and performance have grown steadily with their size, number of trainable parameters, and operations. Furthermore, self-attention's computational and memory cost quadratically increases with the image resolution. Generally speaking, it is challenging to employ these architectures in real-world applications due to many hardware and environmental restrictions, such as processing and computational capabilities. Therefore, this survey investigates the most efficient methodologies to ensure sub-optimal estimation performances. More in detail, four efficient categories will be analyzed: compact architecture, pruning, knowledge distillation, and quantization strategies. Moreover, a new metric called Efficient Error Rate has been introduced in order to normalize and compare models' features that affect hardware devices at inference time, such as the number of parameters, bits, FLOPs, and model size. Summarizing, this paper firstly mathematically defines the strategies used to make Vision Transformer efficient, describes and discusses state-of-the-art methodologies, and analyzes their performances over different application scenarios. Toward the end of this paper, we also discuss open challenges and promising research directions.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformer (ViT) 架构变得越来越流行并广泛用于处理计算机视觉应用。它们的主要特点是能够通过自注意力机制提取全局信息，优于早期的卷积神经网络。然而，ViT 的部署和性能随着其规模、可训练参数的数量和操作的数量而稳步增长。此外，自注意力的计算和内存成本随着图像分辨率的增加呈二次方增加。一般来说，由于许多硬件和环境限制（例如处理和计算能力），在实际应用中采用这些架构具有挑战性。因此，本次调查研究了最有效的方法来确保次优的估计性能。更详细地说，将分析四个有效类别：紧凑架构、剪枝、知识蒸馏和量化策略。此外，还引入了一种名为“有效错误率”的新指标，以便标准化和比较在推理时影响硬件设备的模型特征，例如参数数量、位数、FLOP 和模型大小。总而言之，本文首先从数学上定义了用于提高 Vision Transformer 效率的策略，描述和讨论了最先进的方法，并分析了它们在不同应用场景下的性能。在本文的最后，我们还讨论了开放的挑战和有前途的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了高效视觉Transformer（ViT）的算法、技术及性能基准测试，分析了四种高效方法（紧凑架构、剪枝、知识蒸馏、量化策略），并提出新的效率误差率指标。
AI.motivation: ViT虽具全局信息提取优势，但参数量、计算量及内存消耗随分辨率呈二次增长，难以满足实际应用的硬件限制，需探索高效优化方法。
AI.method: 系统分类分析四种高效ViT方法，提出结合参数量、位宽、FLOPs和模型大小的归一化指标——效率误差率（Efficient Error Rate），用于评估模型在硬件上的表现。
AI.result: 总结现有高效ViT方法的数学定义与性能表现，通过实验对比不同场景下的效果，揭示各方法的优劣及适用性。

search_text: A survey on efficient vision transformers: algorithms, techniques, and performance benchmarking 关于高效视觉转换器的调查：算法、技术和性能基准测试 Vision Transformer (ViT) architectures are becoming increasingly popular and widely employed to tackle computer vision applications. Their main feature is the capacity to extract global information through the self-attention mechanism, outperforming earlier convolutional neural networks. However, ViT deployment and performance have grown steadily with their size, number of trainable parameters, and operations. Furthermore, self-attention's computational and memory cost quadratically increases with the image resolution. Generally speaking, it is challenging to employ these architectures in real-world applications due to many hardware and environmental restrictions, such as processing and computational capabilities. Therefore, this survey investigates the most efficient methodologies to ensure sub-optimal estimation performances. More in detail, four efficient categories will be analyzed: compact architecture, pruning, knowledge distillation, and quantization strategies. Moreover, a new metric called Efficient Error Rate has been introduced in order to normalize and compare models' features that affect hardware devices at inference time, such as the number of parameters, bits, FLOPs, and model size. Summarizing, this paper firstly mathematically defines the strategies used to make Vision Transformer efficient, describes and discusses state-of-the-art methodologies, and analyzes their performances over different application scenarios. Toward the end of this paper, we also discuss open challenges and promising research directions. Vision Transformer (ViT) 架构变得越来越流行并广泛用于处理计算机视觉应用。它们的主要特点是能够通过自注意力机制提取全局信息，优于早期的卷积神经网络。然而，ViT 的部署和性能随着其规模、可训练参数的数量和操作的数量而稳步增长。此外，自注意力的计算和内存成本随着图像分辨率的增加呈二次方增加。一般来说，由于许多硬件和环境限制（例如处理和计算能力），在实际应用中采用这些架构具有挑战性。因此，本次调查研究了最有效的方法来确保次优的估计性能。更详细地说，将分析四个有效类别：紧凑架构、剪枝、知识蒸馏和量化策略。此外，还引入了一种名为“有效错误率”的新指标，以便标准化和比较在推理时影响硬件设备的模型特征，例如参数数量、位数、FLOP 和模型大小。总而言之，本文首先从数学上定义了用于提高 Vision Transformer 效率的策略，描述和讨论了最先进的方法，并分析了它们在不同应用场景下的性能。在本文的最后，我们还讨论了开放的挑战和有前途的研究方向。 本文综述了高效视觉Transformer（ViT）的算法、技术及性能基准测试，分析了四种高效方法（紧凑架构、剪枝、知识蒸馏、量化策略），并提出新的效率误差率指标。 Lorenzo Papa,Paolo Russo,Irene Amerini,Luping Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Negin Yazdani Motlagh,Matin Khajavi,Abbas Sharifi,Mohsen Ahmadi
title: The Impact of Artificial Intelligence on the Evolution of Digital Education: A Comparative Study of OpenAI Text Generation Tools including ChatGPT, Bing Chat, Bard, and Ernie
title_zh: 人工智能对数字教育演变的影响：ChatGPT、Bing Chat、Bard 和 Ernie 等 OpenAI 文本生成工具的比较研究
abstract: In the digital era, the integration of artificial intelligence (AI) in education has ushered in transformative changes, redefining teaching methodologies, curriculum planning, and student engagement. This review paper delves deep into the rapidly evolving landscape of digital education by contrasting the capabilities and impact of OpenAI's pioneering text generation tools like Bing Chat, Bard, Ernie with a keen focus on the novel ChatGPT. Grounded in a typology that views education through the lenses of system, process, and result, the paper navigates the multifaceted applications of AI. From decentralizing global education and personalizing curriculums to digitally documenting competence-based outcomes, AI stands at the forefront of educational modernization. Highlighting ChatGPT's meteoric rise to one million users in just five days, the study underscores its role in democratizing education, fostering autodidacticism, and magnifying student engagement. However, with such transformative power comes the potential for misuse, as text-generation tools can inadvertently challenge academic integrity. By juxtaposing the promise and pitfalls of AI in education, this paper advocates for a harmonized synergy between AI tools and the educational community, emphasizing the urgent need for ethical guidelines, pedagogical adaptations, and strategic collaborations.

However, with such transformative power comes the potential for misuse, as text-generation tools can inadvertently challenge academic integrity. By juxtaposing the promise and pitfalls of AI in education, this paper advocates for a harmonized synergy between AI tools and the educational community, emphasizing the urgent need for ethical guidelines, pedagogical adaptations, and strategic collaborations.
abstract_zh: 在数字时代，人工智能（AI）与教育的融合迎来了革命性的变化，重新定义了教学方法、课程规划和学生参与。这篇综述论文通过对比 OpenAI 的开创性文本生成工具（如 Bing Chat、Bard、Ernie）的功能和影响，并重点关注新颖的 ChatGPT，深入探讨了快速发展的数字教育格局。本文基于从系统、过程和结果的角度看待教育的类型学，探讨了人工智能的多方面应用。从去中心化的全球教育和个性化课程到以数字方式记录基于能力的成果，人工​​智能站在教育现代化的前沿。该研究强调了 ChatGPT 在短短五天内迅速增长到 100 万用户，强调了其在教育民主化、培养自学精神和提高学生参与度方面的作用。然而，这种变革性的力量也带来了滥用的可能性，因为文本生成工具可能会无意中挑战学术诚信。通过对比人工智能在教育领域的前景和缺陷，本文主张人工智能工具与教育界之间的协调协同，强调道德准则、教学法调整和战略合作的迫切需要。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了OpenAI等公司的文本生成工具（如ChatGPT、Bing Chat、Bard、Ernie）对数字教育的影响，探讨其变革潜力与挑战。
AI.motivation: 人工智能正在重塑教育系统、教学过程和学习成果，需分析其带来的机遇（如个性化学习）与风险（如学术诚信问题）。
AI.method: 基于系统、过程、结果的教育学类型学框架，对比分析不同AI工具的功能及对教育各环节的影响。
AI.result: AI工具推动教育民主化与个性化，提升学生参与度，但可能引发学术不端行为，需平衡技术应用与伦理规范。
AI.conclusion: 应建立AI与教育界的协同机制，制定伦理准则与教学策略，以实现技术赋能与教育质量的双重提升。

authors_text: Christian Lienen,Mathis Brede,Daniel Karger,Kevin Koch,Dalisha Logan,Janet Mazur,Alexander Philipp Nowosad,Alexander Schnelle,Mohness Waizy,Marco Platzner
title: AutonomROS: A ReconROS-based Autonomous Driving Unit
title_zh: AutonomROS：基于 ReconROS 的自动驾驶单元
abstract: Autonomous driving has become an important research area in recent years, and the corresponding system creates an enormous demand for computations. Heterogeneous computing platforms such as systems-on-chip that combine CPUs with reprogrammable hardware offer both computational performance and flexibility and are thus interesting targets for autonomous driving architectures. The de-facto software architecture standard in robotics, including autonomous driving systems, is ROS 2. ReconROS is a framework for creating robotics applications that extends ROS 2 with the possibility of mapping compute-intense functions to hardware. This paper presents AutonomROS, an autonomous driving unit based on the ReconROS framework. AutonomROS serves as a blueprint for a larger robotics application developed with ReconROS and demonstrates its suitability and extendability. The application integrates the ROS 2 package Navigation 2 with custom-developed software and hardware-accelerated functions for point cloud generation, obstacle detection, and lane detection. In addition, we detail a new communication middleware for shared memory communication between software and hardware functions. We evaluate AutonomROS and show the advantage of hardware acceleration and the new communication middleware for improving turnaround times, achievable frame rates, and, most importantly, reducing CPU load.
summary: Autonomous driving has become an important research area in recent years, and the corresponding system creates an enormous demand for computations. Heterogeneous computing platforms such as systems-on-chip that combine CPUs with reprogrammable hardware offer both computational performance and flexibility and are thus interesting targets for autonomous driving architectures. The de-facto software architecture standard in robotics, including autonomous driving systems, is ROS 2. ReconROS is a framework for creating robotics applications that extends ROS 2 with the possibility of mapping compute-intense functions to hardware. This paper presents AutonomROS, an autonomous driving unit based on the ReconROS framework. AutonomROS serves as a blueprint for a larger robotics application developed with ReconROS and demonstrates its suitability and extendability. The application integrates the ROS 2 package Navigation 2 with custom-developed software and hardware-accelerated functions for point cloud generation, obstacle detection, and lane detection. In addition, we detail a new communication middleware for shared memory communication between software and hardware functions. We evaluate AutonomROS and show the advantage of hardware acceleration and the new communication middleware for improving turnaround times, achievable frame rates, and, most importantly, reducing CPU load.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶已成为近年来的重要研究领域，相应的系统产生了巨大的计算需求。异构计算平台（例如将 CPU 与可重新编程硬件相结合的片上系统）可提供计算性能和灵活性，因此是自动驾驶架构的有趣目标。机器人（包括自动驾驶系统）事实上的软件架构标准是 ROS 2。ReconROS 是一个用于创建机器人应用程序的框架，它扩展了 ROS 2，能够将计算密集型功能映射到硬件。本文提出了 AutonomROS，一个基于 ReconROS 框架的自动驾驶单元。 AutonomROS 是使用 ReconROS 开发的大型机器人应用程序的蓝图，并展示了其适用性和可扩展性。该应用程序将 ROS 2 软件包 Navigation 2 与定制开发的软件和硬件加速功能集成在一起，用于点云生成、障碍物检测和车道检测。此外，我们还详细介绍了一种新的通信中间件，用于软件和硬件功能之间的共享内存通信。我们评估了 AutonomROS，并展示了硬件加速和新通信中间件在改善周转时间、可实现的帧速率以及最重要的是减少 CPU 负载方面的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于ReconROS框架的AutonomROS自动驾驶单元，通过整合硬件加速与软件组件优化系统性能。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统面临高计算需求，传统ROS 2架构难以高效利用异构计算平台，需通过硬件加速和定制化通信方案提升效率。
AI.method: 基于ReconROS扩展ROS 2，集成导航2包与自定义硬件加速模块（点云生成、障碍物检测等），设计共享内存通信中间件。
AI.result: 实验表明硬件加速与通信中间件显著提升帧率、缩短处理时间，并有效降低CPU负载。
AI.conclusion: AutonomROS验证了ReconROS在自动驾驶场景的可行性与扩展性，为异构计算平台的机器人应用提供参考方案。

tldr: 本文提出基于ReconROS框架的AutonomROS自动驾驶单元，通过整合硬件加速与软件组件优化系统性能。
motivation: 自动驾驶系统面临高计算需求，传统ROS 2架构难以高效利用异构计算平台，需通过硬件加速和定制化通信方案提升效率。
method: 基于ReconROS扩展ROS 2，集成导航2包与自定义硬件加速模块（点云生成、障碍物检测等），设计共享内存通信中间件。
result: 实验表明硬件加速与通信中间件显著提升帧率、缩短处理时间，并有效降低CPU负载。
conclusion: AutonomROS验证了ReconROS在自动驾驶场景的可行性与扩展性，为异构计算平台的机器人应用提供参考方案。
search_text: AutonomROS: A ReconROS-based Autonomous Driving Unit AutonomROS：基于 ReconROS 的自动驾驶单元 Autonomous driving has become an important research area in recent years, and the corresponding system creates an enormous demand for computations. Heterogeneous computing platforms such as systems-on-chip that combine CPUs with reprogrammable hardware offer both computational performance and flexibility and are thus interesting targets for autonomous driving architectures. The de-facto software architecture standard in robotics, including autonomous driving systems, is ROS 2. ReconROS is a framework for creating robotics applications that extends ROS 2 with the possibility of mapping compute-intense functions to hardware. This paper presents AutonomROS, an autonomous driving unit based on the ReconROS framework. AutonomROS serves as a blueprint for a larger robotics application developed with ReconROS and demonstrates its suitability and extendability. The application integrates the ROS 2 package Navigation 2 with custom-developed software and hardware-accelerated functions for point cloud generation, obstacle detection, and lane detection. In addition, we detail a new communication middleware for shared memory communication between software and hardware functions. We evaluate AutonomROS and show the advantage of hardware acceleration and the new communication middleware for improving turnaround times, achievable frame rates, and, most importantly, reducing CPU load. 自动驾驶已成为近年来的重要研究领域，相应的系统产生了巨大的计算需求。异构计算平台（例如将 CPU 与可重新编程硬件相结合的片上系统）可提供计算性能和灵活性，因此是自动驾驶架构的有趣目标。机器人（包括自动驾驶系统）事实上的软件架构标准是 ROS 2。ReconROS 是一个用于创建机器人应用程序的框架，它扩展了 ROS 2，能够将计算密集型功能映射到硬件。本文提出了 AutonomROS，一个基于 ReconROS 框架的自动驾驶单元。 AutonomROS 是使用 ReconROS 开发的大型机器人应用程序的蓝图，并展示了其适用性和可扩展性。该应用程序将 ROS 2 软件包 Navigation 2 与定制开发的软件和硬件加速功能集成在一起，用于点云生成、障碍物检测和车道检测。此外，我们还详细介绍了一种新的通信中间件，用于软件和硬件功能之间的共享内存通信。我们评估了 AutonomROS，并展示了硬件加速和新通信中间件在改善周转时间、可实现的帧速率以及最重要的是减少 CPU 负载方面的优势。 本文提出基于ReconROS框架的AutonomROS自动驾驶单元，通过整合硬件加速与软件组件优化系统性能。 Christian Lienen,Mathis Brede,Daniel Karger,Kevin Koch,Dalisha Logan,Janet Mazur,Alexander Philipp Nowosad,Alexander Schnelle,Mohness Waizy,Marco Platzner cs.RO
